和平就是我们最大的愿望，除此之外别无所求。
Peace is our greatest wish — beyond that, we desire nothing else.
哈哈，好。既然各位心无挂碍，那景元就在此拜辞了。各位安心登程，后续相关事务交由我联盟便是。
Haha, well that's good. Now that everyone's minds are at ease, I shall take my leave. You may now depart with peace of mind — the Alliance will deal with all subsequent procedures.
既然这样，看来我们在匹诺康尼也没什么后顾之忧了…我们是时候踏上新的旅程了。
If that's the case, it appears that we have nothing else to worry about on Penacony... Looks like it's time for us to embark on a new voyage.
那你们两个先回列车吧。我去接小三月，顺便办理退房——还有，黑天鹅小姐也找我有事，对吧？
You two head back to the Express first. I'll pick up March and deal with the check-out procedure. Oh also, Miss Black Swan, you have a matter to discuss with me, yes?
Nothing escapes your attention, Miss Navigator.
原来你刚才一直都跟在我们身边啊…无妨，总之，我和{NICKNAME}就在列车上等你和小三月了。
You've been with us this whole time, huh. In any case, {NICKNAME} and I will be waiting for you and March on the Express.
我们走吧，{NICKNAME}。匹诺康尼之旅…到这里就算圆满结束了。
Let's go, {NICKNAME}. Our time on Penacony... has come to a fruitful end.
首先，列车长要好好感谢大家。如果不是你们挖掘出了匹诺康尼的真相，我可能再也没法得知米哈伊尔他们的下落了……
Firstly, Pom-Pom wishes to thank everyone. If it weren't for you all unearthing the truth about Penacony, Pom-Pom would have never known where Mikhail and the rest had gone...
虽然他们的经历有些遗憾，但我想他们应该也了却了各自的心愿…这都多亏了你们。非常感谢各位帕。
What they had to go through was regrettable, but I reckon they all fulfilled their wishes... And it was thanks to all of you — thank you, everyone.
然后，就是本次航线会议的重点了——我们需要决定列车的下一站帕！由列车长来为各位介绍一下目前的选项。
Now then, we come to the crux of this navigation meeting: We must decide on the Express' next stop! Let me introduce our current options.
第一个选择来自姬子，是<color=#dbc291ff>海洋星球露莎卡星</color>。那是一颗完全由液态水构成的行星，有许多水生种族在那里定居。当然，那也是老无名客米哈伊尔的故乡帕。

The first choice is from Himeko: <color=#dbc291ff>The oceanic planet of Lushaka</color> — a planet composed entirely of water. Many aquatic races reside there. Of course, it's also the home planet of the venerable Nameless, Mikhail.
第二个选择是瓦尔特提供的<color=#dbc291ff>「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因</color>。据说那里是星核之灾的原爆点之一，也是「纯美」伊德莉拉的飞升之地，现在是一颗永存不灭之美的美丽星球帕。

The second choice is the <color=#dbc291ff>"Agate World" Melustanin</color>, suggested by Welt. It's famed as one of the initial sites of the Stellaron Disaster and the place where "the Beauty" Idrila ascended. Today, it's celebrated as a planet of undying allure.
第三个选择是<color=#dbc291ff>江户星</color>。那颗行星藏身在一片广阔的离子暴潮区中，正在遭受反物质军团的侵略。但近期那里的求救信号突然中断了，公司希望我们能去确认状况帕。

The third choice is <color=#dbc291ff>Edo Star</color>, a planet nestled within a vast ion storm region, currently under assault by the Antimatter Legion. However, the distress signals from there have recently ceased, prompting the IPC's wish for us to check in on the situation.
最后一个是黑天鹅提供的<color=#dbc291ff>「琉璃光带」帕特雷维尼齐亚</color>。那是一条因为绝灭大君「焚风」完全玻璃化的巨大行星带…现如今似乎是悲悼伶人的剧团知名分部之一帕。

The last choice, courtesy of Black Swan, is <color=#dbc291ff>the "Glass Belt" Patrevia</color>, a massive belt of asteroids that was turned to glass by the Lord Ravager Zephyro... These days it's apparently known to house one of the branches of the Mourning Actors troupe.
喔…有好多选择啊，感觉要挑花眼了。
Ooh... So many options. I'm seeing stars already.
接下来，大家各自挑选自己想要拜访的目的地吧。然后，我们进行投票表决。
Next up, everyone will select the destination that they wish to visit. And then, we'll put it to a vote.
小米沙和老米哈伊尔的故乡…在经历了匹诺康尼的种种后，我想身为未来的无名客，无论如何都得去他的家乡看看。
Little Misha and Old Mikhail's homeland... Having been through so much in Penacony, as an aspiring Nameless, I believe a visit to his home world is a must.
嗯…我也赞同。不过那颗星球在星核之灾后已经彻底变样了吧？听说那里的陆地已经不复存在，主要住民也全都洗了牌……
Count me in. Still, I imagine that planet must have changed entirely after the Stellaron Disaster. I've heard that its landmasses no longer exist, and the native population has completely changed...
嗯…姬子小姐说的我是不反对啦，但江户星听起来遭遇了危险。身为无名客，我们更应该向他们伸出援手吧？
Hmm... I'm not against Miss Himeko's choice, but Edo Star sounds like it's in danger. As Nameless, should we not extend a helping hand?
三月七说得没错。虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
March is right. Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.
露莎卡星三票，江户星两票……
Three votes for Lushaka, two for Edo...
看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是海洋星球露莎卡星了帕！
Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: Lushaka, the ocean planet!
这次的匹诺康尼之旅让我看到了星核之灾的另一面…就表征而言，梦境的状况和「玛瑙世界」非常相似，前往那里或许有助于我们加深对星核的认识。

This trip to Penacony has allowed me to see another side of the Stellaron Disaster... In terms of symbolism, the state of the Dreamscape bears a striking resemblance to the Agate World. Visiting it might deepen our understanding of the Stellaron.
嗯…有道理。既然这样，我也投给「玛瑙世界」。
Mm... that makes sense. If that's the case, I vote for the Agate World too.
唔…我觉得江户星的状况可能更紧急一点。身为无名客，我们更应该向他们伸出援手吧？
Hmm... I personally think the situation on Edo Star might be more urgent. As Nameless, should we not extend a helping hand?
三月七说得没错。虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
March is right. Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.
Three votes for the Agate World, two for Edo Star...
看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因了帕！
Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: The Agate World, Melustanin!
虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.
嗯，我也同意！身为无名客，我们更应该向他们伸出援手吧？
Yes, I agree! As Nameless, should we not extend a helping hand?
{NICKNAME}和丹恒的判断不错，我也投江户星一票。
{NICKNAME} and Dan Heng make good points. I'll throw in a vote for Edo Star too.
既然大家都这么说，那我们就去探探虚实好了。我也投江户星。
If that's the general sentiment, then we should indeed investigate. I vote for Edo Star too.
看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是江户星了帕！
Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: Edo Star!
黑天鹅和某位悲悼伶人约定了在那里见面。听说他们最近正在筹备特别演出…我倒是不介意前去欣赏一番。
Black Swan has arranged to meet a Mourning Actor there. I've heard they're preparing a special performance... I wouldn't mind going to enjoy the show.
虽然那种演出不太吸引我…但依你们吧。
That type of performance isn't really my cup of tea, but... I'll let you all decide.
唔…剧团演出什么的我是很感兴趣啦，但江户星听起来遭遇了危险。身为无名客，我们更应该向他们伸出援手吧？
Hmm... I'm really interested to check out this troupe's performance, but it really sounds like the Edo Star is in a lot of trouble. As Nameless, should we not extend a helping hand?
三月七说得没错。虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
March is right. Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.
Three votes for the Glass Belt, two for Edo Star...
看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是「琉璃光带」帕特雷维尼齐亚了帕！
Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: The Glass Belt, Patrevia!
I can't make up my mind...
既然这样…我们要不还是先去江户星吧？那里听起来遭遇了危险，身为无名客，我们应该向他们伸出援手。
If that's the case... How about we go to Edo Star first? If that planet really is in danger, then we should go help them out.
三月七说得没错。虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
March is right. Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.
你们的判断不错，我也投江户星一票。
You and Dan Heng make good points. I'll throw in a vote for Edo Star too.
既然大家都这么说，那我们就去探探虚实好了。我也投江户星。
If that's the general sentiment, then we should indeed investigate. I vote for Edo Star too.
Four votes for Edo Star, one vote abstained...
看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是江户星了帕！
Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: Edo Star!
那么，航线会议到此结束。我去校准航线跃迁参数，各位乘客可以先休息一下。
Then this navigation meeting is adjourned. I'll go check the warp jump coordinates. Everyone can catch up on some rest in the meantime.
等可以跃迁的时候，本列车长会广播通知的帕！
When it's time to make the jump, Pom-Pom will make an announcement!
终于尘埃落定了，不是么？最后——做得不错，朋友。
Seems the dust has finally settled, no? Well done, friend.
这都多亏了匹诺康尼的大英雄{NICKNAME}，大家都被你的正直无私打动啦。
This is all due to your heroic deeds in Penacony. Everyone's been moved by your integrity and selflessness.
呵，真为匹诺康尼的逐梦客们感到开心——全宇宙最智慧和最愚钝的头脑现在全都为他们所用了。
I am truly happy for the Dreamchasers on Penacony — the cosmos's brightest and, let's admit, dimmer intellects are now at their service.
你们去吧，各位。我毕竟是个外人，就不给久别重逢添乱了。
You guys go. I'm an outsider after all — I'd rather not disrupt a long-awaited reunion.
约阿希姆•诺基安维塔宁
拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔
Jing Yuan and The Xianzhou Alliance
拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔
May This Journey Lead Us Starward
前星穹列车测绘师，一位充满活力与好奇心的少女学者。
An ex-surveyor aboard the Astral Express and a young scholar, brimming with enthusiasm and curiosity.
她来自受「记忆」启蒙、学阀独裁的卓瑞娜-乌尔德星系，专攻忆质动力学。
Hailing from the Zorina-Urd system — enlightened by Remembrance and dominated by academic cliques — she majored in memoria dynamics.
她为寻求更广阔的学术天地，随星穹列车投身建设阿斯德纳，展开有关忆质的研究。
To seek out broader academic possibilities, she joined the crew of the Astral Express to build Asdana and launched her research into memoria.
独立战争末期，她为探明原初梦境的秘密，独自驾驶穿梭机消失在忆域中。
Towards the end of the War of Independence, she piloted a shuttle on her own and disappeared into the Memory Zone in search of secrets about the Primordial Dreamscape.
她的研究成果是匹诺康尼得以发展至今的理论基础，对后世繁荣产生了深远影响。
Her research results formed the theoretical basis for the development of the entire Penacony to this day, creating a profound impact on the affluence of later generations.
她是「梦想之地」真正意义上的奠基人。
She was the true founder behind the Land of the Dreams.
前星穹列车护卫，一位武艺高超的枪手。
The former guard of the Astral Express and an outstanding gunslinger.
他来自边陲世界弗拉提，崇拜当地传说中的快枪手奥克莱，因为她的事迹登上列车。
Hailing from the frontier world of Frati, his worship of local legend Oakley the Musketeer saw him board the Astral Express.
他是匹诺康尼战时杰出将领之一，象征最高荣誉的猎牙勋章唯一持有人，由哈努努亲自授勋。
During the war, he was one of Penacony's most accomplished generals and the sole winner of the Fanghunter Medal — an award conferred by Hanunue himself.
内乱期间，他随灯蛾家系一同重新开辟银轨，途中遭虫群袭击失踪，后为巡海游侠所救。
While reopening the silver rail with the Lampmoth Family during the civil war, he was ambushed by the Swarm and disappeared only to be rescued by the Galaxy Rangers.
他参与讨伐绝灭大君「诛罗」，并成为那场惨烈战役的幸存者，从此销声匿迹。
He fought in the crusade against Lord Ravager Zulo and managed to survive that gruesome battle, then disappeared out of sight completely.
直到一名自灭者寻得其遗物。他是一名真正纯粹、高尚且无私的伟大战士。
That was until the day a Self-Annihilator found his relics. Truly, he was a pure, noble, and selfless warrior.
前星穹列车机修工，匹诺康尼传奇大亨「钟表匠」。
Former mechanic of the Astral Express, and the legendary big shot of Penacony, "the Watchmaker."
他来自海洋星球露莎卡，是传奇航海家米哈伊尔-夏尔夫妇的养子。
Hailing from the oceanic planet of Lushaka, he was adopted by legendary seafarers, the Mikhail-Char couple.
他因机缘巧合登上列车，在旅途中与众多旅伴结缘，并为匹诺康尼繁荣发展做出巨大贡献。
It was just by happenstance that he boarded the Express, making many travel companions along the way while contributing greatly to the prosperity and development of Penacony.
在机械维修之外，他经常自称没有太多本事，只是擅长编造故事。
Beyond mechanical repairs, he often humbly claimed to possess few skills, except for his knack for spinning tales.
「钟表匠」是他最伟大的谎言，而匹诺康尼的「盛会」是他最后的谎言。
"The Watchmaker" was his greatest lie of all, and Penacony's "Festivities" was his final lie.
其人不愿故星偏离自由的道路，意图巧借谎言让各异的命途在此延续长存。
He did not want his star to deviate from the path of freedom, so he intended to cleverly employ falsehoods and keep various Paths existing here for a long time.
但他未能亲眼见证匹诺康尼的结局。
But he was unable to witness Penacony's end.
他在无人的角落悄然离世，葬礼只有寥寥数人到场。
He died a quiet death in a forgotten corner somewhere, with only a handful in attendance at his funeral.
依照无名客的传统，他的乘员专票被归还星海。
In line with the Nameless' tradition, his Crew ticket was returned to the starry seas.
与此同时，匹诺康尼依旧光辉灿烂，稚子的梦将永远延续。
Meanwhile, Penacony remains resplendent in its glory, and the child's dream will continue in perpetuity.
Not going to come chat with me... {NICKNAME}?
姬子和杨叔应该还在忙…我们先去找丹恒吧。
Himeko and Mr. Yang are probably still busy... Let's go look for Dan Heng first.
看，他果然还在和那个牛仔聊天！
Look, he's still talking to that cowboy!
磋商地点就在酒店大堂。各位，随我来。
The negotiation will commence at the hotel lobby. Everyone, please follow me.
砂金先生和托帕小姐都来了啊…还有，那边那位是？
Mr. Aventurine and Miss Topaz are here too... And, who is that over there?
博识学会的拉帝奥教授，阵仗真不小啊。
The Intelligentsia Guild's Dr. Ratio. This assembly is quite something.
{NICKNAME}乘客，航线会议就要开始了，就等你啦！
{NICKNAME}, the navigation meeting is about to start. We're all waiting for you!
（列车什么时候变得这么热闹了…？）
(When did the Express become so lively...?)
（等待跃迁期间…干点什么好呢？）
(There's still some time before the jump... What should I do?)
{NICKNAME}, how about a chat? Over here.
现在不是做这个的时候……
Now is not a good time...
太好了。感激不尽，黑天鹅小姐。
Thank you so much, Black Swan.
这下我总算可以松一口气了。
Finally, I can breathe a sigh of relief.
The déjà vu is strong with this scene...
我知道你现在一头雾水，我们会尽力为你说明。但讲清一切的来龙去脉之前，你必须明白一件事……
I understand you must be confused, and we'll do our best to shed light on the situation. However, before that, it's essential to know that...
这里是梦境和现实的狭间，属于那些从<color=#dbc291ff>太一之梦</color>中清醒的人。
This place is the rift between dream and reality. A place reserved only for those who have awakened from <color=#dbc291ff>Ena's dream</color>.
还记得那位星期日的野心么？他计划利用星核、橡木家系十万余人的意志，和匹诺康尼众生的愿望，篡夺「同谐」权柄，令「秩序」重现世间。

Do you remember Sunday's ambitious plan? He intended to harness the power of the Stellaron, the collective will of over <unbreak>100,000</unbreak> Oak Family members, and the desires of everyone in Penacony to usurp the Harmony and restore the Order.
遗憾的是，真相不仅如此。早在进入阿斯德纳之初，我们就已经受到了星核的影响。回想起来，你我相遇的那片陌生梦境，或许就是思绪开始游离的预兆。

Unfortunately, it didn't stop there. From the early days of our journey into Asdana, we were already affected by the Stellaron. That strange Dreamscape where we met... Maybe it was a sign that your thoughts were beginning to drift away.
All of this is just a dream?
我这是在列车里睡着了？
Did I fall asleep on the Express?
I'm now back at the beginning of the story?
我想…「秩序」的目的并不是让所有人陷入沉睡。正相反，他们利用星核，是为了催化阿斯德纳的忆质渗入物质世界，让「梦境」与「现实」交融。

I don't think... the goal of the Order was to put everyone into a deep sleep. Quite the contrary — they used the Stellaron to catalyze the leakage of Asdana's memoria into the material world, allowing the Dreamscape to blend with reality.
恐怕其中也掺入了不少天外合唱班的「记忆」…在漫长的时间里，梦变得与现实无异，现实也开始出现幻觉。人们自以为清醒，精神却早已步入「秩序」的殿堂。

...And that included a lot of memoria from the Beyond the Sky Choir. As time came and went, the dreams eventually became indistinguishable from reality, and reality became an illusion. People think they are awake, but their spirits have long since stepped into the temple of Order.
这也正是「太一之梦」的可怕之处。在「秩序」支配的乐园里，每个人都能获得各自美满的梦境，幸福快乐地生活下去。
This is what makes Ena's Dream so powerful. In this paradise governed by the Order, everyone indulges in their delightful dreams and lives happily ever after.
我想，除了那唯一的一处破绽，你在美梦中经历的仍是真实发生过的。唯有如此，他才能让你抵达理想的终点：解救匹诺康尼的危机，踏上下一段「开拓」之旅。

I believe what you experienced in the sweet dream, except for that flaw, was real. Only in this way could you reach the destination, lifting the crisis in Penacony and embarking on your next trailblazing expedition.
若非黄泉小姐提前布局，我们或许就要永远沉沦在这场梦中了。
If it wasn't for Acheron's plan, we might have been trapped in this dream forever.
所幸「秩序」的命途执掌万物，却无法影响「虚无」本身。我也是在「梦主」不计一切代价将我驱逐时，对这一点有所察觉。
Fortunately, while the Path of the Order governs all things, it can't affect the Nihility. I came to realize this when the Dreammaster tried to expel me at any cost.
这也是此前你与她同行时，会产生异常感的缘由。
This is also why you felt a sense of peculiarity when traveling with her.
但我就没这么幸运了，即便身为忆者，也还是会受到「秩序」的影响，陷入幻觉。
Well, I'm not as fortunate as she is. Even if I'm a Memokeeper, I was still influenced by the power of the Order and fell into hallucinations.
不过，多亏了你的「记忆」，我们现在还有绝处逢生的机会。
However, thanks to your memories, now we still have a chance to turn the tide.
凡人即便拥有命途的伟力，也无法如神一样创造完美无缺的世界。
For mortals, even if they possess the great power of a Path, they can't create a flawless world like Gods do.
所以你的梦中才会出现<color=#dbc291ff>瑕疵</color>。换言之，只要能察觉到世界的异常，意识就有机会从梦中抽离。
That's why there was a <color=#dbc291ff>flaw</color> in your dream. In other words, once you have realized the world is not real, you'll have a chance to break free from the dream.
而你梦境中的瑕疵，正是那位不应出现在现实中的米沙。也是在翻开「记忆」的这一页时，我才确信了自己也身在幻觉之中。
The flaw in your dream lies within Misha, who could have never appeared in reality. When I turned the pages of your memories, I realized that I was in an illusion, too.
We still have a fighting chance.
没想到最后回到了米沙…
Didn't expect it all comes back to Misha...
如今，星期日借由谐乐大典篡夺了{RUBY_B#「同愿」的同谐化身}「齐响诗班」{RUBY_E#}的权能。阿斯德纳也因此坠入太一之梦，平等地将每一个人变作祂的{RUBY_B#傀儡}音符{RUBY_E#}。

Now Sunday has usurped the power of the {RUBY_B#Shared Wish's Harmonious Embodiment}Harmonious Choir{RUBY_E#} through the Charmony Festival. Asdana has thus fallen into Ena's Dream, transforming everyone equally into the {RUBY_B#puppets}notes{RUBY_E#} of the Aeon.
但失败不意味着你们的力量更弱小，相反，只有坚强的人才能站在美梦的对立面，打破「秩序」的约束。
Failure doesn't mean weakness. Only the strong can gather the will to resist the Order and try to break free.
现在，我们还有一线生机。而要将它付诸现实…黑天鹅小姐，带我们去见见那些同样坚强的人吧。
We still have a chance, though. To make it happen... please, Black Swan, guide us to those with a strong will.
见见知更鸟小姐吧。她是凭借自己的意志从太一之梦中醒来的人，也是这位坚强的小姐孜孜不倦地用歌声将我们引领至此。
Let me introduce you to Robin. She woke up from Ena's Dream by her own will, and it's this tough lady who led us here with her song.
我得以清醒的原因和各位一样。在梦中，我经历了一些无论如何也不会发生在现实中的事……
I woke up for the same reason as all of you. In the dream, I experienced something that could never occur in reality...
我们真的要把它关在笼子里吗？我希望它能自由地在天空飞翔。
Are we going to lock it up in a cage? I want to see it fly freely in the sky.
这只鸟儿还很弱小。要是离开我们的照料，恐怕没法独自存活。你想看着它死去吗？
Without us, this bird would be too fragile to survive on its own. Do you want it to die?
那我们就一起照看它，直到它能够回归天空的那一天吧。
Then let's take care of it together until it can return to the sky.
鸟儿是因为想要飞翔，才生出了翅膀。哪怕有一天会跌落在地，我们也不该将它囚禁在笼中。
Birds have wings because they're meant to fly. Even if they may crash on the ground one day, they shouldn't be trapped in a cage.
既然鸟儿生来就属于天空，我们应该让它回到那里去。对吧？
Birds belong to the sky, so we should help them return there, right?
…这幻觉太过甜美，让我清醒地意识到它不过是一场梦。
...The illusion was so impossibly blissful that I realized it was just a dream.
这也是我们最后的希望。太一之梦建立在「齐响诗班」——「同愿」的化身之上。只有当匹诺康尼众生的愿望合而为一，它才得以显现。
And this is our final hope. Ena's Dream is founded upon the Harmonious Choir, namely everyone's shared wishes. It will only materialize once the aspirations of all beings in Penacony merge as one.
现在，它因为人们「想要在梦中沉睡」的渴望而变得坚不可摧。如果要将其摧毁——
At present, it has become impervious due to people's desire to remain slumbering within the dream. And in order to destroy it...
我们就必须让匹诺康尼的所有人<color=#dbc291ff>「想要从梦中醒来」</color>。
We must make everyone in Penacony <color=#dbc291ff>want to wake up</color>.
Now comes the tricky part. How do we do it?
That doesn't sound simple at all...
要不还是回太一之梦吧。
Maybe we should just go back to Ena's Dream?
打退堂鼓了么？很可惜，人的意识总是趋向现实的。既然你已经察觉到了梦境的破绽，就没办法再回去了。
You want to go back? Unfortunately, human consciousness always gravitates toward reality. Now that you've seen the flaw in the dream, there is no turning back.
人对美好幻觉的向往近乎偏执，这种心理会令人下意识地抗拒…残酷的真相。
Humans' yearning for sweet illusions borders on obsession, leading them to subconsciously resist... the harsh reality.
我也是费心挑选了一个{NICKNAME}全无防备的时刻，引导{M#他}{F#她}亲自揭开真相，才得以让{M#他}{F#她}取回清醒。

Therefore, I carefully selected a moment where {NICKNAME} was completely unguarded, guiding {M#him}{F#her} to uncover the truth {M#himself}{F#herself} to make {M#him}{F#her} regain {M#his}{F#her} consciousness.
但匹诺康尼的所有人…想让如此规模的人群产生相同的意志，恐怕难如登天。
However, to wake up everyone in Penacony and get them to share the same determination... that would be nearly impossible.
正是如此。这一计划的难度恐怕和复活一位星神差不了太多……
Indeed. I'm afraid it's almost as difficult as resurrecting an Aeon...
但无论如何，我们都无法坐视不理。
But we can't just stay here and do nothing.
这可是宇宙危急存亡的危机关头，哪还有时间纠结一个破数字？
This is a critical moment for the whole universe! Who cares about some dumb number?
你们也从梦里醒来了吗？
怎么有人突然登场耍帅！
Well, well, well, someone enjoys making a dramatic entrance.
举手之劳。也要感谢身在匹诺康尼的忆者们，你的那三位同伴…应该都从各自的梦里醒来了。
You're welcome. And thanks to the Memokeepers in Penacony, too. I believe your partners... have also awakened from their dreams.
这是计划的第一步。在流光忆庭的帮助下，像各位一样足够坚强的人会逐渐从梦中清醒，苏醒的自由意志会成为撼动太一之梦的「不协和音」。

This is the first step of our plan. With the assistance from the Garden of Recollection, those who possess a strong will, like you, will gradually awaken from the dream. These free wills are the "discord" that will sway Ena's Dream.
但寥寥数十人，在如此庞大的梦境面前无异于沧海一粟。我们必须寻找其他办法，在短时间内唤醒以十万、百万为单位的自由意志。

However, awakening a mere handful of individuals is insignificant compared to the vast number of people immersed in the dream. We must find other ways to awaken the free will of millions of people within a short period of time.
如果难以从内部突破，就向外部寻求帮助，我们早就知道有一种办法了。
If breaking through from the inside proves challenging, we can seek assistance from the outside. We've long been aware of a potential solution.
阿斯德纳是忆质充盈的星系，存在着名为「联觉梦境」的奇妙现象：在初入此地时，许多人会出现在彼此的思绪中，分享同一场梦……

Asdana is a galaxy known for its abundant memoria and the remarkable phenomenon known as Synesthesia Dreamscape. When people first enter this place, they often find themselves and others sharing a collective dream...
而此时此刻，整个阿斯德纳星系只有一片梦境。
At this very moment, there is only one dream encompassing the entire Asdana system.
你的意思是，只要能让大量的星际旅客跃迁至阿斯德纳星系，他们的自由意志就会掺入这片梦中，动摇它的根基……
So you mean, if we can attract a large number of outsiders to this system, their free will would intertwine with this dream and shake it to its core...
但应召而来的人也可能沉沦在美梦中，反成为「秩序」的基石。真正的困难，在乎如何在短时间里召集一大群和各位一样坚定的人。

However, those outsiders might also succumb to the dream and become the foundation of the Order instead. The real challenge is — How can we gather a huge number of people as determined as you within a short period of time?
想来，也只有「结盟玉兆」能做到了。
Looks like the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath will be the only solution.
犯不着惊动仙舟联盟，一辈子只能用一次的宝贝你好好留着吧。成千上万的自由意志？小意思——
Keep your once-in-a-lifetime treasure. We don't need to bother the Xianzhou Alliance for such a tiny request. You want thousands of people with unwavering free will? Hah, that's easy...
Just leave it to us Galaxy Rangers.
哈！外人都觉得巡海游侠神出鬼没，彼此之间也没联系，要我说——确实！但正因如此，才有一条不成文的规矩……
Hah! Outsiders may see Galaxy Rangers as elusive and disconnected individuals, and actually... they're right! And that's why we have a tacit understanding among us...
Do you know what it is, Acheron?
It's the relic I returned to you.
对。它的主人一定告诉过你，这东西对巡海游侠以外的人一文不值，只有物归原主才能发挥作用。
Exactly. Its owner must have told you that it's meaningless to anyone other than a Galaxy Ranger, and that it can only fulfill its purpose when returned to its rightful owner.
因为这是一件随葬品，只有为巡海游侠立下赫赫战功的英雄才配拥有。当它的光芒出现在宇宙，也就意味着一颗巨星的陨落，而它落下的方向……

Because it's a burial artifact, worthy only of a hero who has served the Galaxy Rangers with honor. When its light illuminates the universe, it means the fall of a hero, and in the direction it falls...
会有无数流星划破天际，那是巡海游侠集结的火光。他们从银河四方赶来，不问缘由，不计代价，只因我们遵守一条共同的底线——

Countless meteors will streak across the sky. Those "meteors" are Galaxy Rangers coming from all corners of the Cosmos, driven by a shared purpose, without questioning the cause or counting the cost. Because we abide by a bottom line...
「巡猎」的飞星，只会坠落在最漫长的夜晚，而在它身后——将是黎明的到来。
The shooting stars of The Hunt only descend on the longest night, and with them... comes the dawn.
我们已经沉寂了太久。是时候让全宇宙的懦夫、蛀虫和压迫者重新想起巡海游侠的名字了，就由我来打响第一枪。
We've stayed silent for far too long. Now, it's time to remind all the cowards, oppressors, and villains of the universe of our presence! I'll be the one to ignite the first spark.
在梦境被动摇后，计划的第二步由我来完成。我将用「同谐」的歌声为沉睡中的人们调律，将「开拓」的不协和音传入他们心中，指明通往现实的方向。

Once the Dreamscape is swayed, I'll complete the second step. I'll fine-tune the slumbering souls with the song of the Harmony, interrupting them with the discord of "Trailblaze" and guiding them towards reality.
人固然有强大与弱小之分，倘若「开拓」是英雄的使命，那么「同谐」的责任便是以强援弱，因为匹诺康尼的救世主，只能是匹诺康尼人自己。

It's true that some people are born strong, and others are born weak. If the Trailblaze is the target of heroes, then the Harmony will guarantee that the strong help the weak. Only the people of Penacony themselves can be the saviors of their homeland.
每个人的幸福和道路应当由他自己开创。虽然我不是无名客，但也愿意将飞上天空的勇气传递给每一个需要它的人。
Their path of happiness should be forged by themselves. While I may not be a Nameless, I'm willing to instill courage in all those who need it.
这其中也包括我的哥哥。太一之梦…对他、对所有人都太过残酷了。
This includes my brother as well. Ena's Dream... is too cruel for him, and everyone else.
听起来是个很周密的计划，但还是有些…理想主义者的浪漫。人性的弱点绝非一朝一夕能够克服，仅凭这些努力，真的能让所有人弃暗投明么？

Your plan sounds well-conceived, but still, it appears somewhat... idealistic and romantic. The flaws rooted in human nature can't be eradicated overnight. Do you believe these efforts alone are enough to convince everyone to choose the right path?
诚然如此，黑天鹅小姐。所以，计划中最重要的一环不是让所有人弃暗投明……
I agree with you, Black Swan. That's why the most critical aspect of this plan is not to convince everyone to choose the right path...
...But to inspire them to save themselves.
所以，最终还是回到了你这边，是吗？
So, you're the key in the end, I assume?
「齐响诗班」的力量与令使无异，终究需要以对等的力量与之对抗。颠覆美梦的最后一步…将由我来完成。
The Harmonious Choir possesses the power of an Emanator. To overcome it, you'll need the same level of power. The final step in destroying the sweet dream... will be my responsibility.
听见你这么说，真令人放心呀。
既然分工完毕，咱们就出发去往各自的战场吧！准备好——大干一场！
Now that our roles are assigned, let's get to our battlefields and pose a grand finale!
{NICKNAME}，可以单独谈谈吗？还有件事，我有义务向你说明。
May I have a moment alone with you, {NICKNAME}? There's one more thing I need to explain to you.
这场盛大的宴会快要结束了。这里便是前往最后舞台的起点…也曾是匹诺康尼所有故事的起点。
This grand festival is drawing to its close. This is the starting point for the ultimate stage of our journey... just as it marked the beginning of all the stories in Penacony.
无论如何，我已经做好准备。
我相信你。但在正式出发前，我还要告诉你一件事。
I have faith in you. However, before we depart, there is one more thing I must tell you.
流萤就是在这里发现了真相。
This is where Firefly uncovered the truth.
是啊。正是她最早发现了「死亡」的彼岸别有天地，又把这个信息传递给了我们所有人。
Indeed, she was the first to discover the world beyond the shores of "death" and shared this truth with all of us.
你说话还是那么…别有深意。
Your words still carry... a profound significance.
只有时常回望来时的路，我们才不会忘记自己应当前往何处…还有那些曾与我们并肩而行的人们。
Only by reflecting on our steps can we remember the path we should be walking on... and the companions who have walked alongside us.
你应当知晓这件事：在无边无际的梦中，我们之所以能找到你们，找到破局的关键，全都仰赖一个人的付出与努力……
There's something you should know. We were able to locate you within this boundless dream and find the key to breaking free from the dream, all because of one person's unwavering dedication...
流萤小姐，是她早早从梦中醒来，在星海间找到列车，将有关「秩序」残党的一切带给了我们。这其中或许有剧本的助力，而代价……

Firefly. She awakened from the dream ahead of others, discovered the Express amidst the stars, and brought us valuable information about the remnants of the Order. She may have been aided by the script, and it came at a cost...
你知道，身为偷渡者，她进入梦境的方式有别于我们。没有酒店的入梦装置，没有家族的帮助，她能从梦中惊醒的手段也只有一种…一次真正的「死亡」。

As you know, Firefly is a stowaway who entered the Dreamscape in a different way from ours. Without the dreampool in the hotel or assistance from The Family, she can only awaken from this dream in one way... a real "death."
不要辜负她的意志。这不是说我们此行必须赢下所有，而是我们的决心，应当与那位勇敢的女孩相配。
We mustn't fail her determination. I'm not implying that we must win this fight no matter what, but our resolve should match that of the courageous lady.
Let's embark on the final stage.
很好。那么，请闭上眼睛吧……
Very well. Now, please close your eyes...
没关系，你还有时间细细咀嚼此刻的心情。等准备好了，就直面最后的舞台吧。
That's alright. Take your time to contemplate this moment. Once you feel ready, let's step onto the final stage.
Let's embark on the final stage.
很好。那么，请闭上眼睛吧……
Very well. Now, please close your eyes...
没关系，你还有时间细细咀嚼此刻的心情。等准备好了，就直面最后的舞台吧。
That's alright. Take your time to contemplate this moment. Once you feel ready, let's step onto the final stage.
How long... has this rain been ongoing?
如果我没记错，可能有几年、几十年，甚至上百年了吧。
If I remember correctly, it has lasted for decades, or even centuries.
「巡猎」的死志直至生命终结也不会平息，但好在…我们终于引渡了这些亡魂。他们生前都是英雄，再也不会沦为「虚无」的傀儡了。

The unwavering determination of The Hunt followers persists even in death, but thankfully... we've guided those lost souls to their lives beyond. They were heroes in their time, and they won't be reduced to puppets of the Nihility in their death.
你看，海面上的影子已经全部消散了。还记得么？你说过，等亡者的遗憾悉数平息，天就放晴了。
You see, the shadows on the sea have vanished. Do you remember? You once said that the sky would clear when the regrets of the departed had faded away.
这场雨，为什么选中了我呢？
Why did this rain choose me?
或许，是因为还有人的遗憾没有平息吧。
Because someone's regrets haven't been fulfilled, perhaps.
凡人走在命途上，就像坐着小船渡过水面，留下一条蜿蜒的行迹，推开无数可能性的涟漪。相较人类转瞬即逝的一生，这些波浪久久不会平息。
Mortals who walk the Paths are like sailors on a vast ocean, leaving behind a trail that creates countless ripples of possibilities. These ripples last longer than the fleeting lifetimes of humans.
而其中有些人，他们存在的痕迹过于强烈，以致在这一簇簇浪花里留下了自己的倒影。
And for some, their presence leaves such a strong mark that it's reflected in the waves.
「血罪灵」…命途行者的执念，它从IX的阴影中诞生，将自己视作事主，不自知地重复着逝者生前的行为。
Sin Thirsters... the obsessions of the Pathstriders. They emerge from the depths of IX, seeing themselves as masters of their own destiny, unknowingly repeating the actions of their past lives.
它们从「虚无」中诞生，向着「虚无」而去，度过毫无意义的一生。但就是这么一道虚幻的影子……
They emerge from the Nihility and head toward it, leading purposeless lives. However, these hollow phantoms...
却同我一起，走过了漫长的日子。
They have journeyed with me for such a long time.
So, this is how it is.
或许吧。这是我的职责…黄泉的守望者。
This is my duty... as the watcher of the Acheron.
我会扼守通向「虚无」深渊的道路，引领每一个不愿堕入其中的生命…回到这边的世界。
I'm guarding the path to the abyss of the Nihility, guiding every soul reluctant to become one with it... back to this side.
但如果这正是逝者们期望的结果，你还想令它做出改变吗？
But if this is what the departed ones expected, should you try to change it?
我不知道。但曾经有人对我说，总有一天他会与世长辞，他希望那个时候……
I don't know, but someone once told me that when the inevitable moment came, he hoped that...
会有人在他的坟前，献上一束花。
Someone would stand at his grave and place a bouquet of flowers.
Even if... it doesn't make sense at all?
有些事即便没有意义，也总是要去做的。类似的事…我已经历过太多。
Some tasks have to be done, even if they are pointless. I have... experienced that much already.
请你伸出手，然后，闭上眼睛吧。
Please extend your hand, and then close your eyes.
我会带着你的愿望走下去，实现它。唯有如此，我才能了却这死海边最后一桩遗憾。
I'll carry your wish with me and fulfill it. Only then will I be able to put an end to the final regret by the Dead Sea.
Will I... ever see them again?
因为亲口告诉我这些的人正是你：关于那辆列车，你曾经的两位伙伴，那场止于虫灾的拓荒，你的死里逃生，与巡海游侠的相遇……
Because it was you who told me about the Express, your two former companions, the expedition cut short by the Swarm, your narrow escape from death, and your encounter with the Galaxy Rangers...
还有那个再也回不去的故乡，匹诺康尼。
And Penacony, the hometown to which you could never return.
是啊，无数次…我被家族拒之门外，只能和它擦肩而过。
Yeah, for countless times... I got rejected by The Family and had to pass it by.
但我知道，我的同伴还在那里…孤身一人……
But I knew that my companion was still there... alone...
牵住我的手，跟我来吧。我们…会离开这里。
Take my hand and come with me. We... will leave this place.
你会踏上一条很长，很长的路，举目四顾皆是黑暗。但不要害怕，因为你会看见，在那道路的尽头始终会有一抹红色。
You'll embark on a long, long journey, shrouded in darkness. But fear not, as a touch of red will be awaiting you at the end of the path.
那是「存在」的颜色，你要跟着它，它将为你指引出路。如此，你们一定能够在阳光下相聚。
That's the color of "existence." Follow it, and it'll guide you and illuminate the way out. By doing so, you'll eventually reunite in the warmth of the sunlight.
<color=#ff3a3e>May death be the end of your boundless dream...</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>...guiding you back to the waking world.</color>
欢迎来到「存在的地平线」……
这里是{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}的万千表征之一，但同样，也是清醒之人告别「虚无」的出口。
This place is one of the thousands of manifestations belonging to {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}the sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#}, and it's also an exit out of the Nihility for the awake ones.
因此，我们就在这作最后的道别吧。
Let's bid our final farewells here.
是啊，生命因何而沉睡…我们仍未知晓这一问的答案，却已然要从这场梦中清醒。
Why does life slumber...? We don't know the answer yet, but we're about to awaken from this dream.
又或者，这就是答案本身。
Or perhaps, such is the answer itself.
离开这里吧，回到你来时的地方。然后…就让匹诺康尼从梦中苏醒吧。
Leave this place, return to where you belong, and... awaken Penacony from this dream.
What if folks don't wanna wake up?
能见识你隐藏的实力了吗？
Will I get to witness your hidden power?
正如我所说，我们的计划不是让所有人弃暗投明，而是让他们选择自救。试问，人要在什么情况下才会自救？
As I said, our plan is not about convincing everyone to choose the right path, but about inspiring them to save themselves. So, when will people actively save themselves?
The answer is... when they are in desperate situations.
就像深海中的溺水者，当一个人的身体和心灵都承受重压，痛苦、迷茫和绝望便会随之而来。而我也相信……
Like a drowning individual in the deep sea, when one's body and mind bear immense pressure, agony, confusion, and despair will follow. I firmly believe that...
纵使人性的弱点让他们驻足停步，但在真正无法前行的时候，人类一定会试图拯救自己。而现在…匹诺康尼有足够多的英雄，能引领他们前行。
The fragility of humankind often freezes them in their tracks, but in truly desperate situations they will strive to save themselves. And now... Penacony has enough heroes to lead them forward.
正是因为这自私的本能，即便早已知晓自己在做徒劳的反抗，人们依旧会拼尽全力。尽管荒谬，但这同样是一种抗争。
It's through this inherent self-centered instinct that people exert their utmost effort, even when they know their struggle is fruitless. As absurd as it may seem, it's their resistance.
然后，{NICKNAME}…就由你去为众人指引方向吧，不是作为救世主，而是与凡人同在的无名客。
As for now, {NICKNAME}... It is time to guide them, not as a savior, but as a Nameless among those mortals.
如此，你们一定能在阳光下相聚。
In this way, you will reunite in the warmth of the sunlight.
雨…要开始变大了。在分别前，容我最后提出几个问题吧。
The rain... is intensifying. Before we part ways, please allow me to ask a few final questions.
在迄今为止的美梦中，你已经和许多人、许多事建立了牢不可破的联系。
So far, you have forged unbreakable bonds with numerous individuals and entities in the sweet dream.
<color=#ff3a3e>请问，你会对亲手斩断这种联系感到恐惧吗？</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>Might I ask if you fear severing these bonds with your own hands?</color>
如果有一片巨大的梦境，它足够逼真，逼真到与现实无异。那里没有生离死别，每个人都能收获应得的美满与幸福，并永远快乐地生活下去。

If there is a vast, lifelike dreamland that is virtually indistinguishable from reality... a realm without death, where everyone can attain the happiness and fulfillment they deserve, living blissfully ever after.
<color=#ff3a3e>I would ask — Would you wish to stay?</color>
无论如何，我都不愿活在梦中。
I would never ever want to live in a dream.
倘若这美梦注定支离破碎，任何事物都将离去：朋友，亲人、陌生人；然后是轻快的风、飞翔的鸟儿、群星…最后是你自己。
Imagine if this splendid dream were fated to fall apart: Friends, family, strangers... followed by the gentle breeze, soaring birds, the stars... and ultimately, yourself.
每一个人，他们记忆中的每个人，那些笑容和眼泪，完成与未能完成的约定…最后都将迈向既定的终局。如果在启程之初，你便已知晓此行的终点……

Everyone, and every face they remember, the joy and the heartaches, the vows sealed and those left hanging... all will inevitably march towards a predetermined ending. If you had grasped the journey's finale right from its inception...
<color=#ff3a3e>请问，你还会踏上这段旅途吗？</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>I would ask — Would you still embark on this journey?</color>
我会义无反顾地开拓下去。
I would blaze a trail without hesitation.
我很高兴。答案并不重要，重要的是你已作出决定。
I'm glad. The answer itself doesn't matter. What matters is that you've made a decision.
聆听、触碰、思考，由此你将获得感受。珍惜它，凭借感受，我们得以存在。这也是在「虚无」面前，人类唯一能给出的解答。
Listen, touch, and ponder, and therein lies the sensation. Cherish it, because that's what makes us exist. Such is the only answer humans can offer when facing the Nihility.
倘若「虚无」是生命最原始的恐惧与颤栗，任何一种崇高的信念在祂庞然的阴影下都显得微不足道……
If the Nihility represents the primal fear of life, rendering any lofty convictions insignificant under THEIR imposing shadow...
那么在这道影子的背后，也一定存在着世间最猛烈的光源。
Then behind this shadow, there must exist the most fervent source of light in the world.
正如每一个迈向死亡的生命都在热烈地生长，向着「虚无」的尽头……
Just as every life that edges closer to death fervently approaches the end of the Nihility...
We must pursue that primordial light.
明明身在「虚无」之中，却要守望人们离开「虚无」……
Now come to think that you exist in the Nihility, and you watch over others to depart it...
多么荒诞，又没有意义的使命啊。
Such a task is absurd and meaningless.
但它必须有人来完成。至于你所说的意义……
Nevertheless, someone has to do it. As for the meaning you mentioned...
即便没有它，我不也走到今天了吗？
Even if it's a meaningless task, I've come this far, haven't I?
就算你开辟的未来，可能不属于你？
Even if the future you forge may not even belong to you?
它可能不属于我，但一定会属于某个人。
It may not belong to me, but it definitely belongs to someone.
你的过去，该有多辛苦啊……
What hardships you must have experienced...
既然如此，也让我做一件没有意义的事吧……
In that case, allow me to do something meaningless, too...
最后，请告诉我你的名字。
也许下一刻，我的存在就会消失…没人会记得这场对话，和你的回答……
Perhaps my existence will vanish in the next moment... and nobody will remember this conversation or your answer...
但我依然相信…你的名字应当被人铭记……
But I believe... that your name should be remembered...
而这片宇宙…也会记得它。
And this universe... will remember it as well.
有些事我已经很难想起，但也有些事…我很难忘记。
For me, some things are difficult to recall, yet there are others... that I find challenging to forget.
这就是「记忆」，它是由过去创造，却能在遥远的未来绽放意义的事物。
Such is "memory," a creation of the past that blossoms into significance in the distant future.
我依然记得，那是我旅途的起点，是我生命中红色的本源，是每一场风雨中最为激烈、热忱的事物……
I remember that marks the start of my journey, the origin of the vibrant red hue in my life, and the most fervent element amidst every tempest...
很高兴再次听见你的声音，恭喜你成为这场盛会…最大的幕后赢家。
It's a pleasure to hear your voice again. Congratulations, you've become the... biggest winner of this festival.
你专程打电话来，就是为了调侃我？
Are you just calling to poke fun at me?
哪里的话，我只是在感叹这次你又没输成。不仅只身一人深入狼巢，挖掘出了流梦礁的真相，还在那位纯美骑士的帮助下全身而退……
No, I'm just impressed. Not only did you venture alone into Penacony and discover the truth of Dreamflux Reef, but you also managed to escape with the help of that Knight of Beauty...
哦，还有你从「开拓」朋友那儿收到的那段录音，它已经是这场赌桌上价值最高的筹码了。
Remember the recording you received from your Trailblaze friend? It's now the most valuable chip in this game.
不过嘛，作为赢得这一切的代价…失去一枚「基石」，还是过于昂贵了。「钻石」刚刚发起了一场会议，有关你的会议。
However, this came at a high cost... Losing a Cornerstone is a hefty price to pay. Diamond just called a meeting to discuss what to do with you.
不出所料。所以「钻石」是打算给我也降个级，还是要把我直接踢出「石心十人」？
Just as I expected. So, is Diamond planning to demote me, or kick me out of the Ten Stonehearts?
机会难得，为什么不来赌一把呢？
Why don't you take a wild guess?
哼，好啊。那我就赌——他要把我升到P<unbreak>46</unbreak>了吧？
Well, alright. Then I'll guess... he's going to promote me to P<unbreak>46</unbreak>?
真押假押？我可不想把任何东西当给你，省得被吃干抹净。
Are we talking about an actual bet here? I don't wanna wager anything just so that you can swindle it all in the end.
但如果只是赌着玩玩，那就照我们第一次见面时那样——就赌我的命，女士。
But if it's just a friendly bet, I'll put on the line what I did when we first met. I'll bet my life, ma'am.
有趣。但既然那是「钻石」的决议，没有人能够提前猜到答案。
Interesting. But since it's Diamond's call, no one can predict the outcome.
我正在来匹诺康尼的路上，等余下的事安排妥当，我们就一同返回庇尔波因特，迎接开牌吧。
I'm on my way to Penacony. Once everyone is settled, we'll return to Pier Point for the final showdown.
听起来短时间内没我什么事了，意思是我可以好好享受假期了？
Sounds like I'll be out of the action for a while. Finally, a chance to kick back and relax?
交给我和托帕吧，孩子。托你的福，在「翡翠石」被送入家族驻地的那一刻，公司的布置就已经完成了。
Yeah, leave everything to me and Topaz, child. Thanks to you, as soon as the Jade Stone was delivered to The Family's compound, we finished up our preparations.
播下的种子已然生根发芽，而后…便是「收获」的时刻。
The seeds we planted have taken root. Soon... it'll be time to "reap" the rewards.
先到这儿吧，这边似乎有客人来了……
Let's wrap it up for now. Looks like I've got a visitor here...
哦？今天的新鲜事还真多，一个巡海游侠兼通缉犯竟然也自己送上门来——
Oh? So many surprises today. Didn't expect a Galaxy Ranger and wanted criminal to show up here...
——还在公司舰队的眼皮子底下干掉了两个公司员工，你知道这意味着什么吗？
...One who managed to take out two IPC members under the noses of our fleet. Do you understand what that means?
去你个呜呜伯，只是让他们睡会儿，少他宝贝的拿这套威胁我。再说了，我干掉的公司狗比你榨取的剩余价值还多，不介意通缉令上再多几个「零」。

Screwubbaboo, I just put them to sleep! Don't try to intimidate me with that nonsense. Besides, I've taken down more IPC lackeys than the residual value you've squeezed, and I don't mind adding a few more zeroes to my wanted poster.
我有问题要问你。老实点，不然我现在就一枪把你爱死——
I have a question for you. Be honest now, or I won't think twice about puttin' a bullet in your fudgin' head.
告诉我…{RUBY_B#「市场开拓部」主管}奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德{RUBY_E#}在哪里？
Tell me... Where is {RUBY_B#Head of Marketing Development Department}Oswaldo Schneider{RUBY_E#}?
琥珀历<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪，纪元的第一年，一桩燃烧的阴谋在「梦想之地」为宇宙的世纪初破晓，又在混乱与迷茫中迅速化作死灰。
In the first year of the AE <unbreak>2158</unbreak>, a fiery conspiracy erupted in the Land of the Dreams, but soon faded in chaos and destruction.
人们说那四十八个系统时里发生了许多事。一颗太阳将要陨落，一片乐园将要坍塌，一个世界将要易主；一具身躯将要腐朽，一群兀鹫将要集结，一对兄妹将要长别。

Whispers carried the tale of those fateful <unbreak>48</unbreak> system hours, when a sun teetered on the precipice of collapse, a paradise stood on the brink of destruction, and a world was poised to surrender to its new master. Amidst it all, a body decayed, a pack of vultures gathered, and a brother and sister were doomed for long separation.
还有一位神明，再度沉睡了。一些人为此欢呼雀跃，一些人引以为憾。还有些人见证了一切，他们相对宇宙的总和简直无足轻重，说祂这次带着尊严死去。

And so, an Aeon succumbed to slumber once more. Some celebrated this fall, while others mourned. Among the insignificant witnesses, mere specks in the vast tapestry of the universe, it was said that this time, the Aeon met THEIR demise with dignity.
银河迎来了纯洁的黎明，猛烈的风暴亦初具雏形。「一切献给琥珀王」的呼声变得越来越响亮，但无论人们如何审视，时间都将推动克里珀的巨锤下落，周而复始，永无止境。

As the Cosmos bathed in the radiance of a pure dawn, a tempestuous storm brewed on the horizon. The chant of "All for the Amber Lord" grew ever louder. Yet, no matter how one contemplates it, time inexorably swings Qlipoth's colossal hammer in eternal cycles.
星穹列车的故事既告一段落，也重新开始。时间滚滚向前，而「开拓」之旅亦即将翻开新的篇章。
The tale of the Astral Express reaches both its conclusion and a new beginning. Time marches forward, heralding the arrival of a new chapter in the history of Trailblazing expeditions.
哥哥，你说…星星会死去吗？
Brother, do you think... the stars will fade away?
Where did that come all of a sudden?
因为那只像小鸟一样的星座，看起来有点暗了。那个…燕鹅嘤座。
Because the constellation that looks like a bird, the... Torrent Eagles... looks a bit dim lately.
是湮厄鹰座。别担心，它依旧在那，只是因为在匹诺康尼内环，只有春夏交织的时候才能看见它。
It's the Torment Eagles. Don't worry, it's still there. It's just it's located in the inner ring of Penacony and can only be seen when spring and summer overlap.
但你提出的那个问题…我猜星星也是会死去的，就像人一样。
As for the question you asked... I think stars do die, just like people.
可是妹妹，你知道吗？没有一颗星星属于「现在」。我们看见的星空，都是它们在很久以前发出的光芒。
But do you know, sister? No star actually belongs to the present. The light we see from them is from a long time ago.
这些光在星星死后，依然会走过好几百万光年的旅程，跨越好几百万年的时间，照亮另一个世界的夜空。
Even after the stars perish, their light will travel millions of light-years, spanning countless years, to illuminate the night sky of another world.
我相信，在我们的乐园里也会有这么一颗星星，绽放着同样的光芒。它照耀的时间会是「永恒」，而它的名字…叫做「幸福」。
In our paradise, I believe there will be a star like that, shining with the same light. Its radiance will last "forever," and its name... will be "happiness."
错了！怎么会只有一颗呢？应该是两颗星星，不…满天的星星才对！
No, not just one star! We should have two stars... or maybe even more!
拉勾，约好了，什么东西都改变不了我们的理想。
It's a deal, then. This is our promise, and nothing will sway our ideals.
此人双目无神，嘴角微微上扬，正沉浸于巨大的喜悦中。
Their eyes are dulled but their lips curl up at the edges, as though transfixed in overwhelming joy.
你的「钟表把戏」无法令此人动摇。
Your "clockwork" has no sway on them whatsoever.
此人正沉醉于狂热的幻想，完全没有注意到你的存在。
They are so immersed in the maniacal fantasy that they completely fail to notice your very existence.
你的「钟表把戏」似乎失效了。
Your "clockwork" doesn't seem to be working anymore.
此人心无旁骛，潜心梦中，对你的到来没有半点反应。
Single-minded, this person dives into the dreamscape, having not the slightest reaction to your arrival.
看来暂时没有办法将此人唤醒——就连你的「钟表把戏」也不行。
Looks like there's no way to rouse this person from their slumber for now — not even with your "clockwork."
此人的眼神中全无光芒，只充斥着莫大的狂喜。
The spark has completely gone from their eyes, replaced instead by a colossal mania.
「钟表把戏」现在无法为此人指明方向。
Your "clockwork" is unable to point this person in the right direction.
此人只垂着眸子，不知对着何物痴痴笑着。
Their eyes simply droop as they giggle like a fool at only god knows what.
你的「钟表把戏」全然没有奏效。
认可太一之梦，沉溺在幸福幻觉中的人们……
They're the ones who accept Ena's Dream and indulge in their happy illusions...
暂时没有什么办法能动摇他们沉睡的原因，哪怕是你的「钟表把戏」也不行。
We have no means to wake them up now. Not even your clockwork will do the trick.
但我们还有机会靠其他方式扭转现状，先继续走吧。
However, there are still other things we can do. Let's keep going.
欢迎来到「存在的地平线」……
这里是{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}的万千表征之一，但同样，也是清醒之人告别「虚无」的出口。
This place is one of the thousands of manifestations belonging to {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}the sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#}, and it's also an exit out of the Nihility for the awake ones.
千万要区分现实和想象的界限…好吗，小灰毛？
Always distinguish between reality and imagination... alright, Gray?
生命是一座迂回的迷宫——除了记忆，我们一无所有。
"Life is akin to a winding labyrinth, where memories serve as our sole companions."
May your schemes... be forever concealed.
太一之梦…对他、对所有人都太过残酷了。
Ena's Dream... is too cruel for him, and everyone else.
还记得邀请函上的问题吗——生命因何而沉睡？
I still remember the question on the invitation letter — Why does life slumber?
因此，我们就在这作最后的道别吧。
Let's bid our final farewells here.
...Have you broken free from the dream of Order?
已经睡得够久了，{NICKNAME}，让他见识下你的起床气！
We've done enough sleeping already, let's show them a wake-up call!
若无「秩序」，弱者何以为善？
Without Order, how can the weak be righteous?
如果诸位有所主张——就尽管向我证明吧。
If you have any objection, feel free to make your case...
誓以十万七千三百三十六枚音符，通告尔等，加入光荣的合唱——归于天堂！
With <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> notes, I solemnly invite you to join the glorious chorus — and ascend to the heavens!
如果梦境与现实无异，它还能被称作虚假么？
If the Dreamscape is indistinguishable from reality, can it still be called an illusion?
我以完美无缺的乐章号令——再创乐园！
With this perfect melody I command — recreate paradise anew!
被美梦囚禁的人们，正在为「自由」而觉醒。
Those imprisoned in their dreams are awakening for Freedom.
哥哥…人性的弱点，不是由他人救赎的。
Brother... The weakness of humanity cannot be redeemed by others.
就算未来会充满痛苦…我们也绝不逃避！
Even if the future is full of pain... we won't escape from it!
你是个高尚的人…别被过去束缚！
You have a noble soul... Don't be shackled by the past!
就让你看看…「弱者」们的信念吧。
Witness... the will of the weak!
哥哥，你听到人们的心声了，这不是他们希望的乐园。
Brother, you have heard their cries... This is not the paradise they hoped for.
但他们依旧不知道要走向何方，所以，我才必须成为天空中唯一的星予以指引。
Even so, they don't know where they should be heading. That's why... I had to become the lone star in the sky to guide them.
即便那颗星星所在的地方…是一片永远孤独的黑夜？
Even if that star... must hang in a perpetual night of solitude?
如果你我从不孤独，又怎会踏上渐行渐远的道路…？
If we had never experienced solitude, how could we have embarked on different paths?
最后一次和谈，就到此为止吧。
Now, our final talk has concluded.
倘若你们的乐园能拯救更多的人，那就亲手为我断绝前路吧。
If your "paradise" can save more people, sever my path with your hands.
已死的星神，我向你致敬。
O, fallen Aeon... may I honor you.
以此七日誓言，命尔听从号令——
With this seven-day vow, I command you to heed my summon.
这动静，有什么不得了的要来了！
Uh oh, I have a bad feeling about this!
It was not you who created all things.
It was humanity that created you!
...Your divine being will become the foundation of our paradise!
By the solemn desire for Order...
到此为止吧…我们约定的乐园并非只有「秩序」一种选择！
Stop it... You want to achieve the paradise we promised, but the Order is not the only choice!
真正的幸福应当是所有在「虚无」面前依旧挺立的事物，那才是一个人真正的活法！
True happiness and the meaning of life lie in defying the Nihility and embracing all that life offers!
距「谐乐大典」开幕<unbreak>12</unbreak>系统时 星穹列车
<unbreak>12</unbreak> system hours until Charmony Festival - Astral Express
同一时间 黄金的时刻
At the same time - Golden Hour
尖锐的啸叫过后，浓稠而汹猛的忆质冲入你的胸膛，翻腾肆虐。你的意识如同旋涡中的絮纸，破溃、消溶，漫散于滚滚浊流。

After a piercing screech, a thick and ferocious surge of memoria crashes into your chest, churning and ravaging. Your consciousness becomes like scraps of paper caught in a whirlpool, breaking apart, dissolving, and dispersing within the turbulent muddy current.
无数声音透过忆质交响如滚雷，其中有道回响格外清晰。你知道它来自身边的那位少女，你们的心脏合着同样的节拍，沉静，再沉静……

Innumerable voices resonate through the symphony of memoria like roaring thunder, and among them, one echo stands out with exceptional clarity. You know it comes from the girl beside you, your hearts beating to the same rhythm in silence, and then, more silence...
直到那沉寂的黑暗中，回忆泛起点点涟漪……
Until memories stir up ripples in that quiet darkness...
距「谐乐大典」开幕<unbreak>11</unbreak>系统时 流梦礁的另一边
<unbreak>11</unbreak> system hours until Charmony Festival - The other side of Dreamflux Reef
忆域的海面下，距水中的满月最近的花园里，一位老人斜倚在安乐椅上，寂静无声。
Beneath the sea surface of Memory Zone, in a garden closest to the full moon in the water, an elderly man rests on a recliner, enveloped in utter silence.
「钟表匠」——拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔——他已然迈向那没有尽头的长梦，再没有任何声音能将他唤醒。
The Watchmaker, Mikhail Char Legwork, has passed into that endless, timeless dream, where no sound could ever awaken him.
话毕，姬子对你微微颔首示意。你深吸一口气，定了定神，望向「钟表匠」……
As the words cease, Himeko nods ever so slightly in your direction. You take a deep breath, steady your mind, and turn your gaze towards the Watchmaker...
你用手抵住梦泡，浓稠的忆质应力聚拢，又以指腹为中心向四周拉伸，仿佛织成一张细密的网，轻轻托住你的手心。

You press your hands against the dream bubble and the thick viscous memoria converges under strain, then stretches outward from your fingertips. As if weaving a delicate web, it gently cradles your palm.
一道凉意自你的指尖传来。依经验，随着这道触感一同前来的，应当还有种种斑斓错杂的记忆幻影……
A chill travels from your fingertips, carrying with it a myriad of vibrant and intertwined memories, as experience would suggest...
可这一次，你什么都没有看见。
But this time, you see nothing at all.
这枚梦泡显然不同寻常——或许是方法不对，你如是想着，屏息凝神，闭上双眼，单膝跪地，将额头抵上包裹着忆质的薄膜。

The dream bubble is clearly extraordinary. Perhaps the approach was wrong, you think, holding your breath and closing your eyes. With one knee on the ground, you press your forehead against the thin film coated in memoria.
然而，你的眼前依旧一片漆黑。没有红日坠入雪山、没有轻笑、没有繁星、没有枪声刀影，更没有「开拓」……

Yet, before you, there remains an abyss of darkness. No crimson sun descending upon snow-capped mountains, no gentle laughter, no twinkling stars, no echoes of swords clashing, and most of all, no traces of "trailblaze"...
…什么都没有。空的。毫无疑问，这就是一枚*空梦泡*。
...There is nothing and nothing is there. Indubitably, this is but an empty dream bubble.
尝试集中注意力，捕捉记忆…
Try to focus and capture memories...
深呼吸，尝试重新读取梦泡…
Take a deep breath and try to read the dream bubble again...
...Hey, {NICKNAME}! Wake up! The sun's frying your butt!
你没事吧，听得清我说话吗？我听房间里一点动静都没有，快吓死了。
Are you okay? Can you hear me? I didn't hear a peep from your room, and it really freaked me out.
不是在做梦啦，这是在现实，「白日梦」酒店！「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
You're not dreaming. We're in The Reverie Hotel, in the real world. The Order's dream is over.
Woah, this conversation is such déjà vu...
你在说什么啊，别睡糊涂了吧…「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
What are you talking about? Are you still half-asleep or something...? The Order's dream is over.
你一直没反应，我担心还不行吗？幸好，「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
Hey, I was seriously worried when you didn't respond. Thank goodness. The Order's dream is over.
虽然已经过去一天了，但回想起来还是汗流浃背，列车的「开拓」之旅差点就要交代在这匹诺康尼了……
Even though it's been a day, I still break into a sweat when I think about it. Our Trailblazing expedition almost ended in Penacony...
你倒是心宽，还能呼呼大睡。我可是留下了心理阴影，昨晚连眼睛都不敢闭，生怕一睡着就再也醒不过来了。
I'm so jealous that you got a good night's sleep. I was traumatized and too scared to even close my eyes. I thought if I fell asleep, I'd never wake up again.
他们已经出发了。只有善良的本姑娘特地来喊你起床，还不快说声谢谢。
They've already left, leaving this kindhearted girl to wake you up. You owe her big time.
You'll have dark circles under your eyes.
本姑娘天生丽质，才不会有黑眼圈！
A natural beauty like me never has dark circles!
你睡着的这段时间，星核已经被封印了。匹诺康尼的普通民众完全不知道发生了什么，他们只觉得记忆有些模糊，像是被人抽空了一段。
The Stellaron was sealed while you were sleeping. The ordinary people in Penacony have no idea what happened. They just feel like something is missing from their memories.
家族对外的说法是「谐乐大典遭遇来历不明的星核袭击，被迫中止」——毕竟「秩序」的事怎么也没法摆到台面上讲嘛。
The Family's official statement was like, "The Charmony Festival was attacked by an unidentified Stellaron and came to a halt." After all, they can't just reveal the truth about the Order.
现在，橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。列车组也受到邀请，去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。
Now, all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. The Family has invited the Crew to the Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.
现在就差你了，赶紧收拾收拾。准备好了，咱们就出发！
Everyone's waiting for you, so hurry up and pack. We're leaving as soon as you're ready!
呼，经历了这一切，感觉没什么比平平安安的现实更好了……
Phew, after all this craziness, nothing is better than staying safe in reality...
是一艘巨大的空中飞艇，可厉害了！听说它从来不在公众前露面，只有家族的贵客才有资格登上船首，一览匹诺康尼的美丽风光。
It's a massive airship, and it's awesome! I heard it's never shown to the public. Only VIP guests of The Family get to board it and enjoy the breathtaking views of Penacony.
鸢尾花家系还派人送来了好多纪念品和果篮，还有一个精致的按钮模型，等你好利索了，慢慢享受个够…这下我们也算是盛会之星的大人物啦。

The Iris Family sent us a bunch of souvenirs, fruit baskets, plus this fancy button model. After you're back on your feet, you can enjoy them all... We're pretty much celebrities on the Planet of Festivities now, aren't we?
再讲讲匹诺康尼的现状…
Tell me more about the current state of Penacony...
你睡着的这段时间，星核已经被封印了。匹诺康尼的普通民众完全不知道发生了什么，他们只觉得记忆有些模糊，像是被人抽空了一段。
The Stellaron was sealed while you were sleeping. The ordinary people in Penacony have no idea what happened. They just feel like something is missing from their memories.
家族对外的说法是「谐乐大典遭遇来历不明的星核袭击，被迫中止」——毕竟「秩序」的事怎么也没法摆到台面上讲嘛。
The Family's official statement was like, "The Charmony Festival was attacked by an unidentified Stellaron and came to a halt." After all, they can't just reveal the truth about the Order.
现在，橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。列车组也受到邀请，去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。
Now, all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. The Family has invited the Crew to the Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.
你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？
What happened to you in Ena's dream?
怎么突然聊起这个了？被拖入美梦的时候，我只感觉有一只冰凉的触角伸进了我的记忆深处。但那里好像有什么别的东西，所以它马上就离开了。
Why the sudden interest in that? Well, I was dragged into the sweet dream. I felt a cold tentacle diving into my memories, but something else was there, so the tentacle suddenly disappeared.
然后嘛，我就开始做大吃大喝大买特买的梦了…星期日不会以为这就是我想要的生活吧？从这种幻觉里醒来…轻轻松松嘛。

And then, I dreamed about stuffing my face with delicious food and going on a shopping spree... Sunday didn't seriously believe that was the life I wanted, right? Breaking free from that cheesy illusion... was just a piece of cake.
Let's go meet up with others.
走咯走咯！离登船还有些时间，咱们先去惊梦酒吧和大家汇合吧。
Yeah, let's go! We've got some time before we board the ship, so let's catch up with everyone at Dreamjolt Hostelry.
I've got something else to do.
哦，那你快点。等你准备好了，我们就走。
Oh, okay. Hurry up then. We'll leave when you're ready.
如何，现在可以走了吗？还是你有什么别的事想说？
Well, can we go now? Or is there something else you want to talk about?
是一艘巨大的空中飞艇，可厉害了！听说它从来不在公众前露面，只有家族的贵客才有资格登上船首，一览匹诺康尼的美丽风光。
It's a massive airship, and it's awesome! I heard it's never shown to the public. Only VIP guests of The Family get to board it and enjoy the breathtaking views of Penacony.
鸢尾花家系还派人送来了好多纪念品和果篮，还有一个精致的按钮模型，等你好利索了，慢慢享受个够…这下我们也算是盛会之星的大人物啦。

The Iris Family sent us a bunch of souvenirs, fruit baskets, plus this fancy button model. After you're back on your feet, you can enjoy them all... We're pretty much celebrities on the Planet of Festivities now, aren't we?
再讲讲匹诺康尼的现状…
Tell me more about the current state of Penacony...
你睡着的这段时间，星核已经被封印了。匹诺康尼的普通民众完全不知道发生了什么，他们只觉得记忆有些模糊，像是被人抽空了一段。

What happened to you in Ena's dream?
怎么突然聊起这个了？被拖入美梦的时候，我只感觉有一只冰凉的触角伸进了我的记忆深处。但那里好像有什么别的东西，所以它马上就离开了。
