然后嘛，我就开始做大吃大喝大买特买的梦了…星期日不会以为这就是我想要的生活吧？从这种幻觉里醒来…轻轻松松嘛。

And then, I dreamed about stuffing my face with delicious food and going on a shopping spree... Sunday didn't seriously believe that was the life I wanted, right? Breaking free from that cheesy illusion... was just a piece of cake.
Let's go meet up with others.
走咯走咯！离登船还有些时间，咱们先去惊梦酒吧和大家汇合吧。
Yeah, let's go! We've got some time before we board the ship, so let's catch up with everyone at Dreamjolt Hostelry.
I've got something else to do.
哦，那你快点。等你准备好了，我们就走。
Oh, okay. Hurry up then. We'll leave when you're ready.
纸醉金迷啊，和艾普瑟隆如出一辙。如何？它和你想象中的「梦境」一致吗？
How extravagant, just like Epsilon. How was it? Did it live up to your Dreamscape expectations?
你问过这个问题的，在我们刚来到这里的时候。
You already asked that when we first got here.
是啊，我记得那时你的回答是「不」。但发生了这么多事以后，我觉得你还挺中意它的。
Yeah, and you said "no" back then. But after all this madness, I'd say you've grown fond of it.
不过还是提醒一句：别忘了你依然在猎犬家系的通缉名单里，保持低调。
Just a heads-up, you're still on the Bloodhound Family's wanted list. So, keep a low profile.
而且这次和以往不一样，照片上的不是「萨姆」，而是「流萤」——对你而言，这应该算是相当新奇的体验吧？
And this time, it's Firefly in the picture, not Sam. That's gotta be a whole new experience for you, right?
的确，用卡芙卡的话说…这也是我人生中「缺失的部分」。
Indeed. In Kafka's words... that's also a "missing part" of my life.
不过，不能自由行动还是挺不方便的。银狼，能帮帮我么？
Still, it'd be quite inconvenient if I can't move freely. Could you help me out, Silver Wolf?
我就知道你会这么说——放心，早搞定了，我把系统黑了个遍，一点痕迹都没留下。
I knew you'd say that. Don't worry. I've hacked all the systems and left no trace.
别做引人瞩目的事，别去惹对你有印象的警卫，遵守这两点，就没人会在意你，你想去哪就去哪。
Don't do anything that may draw attention, and don't talk with guards, they might recognize you. Keep these two points in mind, and you can go wherever you want unbothered.
不用谢，「萨缪尔女士」——哈哈，我喜欢这个假名。
No problem. Miss Samuel. Haha, I love this fake name.
我们在匹诺康尼的任务已经完成了，接下来的自由时间打算做点什么？听说天才俱乐部的人也来了，要不要跟我去玩点大的？
Now that we're done here in Penacony, what will you do in your free time? I heard the Genius Society is here. How about we go stir up some excitement?
你知道的，我的「剧本」还没结束。
Well, you know, my "script" isn't over yet.
…我把你送回来，不是为了让你做这种事的。
...I didn't bring you back to hear an answer like that.
安心啦。剧本只是写着，盛会之星会赐予我三次「死亡」。但它同样提到，我会在这里得到「难忘的收获」。
Don't worry. The script says that I'll experience three "deaths" but also receive an "unforgettable reward" on the Planet of Festivities.
不试试怎么知道呢。在结果实际发生前，一切可能性都是存在的，对吧？
How will I know if I don't try? All possibilities exist until the outcome actually happens, right?
你可能不知道自己有个坏习惯：每当你使用疑问语气的时候，其实心里早就做好决定了，别人说什么也劝不住你。
You may not realize it, but you have a bad habit: Whenever you seem to be asking a question, you've already made up your mind, and no words will dissuade you.
算了，卡芙卡托我带句话：「要是在匹诺康尼见到什么好东西，帮我也带一件，直接刷我的卡就好，密码你知道的。」
Anyway, Kafka asked me to pass on this message: "If you see anything fabulous in Penacony, get one for me too. Just swipe my card, you know the PIN."
具体她没讲，我猜是洋服、大衣，或墨镜什么的…反正你比我懂，平时都是你们在聊这些时尚的话题。
She didn't specify anything, but I guess she means a dress, coat, sunglasses, or something else... You know better about fashion than I do.
好啊，我会留意的。「奥帝购物中心」有许多选择，你觉得她会喜欢漂亮的小装饰吗，比如…发饰和胸针？
Sure, I'll keep an eye out. There's tons of options at Oti Mall. Do you think she'll like trinkets like... hair accessories or brooches?
听着更适合小女生，你还是留给自己吧。
Those sound more like something for young girls. Maybe you should keep them for yourself.
还有，刃让你多加小心。他没明说，但多半是这个意思——「在匹诺康尼，诱惑又会出现」——他说话真的很含蓄。

Oh, by the way, Blade wanted you to be more careful. He didn't explicitly say it, but I think he was trying to say something like... "Temptation will show up again in Penacony." He's always so subtle with his words.
没事的，他只是出于好心。放心啦，银狼，你懂我的。
Got it. He was just worried about me. Relax, Silver Wolf. You know me.
我什么也不会做，只是想走走，用自己的双腿，再多感受下这个世界。我想去买橡木蛋糕卷，在匹诺康尼的日子，我每天都会吃一个蛋糕卷，从第一天到最后一天。

I won't do anything crazy. I just want to wander around and see more of the world for myself. I want to buy some Oak Cake Rolls. I've had a cake roll every day since I arrived in Penacony, from the first day to the last.
但今天我可以买两个，分给你一半。如果你不喜欢，我就能享用两倍的快乐。或者我可以带给卡芙卡，她向来不会拒绝，又或者…给刃，他会喜欢的。

But today, I'll buy two and give you one. And if you don't like them, I'll enjoy double the pleasure. Or I can bring one to Kafka, as she never refuses. Or maybe I'll give it to... Blade. He'll appreciate it.
「剧本」里是不会有这些的，对吧？可是你看……
That's not written in the script, right? But as you see...
我已经为「命运」添上了新的注脚呀。
I've added new footnotes to my destiny.
与此同时，在「晖长石号」空艇上……
您来啦，托帕总监！家族代表还在里面做准备，「大老板」也还没到——离会谈开始恐怕还得再过一阵。
Welcome, Director Topaz! The Family ambassadors are still inside making preparations, but the Big Boss hasn't arrived yet. It'll be a while before the conference starts, I'm afraid.
嚯，这排场，家族的表面功夫做得可够足的。
Huh, quite a spectacle. The Family really knows how to make things look impressive.
我还以为他们会挑个更低调，更正式点的地方谈事，没想到居然找了艘豪华空艇……
I thought they would choose a more formal and low-key location for the conference. I didn't expect them to go with a luxury airship...
那个…总监，我之前跟人打听了下：听说这艘「晖长石号」是苜蓿草家系的财产。
About this, Director... I've asked around. This airship, named the Radiant Feldspar, belongs to the Alfalfa Family.
公司和家族这次碰面会直接影响匹诺康尼的未来发展。按理来说，这么重要的事应该要在…在…哦对，在「朝露的时刻」开秘密会议商讨才对。

This conference between the IPC and The Family will have a direct impact on Penacony's future. Such an important event should have been held at... at... well... somewhere secretive in the Moment of Morning Dew.
但眼下这个气氛…啧，怎么看都不够严肃啊。
The atmosphere here... Tsk, it doesn't feel serious enough.
看来，这次见面大概只是一盘「前菜」。组织这次会面的人——不管是谁——大概只是想提前来探探公司的口风。
If I'm right, this conference is probably just a prelude. Whoever organized it wants to assess the IPC's stance beforehand.
这位大人物，要么是有自己的野心，想提前跟我们达成某种共识；要么就是打算来个下马威，让我们知难而退。
This influential figure either has their own ambitions and wants to reach a preliminary agreement, or they plan to put pressure on us to make us back off.
哦唷，不愧是托帕总监，脑子真是清楚！等大老板来了，您也要提醒她多留个心眼，当心对方挖坑……
Ohh! Your mind is always so sharp, Director Topaz! When the Big Boss arrives, please remind her to be cautious and watch out for any traps...
哈哈哈，谢谢你的好意提醒，我看还是不必了。和那位女士坐在一张谈判桌上，该当心的永远都是别人~
Hahaha, thank you for the reminder, but I don't think that will be necessary. When she's at the table, it's the others who need to be cautious.
转告组里的各位，大家守好自己的岗位就行，谈判的事不用操多余的心。
Just tell everyone on our team to stay focused on their tasks and not worry about the negotiations.
哦…明白了，我这就去传达。
Oh... got it. I'll do it right away.
——可别当着翡翠女士的面叫她「大老板」，会出人命的~不开玩笑。
Don't call Miss Jade "Big Boss" in front of her, or there will be serious consequences. I mean, really serious.
知、知道了！感谢总监提醒！
G—got it! Thank you for the reminder, Director!
大人物都还没到…看来离会谈开始还有一会儿。
None of the important figures have arrived yet... Looks like the conference won't be starting for a while.
这周围挺热闹啊，先四下逛逛吧。
Such a bustling place. I think I'll take a little walk around.
梦里的食物…味道应该不会差吧？
Food in the dream... shouldn't taste bad, right?
Toss a Potato Fries Sundae to Numby.
账账狼吞虎咽地吃下了「薯条圣代」，然后发出了一个满意的饱嗝。
Numby gulps down the Potato Fries Sundae, then lets out a satisfied puff.
看来还不错嘛？早知道我就先咬一口了。
Looks delicious, huh? I should have taken a bite first.
把「橡木蛋糕卷」抛给账账。
Toss an Oak Cake Roll to Numby.
吃下「橡木蛋糕卷」后，账账似乎表现得不太舒服。
After eating the Oak Cake Rolls, Numby seems a bit uncomfortable.
哎呀，好像不太合你胃口呢…对不起对不起，等回到现实了再带你去吃好的。
Oops, not to your liking huh... Sorry, I'll treat you to a nice meal once we get back to reality.
Toss a Floatdisc Burger to Numby.
账账发出了殷切的叫声，好像一个「飞碟堡」根本满足不了它的胃口。
Numby lets out an earnest cry, as if a Floatdisc Burger can't satisfy its appetite.
好啦好啦，别那么馋嘴，也给别的客人留一点嘛！
There, there. Don't be so greedy. Leave some for the other guests!
您好，女士。有什么需要吗？
Greetings, madam. What can I do for you?
你好。能和我说说这艘「晖长石号」吗？
Hello. Could you tell me more about the Radiant Feldspar?
看样子，您应该是公司「战略投资部」的代表吧？当然可以，乐意为您服务。
I assume you are the ambassador of the IPC Strategic Investment Department? It's my honor to assist you.
「晖长石号」的主人是苜蓿草家系的家主，奥帝•艾弗法先生。一个琥珀纪前，奥帝先生花重金打造了这艘豪华空艇，从此她便开始绕着梦境十二时分巡航，从未停泊。

The Radiant Feldspar is owned by Mr. Oti Alfalfa, head of the Alfalfa Family. Mr. Alfalfa invested a significant amount in building this luxurious airship an Amber Era ago, and it has been sailing across the Twelve Hours of the Dreamscape ever since.
喔，原来是老奥帝本人！怪不得船上的装潢这么奢华。
Oh, so it's owned by Old Oti himself! No wonder this ship is so lavishly decorated.
当然，奥帝先生的品位无可挑剔。能获得苜蓿草家系的邀请、登上「晖长石号」的，也必定是寰宇中一等一的名流贵客。
Indeed, Mr. Alfalfa has impeccable taste. Only the most prestigious guests are invited by the Alfalfa Family to board this airship.
接着为您介绍——「晖长石号」在匹诺康尼的梦海上空巡游了整整一个琥珀纪，但却因为此前发生的「震荡」而不得不停航……

Please allow me to continue with my introduction. The Radiant Feldspar had been cruising over the Sea of Dreams in Penacony for an entire Amber Era, but its voyage was temporarily halted due to the recent reverberation...
「震荡」？好官方的说法，还真是轻描淡写啊。
Reverberation? Such a formal way of putting it. You're really downplaying the whole thing.
…咳。因为此前在美梦中发生的「震荡」，「晖长石号」不得不停航了一段时间。
...Ahem. Following the previous reverberation in the sweet dream, the Radiant Feldspar had to suspend its voyage temporarily.
如今，扰乱梦境的不稳定因素已被消除。但因为…唔…*特殊原因*，原计划在匹诺康尼大剧院举办的谐乐大典不得不临时推迟。

Thankfully, the factors that disrupted the Dreamscape have been resolved. However, due to... well... certain special reasons, the Charmony Festival, originally scheduled at the Penacony Grand Theater, had to be temporarily postponed.
于是奥帝先生提议：不如将谐乐大典的举办场地搬至「晖长石号」，也正好借此机会宣布「晖长石号」重启巡航。
So Mr. Alfalfa suggested relocating the Charmony Festival to the Radiant Feldspar, taking this opportunity to announce the resumption of the airship's voyage.
既解决了家族的燃眉之急，又趁机给自己造了一波势，一举两得。不愧是那位传说中的大亨。
Well, that would meet The Family's needs and also create momentum for Mr. Alfalfa himself. Quite fitting for a legendary tycoon like him.
Thank you for explaining matters to me. Goodbye~
希望您能在晖长石号上度过一段愉快的时光。
I wish you a great time aboard the Radiant Feldspar.
这么多按钮…一个个按下去，我得忙到猴年马月啊？
So many buttons... How many centuries would it take to press them all?
没想到这群小狗崽还挺能干的，居然真的全都给回收了……
Didn't expect those pooches to actually recycle them all...
咳、咳咳！安全起见，您最好还是离那些东西远点。
A—Ahem! For your safety, please stay away from those objects.
「安全起见」？这些按钮一样的玩意，是什么了不得的东西吗？
For my safety? Are these buttons something dangerous?
倒也不是…这么和您说吧，这段时间有好事者在美梦中四处捣乱，逢人便把奇怪的按钮装置塞给对方。
Not exactly... Lately, there's been a prankster in the sweet dream who's been handing out strange button devices to anyone he meets.
听当事人讲，那恶作剧犯嘴上是这么说的：「只要按下这个按钮，整个匹诺康尼就会被炸上天！」。
According to those involved, he said something like, "Just press this button, and all of Penacony will explode!"
还好没人相信他的话。但保险起见，猎犬家系还是回收了这些按钮。
Luckily, no one believed him. Still, the Bloodhound Family collected these buttons just to be on the safe side.
Haven't the hounds caught the culprit yet?
始作俑者呢？猎犬还没把他捉拿归案吗？
Where's that prankster? Haven't the hounds caught him yet?
哈！不得不说，那家伙本事确实不小。
Hah! That guy has some skills, I have to admit that.
呃…但是猎犬家系不会轻易放弃的，破坏梦境秩序的恶人一定会受到严惩！
However, you know... the Bloodhound Family won't give up. Whoever disrupts order in the Dreamscape will face severe consequences!
Hasn't anyone actually tried pressing it?
按下去以后到底会有什么反应——真的没人试过吗？
What will happen if you press it? Hasn't anyone actually tried?
哼…您可能对匹诺康尼还不够了解吧？来到这里的客人都有一个共同点：特别惜命。
Well... perhaps you don't know much about Penacony? All the guests here have one thing in common: They're terrified of death.
总之，家族会尽快处理这些东西，还请您保持距离。
Anyway, The Family will deal with these things. Please kindly keep your distance.
好突兀啊，完全不像这船上该有的东西。
Definitely not the kind of thing you'd expect to find on a ship like this.
安全起见，请您远离这些按钮！
For your safety, please stay away from these buttons!
…又是人才激励部？内务审查？到底有完没完？
...The Talent Motivation Department again? Internal review? Will it ever end?
我在跑一个重点项目，没空跟你们置气。
I'm working on a major project, I don't have time to squabble with you guys.
雅利洛那一单，我的处理方式是通过了高层决议的。项目日志和通话记录都很齐全，你们不会自己去查吗？
The way I handled the Jarilo case was approved by senior management, and all of the project logs and call are complete. Can't you check them yourselves?
真搞不明白…你们盯着这个小案子不放、一直上纲上线，到底是出于什么居心？
I just don't understand... Why are you so fixated on this minor case and constantly escalating it? Seriously, what's your purpose?
令人厌倦的对话…直接挂断就好了，不是吗？
Sounds exhausting... Why not just hang up?
翡翠女士，好久不见。能有机会和您合作，我非常荣幸。
It's been a while, Madam Jade. I'm honored to have the opportunity to work with you.
还是那么放不开呢。抛开那些上下关系，把我当成你的平级就好，不必要的称谓都可以省去——比如「女士」，比如「您」。
You're still so formal, aren't you? Forget about the hierarchy and treat me as your equal. No need for unnecessary titles like "madam."
抱歉，一时半会儿还是难以适应。毕竟您…你是前辈。
I'm sorry, but it might take some time to get used to that. After all... you are a senior.
但现在，我们同为「石心十人」，托帕，我只需要你拿出最好的状态，毕竟接下来的谈判不容有失。
Well, now that we're both members of the Ten Stonehearts, I need you to be at your best, especially since the upcoming negotiations leave no room for error.
敏锐如你，一定早就看出来了吧？这次会面的真实用意。
As sharp as you are, I'm sure you've figured out the true purpose of this conference, right?
想必是那位老奥帝自作主张，想在公司和匹诺康尼正式会谈前探探虚实。
I believe Old Oti has taken it upon himself to test our limits before the official negotiations between the IPC and Penacony.
对，但这样更好。知道为什么吗？
That's true, and it works in our favor. Do you know why?
如果我们能提前和老奥帝达成某种共识，再摸清对方的底线，未来的谈判就能顺利很多，这是明面上的一层。
If we can reach some sort of agreement with Old Oti beforehand and gauge our opponent's boundaries, our future negotiations will go much more smoothly. That's the obvious benefit.
没错，而不可说的一层是…透过苜蓿草家主的行为，我们得以捕获一种信号：五大家系也许并不像「谐乐颂」唱的那般团结。
Exactly, and the hidden benefit is that... as the head of the Alfalfa Family, his actions suggest that the Five Lineages might not be as united as the Odes of Harmony would suggest.
只要「同谐」的影响还没有深入骨髓，个人的欲望就总能占据一席之地。我们运气不错，至少在匹诺康尼，还没有哪位大人物的音级高到彻底丧失了私欲。

As long as the influence of Harmony hasn't completely permeated their core, personal desires will always have their way. Thankfully, influential figures in Penacony haven't entirely suppressed their own desires.
就像公司里的明争暗斗一样，五大家系所谓的「万众一心」…在梦主失位的如今，也只剩下一句口号了。
It's similar to the power struggles within the IPC. The supposed "all for one" philosophy shared by the Five Lineages... it's just a slogan now that the Dreammaster has gone.
橡木家系倒台后，老奥帝一方就是匹诺康尼最大的势力了。即便只以继位顺序推算，他也是现今所有家主中在任最久，资历最深的人。

After the downfall of the Oak Family, Old Oti's faction became the dominant force in Penacony. Even if we consider only the succession order, he's the longest-serving and most senior among all the family heads.
嗯，所以接下来的会谈，我们务必要按商议好的策略来推进。就像下一盘棋，每一步都要审时度势。
Yes, that's exactly why we need to handle the conference following an agreed-upon strategy. It's like playing a game of chess, where every move needs to be carefully thought out.
当然。谈判的三步式：先聆听；再试探；最后展露刀芒。这是你教我的。
Absolutely. The three steps of negotiation: Listen, test, and strike. That's what you taught me.
真清晰——不过在雅利洛那桩案子里，你好像把顺序调换了呢。
Pretty clear, although you seem to have changed the order in the Jarilo case.
That was based on my personal experience.
抱歉打扰二位谈话，家主已经准备好和战略投资部的代表会面了。
I apologize for interrupting your conversation, but the family head is ready to meet the ambassadors from the Strategic Investment Department.
工作时间到了。打起精神，去见见那位身居高位的「配角」吧。
Time to get to work. Let's prepare ourselves and meet that esteemed "supporting actor."
记住我们的目标：为公司入驻匹诺康尼创造机会。砂金已经划开了一道口子，而你我…要把它彻底撕开。
Remember, our goal is to create an opportunity for the IPC to enter Penacony. Aventurine has already made a small opening, and you and I... we're going to tear it wide open.
嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！两位聪明又美貌的女士，欢迎登上我的「晖长石号」！
Ohohohoho! Welcome aboard my ship, the Radiant Feldspar, smart and charming ladies!
快来，请坐！咱们可得好好聊聊！
Please, have a seat! Let's have a pleasant conversation!
嚯嗬嗬嗬！欢迎，欢迎两位女士登船！怪我照顾不周，害你们在外面久等了吧？
Ohohoho! Welcome aboard, my dear ladies! Forgive me for any lack of attentiveness that might have led to a lengthy wait outside.
哪里的话，奥帝先生。能见到您是我们的荣幸。您也许不知道，《奥帝•艾弗法传》可是战略投资部员工入职后的必读书目。
No problem at all, Mr. Alfalfa. It's my honor to meet you in person. You may not be aware, but the book Oti Alfalfa: The Biography is a must-read for all Strategic Investment Department employees.
毕竟在很多人眼里，您可是只手撑起匹诺康尼经济体系的传奇人物啊。
After all, to many, you are the legendary figure who single-handedly built the Penacony economy.
嚯嗬嗬嗬！不愧是战略投资部的「石心十人」，两位果然深谙谈话之道。
Ohohoho! I expected no less from the Ten Stonehearts from the Strategic Investment Department! You're definitely skilled in the art of conversation.
老奥帝就喜欢和聪明人聊天，可以省掉套路和表面功夫，直奔主题！这次既然邀请了公司代表上船，二位大抵也能猜到我想讨论的议题了吧？

I always enjoy talking to smart people because we don't have to beat around the bush, we can just get straight to the point instead. Since I invited you IPC ambassadors on board, I'm sure you've figured out the topic I'd like to discuss, yes?
「匹诺康尼的未来」——没猜错的话，您想聊的就是这个。
The future of Penacony, if I'm not mistaken.
嚯嗬嗬嗬，没错，一语中的！简简单单的几个字，里面牵扯到的利害关系可是盘根错节，好不复杂！
Ohohoho! Precisely! Those few words represent a terribly complicated situation indeed!
就拿没来的那个金毛小子举例，他费了半天功夫，连自己的小命都差点搭进去了，究竟是为了什么？
Let's take that golden-haired guy who's not showing up for example. He put in great effort and almost got himself killed, but what was it all for?
到头来，不就是为了给公司创造一个契机，让你们有理由重新接手阿斯德纳这块肥肉吗？嚯嗬嗬嗬……
Wasn't it eventually to create an opportunity for you IPC to regain control of the precious Asdana? Ohohoho...
纵横商界十个琥珀纪沉淀下来的经验智慧，果真名不虚传。
The wisdom and experience you've accumulated over ten Amber Eras are truly impressive.
假设您方才的猜想是真，奥帝先生——面对公司的这步棋，您又打算作何回应呢？
Let's assume your assumptions are correct, Mr. Alfalfa. How would you respond to the IPC's actions?
我欣赏你的沉稳，翡翠女士！你一定见过很多世面。
I appreciate your composure, Miss Jade! You must have witnessed much in your worldly experiences.
但你对于匹诺康尼的了解还不够深…嚯嗬嗬嗬…面对垂涎三尺的贪狼，老奥帝我可不打算坐以待毙。
However, perhaps you don't know much about Penacony... Ohohoho... Old Oti won't sit idly by when faced with a greedy wolf.
Please go ahead... I'm all ears.
嚯嗬嗬嗬…那我就单刀直入了。这次赶在正式会谈之前约二位见面，就是为了劝战略投资部彻底放弃打匹诺康尼的算盘。
Ohohoho... then I'll be straightforward. I requested this meeting before the official conference to dissuade the Strategic Investment Department from trying to lay a finger on Penacony.
在这一步知难而退，你们就能更加体面地退场…也省得在大谈判桌上丢了公司的颜面。
If you back off now, you can make a smooth exit... and prevent the IPC from losing face during more important negotiations.
一位P<unbreak>45</unbreak>级的高管在梦境中遭到袭击、几近丧命，公司不可能对此坐视不理。再加上谐乐大典期间的骚乱…匹诺康尼在大众眼里的公信力也已经降到了新低。

One of our P<unbreak>45</unbreak> executives was attacked and nearly killed in the Dreamscape. The IPC can't simply ignore this incident. Moreover, considering the turbulence during the Charmony Festival... Penacony's credibility has taken a hit in the public's eyes.
即便您的态度再坚决，现实的困局依旧存在，不是吗？
Despite your determined attitude, the issues plaguing Penacony are real, are they not?
托帕小姐，你刚才好像用了一个词——「现实的困局」。但别忘了，这可是梦的世界！想在这里获得成功，想法就得够大、够野！
You used the term "real," Miss Topaz, but let's not forget that this is the realm of dreams! If you want to succeed here, you need ambition and unconventional thinking!
想知道我会如何应对危机？告诉你们也无妨：通过我的操作，匹诺康尼将会迈出伟大的一步，在寰宇间「自主上市」！
Curious about how I plan to respond to the IPC? Well, I don't mind sharing. My actions will help Penacony take a significant step forward by "self-listing" and going public!
听您的意思…您是想绕开公司，直接向全宇宙公开募股？
If I'm not mistaken... you want to bypass the IPC and go public on a universal scale?
正是如此！与其坐以待毙，眼睁睁地看着你们一步步蚕食匹诺康尼，我宁愿向全宇宙敞开美梦的大门。
Precisely! Instead of watching the IPC gnaw away at Penacony, I'd prefer to open the doors of the sweet dream to the entire universe.
从今天开始，银河中的任何有志之士都可以成为梦想之地的股东！这便是老奥帝将要贯彻的「同谐」之道，嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！
Starting today, anyone in the Cosmos can become a shareholder of the Land of the Dreams! This is the path of Harmony I'll choose! Ohohohoho!
这场改革理应来得更早些，无奈橡木家系是一群被「秩序」冲昏了头的木头脑袋…人如其名，他们的思维活络程度还赶不上我一个老头。

This reform should have been implemented earlier, but unfortunately, the Oak Family were a bunch of blockheads blinded by "Order"... Their level of intellectual flexibility doesn't even come close to an old fellow like me.
多亏了之前那波小「震荡」，挡在老奥帝改革路上的最大阻碍现在已灰飞烟灭了，嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！
Thanks to the little "reverberation" earlier, the biggest obstacle between me and my reforms has been eliminated! Ohohohoho!
苜蓿草家系会公开美梦乐园的财报，让全宇宙看到：哪怕经历了劫难，匹诺康尼仍然充满了潜力和机遇，家族依然对未来信心满满。

The Alfalfa Family will publicize the financial results of Sweetdream Paradise, so that the entire universe can see that despite the catastrophe, Penacony still holds immense potential and opportunities, and that The Family remains confident in its future.
危机亦是际遇。您其实一直在等待时机，等待匹诺康尼再次成为所有人的视线焦点。
Crisis and opportunity are two sides of the same coin. So, you've been waiting for the right moment for Penacony to regain the spotlight.
如果匹诺康尼借机成功渡过难关…届时公司再想掺上一脚，我们的一举一动便会暴露在万亿公众的视野之下。
And if Penacony should seize this opportunity to overcome adversity... Even if the IPC tries to intervene, every move we make will be scrutinized by trillions of people.
嚯嗬嗬…现在我相信了，翡翠小姐，看来你确实熟读过我的传记。下一步棋该怎么走…你们好好考虑一下吧。
Ohohoho... now I'm convinced that you've indeed familiarized yourself with my biography, Miss Jade. So, about your next move... please consider it carefully.
如此庞大的信息量，我们的确需要一些时间消化。
Indeed, we need some time to digest such a wealth of information.
奥帝先生，我提议会谈的上半场就到此为止。请允许我和托帕单独商议片刻，稍后再代表公司做出回应。
I suggest we conclude the first half of our conference, Mr. Alfalfa. Please allow Topaz and me to confer privately for a few moments and to respond on behalf of the IPC later.
嚯嗬嗬，当然可以。二位女士，请便。
Ohohoho, of course. Take your time, dear ladies.
苜蓿草家系会见了公司？
The Alfalfa Family had a meeting with the IPC?
是那位{RUBY_B#砂金}公司使节{RUBY_E#}捎来的口信，他说这是「礼尚往来」。
I got this information from a message sent by that {RUBY_B#Aventurine}IPC ambassador{RUBY_E#}. He said it was to "return the favor."
也不难理解，今日的匹诺康尼就和曾经的边陲监狱一样，外有民众与银河势力虎视眈眈，内有「秩序」的阴影暗流涌动。
It's not hard to imagine. Penacony today is pretty much like the frontier prison it once was, with external forces casting greedy eyes and the undercurrent of Order lurking within.
与其落入腹背受敌的境地，不如主动退让一步，邀请公司上桌谈判，名义上是合作，实则是在为自己谋取更多存续的机遇。

Instead of falling into a situation where they are plagued by both external and internal threats, Penacony would rather take a step back and invite the IPC to negotiate at the table, ostensibly to cooperate, but in reality, to secure more opportunities for their own survival.
难怪他们会邀请星穹列车从中斡旋。依你之见，我们该站在哪边？
Well, no wonder they sought the mediation from the Astral Express. In your opinion, who should we stand behind?
我不认为「同谐」是完全的受害者。无论出于何种理由，他们也有息事宁人的诉求，并且十分强烈，个中缘由不免引人遐想。

I don't think the followers of the Harmony are completely innocent victims in all of this. For reasons unknown, they have a strong desire to smooth things over, which leads to speculation about their motives.
若是让家族或公司其中一方完全掌控匹诺康尼，只怕这里又会变回声色犬马的虚假美梦，老无名客们的努力…又会再度付诸东流。

If either The Family or IPC were to assume full control of Penacony, it would return to its previous illusory dream of hedonism, and the efforts of those previous Nameless... would once again go to waste.
你们来了啊，休息得还好吗？
There you are. Did you rest well?
看你睡得很熟，就没有打扰。
I didn't disturb you since you were in a deep sleep.
It feels like I had a really long dream.
长梦总有醒来的时候，我们在匹诺康尼的冒险也临近尾声了。
Even long dreams eventually come to an end. Our adventure in Penacony is reaching its conclusion.
她作为列车组代表，先行前往和家族交涉了。等安排妥当，会立马联系我们。
She went to negotiate with The Family as a representative of the Crew. She'll contact us once her arrangements are ready.
太一之梦破碎后，蒙托尔星系的家族分家闻风赶来，迅速控制了现场。橡木家系的大多数成员都失去了意识，所幸没有生命危险。

After Ena's dream was shattered, The Family branch from the Montour System soon arrived and swiftly took control of the situation. Most members of the Oak Family fell unconscious, but fortunately, their lives were not in danger.
一切阴谋的始作俑者被指认为前「梦主」歌斐木，但当我们赶到的时候…{RUBY_B#群鸦}他{RUBY_E#}已经陨落了。
The mastermind behind the plans was confirmed to be Gopher Wood, the previous Dreammaster, but by the time we arrived... {RUBY_B#Crows}he{RUBY_E#} was dead already.
等待他的将是一场审判，至于更多的…家族不便透露。
He'll face a trial. As for further details... The Family would rather not disclose them.
蒙托尔分家在极短的时间内平息了流言的散布，绝大多数客人并无实感，生活也没有受到影响。

Since The Family branch from the Montour System managed to quash the spread of rumors within a short period of time, the majority of guests were unaware of the situation, and their lives remained largely unaffected.
匹诺康尼会变成怎么样？
这就是接下来，我们要在「晖长石号」上见证的事了。
That's what we're about to witness on the Radiant Feldspar.
到头来，普通人只觉得这是一场邪恶势力针对谐乐大典的袭击，而家族没有尽到「保护美梦」的职责，信用一落千丈。

Ultimately, the public perceived the incident as an attack by evil forces targeting the Charmony Festival. They believe The Family failed to safeguard the sweet dream, significantly eroding their credibility in the process.
尽管离事实还有不少差距，但也算是影响最小的结果了吧……
While quite different from the truth, this appears to be the outcome with the least impact...
毕竟你分不清哪些人是清醒的，而哪些人在装睡。他们固然会在走投无路时睁开双眼，却也会在危险过去后，重新投入梦的怀抱。
After all, you don't know who's awake and who's pretending to be asleep. While they'll open their eyes in the face of danger, once the danger subsides, they'll embrace the sweet dream again.
三杯「开拓的光辉」，向各位致敬。
Here's a toast, with three glasses of "Glory of the Trailblaze" to all of you.
是啊，很高兴能再见到各位。但重逢过后，也许就是道别了。
Yeah, it's good to see you all again, although we might be saying goodbye again after this reunion.
说什么呢，这可是我的店。
What are you talking about? This is my lounge.
很高兴能再见到各位。但重逢过后，也许就是道别了。
It's good to see you all again, although we might be saying goodbye again after this reunion.
星穹列车打算什么时候离开匹诺康尼？
When will the Astral Express leave Penacony?
还会再停留些时间，但不会太久。
We'll stay a bit longer, but not too long.
那这就是最后一次见面了？如果这是场告别，似乎还缺了点什么。
So, this is our final meeting, then? If this is a farewell, then it seems to be missing something.
音乐？氛围？啊，或许是一份特殊的调饮，献给那些不在这里的人。
Music? Atmosphere? Ah, maybe a special drink to honor those who are not here.
我想想，这杯调饮应该是庄严、肃穆，且独一无二的，因为我们要用它来纪念那些英雄……
Let's see. The mixed drink should be solemn, dignified, and unique, as we'll use it to pay respect to those fallen heroes...
敬沉眠在地下的无名客…还有加拉赫。
To the Nameless resting in peace... and to Gallagher.
不知道，上次酒吧相遇后，我就没再见过他了。回想起来，他的到来和离去总是这么悄无声息。
I'm not sure. I haven't seen him since our last meeting at the lounge. Come to think of it, he always did come and go quietly.
在这吧台边，我们无话不谈，可当他推门而去，我又发现自己完全不了解这个男人，加拉赫就是这么神秘。
We used to discuss everything here. But every time he'd leave, I'd realize that I didn't know him at all. Such is the mystery that is Gallagher.
我只是有种预感…也许他的心愿已了，不会再回来了。
I have a hunch... Perhaps he's already fulfilled his wishes and won't be coming back.
稍等，我还想和大家聊聊。
Just a moment. I'd like to talk to everyone.
当然可以，我们现在都等得起——加拉赫也是。
Sure, we can wait – Gallagher included.
开始之前，要不要先去跟你的同伴们聊聊？我们有的是时间。
Before we start, would you like to talk to your friends? We have plenty of time.
Great idea. I'll come back soon.
该调哪种饮料，我大概有些想法了。苦口或是甜口，你来做选择吧——看看哪种口味更符合你此时此刻的心境。
I think I have an idea about what drink to make. Would you like it bitter or sweet? It's up to you. Choose the flavor that suits you best at this moment.
「长梦苦短」——这酒吧里最不受欢迎的饮品。苦口、酸涩，就像血淋淋的现实。
Here's Bitter Dreams... the least popular drink in this bar. It's bitter and sour, just like the harsh realities of life.
不错的选择，开始调饮吧。
Not a bad choice. Let's start mixing.
「溺甜」——调制难度最高的饮品之一。只要原料比例稍微失衡，口感就会变得过分浓稠、腥腻。
Drowning Sweetness... one of the most challenging drinks to make. A slight imbalance in the ingredients can result in an overwhelmingly viscous, sweet taste.
反之，如果配比得当…那你就能得到一杯独一无二的甜美饮料，回味悠长。
However, with the right ratios... you get a uniquely sweet drink with a lingering aftertaste.
不错的选择，开始调饮吧。
Not a bad choice. Let's start mixing.
希望你能喜欢这杯，加拉赫。
I hope you'll enjoy this one, Gallagher.
Not quite right... No rush. Take your time.
为逝者干杯，敬他们的梦想。
A toast to the departed, in honor of their dreams.
In bitterness, we search for clarity.
In sweetness, we dream of the future.
…这杯好像不太对。没关系，再来一次。
...This doesn't seem quite right. Don't worry. Let's give it another try.
Let me know when you're ready.
这次的「开拓」之旅可谓惊险万分，却充满回味。但愿我们都能从这次旅途中汲取未来的养分，关于理想与偏执，关于清醒与梦想。
This Trailblazing expedition has been thrilling and memorable. Hopefully we've all gained insights about ideals, paranoia, clarity, and dreams from the experiences we've had.
星期日和知更鸟会怎样？
What will happen to Sunday and Robin?
一只眷顾大地的鸟，一只向往天空的鸟…即便知更鸟亲手阻止了兄长的愿望，她依然不愿放弃他。
One bird longs for the earth, and the other longs for the sky... Even if Robin had to stop her brother with her own hands, she won't give up on him.
但「同谐」的惩戒在所难免，等待他的将是一场审判，至于细节…家族不愿透露太多。
However, facing punishment from the Harmony is inevitable. He will face a trial. As for further details... The Family would rather not disclose them.
When did the Order infiltrate Penacony?
自家族入驻匹诺康尼以来，「秩序」残党便一直以橡木家系为掩护潜伏其中，用星核的力量不断加强对美梦的控制，最后酿成了大祸。

Since The Family took up residence in Penacony, the Order has been hiding in plain sight under the guise of the Oak Family, using the Stellaron's power to strengthen their hold on the sweet dream, which eventually resulted in disaster.
…这是家族的说辞，至于他们是否真的从头到尾一无所知，便是另一个微妙的问题了。
...That's the claim The Family makes. Whether they were truly unaware of all this is a delicate matter.
Did the IPC make any move?
砂金所做的一切，最终成功让公司获得了上桌的权利。一位职级更高的使节也因此来到匹诺康尼，与家族展开交锋。
Aventurine's efforts finally earned the IPC a seat at the table. As a result, a more senior representative arrived in Penacony and initiated negotiations with The Family.
而为了不让匹诺康尼再走上先前的老路，对星穹列车而言，公司也会成为谈判桌上不可或缺的助力。
As far as the Astral Express is concerned, the IPC will make for an invaluable ally during the negotiations to prevent Penacony returning to its former ways.
你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？
What happened to you in Ena's dream?
说来有些令人哑然，在无边无际的梦中，我得以回到故乡，与分别已久的朋友重逢。而因为一些特殊的原因…我想起了黄泉小姐。
Well, it was somewhat surprising. In that dream, I returned to my homeworld and reunited with my long-lost friends. And for some reason... Acheron resurfaced in my mind.
在发现自己的记忆里并未留下她的结局时，我便察觉到了苦涩的事实。
When I realized that her "conclusion" was not preserved in memories, I became aware of the bitter truth.
一段旅途行将结束的时候，总会让人感到怅然。我们能做的，就是让它拥有一个尽量圆满的结局。
The conclusion of a journey can often be sorrowful. All we can do is try to make sure it ends on a happy note.
Is there anything else you'd like to ask, {NICKNAME}?

The conclusion of a journey can often be sorrowful. All we can do is try to make sure it ends on a happy note.
「开拓」的旅途中，很少出现所有乘客一起下车的情况，但匹诺康尼…确实具备让我们这么做的意义。
It's rare for all passengers to leave the Express together during a Trailblazing expedition, but for Penacony... it seems most appropriate.
有列车长在，暂时不用担心。但我们也应该尽快返程，把无名客们的消息带给它。
Given the conductor's presence, there's no need to worry about it. However, it's crucial that we soon return to inform Pom-Pom about uh... the Nameless.
你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？
What happened to you in Ena's dream?
我梦见列车驶过一站又一站，有人到来，有人离去，而我们五人始终都在，这段旅程似乎永远也不会结束。
In my dream, the Express stopped at many places, and passengers came and went. However, the five of us were always present, and the journey seemed never-ending.
也许这就是我内心深处的渴望，当意识到这点时…我就知道它并不真实了。
Perhaps this could be a deep-seated desire inside me, and upon realizing this... I... I knew it wasn't real.
匹诺康尼的「秩序」是个例吗…
Is the Order incident in Penacony a unique case...?
智库里没有相关记录，只是我的猜测：「秩序」的隐患始终存在于「同谐」中，这原本是家族的内部问题。
No related records exist in the data bank, but I have a theory: The hidden dangers of the Order have always been within the Harmony — And this issue existed within The Family from the very beginning.
但如今，宇宙中有更多势力知道了这个秘密，银河形势…会变得更加复杂吧。
However, now that more powers in the universe are aware of this secret, the situation in the cosmos... will become more complicated.
就像我之前说的，来日方长，等收拾妥当，就前往我们的下一站吧。
Like I said, we'll go and see. Once we've packed everything, we should head to our next destination.
你看上去好像还有些疑问。
It seems like you have other questions.
有列车长在，暂时不用担心。但我们也应该尽快返程，把无名客们的消息带给它。
Given the conductor's presence, there's no need to worry about it. However, it's crucial that we soon return to inform Pom-Pom about uh... the Nameless.

就像我之前说的，来日方长，等收拾妥当，就前往我们的下一站吧。
Like I said, we'll go and see. Once we've packed everything, we should head to our next destination.
说起来，来这的路上发生了件怪事。我好端端走着，突然被人塞了件奇怪的礼物。
Guess what! Something weird just happened when I was on my way over here. Someone gave me a strange gift.
我拆开一看是个按钮，背后还有行字：「只要按下它，整个匹诺康尼就会被炸上天」——什么啊，太吓人了！
So I unwrapped it and found out it was a button, with a message on the back: "Just press this button, and all of Penacony will explode!" Sounds terrifying!
Could it be a terrorist attack!?
可哪有人会这么明目张胆地袭击啊，简直是唯恐天下不乱。
But who would launch such an obvious attack? They just want to stir up chaos.
Of course not! Who would press something like that!
我一转头，那人已经消失不见了。没办法，我只能把它交给附近的猎犬。听说类似的报案还有不少，在谐乐大典开幕前就有了。
By the time I turned around, the person had already vanished. So I handed it over to a nearby hound. I heard there were many similar reports before the Charmony Festival started.
唉，真担心匹诺康尼的未来啊……
I'm really worried about the future of Penacony...
唉，真担心匹诺康尼的未来啊……
I'm really worried about the future of Penacony...
言语总是苍白的，如果要为一段往事作结，在这间酒吧里，没有比调饮更好的方式。
Words always fall short. If you want to bring closure to past events at this lounge, there's no better way than mixing a drink.
将所有的回忆和感情倒在一起，搅拌均匀，透过时间的滤网，留在杯中的便是值得回味的东西。
Blend all your memories and emotions together and stir them well. Through the filter of time, what remains in the glass is something to savor.
敬沉眠于地下的无名客们，还有我的好友，加拉赫。
Here's to the Nameless resting in peace... and to my friend, Gallagher.
死亡是如此苦涩的事实，但你们所奉献的一切将被历史所铭记。
Death is a bitter truth, but what you did will be remembered by history.
我们不被外面的世界接受，因此才聚在这里。
We're not accepted by the outside world, so we've gathered here.
而终有一日，我们将魂归同处。
And one day, our souls will return to the same place.
