Here's to the Nameless resting in peace... and to my friend, Gallagher.
自由的精神将在群星间悠远传扬，它的余韵会比牧歌更加隽永。
The spirit of freedom will spread far and wide among the stars, and its legacy will be more timeless than a pastoral song.
我们不被外面的世界接受，因此才聚在这里。
We're not accepted by the outside world, so we've gathered here.
而终有一日，我们将魂归同处。
And one day, our souls will return to the same place.
要出发了么？那把它也带上吧。
Are you leaving? Then take this with you.
这最后一份特饮，我特地多调了些。往事如烟，希望它能让你们记得匹诺康尼的滋味。
I've mixed more of this last special drink for you. The past shouldn't be forgotten, so I hope it brings back the flavors of Penacony.
谢谢，我想，那一定会是令人难忘的味道。
Thank you. I'm sure it'll leave a lasting impression.
要是能见到加拉赫，就让他也喝上一杯吧。我懂那家伙的口味，他肯定会喜欢的。
If you happen to run into Gallagher, make sure he has a sip too. I know his tastes, and he'll be thrilled.
But what if we never cross paths with him?
Then... I guess you won't be seeing him.
好了，到此为止。你们还要去谈正事，别让氛围继续变得悲伤了。
Alright, enough with the heavy stuff. You guys have important things to take care of, so let's not dwell on things.
无论是星穹列车还是匹诺康尼，未来都还有很长的路要走呢，打起精神来。
Whether it's the Astral Express or Penacony, there's still a long journey ahead. So, let's lift our spirits, guys.
然后，就走向我们各自的明天吧。
…真难对付啊，那位老奥帝。没想到在匹诺康尼最危急的关头，他居然会走出「上市」这步险棋。
...Old Oti is a tricky opponent. I didn't expect him to take the risky step of "going public" at such a critical moment for Penacony.
没错，他很有胆量。正是凭借这份魄力，他才得以成为今天的奥帝•艾弗法。
Indeed, he's definitely bold. It's that kind of boldness that made him the Oti Alfalfa he is today.
但胜利的天平还没有向哪边倾斜。喊话声再大，声音本身都没有重量。托帕，拜托你打的那通电话，有下文吗？
Still, the outcome is uncertain. Shouting loud doesn't necessarily carry any weight. What about the phone call I asked you to make, Topaz?
有，对方答应了。不过人要再过一阵才能到场。
Ah, they agreed, but it'll take some time before they arrive.
这样正好。「甘露」的上桌顺序本就该在「鸩毒」之后。
Just as it should be. The "sweet dew" should be served after the "bitter poison."
看来这次，「交换苹果」的环节要被省略了。
Looks like we'll be skipping the "exchanging apples" step this time around.
谁叫对方是个贪得无厌的商人呢？只靠一颗不甜不淡的苹果是解决不了问题的——啊，这话好像也误伤到了我自己呢。
Now that we're dealing with a greedy merchant, a simple apple wouldn't make a difference. Well, I guess I included myself in that remark too.
我突然有些好奇，托帕：在你看来，匹诺康尼算是优质资产吗？
Now I'm a bit curious, Topaz. Do you think Penacony is a quality asset?
信用良好、暴利、有发展前景，哪怕经历这次劫难，依旧是银河中一等一的优质资产，这点毫无疑问。
Yes, despite its recent calamity, Penacony remains a top-quality asset within the Cosmos, with good credit, lucrative potential, and promising prospects.
嗯，显而易见。但我想问的是，以你的品位，这个项目显然有些*无趣*了，不是吗？
Well, that's obvious, but what I truly wanted to know is: This project is obviously too bland for your taste, isn't it?
呵，的确。要不是砂金拉我入局，我怎么也不会来这里的。
That's true. I wouldn't be here if it weren't for Aventurine.
但你却很信任他，对我们而言如生命般宝贵的「基石」，你竟然愿意托付给他，去完成一场赌局。
But despite that, you trust him. You even entrusted him with a Cornerstone, something as precious as life itself, to finish this gamble.
你不也一样么，翡翠女士？如果我们不跟注，你的「翡翠石」也没法这么顺利地入境，将流淌在美梦中的欲望尽收眼底，赢得谈判的筹码……

Are you not in the same boat, Miss Jade? Without us playing along, your "Jade Stone" wouldn't have made it across the border so easily, allowing you to see all desires that flow through dreams to gain a bargaining chip in negotiations...
为此，我当然也愿意搭上「托帕石」来为你们作掩护…真是好大一盘棋啊。
That's why I'm willing to stake my "Topaz Stone" to cover for you... It's like one big elaborate game of chess.
那孩子下定决心要做的事，谁也阻拦不了——连命运都不行。至少现在他还活着，这已经是最好的结果。
Once that kid sets his mind to something, nothing can stop him, not even fate. Well, at least he's still alive, and that's the best outcome.
好像…聊得有些跑题了，翡翠女士。我们是不是该讨论下后续的策略？
Looks like... we've strayed off-topic, Miss Jade. Should we discuss our next steps?
不必了，等会儿我一个人进去。你去接待我们的贵客吧，等我消息行动。
No need. I'll go it alone. Meanwhile, you can go greet our honored guest and wait for my message.
（那位是…知更鸟？原来她也在「晖长石号」上。）
(Is that... Robin? She's also here, on the Radiant Feldspar.)
知更鸟小姐，你好，没想到能在这船上遇见你。
Greetings, Miss Robin. I didn't expect to meet you here.
翡翠女士？你好。谐乐大典的开幕典礼搬至「晖长石号」了，我提前上来做些准备。
Miss Jade? Greetings. The opening ceremony for the Charmony Festival has been moved to the Radiant Feldspar, so I'm here making some preparations.
你呢，和老奥帝先生谈过了么？
How about you? Have you spoken with Mr. Alfalfa?
事实上，我正要去见他。知更鸟小姐和他很熟吗？
I'm actually on my way to meet him right now. Do you know him well, Miss Robin?
很可惜，我并未见过他，只是从…{RUBY_B#星期日}前橡木家主{RUBY_E#}口中听过寥寥几句评价：老奥帝先生是位厉害的商人，但其他方面…不敢恭维。

Unfortunately, I've never met him. I've only heard a few comments from the {RUBY_B#Sunday}former head of the Oak Family{RUBY_E#}... Mr. Alfalfa is respectable when it comes to business, but in other respects... I can't say the same.
那你觉得，盛会之星的未来会走向何方？
Where do you think the future of the Planet of Festivities is headed?
就像晖长石号一度停航，却又再度启航。我相信美梦会迎来它的新生。
I believe the sweet dream will see its rebirth, just like the Radiant Feldspar resumed its voyage.
「同谐」需要找到新的方向，只有与过去告别，我们才能驶向明天。
The Harmony needs a new direction. Only by bidding farewell to the past can we actually sail into the future.
没有永远的盟友，也没有永远的敌人。希望我们能从这场交易中…各取所需。
There are no permanent allies or everlasting enemies. So, let's both... take what we need from this deal.
当然。期待你的献唱，我们庆典上有缘再见。
Naturally. I'm looking forward to your performance. See you at the Festival.
久等了，奥帝先生。会谈可以继续了。
Thank you for your patience, Mr. Alfalfa. Let's continue our discussion.
嚯嗬嗬嗬，这么快就商量出对策了，翡翠女士？唔…托帕女士去哪了？
Ohohoho, figured out something already, Miss Jade? Hmm... but where is Miss Topaz?
托帕还有别的任务，一会儿你会见到她的。谈话还是可以继续，就你跟我。
Topaz has something else to take care of, you'll be seeing her later. Talks can still continue between the two of us.
是我的错觉吗，女士？你说话的语气和刚才比…很不一样。
Is it just me, Miss? Your tone sounds... very different now.
总得在后辈面前树个好榜样。谈判场上，口无遮拦可不是什么好习惯，不是吗？
I need to set a good example for my junior. It's not a good habit to be too loose-lipped during negotiations, right?
现在，我们可以打开天窗说亮话了。你相信吗，奥帝？过去十个琥珀纪，你不是唯一一个亲历了宇宙市场变迁的「商人」。
Now, we can speak frankly and openly. Do you believe what I said, Oti? You're not the only merchant who has seen the changes in the cosmic market over the past ten Amber Eras.
有意思…嚯嗬嗬嗬，这下有意思了。
打开天窗说亮话，很好！我最喜欢的就是公开透明。说来听听吧，你这步棋要往哪下？
Good! It's good to be straightforward! Openness and transparency are my things! So, tell me, what's your next move?
不巧，我的习惯是先将军、再落子。直接说结论吧：第一，你的计划不可能实现。匹诺康尼绝无绕过公司「上市」的可能。
Unfortunately, I'd like to speak the harsh truth before laying out my plan. Let's cut to the chase. First, your plan won't work. Penacony has no way of sidestepping the IPC and going public.
第二，你也无法阻止公司入驻匹诺康尼。我们有的是时间和办法，找到合适的突破口，一点点将它撕开、再填满，让阿斯德纳星系再次熟悉公司的手腕。

Second, you can't stop the IPC from entering Penacony. We've got all the time and connections in the world to find a way in. We'll keep tearing down and rebuilding this place until the Asdana system gets used to the IPC's ways again.
你说过的话，我现在悉数奉还。为了保住你的体面，也为了你能不在正式会谈上成为众矢之的——你最好放弃那个天方夜谭的计划。
Now I'm repeating your words exactly. If you don't want to be a laughingstock and have everyone gunning for you at the official conference... you'd better drop your little pie-in-the-sky plan.
嚯哈哈哈哈哈！有趣，真是太有趣了！
你这画皮的女人，口气倒是不小！我今天倒要看看，你手里究竟攥了什么牌。
You surely have a way with words! Now I'm curious to know what you have up your sleeve.
不要忘了，奥帝先生，公司掌握着星际间体量最大的宣传平台。全宇宙的新闻网络，有超过一半都是我们的喉舌。
Mr. Alfalfa, let's not forget that the IPC controls the biggest interstellar publicity platform. More than half the news networks in the universe take their orders from us.
你把匹诺康尼公开募股的消息散播出去的下一秒，数以万亿计的用户就会同时收到这样一条推送：
The moment news spreads about Penacony going public, trillions of customers will immediately receive a message like this:
<color=#dbc291ff>「家族对匹诺康尼的保护已经失效，在梦境中发生意外或将导致永久性的脑死亡。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"The Family's protection for Penacony has expired. Any mishaps in the Dreamscape could result in permanent brain death."</color>
猜猜看，在全银河都把目光投向匹诺康尼的时候，仅凭这一条消息，公司有多少种方法能在二十四个系统时里把苜蓿币贬得一文不值？

Care to guess how many ways we have to turn Alfalfa credits into worthless junk within a measly <unbreak>24</unbreak> system hours? With the entire cosmos keeping a close eye on Penacony, I assure you it won't be too hard.
You really think you can pull that off?
我的鞭子很长，即便在庇尔波因特，也可以轻而易举地勒住你的脖子。
Even from Pier Point, as distant as it may be, I'm more than capable of keeping you on a tight leash.
但只要你放弃那个愚蠢的上市计划，公司就会承诺：绝不损害以你为首的家主们的利益。
However, if you agree to give up that half-baked plan to go public, the IPC will assure you that we'll never jeopardize the interests of the family heads under your leadership.
在阿斯德纳，我们也需要盟友。公司可以「帮助」匹诺康尼融资——就从买进<unbreak>30%</unbreak>的股权开始。有了我们的资金流入，匹诺康尼的稳定和重建也不过是一夜工程。

After all, we also need allies here in Asdana. The IPC can assist Penacony with financing — starting by acquiring <unbreak>30%</unbreak> equity shares. With our financial support, stabilizing and rebuilding Penacony will be a piece of cake.
<unbreak>30%</unbreak>，谁能保证你们的胃口不会越变越大？
<unbreak>30%</unbreak> equity, you say? Who can guarantee you won't want more in the future?
呵呵，整件事的精妙之处不就在这吗？答案是：没有人。没人能够保证，一切全凭自觉和尊重，至少董事会多少还会顾及你们这些家主的面子。

Heh, that's the brilliant part of it all. The answer is simple: No one. There are no guarantees. It all hinges on self-awareness and mutual respect. However, the board of directors will consider the interests of the family heads to some extent.
老奥帝，你是个聪明人，如此大费周章和我下这盘棋，不就是为了展现自己的商业手腕，好为家族谋求更多利益么？
You're a smart merchant, Old Oti. Isn't the whole purpose of this elaborate game to showcase your business acumen and seek more benefits for The Family?
点到为止，对彼此都好，如果你觉得这还不够——让匹诺康尼上市的另一个目的，无非是想进一步扩大盛会之星的影响力，吸引更多宾客前来挥霍。

It benefits us if we both take a step back. And if that's not enough for you, I'm pretty sure that another goal of making Penacony go public is to expand the influence of the Planet of Festivities and attract more customers.
这个诉求，我也给你准备了相应的解决方案。
I understand your concern, and I have a solution for that, too.
可以。公司的诚意我了解了，作为苜蓿草家系的家主，老奥帝似乎没有拒绝的理由——
Fine, now I see your sincerity. As the head of the Alfalfa Family, I don't think I have any reason to refuse your offer...
但身为{RUBY_B#「同谐」希佩}祂{RUBY_E#}的选民，我还是需要最后一个答案的。
However, as {RUBY_B#Xipe, the Harmony}THEIR{RUBY_E#} chosen one, I still need one final answer.
在我还是孩子时，就听大人念起过古琥珀纪的故事：「同谐」希佩飞升，「秩序」太一陨落。
When I was a child, I heard the adults recite the tale of the Ancient Amber Era, about the ascension of Xipe the Harmony, and the downfall of Ena the Order.
在那古老的岁月，「秩序」与「存护」那么接近。公司身为琥珀王的信徒，为何不站在「秩序」一方，却要寻求和家族合作？
The Order and the Preservation used to be close in ancient times. So why does the IPC, as a follower of the Amber Lord, seek collaboration with The Family instead of aligning with the Order?
这答案或许比你想的更简单：信用点，人们最爱的东西，星际间唯一被认可的恒定价值货币，公司有能力保障它永不贬值。

The answer is simpler than you think: It's all about credits, everyone's favorite thing and the universally recognized currency among the stars. The IPC has the power to perpetually ensure their value.
每有一个世界加入信用体系的版图，寰宇和平的事业便会再添一砖一瓦，直至所有的外汇、资本、贸易都被归于统一的「货币体系」之下。

With each new world integrated into the credit system, the IPC adds another building block to its cause. Eventually, all exchanges, capital, and businesses will operate within a unified monetary system.
届时，一切星球的发展将归纳于帐，条目了然；所有的概念都可以被定义、估值、交换、流通，而它的中心，即是克里珀的「信用」。
By then, all planetary developments will be recorded in accounts with well-defined values and the ability for exchange and circulation. And the heart of everything will be Qlipoth's "credit."
然后，公司便能操纵一切。
And then the IPC will be able to exert influence over everything.
我们只是想建立永恒的「存护」。所以你也一定能理解——
Our intention is to establish enduring Preservation, so I'm sure you can understand...
一个宇宙，不需要两种「秩序」。
This universe doesn't need two types of Order.
嚯嗬嗬，可以，可以！你说服我了。
Ohoho! Well said! Now you've convinced me.
现在告诉我吧，那个「解决方案」是什么？看看你我在想的是不是同一件事。
Alright, tell me your solution. Let's see if we're thinking the same thing.
那就继续方才的话题吧。托帕，邀请「甘露」上桌吧。
Then let's continue our conversation. Please, Topaz, invite "Sweet Dew" to join us at the table.
Thank you for your presence, Miss Himeko.
奥帝先生，为您引荐一下——这位就是匹诺康尼未来的股东之一，星穹列车的姬子女士！
Please allow me to introduce her to you, Mr. Alfalfa. This is Miss Himeko from the Astral Express, one of the future shareholders of Penacony!
奥帝•艾弗法先生，久仰大名。很荣幸能作为星穹列车的代表与您会面。
I've heard so much about you, Mr. Alfalfa. It's an honor to meet you as representative of the Astral Express.
嚯嗬嗬，果然如此…眼前这位美丽的女士就是星穹列车的领航员？幸会，幸会。
Ohoho! This stunning lady is the navigator of the Astral Express? It's a pleasure to meet you.
提案的大致内容，各位已经有所了解了。按照设想，这轮融资结束后，公司将持有匹诺康尼<unbreak>30%</unbreak>的股份。
I believe everyone here is familiar with the general contents of the proposal. After this round of financing, the IPC is expected to hold <unbreak>30%</unbreak> of Penacony's shares.
而后，公司会将其中5%的股权转赠给星穹列车，并推举姬子女士为独立董事，此举是为表彰历史上的无名客为梦想之地做出的牺牲和贡献。

Then, the IPC will transfer 5% of that stake to the Astral Express and recommend Miss Himeko as an independent director to honor the sacrifices and contributions made by the former Nameless to the Land of the Dreams.
虽然一切尚未尘埃落定，但在座各位如此认可列车的「开拓」之道，我们深感荣幸。
While this decision isn't finalized yet, we are honored that everyone here recognizes the way of the Trailblaze.
无名客们踏上旅程，不是为了谋名逐利。但倘若家族和公司都有此意，我们也会尽到董事会成员的职责。

While the Nameless didn't embark on their journeys for fame or fortune, if this is the wish of both The Family and the IPC, I will represent the Astral Express and fulfill my duty as a member of the board of directors.
经过列车组全体成员表决同意，星穹列车会协助匹诺康尼的重建事业。除此之外，在今后的旅途中，我们也会致力于将盛会之星的美梦带去更多世界。

The entire Crew has agreed to assist in the reconstruction of Penacony. Beyond that, in our future travels, we are committed to bringing the beautiful dreams of the Planet of Festivities to more worlds.
当然，所有的合作都基于一个前提——
Of course, all cooperation is based on one premise...
匹诺康尼贯彻的「同谐」之道不能被再度歪曲，同样的悲剧，绝不能再发生第二次。
The Path of Harmony in Penacony must not be distorted again... and such a tragedy must never recur.
老奥帝同意了，这一关就算是过去了吧？那剩下几位家主……
Old Oti is in agreement, so the issue is settled, I presume. What about the remaining family heads...?
他们也会认清局势的。当问出最后一个问题的时候，老奥帝代表的，就不止是苜蓿草家系了。
They will soon realize the situation. When the last question was asked, Old Oti represented more than just the Alfalfa Family.
正式会谈的时间放在什么时候合适？我去安排。
When should we schedule the formal negotiations? I'll handle the arrangements.
都听你的。接下来的谈判和交接工作交给你就行，我不参与了。
It's all up to you. I'll step back and let you handle the negotiations and takeover. I won't be involved.
这个案子本就是砂金揽下来的，而你是他指定的项目伙伴。若不是那孩子玩得太过火，我也不会被推到幕前来。
Aventurine initiated this case, and you were his project partner. If that kid hadn't overplayed his hand, I wouldn't have been pushed to the forefront.
我今天来，就是为了帮你们除掉最难拔的那根钉子。我相信你能给这一单收个好尾，小叶琳娜。
I came here today to help you sort out the toughest issue. I trust you'll be able to wrap things up quite nicely, little Jelena.
当然，肯定没问题。也请「钻石」放心吧。
Of course, there won't be any problems. And please, give Diamond my assurance.
安心吧，「钻石」一直很信任我们。我会替你美言两句的，升回P<unbreak>45</unbreak>不是问题。
Don't worry. Diamond has always trusted us. I'll put in a good word for you, and you'll have your P<unbreak>45</unbreak> position back in no time.
「晖长石号」…多好的一艘船啊。正事聊完，我也该去顾及下自己的*小爱好*了。
Radiant Feldspar... what a fantastic ship. Now that my business is done, it's time for me to indulge in my own little hobby.
你想把「慈玉典押」也开到这空艇上来？
You want to open a Bonajade Exchange branch on this ship, too?
毕竟这种机会可不多见。看看这船上的客人吧，从他们身上肯定能得到不少有价值的宝物。
Opportunities like this don't come around often. Just look at the guests on this ship. They're surely holding a wealth of valuable treasures.
就这样吧，典当行没有老板娘在可没法开张。回头见，托帕。
Well, I'll take my leave. A pawnshop can't run without a boss. See you around, Topaz.
翡翠女士，我还有一个问题想问。
I have one more question for you, Miss Jade.
那剂「鸩毒」——我有些好奇，你是从哪里得到消息的？
That dose of "bitter poison"... I'm curious as to how you found this information.
并非是我找到了消息，而是消息找到了我。它来自…一位心系「同谐」未来的女孩。
I didn't find the information. It came to me. It was from... a lady concerned with the future of the Harmony.
作为交换，我也要帮她完成一件事，但那是后话了。等我们离开匹诺康尼后再办也不迟。
In return, I've agreed to help her with something, but that's for later. We can deal with it after we leave Penacony.
你看，这就是「投资」，机遇的种子被埋在土中，只需一点养料便可生根发芽，而我们要做的，就是耐心等待。

You see, that's what "investment" is all about. The seeds of opportunity are already sown, they only need a little bit of nourishment to take root. And then after, all we need to do is to wait patiently.
就像现在，我等的最后一位「贵客」…也该登上这艘船了。
Like right now for example. It's just about time my final "guest" boarded the ship.
（混进来的过程比我想的还要轻松，家族的安保还是一样疏漏百出。）
(Sneaking in was easier than I thought. The Family's security is as lax as ever.)
（这里就是「晖长石号」…真豪华啊。）
(So, this is the Radiant Feldspar... so luxurious.)
（通过「抵押」便能实现愿望的典当行，这艘船上真的有那种地方吗？）
(A pawnshop that grants wishes... is there really a place like that on this ship?)
（流言是真是假，我只能自己去一探究竟了。）
(I'll find out for myself if the rumors are true or not.)
（一下子就消失不见了，原来星穹列车也在这啊。）
(Huh, vanished in the blink of an eye. So, the Astral Express is here, too.)
...By the way, there's one more thing.
我和老奥帝先生已经商量好了，<color=#dbc291ff>为了感谢无名客对匹诺康尼做出的贡献，我会以家族的名义赠予星穹列车一件礼物。</color>
Mr. Alfalfa and I discussed it. <color=#dbc291ff>I'll present a gift to the Astral Express on behalf of The Family as a token of gratitude for the Nameless' contributions to Penacony.</color>
麻烦各位帮忙准备一下相应的流程了。
Please help me with the necessary arrangements.
啊，您好，小姐——需要帮助吗？
Oh, greetings, miss. Is there anything I can help you with?
你知道「典当行」该怎么走么？
Do you know how to get to the pawnshop?
典当…噢，您想找的应该是「慈玉女士」的房间吧？听说她的确正在提供一些…特别的服务。
Pawnshop... Ah, you must be talking about Lady Bonajade's place, right? I heard she offers... special services there.
我把位置在您的设备上标记出来了，请查收。
I've marked the pawnshop's location on your device. Please feel free to check it out.
（「慈玉女士」？似乎从谁那里听过这个名字…是银狼吗？）
(Lady Bonajade? I think I've heard that name somewhere before... Was it from Silver Wolf?)
（说起来，她说要去碰碰天才俱乐部后就消失不见了，不知道还顺利吗。）
(Come to think of it, she disappeared after mentioning that she was going to meet with the Genius Society. I wonder how things turned out for her.)
(No, it's not the best time to do that...)
（不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。我得先去找到那位「慈玉女士」。）
(Sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I've got to find Lady Bonajade first.)
(No, it's not the best time to do that...)
（不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。晚点有机会再找你聊天吧。）
(Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I'll catch up with you later.)
欢迎光临「慈玉典押」，晖长石号分行。
Welcome to Bonajade Exchange, Radiant Feldspar Branch.
How should I address you, dear lady?
萨缪尔，很好的名字呢。那么萨缪尔小姐，你想要什么？又愿意为之付出什么？
Samuel, nice name. So, what do you need, Miss Samuel? And what are you willing to give up in return?
我想活下去。为了这个愿望，我愿意押上自己的一切。
I want to keep on living. And for that, I'm willing to give up everything I have.
萨缪尔小姐，请回吧。我想，你对「典押」的定义还不够了解。
Miss Samuel, I think you'd best turn around. It seems you're not quite familiar with the term "pawn."
就是字面意思。我能感受到你强烈的求生欲，它炽烈得像一团火焰；但与之相对的，你拿不出任何与它等价的押物。
I mean it literally. I sense your burning desire to live, but unfortunately, you don't have anything of equal value to offer.
果然，什么「通过抵押便能实现愿望的典当行」…只是故弄玄虚。
Okay, "A pawnshop that grants wishes"... I see. It's just a marketing gimmick.
很严厉的指控呢，你不理解也很正常。但没关系，我会帮你看清。
That's quite a harsh accusation. I understand you may not fully comprehend what I mean, but don't worry, I'll help you understand.
去找这几个人吧，他们都光顾过我的典押行。用你的眼睛去见证，看看他们的愿望有没有实现。
Go and talk to these people. They're all customers of my pawnshop. See for yourself if their wishes have come true.
然后，回到我这里来，我会让你理解「典押」意味着什么，也会让你明白自己还缺少什么。
Once you've done that, come back to me. I'll help you understand the true meaning of "pawn" and make you realize what you're missing.
（与其说是典押行的老板娘，那位「慈玉女士」的气质…更像是一位放贷人呢。）
(That Lady Bonajade feels more like a... moneylender rather than the owner of a pawnshop.)
（反正暂时没有别的事做，就照她说的四处看看吧。）
(Well, I've got nothing better to do anyway. I'll do as she says and see what happens.)
多萝西，我想送你一件礼物。你看。
I've prepared a gift for you, Dorothy. Check this out.
哇…好漂亮的项链！是猫眼石的吗？太美了……
Whoa... what a beautiful necklace! Is it made of cymophane? It's stunning...
你怎么知道我喜欢猫眼石的首饰？还是紫色色相，就像爸爸年轻时送给妈妈的那一串…我从没和别人谈起过这事，戴尔，你是怎么知道的？
How did you know I love jewelry made of cymophane? It has the same purple hue as the necklace my dad gave my mom... I've never told anyone about it. How did you find out, Dell?
你愿意…愿意和我交往吗？
Will... will you go out with me?
以前我没答应你，是因为我觉得你根本不知道我喜欢什么。但是这份礼物让我明白了…你其实一直在默默观察，尝试着去了解和我有关的一切…所以，我愿意。

I never said "yes" before because I thought you had no idea what I liked. But this gift made me realize you were actually paying attention all along, trying to learn everything about me... So, yes, I will.
太、太好了！我…我的愿望真的实现了！
W—Wonderful! My... my wish has actually come true!
多萝西，我们走吧？到外面去，一起看看十二时分的风景！
So, shall we go, Dorothy? Let's go outside and enjoy the stunning views of the Twelve Hours!
哈哈哈！不自量力的小姑娘，又来给老子送钱啦？
Hahaha! You stupid little girl! Coming back to lose more money, huh?
一场定输赢…我和你赌我的全部家当！
This will be our final game... I'm betting my entire fortune!
嚯嚯，口气这么大？行啊，那就让我见识下你的本事！
Oh? A big talker, huh? Alright, let's see what you've got!
I... I won? I actually... won!?
这…这不可能！你之前明明都连着输给我十把了…我怎么可能在这种关键时刻失手？！
Th—This... this can't be! You lost to me ten times in a row... How could I possibly lose to you at such a crucial moment!?
是真的…那位慈玉女士是货真价实的……
It's true... Lady Bonajade has truly blessed me...
哈…哈哈…哈哈哈哈！！天无绝人之路，属于「赌圣史黛西」的时代终于要来了！
Ha... Ha... Hahaha!! Finally, my luck has turned for the better! A great new era for Stacy the Master Gambler has arrived!
I... I won? I actually... won!?
这…这不可能！你之前明明都连着输给我十把了…我怎么可能在这种关键时刻失手？！
Th—This... this can't be! You lost to me ten times in a row... How could I possibly lose to you at such a crucial moment!?
是真的…那位慈玉女士是货真价实的……
It's true... Lady Bonajade has truly blessed me...
哈…哈哈…哈哈哈哈！！天无绝人之路，属于「赌圣史黛西」的时代终于要来了！
Ha... Ha... Hahaha!! Finally, my luck has turned for the better! A great new era for Stacy the Master Gambler has arrived!
嗯…对，你没听错。我已经抓到他了。
Yeah... you heard right. I've got him.
他一直藏在匹诺康尼，「太阳的时刻」。他换了个身份，还混进折纸大学当了个教授。
He's been hiding at the Moment of Sol in Penacony, using a fake identity. And he even posed as a professor at Paperfold academy.
我和家族已经谈好了。引渡相关的工作就交给你们了。
I've made a deal with The Family. I'll leave the extradition-related paperwork to you.
…怎么抓到他的？呵…有贵人相助。细节就别问了。
...How did I find him? Well... let's just say I had some help from an influential figure. Don't ask for all the details.
二十二年啊…我追了他整整二十二年，跑遍了银河的每个角落。没想到最后会在这里，用这种方式……
Twenty-two years... Twenty-two years of chasing this guy all over the Cosmos. Y'know, never thought it'd end up like this, right here...
我先挂了，搭档…我要敬自己一杯。
I'm gonna hang up for now, partner... I need to raise a glass to myself.
沃克挂断了电话，他金属构成的深邃眼窝里渗出了一滴燃料…那是智械的泪水。
Walker hangs up the phone, and a drop of fuel seeped out from his deep, metal-constructed eye sockets... those were the tears of an Intellitron.
(All of their wishes actually did come true...)
（但我还是不太明白，她是怎么做到的，「典押」又意味着什么？回去问问吧……）
(But I just don't understand. How did she do it? And what does "pawn" really mean? I should go back and ask...)
嗯，我找到了您说的那几个人。光顾了「慈玉典押」后，他们各自的愿望确实都成真了。
Yeah, I found those people, and it seems their wishes did come true after visiting the Bonajade Exchange.
但我还是不知道你想让我看清什么。他们看上去都那么的…圆满。
But I'm not sure what you want me to see. They all seem to be living... fulfilled lives.
别着急，这一步只是为了让你相信「慈玉典押」货真价实。接下来，我自然会告诉你他们付出的代价。
Not so fast. This step was just to show you that the Bonajade Exchange is genuine, that I had the power to grant their wishes. And now, I'll tell you the price they paid.
戴尔是个富家子弟，一路追求心仪的女孩多萝西而不得。为了俘获对方的芳心，他与我做了交易：抵押自己全部的财产，换取一样必定能打动多萝西的礼物。

Dell was from a wealthy family. He was head over heels for Dorothy and wanted to win her heart, so he made a deal with me. He put up his entire fortune in exchange for a gift that would impress Dorothy.
以公司的情报和人脉网络，这轻而易举。但戴尔很快就会因为支付不起客房费用被赶出梦境，那之后能否摆脱穷困潦倒的生活…就看他个人的努力了。

It was a piece of cake for me, thanks to my IPC connections. However, Dell will soon find himself evicted from the Dreamscape because he can't afford his room. Whether he can bounce back from poverty... well, that depends on him.
祝愿那串项链能让他们的感情永不破裂。
Let's just hope that necklace will keep their relationship from crumbling.
嗜赌成性的史黛西，她希望从我这里获得绝世的好运。但她没有任何可供抵押的财物，所以我收走了另一样东西：她所有的亲密关系。
Then there's Stacy, a lady with a gambling addiction. She wanted some serious luck, but she had nothing to offer, so I took something else instead. I took away all her close relationships.
从走出慈玉典押的那一刻起，星际中的每一间赌场都会记得她的名字，而父母手足会因此和她断绝往来，史黛西也不可能再交到真正的朋友。

From the moment she stepped out of the Bonajade Exchange, every casino in the cosmos would remember her name, but her parents and siblings would sever ties with her, and it would be impossible for Stacy to make any real friends again.
她会因「幸运」获得无穷的财富，却再也无法将那财富用在重要之人身上。
She will accrue a vast wealth due to her "good luck," but she'll never be able to use it for the people who truly matter to her.
至于沃克警探——他用了二十年的时间尝试抓捕一位罪大滔天的通缉犯，但始终踩不到对方的影子。彻底绝望之际，他找到了我。
As for Detective Walker, he spent two decades chasing down a wanted criminal for some heinous crime, but he never caught the guy. In his desperation, he came to me.
他的抵押物是自己的存储系统。很快，他作为「警探」的记忆就会被抹除，他会彻底忘记自己是谁，也不会记得自己曾经做出了什么样的牺牲。
He offered his own memory system as collateral. In due time, his memories as a detective will be erased, and he will completely forget his own identity and all the sacrifices he has made.
很有趣的现象，不是吗？我满足一些人的渴望，施与他们恩惠。而这恩惠很快又会回到我这里，伴随着更大的渴望。
Interesting, don't you think? I fulfill people's desires and grant them favors, and soon, they come back to me with even greater desires.
而当人们窥见他人的欲望得到满足时，自己也会产生同等的欲望，无穷无尽。最后，我就能从这片漩涡中捞起我想要的东西。
When people see others' desires get fulfilled, they develop their own desires. It seems like an endless cycle but it does have a goal. In the end, I will get what I desire from this whirlpool.
而我最擅长的事，恰巧就是等待。所以现在，你明白自己要付出什么了吗，萨缪尔小姐？还是说，我该称呼你为……
And patience happens to be one of my greatest strengths. So now, do you understand what you must give up, Miss Samuel? Or should I address you as...
AR<unbreak>-26710</unbreak>, a remnant of Glamoth's Iron Cavalry?
你比我想象中镇定许多呢。失熵症…真是一场无妄之灾啊，不是么？
You are much calmer than I expected. Entropy Loss Syndrome... truly an unjust misfortune, isn't it?
格拉默人为了不让共和国最强大的武器落入他人手中，就在战士们的基因编译中设下了这么一道「保险」。
The higher-ups in Glamoth implemented such a "fail-safe" within the genes of their warriors, just to make sure the Republic's most powerful weapons wouldn't fall into the wrong hands.
而代价…因为这些铁骑从来没有被视作独立的「人」，自然也无代价而言。
As for the price... Those Iron Cavalries weren't exactly seen as regular, independent "humans," so there wasn't really a price to be paid.
可你不一样，如今的你是星核猎手，是「流萤」，一个鲜活的生命。你当然想活下去，但昔日的苍穹战线已经覆灭，知晓这一秘密并能治愈它的人，也不复存在了。

However, you are different. You're now a Stellaron Hunter, a living being named Firefly. Naturally, you want to continue your existence, but with the Firmament Front gone, the people who know the secret and can cure the disease are nowhere to be found.
你想说，公司有办法做到？
Are you suggesting that the IPC has a remedy?
不是没有希望，我只能言尽于此。
Well, there might be a silver lining. That's all I can say for now.
原来如此。难怪你会说我拿不出等价的抵押物，因为「我自己的一切」没有意义……
I see. It's no wonder you said I can't provide anything of equal value, because nothing I own holds any meaning...
你想要的，是我为了能够活下去，亲手给自己的伙伴们戴上镣铐。
So, you're going to ask me to personally restrain my partners to ensure my own survival.
Unfortunately, that's not quite the case.
「伙伴」，很不错的说法，这让我对星核猎手更加好奇，你们各自身份特殊，彼此间的联系也颇为有趣——它如此紧密、牢固，却又保持着个体的独立。

Partners... a nice way to put it. Now, I'm even more curious about the Stellaron Hunters. Each of you has your own identity and a special bond with each other. It's strong and intimate, and yet it allows for independence.
就像石心十人追随「钻石」，你们应当也有一位领袖。我好奇他是怎样的人，也好奇每一位星核猎手是否都像你一样……
Just as the Ten Stonehearts follow Diamond, you follow your own leader. I wonder what they are like, and if all Stellaron Hunters are like you...
<color=#dbc291ff>行于「终末」的命途，却奋力向命运的反方向前进？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Traveling on the Path of Finality but struggling against your destiny, attempting to move in the opposite direction?</color>
如果有机会，我希望你们都能来我的典当行坐坐。而为了这一天的到来，我愿意耐心等待。
I really hope that one day, all of you will come and visit my pawnshop. I'll be waiting patiently for that day.
我是否可以理解为，这是「钻石」瞒着公司，向星核猎手递出的一张邀请函？
Can I see this as an invitation from Diamond to the Stellaron Hunters while keeping the IPC in the dark?
如果可以，我更希望你把它当作我个人的行为，既不代表公司，也不代表战略投资部。
Consider it more of a personal offer from myself. It doesn't represent the IPC or the Strategic Investment Department.
星核猎手和公司打过许多交道，但「石心十人」…我们并无交集。你的提议我可以传达，但在那之前我有个疑问……
The Stellaron Hunters have interacted with the IPC, but not the Ten Stonehearts... Our paths have never crossed. As for your offer, I can pass it along to my partners, but I have a question...
你知道我的身份，那也一定能想到我的{RUBY_B#银狼}伙伴{RUBY_E#}很可能正在监视这个房间。只要她愿意，只需几秒，整个庇尔波因特都会看到这场会谈。

You know who I am, and you must know that my {RUBY_B#Silver Wolf}partner{RUBY_E#} is keeping an eye on this room. If she wanted to, she could let the entirety of Pier Point know about it within a few mere seconds.
是什么让你甘愿承受沦为弃子的风险，也要为「钻石」完成这一切？
What drives you to take such a risk and extend this invitation on behalf of Diamond, even if it could lead to your downfall?
因为，总得来说…我们是「同类」。
Simply put... you and I are the same.
但和星核猎手、星穹列车不同，我们聚集在一起…只是为了「各取所需」。
However, unlike you Stellaron Hunters or the Astral Express, we band together... merely to obtain what we want.
十人有各自的来路，也有各自的归宿。而在这其中一段路上，我们受到「钻石」邀请，与他同行。
Each of us has our own past and destined ends. And on this journey, we have been invited by Diamond to join him.
这段路可以很短，也可以很长。因为我们每人心中都有一片{RUBY_B#野心}空洞{RUBY_E#}，只有不断依赖外物填补。
This journey could be either brief or long, as each of us carries a {RUBY_B#ambition}void{RUBY_E#} in our hearts that can only be filled from the outside.
而「钻石」，他给出了承诺——将「存护」令使的大权一分为十，为那空洞添上「基石」。
So, Diamond made us a promise. To divide the power of the Emanator of Preservation into ten pieces and give each of us a Cornerstone to fill that void.
「血肉孱弱，而我心坚如辉石。若非如此，则『存护』之道无以立足。」
"Mortal flesh is fragile, yet my heart is unyielding like the monolith. For without this resolve, the way of Preservation would fade into oblivion."
所以明白了么？这不止是一句誓言，更是我等「十人」交出的抵押，我们由此换得机遇、财富、存续、明天……
So, you understand? This pledge goes beyond a mere oath. It's our collateral in exchange for opportunities, wealth, survival, and a future...
而它们再换得的一切，都会让「石心」变得更加坚不可摧，在终将到来的「列神之战」中，实现{RUBY_B#「钻石」}「存护」{RUBY_E#}的伟业。
And whatever we gain from it will fortify the Stonehearts in return, allowing us to achieve the great cause of {RUBY_B#Diamond}the Preservation{RUBY_E#} when the war among the Aeons eventually comes.
去吧，孩子，你不用立即给出答复。就像我说的，我最擅长的事，就是等待。
Take your time, child. You don't need to give me an immediate answer. Like I said, patience is one of my greatest strengths.
如果命运真的翻开了那一页，我们自然会再见的。
If fate turns that page, our paths will cross again.
但我很遗憾，这典当行给不了我想要的。我在匹诺康尼的最后一次尝试…也只能以「希望」作结。
It's a shame, though, that this pawnshop can't give me what I desire. My last attempt in Penacony... Well, it ends with "hope."
慈玉女士，我如约来交付抵押物了。
Lady Bonajade, I've come to deliver the collateral as promised.
能帮人实现愿望的当铺…
Nah, sounds too good to be true.
If they can really grant my wish...
不知道要拿什么做抵押？
I wonder what they'll ask for in return?
...Who said I was betting with you?
(They are still a ball of fire as ever.)
（不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。我得先去找到那位「慈玉女士」。）
(Sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I've got to find Lady Bonajade first.)
...Who said I was betting with you?
Have you been to the pawnshop?
Then why did you go there?
Just to meet Lady Bonajade in person.
外面那个灰色头发的人……
Don't look around! Just focus on your drink!
那人看着精神不太稳定…
Seriously, they look like a total lunatic...
快点下来，别人都在看着呢！
Come down already. Everyone's staring at you!
...Hey, {NICKNAME}! Wake up! The sun's frying your butt!
你没事吧，听得清我说话吗？我听房间里一点动静都没有，快吓死了。
Are you okay? Can you hear me? I didn't hear a peep from your room, and it really freaked me out.
不是在做梦啦，这是在现实，「白日梦」酒店！「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
You're not dreaming. We're in The Reverie Hotel, in the real world. The Order's dream is over.
Woah, this conversation is such déjà vu...
你在说什么啊，别睡糊涂了吧…「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
What are you talking about? Are you still half-asleep or something...? The Order's dream is over.
你一直没反应，我担心还不行吗？幸好，「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
Hey, I was seriously worried when you didn't respond. Thank goodness. The Order's dream is over.
虽然已经过去一天了，但回想起来还是汗流浃背，列车的「开拓」之旅差点就要交代在这匹诺康尼了……
Even though it's been a day, I still break into a sweat when I think about it. Our Trailblazing expedition almost ended in Penacony...
你倒是心宽，还能呼呼大睡。我可是留下了心理阴影，昨晚连眼睛都不敢闭，生怕一睡着就再也醒不过来了。
I'm so jealous that you got a good night's sleep. I was traumatized and too scared to even close my eyes. I thought if I fell asleep, I'd never wake up again.
他们已经出发了。只有善良的本姑娘特地来喊你起床，还不快说声谢谢。
They've already left, leaving this kindhearted girl to wake you up. You owe her big time.
You'll have dark circles under your eyes.
本姑娘天生丽质，才不会有黑眼圈！
A natural beauty like me never has dark circles!
你睡着的这段时间，星核已经被封印了。匹诺康尼的普通民众完全不知道发生了什么，他们只觉得记忆有些模糊，像是被人抽空了一段。
The Stellaron was sealed while you were sleeping. The ordinary people in Penacony have no idea what happened. They just feel like something is missing from their memories.
家族对外的说法是「谐乐大典遭遇来历不明的星核袭击，被迫中止」——毕竟「秩序」的事怎么也没法摆到台面上讲嘛。
The Family's official statement was like, "The Charmony Festival was attacked by an unidentified Stellaron and came to a halt." After all, they can't just reveal the truth about the Order.
现在，橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。列车组也受到邀请，去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。
Now, all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. The Family has invited the Crew to the Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.
现在就差你了，赶紧收拾收拾。准备好了，咱们就出发！
Everyone's waiting for you, so hurry up and pack. We're leaving as soon as you're ready!
嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！两位聪明又美貌的女士，欢迎登上我的「晖长石号」！
Ohohohoho! Welcome aboard my ship, the Radiant Feldspar, smart and charming ladies!
快来，请坐！咱们可得好好聊聊！
Please, have a seat! Let's have a pleasant conversation!
...Who said I was betting with you?
(They are still a ball of fire as ever.)
（不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。我得先去找到那位「慈玉女士」。）
(Sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I've got to find Lady Bonajade first.)
(No, it's not the best time to do that...)
（不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。晚点有机会再找你聊天吧。）
(Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I'll catch up with you later.)
快点下来，别人都在看着呢！
Come down already. Everyone's staring at you!
(No, it's not the best time to do that...)
（不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。晚点有机会再找你聊天吧。）
(Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I'll catch up with you later.)
结果决定匹诺康尼未来的会议比想象中顺利好多…几乎没什么争论就结束了。
Turns out, the meeting to decide the future of Penacony went much smoother than expected... with little debate.
谐乐大典的开幕式应该快开始了，去现场看看吧。
The Charmony Festival's opening ceremony is starting soon. I should head down and take a look.
…别忘了，我随时都可以一枪爱死你。
...Remember, I can take you out with just one shot whenever I choose.
那可真是我的荣幸…放心吧，我最讨厌的就是在赌桌上出千。
That'd be my honor... Don't worry. I hate cheating at the table.
看看，这是谁来了？星穹列车的大英雄，全匹诺康尼如今最耀眼的{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}！
Look who's here! The great hero of the Astral Express, the most dazzling {NICKNAME} in all of Penacony!
哟，你也在这儿啊？好久不见，朋友。
Oh, you're here too? Long time no see, friend.
What are you guys whispering about?
你是不是见谁都一顿夸，砂金？
Do you always compliment everyone you meet, Aventurine?
只是寒暄的开场词而已，你我心照不宣就好。
Merely a greeting of platitudes. As long as you and I have an understanding.
怎么和公司站一边了，牛仔？
Why are you on the IPC's side now, cowboy?
这家伙…和我在追查的某个大可爱有关。那句话怎么说的来着？「敌人的敌人就是朋友」。
This fella... is also tracking down that son of a gun. What's that saying again? "The enemy of my enemy is my friend."
算了，上不得台面的事先放一边吧，别坏了谐乐大典的气氛。
Let's set aside those under-the-table dealings for now, pardner. Don't wanna spoil the festive mood of the Charmony Festival.
我同意。那就让我们恭喜一下{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}吧。我听说家族要在谐乐大典上好好感谢你们列车组呢。哎，不能亲临现场真是太可惜了。
I agree. Now let's congratulate {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I hear The Family intends to thank the crew at the Charmony Festival. *sigh* It's a real pity I can't personally be there to witness this.
砂金，你退场退得还真匆忙。
You sure left in a hurry, Aventurine.
我的任务只是给公司入局撕开一道口子。别的不谈，就这件事而言，我自觉应该完成的还算不错。
My job was just to give the IPC an opening. Other things aside, I think I did a pretty good job at achieving this.
你们在流梦礁逗留的时候，其实我也就在附近。多亏有一位博学的朋友，不然我还真挖不到这么多黑料呢。
While you were at Dreamflux Reef, we were actually close by. We wouldn't have been able to dig up so much dirty information without the help of a knowledgeable friend.
就是那位令使有点用力过猛…我的身体支撑不了多久，否则这事还能结得更利落。
But that Emanator didn't pull any punches... My body couldn't hold out too long, otherwise this would have been settled in a much cleaner manner.
牛仔，感谢你们在决战里出手。
I'd like to thank you for all your help in the battle, cowboy.
哈，小意思。惩奸除恶可是头等大事，要是少了我们那才奇怪呢。
Hah, no problem. Punishing the wicked and eradicating evil is a top priority. Would've been strange if we sat it out.
先前来这么一下子，我们巡海游侠也算是再度出山了。你今后在路上估计能遇到不少「巡猎」的同志，拜托你替我问声好。
Makin' an entrance like that, us Galaxy Rangers are makin' a comeback. Reckon you'll meet quite a few followers of The Hunt on your journey, do me a favor and pass on my regards will you?
你们刚才到底在聊什么？
What were you guys chatting about?
算了，明人不说暗话，我直说了吧：我和一个叫{RUBY_B#「市场开拓部」主管}奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德{RUBY_E#}的高管有仇，而这个花枝招展的家伙能帮我找到他。

Forget it. I'm not one to beat around the bush. I've got a score to settle with a high-ranking executive fella named {RUBY_B#Head of Marketing Development}Oswaldo Schneider{RUBY_E#}. And this flamboyant fella here can help me find him.
市场开拓部和战略投资部的恩怨全银河皆知，但我还真没想到，连巡海游侠都有机会牵连其中。

The feud between the Marketing Development Department and the Strategic Investment Department is well-known across the cosmos. But what I didn't expect was the involvement of the Galaxy Rangers in this feud.
看来…事情要变得有意思起来了。
Looks like... things are about to get spicy.
祝你们在大典上玩得开心。
I hope you guys have fun at the festival.
多谢，也祝你玩得开心，匹诺康尼的大英雄！
Thank you, and I also hope you enjoy yourself, great hero of Penacony!
我就免了。不过，祝你玩得开心，不介意的话，回头我们再玩上两把。
I'll pass, but I do hope you guys have fun. If you don't mind, let's play a few rounds next time.
这种日子就该撒开了玩——祝你玩得开心，匹诺康尼的大英雄！
It's time to let down our hair and enjoy ourselves on days like this — I hope you can enjoy yourself to the fullest, oh, great hero of Penacony!
呀，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛？这才过了多久，我们又见面了。最近如何？
Well if it isn't {NICKNAME}? It hasn't been long, and yet here we are again. How are you?
Life is as wonderful as ever.
我想也是！听说你们整了个大活，把橡木家系都连带着给一锅端了。
Hah, that's what I thought! I heard you guys pulled off a big stunt, cutting down the Oak Family in one fell swoop.
可惜当时我没法到场，否则肯定会助你们一臂之力。
Such a pity I couldn't be there, or else I would have lent a helping hand.
哈哈，我猜也是！听说你们整了个大活，把橡木家系都连带着给一锅端了。
Hah, that's what I thought! I heard you guys pulled off a big stunt, cutting down the Oak Family in one fell swoop.
可惜当时我没法到场，否则肯定会助你们一臂之力。
Such a pity I couldn't be there, or else I would have lent a helping hand.
I'm in the mood for a job change.
嗯？这么直接，不怕我当真？
Hmm? So direct. Aren't you afraid I might take you seriously?
不过想想也是，你们无名客的生活未免也过于刺激了。听说你们之前整了个大活，把橡木家系都连带着给一锅端了。
Thinking about it though, the lives of the Nameless are so excessively exciting. I heard you guys pulled off a big stunt, cutting down the Oak Family in one fell swoop.
如果哪天你真的累了，想换换工作环境、坐个办公室什么的，随时联系我！
If one day you're tired and looking for a change in work environment or you want a desk job, just contact me!
你看这船上多热闹啊，真不错。等哪天不忙了，我也要在生态舰上举办个大派对，到时一定会邀请你们。
Look at how bustling this ship is, not bad! Someday when I'm less tied up, I plan to host a grand party on my eco-ship, and you'll all be on the guest list.
I wanna ask you a question about that transformation...
...Are you also able to transform yourself?
Trans... form? What are you saying?
噢…我明白了。你说的是砂金那家伙的「基石」吧？真不好意思，跟他比起来，我的能力可能没那么「视觉系」。
Oh... I understand now. You're referring to Aventurine's Cornerstone right? Sorry, compared to him, my ability is not as "visual."
告诉你也无妨，「石心十人」的基石能力各不相同，有人甚至可以直接读透你的念想，拿捏你的欲望…可要小心哦。
Guess there's no harm telling you. The abilities of the Ten Stonehearts' cornerstones are all different. Some can even read your thoughts, grasp your desires... So be careful...
这么一想，当时在贝洛伯格，还好布洛妮娅赶到的够及时——要是她晚来一步，咱们怕是连朋友都做不成了~
Now that I think about it, it was good that Bronya got there when she did in Belobog — if she came any later, we probably wouldn't have ended up as friends~
你看这船上多热闹啊，真不错。等哪天不忙了，我也要在生态舰上举办个大派对，到时候一定会邀请你的。
Look at how bustling this ship is, not bad! Someday when I'm less tied up, I plan to host a grand party on my eco-ship, and you'll be on the guest list.
又见面了，我的挚友。你已在「纯美」之道上走出了比我更甚的风采，我由衷向你致意！
We meet again, my dear friend. Your journey of the Beauty is even more elegant than mine. My most sincere regards to you!
Sincere regards to you too, dear friend.
即便实现如此非凡的成就，你也依旧谦逊平和…这是多么富有骑士精神的行为！
Even after achieving such remarkable feats, you remain humble and gentle... Such is the true mark of knightly grace!
你这回可是有点过誉了…
怎么会？「纯美」容不得偏颇，我的发言皆出于公平公正。
How could it be? The Beauty holds no bias. My words are fair and just.
那我什么时候解锁新命途？
When will I be able to unlock a new Path then?
「解锁」？真是富有诗意和美感的说法，但你已经行于「纯美」的命途之上了。
Unlock? An eloquent and picturesque choice of words, yet you have already set forth on the Path of Beauty
我已听说了你带领众人击倒恶兆的壮举。尽管故事听来令人惋惜，但你毫无疑问地伸张了「纯美」和正义。愿伊德莉拉为你展露笑容。

I have heard of your valiant deed in leading others to vanquish the Omen of Evil. Though the tale bears a tinge of regret, you have undoubtedly championed Beauty and justice. May Idrila smile upon you.
「纯美」的审美者若在追求力量之路上迷失，就会堕为「恶兆」非人非兽的模样。
If an admirer of the Beauty gets lost in the pursuit of power, they risk descending into "the Omen of Evil," a form which is neither human nor beast.
虽然那位星期日先生与「纯美」的道途并无交集，但他的行为已与恶兆无异。在向善的道路上迷误的可悲灵魂啊…真是令人扼腕叹息。

Although Mr. Sunday did not cross paths with the Path of Beauty, his actions were no different from the Omen of Evil. A lamentable soul lost on the path of righteousness... truly a matter of deep regret.
决战的时候你怎么没来？
Why were you not there during the final battle?
说来惭愧，那座「太一之梦」实在逼真。我不忍与早已化作异兽的亡友道别，竟然在那虚无缥缈的梦中耽搁了许久…呵，他的音容笑貌真是太过鲜活了。

I'm ashamed to admit, Ena's dream was too realistic. I couldn't bear to bid farewell to a fallen friend, who had long turned into a beast. I lingered in that illusory dream for far too long... Ah, his voice and smile were too vivid.
我没能通过此次「纯美」的历练，花了许多时间为自己的动摇自省。但愿伊德莉拉还愿为我作旌旗，砥砺我「纯美」的决心。

I didn't pass the trial of Beauty this time, spending much time in self-reflection over my own hesitation. Yet I wish for Idrila to remain my beacon, a banner for me to strengthen my determination for the Beauty.
也祝你在大典上玩得开心。
I hope you have fun at the festival.
感谢你，也愿「纯美」常伴你！
Thank you, and may the Beauty always be with you!
感谢你，也愿「纯美」常伴你！
Thank you, and may the Beauty always be with you!
你好，活泼的{M#先生}{F#小姐}。欢迎来到「慈玉典押」。
Hey there, lively {M#guy}{F#lady}! Welcome to the Bonajade Exchange.
那么，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}——你想要什么？你又愿意为之付出什么？
So, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, what do you wish for? And what are you willing to sacrifice for it?
没问题，就叫这个名字无妨。
No problem. Let's just use this name.
那么，三月七{M#先生}{F#小姐}——你想要什么？你又愿意为之付出什么？
So, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} March 7th — What do you wish for? And what are you willing to sacrifice for it?
嗯…不错的名字，就是欠了些功德。
Hmm... Not a bad name, just lacking in virtue.
那么，星期日{M#先生}{F#小姐}——你想要什么？你又愿意为之付出什么？
So, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Sunday, what do you wish for? And what are you willing to sacrifice for it?
让纳努克对我俯首称臣！
Make Nanook bow down to me!
I want to be the CEO of the IPC!
「慈玉女士」连眼睛都没眨一下。你猜她可能没什么幽默感。
Lady Bonajade doesn't even blink. You're guessing she doesn't have any sense of humor.
听起来很简单，很好实现。那么，来谈谈代价吧？
Sounds simple enough. Very pragmatic. Then, let's discuss the cost.
不会吧，这就要大结局了？
No way. This is the endgame already?
想要实现这个愿望，我需要的东西很简单：一种动物的尾巴。
To fulfill this wish, the thing I need is simple: The tail of an animal.
那是一种靠两脚站立的生物…绒毛是黑色的，圆头圆脑，耳朵很长。杂食，情绪不太稳定。最重要的是，它还掌握了人的语言，可以开口交流。
Well, it's a two-legged animal... With black fur, a round head, and long ears, it's omnivorous and is prone to mood swings. Most importantly, it has mastered the human language and can communicate.
把它的尾巴带给我作为抵押，然后你的愿望就能实现了。
Bring its tail to me as collateral and your dreams will come true.
看来「慈玉女士」并非没有幽默感…你不得不承认，她运用黑色幽默的技巧在你之上。
It seems that "Lady Bonajade" is not without a sense of humor... You have to admit, her skill in using dark humor is superior to yours.
...Hopefully, there are scissors on the Express.
May fate bring us together again, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.
我们有缘再见，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
May fate bring us together again, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.
「慈玉女士」盯着你，似乎望穿了你所有的欲望和念想。
Lady Bonajade stares at you, seemingly piercing through all your desires and thoughts.
哦？我记得你，你在空间站「黑塔」的表现…基本及格。
Ah, yes, I remember you. Your performance at Herta's space station was... adequate, I suppose.
呵，难怪那个赌徒如此看重你。
Hm, no wonder that gambler likes you so much.
I didn't know you were here, too.
博识学会派我来给公司的使节监考。哼，教务办公室的任务罢了。
The Intelligentsia Guild assigned me to be an invigilator for the IPC's ambassadors. Hmph, nothing more than an errand from the Office of Academic Affairs.
他是我此行的监考对象。哼，教务办公室的任务罢了。
This individual is my responsibility during the trip. Hmph, nothing more than an errand from the Office of Academic Affairs.
拉帝奥教授，请给我签名！
Can I please get your autograph, Dr. Ratio!
别和那个赌徒一样总想耍小聪明。这次我就睁一只眼闭一只眼，下不为例。
Do not try to emulate that gambler's penchant for attempting to be overly clever. I'll let it go this time, but this won't happen again.
行了，谐乐大典不是马上要开始了么？机会难得，去吧，只有劳逸结合才能更好地汲取知识。
Very well, the Charmony Festival is about to commence soon. Take advantage of this unique opportunity, a blend of work and play is essential for superior knowledge absorption.
公司和学会的行政人员对我们的定义是「战略合作伙伴」。但在我看来，我永远只能扮演「教师」，而他则是「学生」，就像你和其他每一个人。
The executives of the IPC and the Guild say that we are strategic partners. Yet, from my perspective, I am invariably the teacher, and he, along with you and every other individual, is the student.
从这种视角出发，砂金不是什么好学生，但也绝不是块榆木疙瘩。可惜，他内心的空洞永远无法用天赋和知识填满…但愿他不会沦为哲学僵尸吧。

From this perspective, Aventurine isn't what you'd call an ideal student, yet he's also not utterly obtuse. Alas, the void within him can never be filled by talent and knowledge. Let's hope he doesn't turn into a philosophical zombie.
我还以为你会让我收收心。
I thought you were going to make me get my act together.
呵，会问出这样的问题，就代表你根本没有真正地理解学习的目的。
Ah, saying such a thing merely indicates that you have not truly grasped the essence of learning.
劳逸结合有其科学依据，相关论证过程可以参考学术期刊《揽星》第<unbreak>31467</unbreak>期<unbreak>21</unbreak>页。汲取知识是为了更好地生活，别像学会那帮蠢材一样本末倒置了。

The principle of balancing work and relaxation is scientifically grounded, with the relevant proof process detailed on page 21 of the 31467th issue of the academic journal Starseizer. Acquiring knowledge aims to enhance living. Don't invert priorities like those dolts at the Guild.
祝你在大典上玩得愉快。
I hope you have fun at the festival.
我讨厌喧闹的场合，对沉思有害而无益…简直浪费时间。
I detest noisy gatherings, as they intrude upon my thoughts... What a waste of time.
（典礼还没开始，先休息一下吧……）
(The festival hasn't started. Let's take a quick break...)
果然是你。我就知道之前没认错人。
It's really you. I knew I didn't get the wrong person.
是呀，只是没来得及搭话。离谐乐大典开幕还有些时间，想聊聊吗？
Yes, it's just I didn't get the chance to say hello. There's still some time before Charmony Festival starts. Do you want to chat?
You mistook someone else for me?
就是你本人。我有看到你开宝箱、打气球、玩美梦排排乐，应该不是我看错了…吧？
It was you. I saw you opening treasure chests, hitting balloons, and playing the Dreamy Slots. I don't think I'm mistaken... right?
离谐乐大典开幕还有些时间，想聊聊吗？
There's still some time before Charmony Festival starts. Do you want to chat?
你与流萤边走边谈，待到视野更加开阔时停住了脚步。
You walk and talk with Firefly, and stop in your tracks when the view becomes more expansive.
…两起「命案」、与公司使节的对决、无名客道路的传承、一位梦想代替星神创造乐园的「秩序」残党——你们最后甚至还击碎了美梦…真是波澜壮阔的假日呀。

...Two murder cases, a showdown with the IPC's ambassadors, the legacy of the Nameless, and a remnant of the Order who dreams of creating a paradise in place of the Aeons. You guys even ended up shattering the dream... It's truly been quite a vacation.
好在你们成功解决了这些难题，恭喜你们。谐乐大典开幕后，你们也该再次启程了吧？
It's a good thing that you guys managed to overcome all those difficult problems. Congratulations! After the Charmony Festival's opening, will you guys be leaving again?
不知道下一站是什么地方。
I don't know where our next destination will be.
不知道能不能顺利出发。
I'm not sure if we'll be able to depart smoothly.
总会有方向的。毕竟你们是「开拓」的命途行者嘛……
There will always be somewhere. After all, you guys are on the Path of the Trailblaze...
也有这部分原因吧，但更多是因为我在匹诺康尼也没能找到想要的东西…有点遗憾。
Yes, but it's mainly because I couldn't find what I wanted on Penacony... It's a pity.
You're more than welcome to tread on the Path of the Trailblaze.
我倒是想过这种可能性…不过，这种「如果」也未必能带给我想要的东西就是了。
I've also considered this possibility... But this kind of "what if" might not be able to bring me what I want.
难道星核猎手压榨成员？
Are the Stellaron Hunters this exploitative of their members?
这都什么跟什么…不过，倒也确实和这有关就是了。
What does that have to do with anything... But, I suppose it does have something to do with that.
加入星核猎手前，艾利欧对我说，这段旅途会告诉我活下去的方法。他言止于此，剩下的都留待我自己去探寻。
Before joining the Stellaron Hunters, Elio told me that this journey will tell me how to live on. That's all he said. As for the rest, it's up to me to find out.
所以，我会格外关注「能让我活下去」的线索，这次的匹诺康尼之旅也一样。
So, I'll pay extra attention to any leads that will let me live on. This trip to Penacony is no different.
难怪你会积极调查「钟表匠」。
No wonder you were interested in investigating the Watchmaker.
嗯…只可惜找错了方向，但我也算是有些别的收获啦。
Yes... sadly I was looking in the wrong place. But I did reap some rewards.
看来这次你也没能得偿所愿。
Looks like you didn't get what you wanted this time.
嗯…一开始我以为答案就藏在「钟表匠」的谜题里，可惜找错了方向，但我也算是有些别的收获啦。
Yes... Initially, I thought that the answer might lie with the riddle of the Watchmaker. I was looking in the wrong place, but I did reap some rewards.
公司战略投资部的翡翠女士，你认识吗？「慈玉典押」就是她名下的财产。
Do you know Miss Jade from the IPC's Strategic Investment Department? Bonajade Exchange belongs to her.
She told me her price, but...
没有。她想要的也不是我的回答。
No. But what she wanted wasn't my answer either.
别答应，公司的人准没安好心。
Don't take the deal. Those IPC people may have ulterior motives.
我知道。她想要的也不是我的回答。
I know. But what she wanted wasn't my answer either.
我当然很想活下去，但…命运亏欠了我，我想要的是偿还，而不是转嫁。不应该有第三者被卷入其中，因为这是我个人和命运的恩怨。
Of course I want to live on, but... what fate owes me, I want it paid back, not passed on. No one else should be involved, because this is a grudge between me and fate.
啊，说到这个…其实我一直觉得自己还欠你一个正式的道歉，就是「鸢尾花家系艺者」的事。
Speaking of which... Actually, I feel that I still owe you a formal apology, for... that matter with "the performer of the Iris Family."
再小的谎言也会铸成如尖刀般锐利的背叛…对不起，{NICKNAME}。
Even the smallest of lies can turn into a betrayal as sharp as a blade... I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}.
我没觉得自己因此受伤。
I never felt hurt by this.
真的吗？看来…卡芙卡教给我的没错。
Really? Then it seems... what Kafka taught me was correct.
那次情况紧急，算不上正式道歉，也确实是我有错在先。
It was an emergency, so I never had the chance to formally apologize to you, and admittedly, I was the one to blame.
那你从一开始就不该骗我。
You shouldn't have lied to me in the beginning.
Yes, and for that, I'm sorry.

很高兴同各位欢聚一堂，共同迎接匹诺康尼在本琥珀纪最隆重的典礼，谐乐大典。首先，我谨代表匹诺康尼家族分家暨五大家系……
It's a pleasure to join you all in celebrating the grandest ceremony of the Amber Era, the Charmony Festival. Firstly, on behalf of the Penacony Family's five major lineages...

想必各位已经发现，本届谐乐大典非比寻常。在各大家系的努力下，本次盛典可谓规模空前，更有全银河的派系应邀赴宴……

As you all may have noticed, this year's Charmony Festival is far from regular. Thanks to the efforts of everyone, this celebration is unprecedented in scale, with factions from across the cosmos in attendance...
不仅如此，以往按惯例在匹诺康尼大剧院召开的开幕典礼，也将舞台转移至了「晖长石号」——也就是各位嘉宾现在脚下的这艘空艇——
Not only that, the customary opening ceremony held at the Penacony Grand Theater has now moved to the Radiant Feldspar — the very airship you all stand upon.
——让我们共同为苜蓿草家主奥帝•艾弗法对「同谐」事业的无私奉献，献上最热烈的掌声，以及最诚挚的谢意！
We invite you to express your warmest applause and deepest appreciation for Oti Alfalfa — head of the Alfalfa Family — for his selfless devotion to the Harmony's cause!
那是什么让本届大典变得这样意义非凡？众所周知，「晖长石号」曾因美梦中的异变不得不停航，一度在十二时刻引发热议……

What makes this festival so uniquely significant? As is widely known, the Radiant Feldspar had to halt its voyage due to an anomaly in the sweet dream, sparking widespread discussion in the Twelve Hours...
但在匹诺康尼内外部的共同努力下，我们终于令梦境重回正轨。又时逢谐乐大典，可谓是好事成双，「晖长石号」的重新启航也具备了新的意义。

But thanks to the hard work of Penacony's internal and external factions, we've finally gotten the Dreamscape back on track, just in time for the Charmony Festival. And as they say, good things come in pairs. The Charmony Festival not only celebrates this achievement but also marks the relaunch of the Radiant Feldspar.
而最后，还有一个原因——各位，还记得「钟表匠」吗？事实上，家族为此次大典尽思极心，也是为了纪念这位传奇大亨——
And finally, the last reason. Does everyone remember the Watchmaker? In truth, The Family has poured their efforts into this festival just to commemorate this legendary luminary...
「匹诺康尼之父」拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔，为匹诺康尼奠基的传奇无名客之一！
The father of Penacony, Mikhail Char Legwork, one of the legendary Nameless who laid the foundations of Penacony!
在盛会之星最为迷茫的岁月里，是他携伙伴从天而降，用「开拓」教会了我们自由在何方；也是他们为梦境的拓荒事业身先士众，才换来如今「同谐」的乐园。

In the most bewildering times of the Planet of Festivities, it was he who descended from the sky with his companions, who taught us through Trailblazing where freedom lies. It was also they who led the vanguard in the pioneering of the Dreamscape, in exchange for what is now known as the paradise of Harmony.
可以说，匹诺康尼能有今日的辉煌成就，离不开「钟表匠」深植于我们心中的「开拓」。也只有铭记这份「开拓」之志，我们才能不辱使命，将「同谐」带给更多的人。

让我们把掌声和欢呼送给各位勇敢无畏的无名客们！

请听题！什么生物早上四条腿、中午两条腿、晚上三条腿？
Listen up! What creature has four legs in the morning, two legs at noon, and three legs in the evening?
Correct answer! But, it's a shame...
我讨厌直觉敏锐的小鬼。
你通过了「垃圾桶」娃娃的试炼。果不其然，一只貌似花火的娃娃就躺在桶底。令人遗憾的是，它的本质只是一团棉花，并非枪式或收聚式击发装置及其组合。

You have passed the trial of the "Trashcan" doll. As expected, a doll that looks like Sparkle lies at the bottom of the can. Regrettably, it is nothing more than a clump of cotton, devoid of any projectile or aggregative firing devices and their combinations.
你好，我是一枚炸弹！距离我爆炸还有一段时间，你可以先到别处转转！
Hello, I'm a bomb! There's still some time before I explode, so you can take a look around first!
拆除？没问题！正在启动自主拆除程序——请给我一首歌的时间！
Defuse? No problem! Executing self-defusing program — this won't take long!
好吧，那我就去别处转转。
All right. I'll go take a look around then.
当然没问题！但如果你不想走太远，我也可以为你演唱一首轻柔舒缓的歌曲，以免你无聊！
That's no problem of course! But if you don't want to go too far, I can also play a soothing tune for you in case you get bored!
我可以就在这里快速等待吗？
Can I just wait around here for a moment?
我们根本没有「快速等待」这种功能！但没关系，为了让你的等待过程不无聊，我可以为你演唱一首轻柔舒缓的歌曲！
We do not have this function called "Wait Around"! But it's no problem — to ease any boredom during your wait, I can play a soothing song for you!
正在为您播放《不抛弃，不放弃》，来自艾普瑟隆Ⅻ星系流行巨星艾斯•里克利……
Now playing Never Give Up, Never Surrender by the trending superstar Ast Rickley from the Epsilon XII System...
…哦，等等，匹诺康尼的家族没买这首歌的版权，不能在这里播放。这样吧，我来为您朗诵一段好了——接下来请欣赏诗朗诵《不抛弃，不放弃》！

...Oh, hang on, Penacony's Family have not purchased the rights to this song — we can't play it here. How about this, I'll recite it for you — next up, please enjoy a recital of Never Give Up, Never Surrender!
「哦，阿哈！若你问我对您的感受，请别对我说你视而不见！」
"O Aha! If you ask me how I feel about you, don't tell me that you pretend not to see!"
「祂永远不会放弃你，永远不会令你沮丧！祂永远不会抛弃你，永远不会让你哭泣！」
"THEY will never give you up, never make you sad! THEY will never give you up, never make you cry!"
「祂也永远不会同你道别，永远不会用谎言伤害你——赞美阿哈！」
"THEY will never say goodbye to you, never tell lies to hurt you — praise Aha!"
在那句近乎哭腔的「赞美阿哈」落地后，娃娃的嘴里只余令人烦躁的卡带声久久回荡。原来它根本不是一枚炸弹，而是老式古董录音机。

After the almost-tearful exclamation of "Praise Aha!" comes to pass, all that's left in the doll's mouth are those lingering echoes of an irritating cassette tape. Turns out that it isn't a bomb after all, but a vintage tape recorder.
欢迎来到「晖长石号」，尊敬的{M#先生}{F#女士}！我是一颗危险的炸弹，也是一位蔑视公序良俗的法外狂徒。祝您在这里度过美好的一天。
Welcome to the Radiant Feldspar, good {F#lady}{M#sir}! I am a dangerous bomb, and an outlaw who despises law and order. May you have a splendid day!
不客气，{M#先生}{F#女士}，但礼貌依旧无法掩藏我危险癫狂的气息。以防你不信，给你表演一下：宝了个贝的！
Thank you, {M#mister}{F#miss}, but courtesy doesn't hide my hazardous lunacy. If you're unconvinced, let me show you: Go fudge yourself, you muddle-fudger!
我猜你也不是真正的炸弹。
I'm guessing you're also not a real bomb.
不是，但那又如何？我依旧危险又癫狂。以防你不信，给你表演一下：宝了个贝的！
I'm not, but so what? I'm still crazy and dangerous. In case you don't believe me, allow me to show you: Go fudge yourself, you muddle-fudger!
你看上去和听上去都不太危险。
You don't look or sound that dangerous.
真的吗？宝了个贝的，如果你现在觉得不够刺激，我倒是不介意展示一下什么叫真正的危险和癫狂。
Really? Fork you. If you think this isn't intense enough, I don't mind showing you what real danger and madness look like.
不瞒你说，我之所以成为法外狂徒并不因为我他宝贝的是一颗炸弹，而是因为我他宝贝的掌握着一则古老而疯狂、为人伦所不容的亵渎咒语。
To be frank, I didn't become an outlaw because I'm a fudgin' bomb. It's because I'm the fudgin' owner of an ancient, mad, forbidden curse.
你想感受一下吗？我可以念给你听，但一切后果花火大人概不负责。
Care to experience it? I can chant it for you, but Miss Sparkle won't be responsible for any of the consequences.
嗬，宝贝，你比我狂多了。让我酝酿酝酿……
Holy fudge, you're more insane than I am! Let me gather my wits...
Forget it. I value my life too much.
嗬，宝贝，怂了？告诉你，晚了！你已经打开了魔盒……
Oh? You scared, lil' fudgehead? It's too late, I tell you! You've already opened Pandora's box...
…仪式准备好了。竖起耳朵吧，仔细聆听那最古老、最原始、他宝贝的人类刻入基因的战栗——
...The ritual is ready. Perk up your ears and listen closely to the most ancient, primal fear etched into the very fudgin' genes of humanity—
<size=28>「花斯卡，火斯卡，小花火——！花斯卡，火斯卡，小～花～火～！」</size>
<size=28>Bloomska, boomska, little sparkleeesss!!! Bloomska, boomska, little sparkleeesss!!!</size>
这酷似匹诺康尼传奇动画品牌主人公「钟表小子」的声线登时令你警铃大作！远古深刻的肌肉记忆令你抡圆了胳膊，将娃娃抛向九霄云外——

The striking resemblance to the voice of the legendary Penaconian cartoon character "Clockie" instantly rings an alarm within you! The profound muscle memory from ancient times prompts you to swing your arms in a wide arc, catapulting the doll into the heavens.
——如果那娃娃方才所言不虚，那应该确实不会有一枚虚数中子弹在「黄金的时刻」地表爆炸。放心…吧？
If the doll's words just now are not false, then indeed there won't be an imaginary neutron bomb exploding on the surface at Golden Hour. No need to worry...?
你好，人类。我们又见面了，真没想到会在这里再见到你。
Hello, human. We meet again. I never thought I'd see you here.
我正在这艘豪华游轮上品尝匹诺康尼消费主义糖衣炮弹。你呢？是来观光的吗？
I'm currently on this luxury cruise ship enjoying Penacony's consumer-friendly sugar-coated cannonballs. What about you? Are you just seeing the sights?
I'm here to defuse a bomb.
炸弹？天啊，我可不是炸弹。
Bomb? Gosh, I'm not a bomb.
如果你也去过「仙舟」罗浮，那我们很可能见过面。
If you've been to the Xianzhou Luofu, it's likely we've met.
You remind me of an old acquaintance.
Old acquaintance? I'm not even human.
我是一只「岁阳」，原本住在罗浮的绥园里。我热衷于研究仙舟亚文化，但慢慢地，我发现仙舟亚文化也是有极限的。
I'm a heliobus, originally from the Luofu's Fyxestroll Garden. I'm passionate about researching Xianzhou subcultures, but I've slowly come to realize that Xianzhou subcultures also have their limits.
前略，中间忘了，总之我最终来到了匹诺康尼。我想要研究与仙舟完全不同的亚文化，结果可真是让我大跌眼镜——如果我有眼睛的话。

I forgot what happened, but anyway, I ended up in Penacony. I wanted to study a subculture that is completely different from the Xianzhou's, and boy it's really been an eye-opening experience — that is, if I had eyes.
我发现，这里的人们不把亚文化当文化。他们管它叫迷…迷……
I've come to realize, the people here don't treat subcultures as actual culture. They call them me... me...
是「迷因」，对，就是这个。它们还有形体呢。我和其中一个牙尖爪利的迷因生命成了好朋友。它对仙舟持明文化特感兴趣，我就给它起了个仙舟名，它很开心。

Yes meme, that's it. They even have forms. I'm good friends with a meme with sharp teeth and claws. It's very interested in the Xianzhou Vidyadhara culture. I gave it a Xianzhou name, and it was delighted.
哦，说到这个，我该去找它了。「梗大鬼」脾气火爆，向来没什么耐心。
Oh, speaking of which, I should go and look for it. Memey the Monster has an explosive temper, and it's never been very patient.
祝你找到真正的糖衣炮弹——我是说，炸弹。拜拜！
I hope you can find the real sugar-coated cannonball — I mean, bomb. Bye bye!
娃娃体内冒出一缕青烟，随后便不再动弹。看来这也并非真正的虚数中子弹。
A wisp of green smoke emerges from the doll's body, and then it lies motionless. It seems this isn't a real imaginary neutron bomb either.
你好，亲爱的演员。你可以叫我「导演」娃娃，这是我在片尾字幕常用的署名。
Hello, lovely actor. You can call me the Director Doll. I often use this name in film credits.
你或许有所不知，其实正是我导演了匹诺康尼的整场闹剧。作为剧目的{M#男一号}{F#女一号}，你现在有什么想法？欢迎畅所欲言……
If you didn't know, I'm the one who directed the entire farce in Penacony. As the leading {F#lady}{M#man} of the show, what did you think? Feel free to share your thoughts...
…好吧，其实根据剧情需要，你现在只能说一句话，所以还是拜托你尽量克制一下畅所欲言的冲动。
...Well, actually, due to current plot requirements, you're only allowed to say one line. So, please try and resist the urge to share your thoughts.
我现在只想拆炸弹过剧情。
Right now, I just want to defuse the bomb and advance the plot.
真的吗？你真的什么都不问吗？好吧，真为你惋惜。
Really? You really have no questions? Okay then, what a pity.
就是你让星期日做大反派？
You're the one who made Sunday a villain?
黄泉逃离家族围捕的动作戏呢？
What about the action scene where Acheron had to escape The Family?
知更鸟得知真相的过程去哪了？
What happened to Robin's journey of uncovering the truth?
你的剧情转场也太多了吧！
You have way too many storyline transitions!
嗐，怪我，上了假面愚者的当！这剧本出自一位名为「花火大人」的编剧之手。她说她是第一花火大学电影编导系出身，我便与她一拍即合……

*sigh* It's all my fault for being duped by the Masked Fools! This screenplay was written by someone named "Miss Sparkle." She said she graduated from Sparkle University's Film Directing and Screenwriting program, so we instantly hit it off...
…谁知道第一花火大学根本没有什么电影编导系——就连第一花火大学这所高校都不存在！哎，花火。
...Who knew that there was no such thing as the "Film Directing and Screenwriting program" at Sparkle University — in fact, Sparkle University isn't even real! Bah, Sparkle.
既然你问完了，我也回答过了…那么根据剧情需要，我将会告诉你这里根本没有炸弹的事实，让你痛悔自己浪费了半天时间听我说废话，然后我们分道扬镳。

Since you're done asking questions, and I'm done answering... according to the script, I must reveal to you the fact that there's no bomb here at all, thus causing you to want to kick yourself for spending this whole time listening to me prattling on, after which we will part ways.
但别难过！我还为你准备了一份好礼——一枚梦泡——记录了我和一位美丽忆者的生死时速！如果你还没看过，那就快去找爱德华医生吧。

But don't fret! I've also prepared a gift for you — a dream bubble that has the thrilling life-and-death moments I shared with a beautiful Memokeeper! If you haven't seen it yet, you should hurry up and look for Dr. Edward.
这只完全无害又爱说废话的毛绒娃娃对你深情地鞠了一躬，还送上飞吻，然后一跳一跳地消失在船舱深处。
The harmless chatterbox plush doll bows affectionately to you, blowing you a kiss before bounding away, vanishing into the depths of the cabin with joyful leaps.
呀哈哈！你找到我了…呃，不是，我是说「谢谢你」啾！
Yahaha! So you've found me... Uh, no, I meant to say "thank you," tweet!
什么…你看不出来吗？我是「折纸」娃娃啾！
What... You can't tell? I'm the Origami Doll, tweet!
只、只是串戏了啾！请你千万别告诉别人啾。
I—I just got the parts mixed up! Please don't tell anyone, tweet.
你现在又是折纸小鸟了？
So you're the Origami Bird now then?
「折纸小鸟」？你看不出来吗？我是「折纸」娃娃啾！
Origami Bird? Can't you tell? I'm the Origami Doll, tweet!
其实，像我这样能打的娃娃，在这艘「晖长石号」上还有<unbreak>998</unbreak>个啾。请把它们叫回「黄金花火大树」吧——我会为您准备好谢礼的啾！

Actually, there are <unbreak>998</unbreak> more dolls that can pack a punch just like me on the Radiant Feldspar, tweet. Please call them back to the Golden Sparkle Tree. I will prepare a worthy gift for your troubles, tweet!
至于你要的虚数中子弹…呃，别打岔，我知道你根本没提过这五个字…那个炸弹不在这里啾！恐怕你只能到别处看看了啾。

As for that imaginary neutron bomb you want... Uh, don't interrupt me. I know you never mentioned those three words to me before... Well, the bomb isn't here, tweet! I'm afraid you'll have to look elsewhere for it.
古怪的娃娃扇动双马尾消失在了梦境的天空中，这场面看起来可比折纸小鸟惊悚多了。至于「黄金花火大树」…忘了它吧，多半只是花火随手捏的设定罢了。

The peculiar doll flicks its twin ponytails and vanishes into the sky of dreamscape, a sight much more thrilling than an Origami Bird. As for the "Golden Sparkle Tree"... forget about it, most likely just some random balderdash that Sparkle made up.
这是一只花火造型的「芙莫」娃娃。
This "Furmur" doll is a Sparkle lookalike.
根据《近现代花火语汇编》一书，「芙莫」一词首次诞生于琥珀<unbreak>2005</unbreak>纪花火星系的花火星，原意为「毛绒绒的」。现在，花火星人多用「芙莫」特指「毛绒娃娃」。

According to the book "Compilation of Sparkle Vocabulary in Modern and Contemporary Times," the term "furmur" was first coined in <unbreak>2005</unbreak> AE on the Sparkle Planet in the Sparkle star system. Its original meaning is "fluffy." Nowadays, the inhabitants of Sparkle Planet often use "furmur" specifically to refer to "plush dolls."
换句话说，「『芙莫』娃娃」的意思是「毛绒娃娃娃娃」。听起来有点奇怪，但考虑到是花火，倒也合理。
In other words, "furmur doll" translates to "fluffy doll doll doll doll." It may sound peculiar, but considering its Sparkle origin, it actually makes lots of sense.
The "Furmur" doll is staring right at you.
我能把你的炸弹拆掉吗？
The "Furmur" doll continues to stare right at you.
「芙莫」娃娃的眼睛眨都不眨。说真的，要是眨了那还怪吓人的。
The "Furmur" doll's eyes never blink. Honestly, if they did, it would be quite unsettling.
无论如何，它就只是个普通的毛绒玩具而已。你还能指望它说句话不成？
Anyway, it's just an ordinary plush toy. Can you really expect it to utter a single word?
你要是不说话，那就是默认了。
If you don't speak, then your silence equates to consent.
必须指出的是，这只娃娃没有任何可疑的地方，它由内自外地散发着一个完美「芙莫」娃娃该有的气息，而非一枚虚数中子弹。
It must be pointed out that this doll has no suspicious features at all. It exudes from within an aura befitting of a "Furmur" doll, not that of an imaginary neutron bomb.
刚才这句话的意思是你不必再骚扰它了——这样你和它看起来都怪可怜的。还是及时终止这场闹剧吧。
...which means there is no need to bother it anymore. It makes both you and the doll appear rather pitiful. It's best to promptly put an end to this farce.
（还算是有点进展…继续努力吧。）
(At least I made some progress... Gotta keep working at it.)
(Not much time left... I hope I make it.)
二十八分四十六秒…二十八分四十五秒……
Twenty-eight minutes forty-six seconds... Twenty-eight minutes forty-five seconds...
看来她也给你们发消息了……
Looks like she also sent you a message...
你也是被假面愚者喊来的吗？
You were also summoned here by the Masked Fools?
假面愚者…果然是他们干的好事。
The Masked Fools... So this really was their doing.
别过来，这颗炸弹很危险！还有…我是真的流萤！
Don't come close. This bomb is very dangerous! And... I'm the real Firefly!
既然你会出现在这…那我就长话短说吧。大约半小时前，我收到未知发信人的消息，就立刻赶过来了。
Since you're here... I'll just keep it short. Just over half an hour ago, I received a message from an unknown sender, and rushed here as soon as I could.
二十七分五十二秒…二十七分五十一秒……
Twenty-seven minutes fifty-two seconds... Twenty-seven minutes fifty-one seconds...
美梦失去了「秩序」的庇护，要是让它在这里爆炸…后果不堪设想。我研究了很久，但这枚炸弹的构造十分特殊，像是被某种莫名的命途力量上了锁……

The sweet dream has lost the protection of the Order — if it were to blow up here... the consequences would be unfathomable. I've scrutinized it for a long time, but the bomb's design is incredibly unique, as if it's been locked by some mysterious Path force...
除了制造者，恐怕没人能让它停下来了。
Apart from its creator, I fear no one knows how to deactivate it.
Then we'll just have to find that person!
很困难。时间有限，她又会易容，而且就算抓到了，她也一定不会乖乖就范……
It's difficult. Time is running out, and she's a master of disguise. And even if we catch her, she won't come quietly...
别急，还有很多人正在赶来。
Don't panic. There are still many people on their way.
你是指「钟表匠」的贵宾们吗？可惜…以我的经验，在场的人里应该没人能改变现状。
You mean the Watchmaker's guests? That's a pity... Based on my experience, I don't think any of them can turn the tide on this situation.
忆者也许能把炸弹转移到没人的地方，但…我在娃娃体内发现了一张纸条。
The Memokeeper may be able to teleport the bomb to a deserted location, but... I've found a note inside the doll.
不知道她们有什么过节…但这条路也被堵死了。
I don't know what grudges they have... but this path is a dead end, too.
难道就没别的办法了吗…
So that's it? There's no other way?
别急，还有很多人正在赶来。
Don't panic. There are still many people on their way.
你是指「钟表匠」的贵宾们吗？可惜…以我的经验，在场的人里应该没人能改变现状。
You mean the Watchmaker's guests? That's a pity... Based on my experience, I don't think any of them can turn the tide on this situation.
忆者也许能把炸弹转移到没人的地方，但…我在娃娃体内发现了一张纸条。
The Memokeeper may be able to teleport the bomb to a deserted location, but... I've found a note inside the doll.
不知道她们有什么过节…但这条路也被堵死了。
I don't know what grudges they have... but this path is a dead end, too.
那我们就找到那家伙好了。
Then we'll just have to find that person.
这…应该也办不到。时间有限，她又会易容，而且就算抓到了，她也一定不会乖乖就范……
That's... probably not possible. Time is running out, and she's a master of disguise. And even if we catch her, she won't come quietly...
难道就没别的办法了吗…
So that's it? There's no other way?
其实…也不是完全没办法。
Actually... there might be another way.
还记得吗？剧本上说过我会在梦想之地经历三次「死亡」。
Do you still remember? The script said that I will experience "death" three times in the Land of Dreams.
我想，现在就是「第三次」的前兆了。
I think this moment heralds the third time.
都说了别在这种场合回收伏笔！
Like I said earlier — now's not the time for the plot payoff!
你或许已经知道了，我生来没有做梦的机能，入梦的方式也是星核猎手的特殊手段。这让我能做到一般逐梦客做不到的事。

You may already know that I have no way of evoking dreams — I employ a Stellaron Hunter's special method in order to enter dreams instead. This allows me to perform feats that typical Dreamchasers can't.
只要承受住忆质重压带来的痛苦，我就可以下潜至美梦之外的原始忆域中，而这将会为「晖长石号」提供一线生机。
As long as I can bear the pain of the memoria pressure, I'll be able to dive into the primal Memory Zone beyond the dream, and extend a lifeline to the Radiant Feldspar.
我会把这枚炸弹带到{RUBY_B#原始忆域}梦境的深处{RUBY_E#}…至少是尽可能深的无人之地。这样就没人会受伤了。
