We both still have our own paths to walk. So let's forge ahead. Hopefully, if we meet again... it'll be beneath clear skies.
在这宇宙中，有着无数相似却又相异的世界，和无数相似却又相异的人。
In this universe, there exist countless worlds that are similar yet different, and countless people who are alike yet distinct.
我也曾踽踽独行，在陌生的星球邂逅「故人」，看见他们的身影和我的过去重叠在一起。
I, too, have wandered alone, encountering "acquaintances" on strange worlds, seeing their silhouettes overlap with my past.
在你看来，这种「似曾相识」意味着什么？
In your opinion, what does this "déjà vu" mean?
Perhaps some sort of sentimental attachment.
The wish to return to the past.
A longing for a certain someone.
眷恋、渴望、思念…它们或许都对，但都不完整。
Attachment, desire, longing... They may all be right, but they are all incomplete.
我想，它并非外物，而是来自我们自身，是从过去的某个时刻…跨越时间而来的感情。
I believe it's not something external, but something that originates within us, an emotion that traverses time from a certain moment of our past to reach us.
它也许是温暖、快乐的，也许是痛苦、悲伤的，每当我们回首过去，总会发现身后留下的只是这么一个个微小但难忘的瞬间，和一些在其中永恒不变的事物……

Perhaps it's a source of warmth and happiness, or maybe it brings pain and sorrow. Each time we reminisce on our past, we always seem to notice a tiny, but unforgettable instant that we left behind us, along with certain other things that remain constant throughout...
那便是我们人生的一段总结，这段时光中你我全部的缩影…我们一路走来的证明。
That is a summary of our lives, encapsulating everything about us in these moments... proof of our shared path.
我们从中看到自我，然后…得以「存在」。
Within them, we glimpse our own essence, and thus... we truly "exist."
就像这个故事中的所有人一样，为了寄托他们生命意义的事物，热烈而勇敢地奔赴在命运的道路上。
Just like everyone in this story, hurtling onwards along the path of destiny with passion and courage, for the things that breathe meaning into their lives.
义无反顾地踏上旅途吧，走在「开拓进行时」的无名客。
Set forth on your voyage without hesitation, Nameless, on the path of the Trailblaze.
就算结局早已注定，那也无妨，人改变不了的事太多。
Even if the ending has been predetermined, that's fine. There are countless things that humans cannot change.
但在此之前，在走向结局的路上，我们能做的事同样很多。
But before that, on the road towards the end, there are still many things that we can do.
而「结局」…也会因此展现截然不同的意义。
And because of this, the "end" will thus reveal a completely different meaning.
那美丽的事物从前如此，现在亦然，而我同样相信……
All those things, beautiful before, are still so now. And I believe...
它会在「虚无」的尽头依旧盛放，直到我们在阳光下重逢。
It will still bloom at the end of the Nihility, until we meet again beneath the sun's rays.
好啦好啦…帕姆，打起精神来！别伤心，别哭啦……
There there... Chin up, Pom-Pom! Don't be sad. Don't cry...
你安慰人的方法还真古朴。
Wow, your method of consolation is truly unsophisticated.
...Still better than just standing there like a scarecrow!
把这次的冒险经历告诉帕姆以后，它就突然开始哭了…我从来没见过帕姆这么伤心……
We told Pom-Pom all about our adventure, and... they suddenly started crying... I've never seen Pom-Pom so sad before...
Is March picking on Pom-Pom again?
怎么可能！别说风凉话了，你也来安慰安慰帕姆呀！
How could you say that! Don't be so mean. And while you're here, why don't you help me comfort Pom-Pom!
把这次的冒险经历告诉帕姆以后，它就突然开始哭了…我从来没见过帕姆这么伤心……
We told Pom-Pom all about our adventure, and... they suddenly started crying... I've never seen Pom-Pom so sad before...
呜呜…列车长…列车长才不会哭！才没有…没有在伤心！
*sob*... The con... conductor never cries! Pom-Pom... is never sad!
每次…每次不管列车停靠在哪，你们总是要搞得天翻地覆帕！帕姆预先计划好的发车时间，根本没有乘客会遵守！再这样下去，列车的燃料就要耗光了帕！
No matter where the Express stops, you lot always manage to cause chaos! My well-thought-out timetable? Completely ignored! If you carry on like this, the Express is going to run out of fuel!
没错，帕姆只是在生气…才不是因为米沙、铁尔南、拉扎莉娜他们——
That's right. Pom-Pom is just angry... It's not because of Misha, Tiernan, Razalina and the rest...
没关系，尽情哭出来吧，帕姆。
It's okay. Pom-Pom, just let it all out.
大家，能先去隔壁车厢休息一下吗？别担心，这边有我陪着就好。
Everyone, could you all take a break in the next car? Don't worry, I'll stay here with Pom-Pom.
没想到帕姆的反应会那么大……
I never expected Pom-Pom would be so distraught...
那三位「无名客」肯定是它非常重要的伙伴。
Those three Nameless must have meant a lot to Pom-Pom.
没有人知道帕姆是什么时候登上列车的，但可以想见的是，它这一路上一定经历了许多我们难以想象的相见和离别。
No one knows exactly when Pom-Pom boarded the Express, but one can surmise that their journey has been filled with many hellos and goodbyes, probably more than we can imagine.
它能像这样大哭一场，在我看来反而是件好事。这证明帕姆没有被漫长的时光磨耗，它仍然无比珍视每一位登上过列车的无名客、珍视每段和他们共同经历的旅程。

The fact that they're crying so hard is probably a good sign. It proves that Pom-Pom's emotions haven't become dulled by the grind of time — they still deeply cherish every Nameless who has boarded the Express and value every journey shared with them.
安抚的工作就交给姬子吧，毕竟这列车上没人比她更会「开导」别人了。
Leave it to Himeko. When it comes to comforting, there's no one better on the Express.
帕姆说「燃料」就快耗光了…
Pom-Pom said we might run out of fuel...
虽然帕姆当时更多是在宣泄情绪…但它说的也确实没错。
Well, they were a little emotional at the time, but... I'm afraid that's not out of the question.
以{NICKNAME}加入为节点，列车在之后的每一站都耗费了比预期更久的时间。为了确保全员齐整，帕姆不得不一再推迟跃迁时刻表。

Since {NICKNAME} joined us, the Express has stayed longer than anticipated at every stop along the way. And to ensure that everyone always makes it back on board, Pom-Pom has had no choice but to delay the warp jump schedule.
原来如此…怪不得常听到帕姆在走廊上焦虑踱步。
I see... No wonder I can regularly hear Pom-Pom pacing anxiously up and down the corridor.
原来列车长也一直在默默为我们付出啊……
Turns out, Pom-Pom's been silently putting in a lot of work for us, wow...
和一般的载具不同，星穹列车会将一次次的「开拓」转化成维持运行的能源。理想状态下，只要开拓之旅不曾间断，列车便能获得源源不断的动力，如永动机一般持续前行。

Different from typical vehicles, the Astral Express converts every "Trailblaze" into the energy it needs to run. Ideally, as long as trailblazing expeditions continue without interruption, the Express will receive a constant flow of energy, much like a perpetual motion machine.
但因为此前的遭遇…燃料的消耗比预想中更迅速，再进行两次跃迁可能就是极限了。
But because of our previous encounters... fuel is being used up much faster than expected. We can probably only pull off two more warp jumps at most.
两次…那岂不是已经很危险了？噫，我可不想又变回在太空中漂泊的冰块啊！
Only two more... Isn't that super risky? Ahh! I don't wanna become an ice cube floating around in space again!
At least you'll be an adorable ice cube.
你这么一说，好像场面真就没那么凄凉啦？
When you put it like that, it doesn't actually sound too bad.
噫，我可不想又变回在太空中漂泊的*美少女冰块*啊！
But I don't even wanna become an adorable ice cube floating around in space again!
Falling leaves must return to their roots.
…那要不，我们再把你塞回空间站的电脑里？
...How about we shove you back in the space station's computer, then?
也就是说，在选择下一个目的地时必须考虑这点。
Which also means that we must prudently consider our next destination.
没错。我已经查看过星图了，距离我们较近的世界有<color=#dbc291ff>「海洋星球」露莎卡星</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因</color>。
Yes. I've already checked the astral charts — the two nearest worlds to us are <color=#dbc291ff>the oceanic planet of Lushaka</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>the Agate World, Melustanin</color>.
至于选择其中哪个作为我们的目的地，还是得经过投票……
As for which one we're headed to, that still requires a vote...
…或者，各位也可以听听我的提议。
...Or, perhaps you might consider a suggestion.
是、是你？！你怎么会从我的房间里……
I—It's you? Why were you just in my room...
很可爱的房间呢，三月小姐——和你本人一样。
It's a very cute room, Miss March... just like you.
Black Swan, what are you doing here?
我就说道别时少了个人…
I knew we were missing someone...
忆者…姑且不论你是如何避开耳目登上列车的，你刚才所说的「提议」……
Memokeeper... Let's put aside how you managed to sneak past everyone and board the Express for now — you mentioned a suggestion...
关于列车获得「燃料」的方式，我不小心都听到了呢。
I accidentally overheard how the Express obtains fuel.
我原本只是想来和各位聊聊天，看看我们之间是否可能达成合作——现在看来，我的提议很可能也是各位的救命稻草哦。
I just wanted to chat with everyone to see if we could work together, but now, it appears my suggestion could be the very lifeline that saves everyone.
有话直说吧。取决于内容，我们也可能会请你下车。
Please speak candidly. Depending on what you say, we could very well ask you to disembark.
「不朽」的后人吗…还真是一条有魅力的小龙呢，尤其是你那段浑浊不清的记忆。
Ah, the Permanence's descendant... What a charming little dragon, especially with those mired memories of yours.
不说题外话了。如果星穹列车现在急需一趟特别的开拓之旅来为引擎补充「动力」——
But I digress. If the Astral Express is in urgent need of a special trailblazing expedition to recharge its engine...
各位可曾想过？如果你们此行的目的地是连大名鼎鼎的阿基维利都未曾抵达过的世界……
Have you all considered this? Perhaps your destination could be a world that even the renowned Akivili never reached...
如果你们能在宇宙中铺下一段崭新的银轨，那列车恐怕就再也不用为能源发愁了。
Should you be able to lay down a new stretch of silver rail, the Express may never have to worry about energy ever again.
开拓连阿基维利都没去过的世界…这真的能做到吗？
Trailblazing to a world that even Akivili has never been to... Is that possible?
继续说吧，忆者。你口中的目的地，那是一个怎样的世界？
Continue, Memokeeper. This destination of which you speak, what sort of world is it?
一个宇宙中绝大多数人都不知道其存在的世界……
A world that many across the universe don't even know exists...
一个难以从外部被观测到，只能被忆庭之镜照映出来的世界……
A world hidden away from outside observation, its presence only revealed by the light from the mirror of the Garden of Recollection...
一个被三重命途缠裹绑缚，命运未卜的世界……
A world fettered by three Paths, its destiny hanging in the balance...
希望我没有来晚了，孩子。
I hope I'm not too late, child.
...I wasn't expecting it to be you.
你不知道家族设下了多少道岗哨，要把你从这里带出去得有多难？
Don't you know how many sentry posts The Family has built, and how hard it is to get you out of here?
我不太明白你的意思，你想说…什么「时候」？
谈判、审讯，或者一场彻头彻尾的私刑…我的下场完全取决于你，慈玉女士。
Negotiation, interrogation, or death... My fate lies entirely in your hands, Lady Bonajade.
事到如今，何必再假情假意地赏给将死之人开口的机会？
The dance is done. Why bother with the compassionate pretense and give someone who's about to die the chance to talk?
即便从神坛跌落，你这副姿态依旧甚好。看到你这么有活力，我很高兴。
Despite your fall from grace, you still look well. I'm very glad to see that you're so full of verve.
别再用哑谜辱没我的尊严。你专程来见我，就只是为了满足自己恶毒的虚荣心么？
Do not insult my pride with half-veiled sarcasm. Have you specially come to see me just to sate your vile vanity?
当然不。我来是为了满足你妹妹的愿望，提供一份绝对优渥的交易——只看你愿不愿意接受而已。
Of course not. I merely came to fulfill your younger sister's wishes. To offer you a generous trade — that is, if you're willing to accept.
「建造一片每个人都能获得安宁的真正乐园」，这是你们兄妹两人的约定，对吧？
To build a true haven where everyone can attain peace — that's the oath between you siblings, isn't it?
如果我说你还有机会实现这份约定…你会愿意和我谈谈么？
If I told you there was still a chance to realize this vow... would you be willing to talk to me then?
我知道这个问题很沉重，所以，不需要现在就答应我。
I recognize the gravity of this question, which is why you don't have to answer me right now.
走吧，你自由了，妄图超越本分的神选者。把自己的羽翼折断，到人间去，走在大地上，看看这人世真正的模样。
Go now. You are free — O chosen one, who dared to exceed his bounds. Sever your wings, descend to the mortal realm, and walk their lands. See what this world is truly like.
我不会接受你们的施舍。
I will not accept your charity.
我说过，这是一份交易，而且不需要你立刻回应。收获不在一朝一夕，我最擅长的事情就是等待。美梦还在继续，夜晚还长，你有的是时间慢慢考虑。

As I mentioned earlier: It's a trade, and you don't have to give me an answer right now. Rewards are not reaped in a day, and if there's one thing I'm best at, it's waiting. The sweet dream still continues, and the night is still long — you have plenty of time to contemplate your answer.
啊，临别前再附赠你一句话吧——权当是过来人的忠告……
Ah, a word of advice for you before we part ways — a word of warning from someone who's been in your shoes before...
Life is too short to miss out on golden opportunities.
（该回列车了…或者，我还可以和黄泉作最后的道别。）
(I should get back to the Express... Or, maybe I could say my final goodbye to Acheron.)
Wait for the Charmony Festival to start
Please follow the guide and wait for a while.
不会有人在船上安了炸弹吧…
No way someone could have planted a bomb on this ship, right...?
How is that even possible? Have faith in those Bloodhounds.
The elderly and children go first.
Hey, who are you calling a child?
你们公司又在搞什么鬼？！
What the heck is wrong with your company this time!?
{NICKNAME}，你可算来啦！都等你好半天了。
{NICKNAME}, you're finally here! We've been waiting for so long.
既然大家都到齐了，咱们就进入正题吧。
Since everyone's here, let's get down to business.
就在刚才，星穹列车收到了来自「盛会之星」的邀请函……
The Astral Express just received an invitation to the Planet of Festivities...
等等！怎么感觉这个桥段似曾相识？！
Hang on! Why am I getting a sense of deja vu?
Is it going to be a repeat of the Charmony Festival?
就算是「盛会之星」也不能天天办盛会吧！
Even the Planet of Festivities can't possibly hold a festival every day!
又要去找「钟表匠」的遗产？
Are we going to look for the Watchmaker's Legacy again?
那位前辈也没留下这么多遗产吧……
I don't think he had that many legacies to leave behind...
Are we all still in a dream?
别啊，同一种套路别来第二遍了！
Please don't! We don't need to go through that again!
别紧张，这次列车收到的是一场普通邀约，来自匹诺康尼的学府「折纸大学」。
Don't worry — the Express received a normal invitation this time. It's from Penacony's "Paperfold University".
校方打算在「太阳的时刻」筹办一场有关「开拓」的学术研讨会，邀请星穹列车作为嘉宾出席。
The university plans to hold an academic conference on the topic of "Trailblazing" in the Moment of Sol. The Astral Express has been invited as guests to the conference.
学术研讨…是要坐在大讲堂里，对着几百页幻灯片聊上好几个系统时？
An academic conference... You mean we'll have to sit in an auditorium and spend several system hours talking about a few hundred slides' worth of scholarly discourse?
放心，这种「枯燥」的活动就交给大人来处理吧。我和瓦尔特会应邀参与研讨，而你们三人……
Don't worry, you can leave such "boring" events to the grown-ups. I will attend the conference with Welt. As for the three of you...
如果有兴趣，大家可以以「旁听生」的身份进入大学。
If you are interested, you can enter the university as guest students.
时逢开学季，折纸大学正在筹办「彩梦校庆」，既是献给新生的开学礼物，也是在校生一年一度的狂欢庆典。

Well, it happens to be the start of the academic term, and Paperfold University is preparing for its Dreamlight Anniversary. These annual festivities serve as both a welcoming gift for new students, and a chance to celebrate for those already enrolled.
都是年轻人，你们不妨和新生一同入学，在校园里随便走走，体验下学生生活。
Why don't you youngsters join the new students? You could explore the campus, experience student life...
…真是太棒了！青春活泼的美少女在校园里挥洒人生，这种情节简直是为本姑娘量身定制的嘛！
...That's great! A young cute girl full of energy living her best life on campus? That experience is practically made for me!
据说「折纸大学」是寰宇皆知的顶尖艺术学府，我也很想见识一下。
I hear that Paperfold University is well-known throughout the universe as a top arts school. I would love to check it out too.
校园果然对年轻人充满吸引力啊。
Awesome! I'll finally have some academic credentials!
呃，你的关注点好现实哦……
That's a really practical way of looking at it...
恐怕要让你失望了，折纸大学不会为旁听生颁发凭证。但我相信，你会收获远比证书更有价值的事物。
Sorry to disappoint, but Paperfold University doesn't issue certificates to guest students. However, I believe you'll gain something far more valuable than a certificate.
Help! I don't want to go to school!
不用担心，旁听生不会有繁重的学业。师生们也都在忙着筹备庆典，就当是参加一场派对吧。
Haha, don't worry — guest students don't get a lot of homework. Besides, all of the professors and students are busy preparing for the festivities. Just... treat it as a party.
不用考试和写作业的校园生活——简直就是天堂嘛！
Campus life without homework or examinations? That sounds like paradise!
看来大家都已经等不及了，那就这么定了。我会向折纸大学递交入学材料，准备好了就出发，一定要玩得开心啊。
Looks like everyone can't wait. Let's go ahead with that plan, then. I will submit the admission documents to Paperfold University. We'll leave once everyone is ready. Let's all have some fun.
校园，真是个令人怀念的词啊。
"Campus..." That word sure brings back a lot of memories.
这么说来，记得你在故乡也有过一段任教经历，想起什么有趣的事了吗？
Now that you mention it, I recall that you had a teaching stint back home. Any delightful stories that come to mind?
哈哈，那可太多了，准备入学材料时慢慢和你说吧。
Haha, too many to count. Then again, these admission documents will take us a while to complete — I'll see if I can dig up any stories for you.
选修课、社团、校园派对…本姑娘全都要体验一遍！
Electives, extracurricular activities, campus parties... I want to try them all!
当然啦，现在开始咱们就是同学了。
可能没你想的那么美好。
It might not be as fun as you're imagining.
瞧你紧张的，上个学而已，能坏到哪去？
Ooh, is someone having a case of nerves? We're just going to school. How bad can it be?
Actually, I've never been to school before.
唉，列车上就属咱俩的教育经历有些扑朔迷离…哦不对，还有帕姆。
You and I are the only ones with ambiguous educational qualifications on the Express... Oh wait, there's Pom-Pom too.
安下心，好好享受校园生活吧。{NICKNAME}同学，请多指教！
Never mind. Let's just relax and enjoy ourselves on campus. I'll be in your care now, {NICKNAME}!
作为匹诺康尼的最高学府，折纸大学严苛的考核与昂贵的学费让无数考生望而却步，能进入其中就读的不是声名显赫的富商，就是天赋过人的才子。

As the top university in Penacony, the strict examinations and expensive tuition have deterred many potential candidates. The people who are admitted to the school are either well-known wealthy merchants or exceptionally talented geniuses.
因此，听说校园风气也非常「匹诺康尼」，真让人好奇。
Because of this, I hear that the culture on campus has a truly Penaconian flavor. How intriguing.
舒适的沙发，躺着就会感到昏昏欲睡，希望这次旅途不会把你送进一场奇怪的梦里。
A comfy couch that makes you drowsy as soon as you lie down on it — let's just hope this trip doesn't send you into another strange dream.
Talk with the others a little longer.
古怪的声音在耳边萦绕，但睡意胜过了噪音的干扰，你的眼皮不为所动……
The strange sounds lingered by your ears, but your drowsiness overcame the noise, and your eyelids remained unmoved...
前往匹诺康尼的途中，你不出意外地打了个盹儿……
On your way to Penacony, you unsurprisingly dozed off...
我们到啦。{NICKNAME}，你怎么每次跃迁都要犯瞌睡？叫都叫不醒的。
We've arrived. {NICKNAME}, why do you always fall asleep when we're warping? I couldn't even wake you up.
你呀，大晚上不睡觉都干什么去了？
What have you been doing at night instead of sleeping?
Oh, so that ruckus was you?
什么鬼动静！我喊你的时候很温柔的，好不好？

It's almost time. Let's proceed to admissions.
走吧走吧，彩色的校园生活在等我们呢。
Come on, let's go! A spectacular campus life awaits us!
可话说回来，家族为什么要在梦里办学？会有人专程跑「盛会之星」来读书吗？
Why is The Family running a school in a dream anyway? Do people really come to the Planet of Festivities just to study?
折纸大学建立于「拓梦时代」，最早是筑梦师的培训基地，创始人是当时的隐夜鸫家主格拉克斯。
Paperfold University was established during the Pioneering Era. It was initially a training ground for Dreamweavers and was founded by Glaux, head of the Nightingale Family.
后来鸢尾花与苜蓿草也参与到大学管理中，发展出如今的筑梦、谐乐、财富三大学院，折纸大学也一跃成为了闻名银河的艺术学府。

Later on, the Iris and Alfalfa Families also got involved in university operations, and the education landscape expanded into the three academies we have today: Dreamweaver, Charmony, and Fortune. From there, Paperfold University became known as the top arts school in the cosmos.
哇——这里真的是学校吗？看起来比影视乐园还豪华啊！
Wow! Is this really a school? It looks grander than the theme park!
折纸大学的校训是「美梦多彩，理想自由」，眼前的景象也算是印证了这句话。离校庆开幕式还有些时间，我们先四处逛逛吧。

Paperfold University's motto is "Color your dreams, free your ideals." What we see before us reaffirms those words. We still have some time before the anniversary celebration's opening ceremony. Let's take a look around.
Ooh! Slumbernana Monkey is so cute!
哦，这位同学也是睡蕉小猴的*蕉粉*吗？
Oh, are you Slumbernana Monkey's Ripe Banana too?
*蕉粉*谈不上，刚入坑的*新蕉*而已！你身边这是…玩偶吗？
You could say I'm more of a Fresh Banana than a Ripe Banana. Is that a plush next to you?
这是我在「创意集会」上买的，是不是很逼真？听摊主说这款特别火爆，专程去也不一定抢得到呢。
I bought this from the Creator's Market. Doesn't it look realistic? The booth owner said this design is especially popular and really hard to get.
真可爱，种草了，有机会我也要去看看。
So cute! I want one! I'll go take a look when I get the chance.
Hello, new students! How are you?
吓到你们了？抱歉！我是负责迎新的「助蕉<unbreak>416</unbreak>」！
Did I scare you? Sorry. I'm Assistanana <unbreak>416</unbreak> from the welcoming committee!
这是*蕉语*！现在同学们都爱睡蕉小猴，咱们这些教职人员也做足了功课，专门换了个造型蕉！
It's Bananese. Students are in love with Slumbernana Monkey right now, so our faculty did our homework and changed up our image, bana!
为什么折纸大学的教职人员是美梦剧团？
Why are the faculty in Paperfold University from the Sweet Dreams Troupe?
这位同学有所不知，校庆期间大部分老师都在参加学术研讨，校长就委托美梦剧团来填补师资空缺了蕉。
Most of the teachers are attending the academic conference during the school's anniversary. That's why the dean asked the Sweet Dreams Troupe to be substitute teachers, bana.
放心，*蕉师*们装载了资深教师的记忆，*蕉学*水平绝对可靠——但现在还不急着学习，大家先在彩梦校庆上玩个痛快蕉！

Don't you worry. The BananAdvisors come loaded with the memories of the senior professors. Our banacademic standards remain top-notch. There's no need to worry about studies right now though. Please enjoy the Dreamlight Anniversary first, bana!
当然，我就没打算好好学习！
I sure will! I wasn't planning to study anyway!
哈哈，没关系！折纸大学是自由的学府，请在这里尽情挥洒青春吧！
Haha, that's alright! Paperfold University is a school of freedom. Spend your youth however you'd like!
You there, please wait a moment!
Huh? Are you talking to us?
大老远就瞧见你们了，带着相机的粉红系美少女…你就是「赵相机」同学吧！
You guys were easy to spot. You, the pink pretty girl with the camera, you're Say~Cheese~, aren't you?
哎，别闹别闹，人家找的是我！
Hey, stop messing around! She was looking for me!
是我啦。这不是听说大学生都爱起昵称，我就让大家直接叫网名了。
That's me. I heard college students love nicknames, so I decided to go by my online handle.
你好！我是校友群里的「独爱蕉宝」，各位可以叫我蒙塔娜。
Hi there! I'm TreasureNana from the campus group chat. You can call me Montana.
Nice to meet you. My name is Dan Heng.
…你什么时候给自己起了这名啊？
...When did you start going by that name?
天呐，我认得你！你不是这一届的盛会巨星吗？大明星啊！
Oh gosh, I recognize you! You're this season's Festive Superstar! You're famous!
真没想到能和你这样的大人物当同学，我敢打赌，你一定会被分到「谐乐学院」的！
I never thought I'd go to the same school with someone famous. I bet you'll be assigned to the Charmony Academy!
指的是「测弦考试」。在入学典礼上，家族成员会通过「调律」来分析学生们的潜质，分配至合适的学院。
It refers to the "Tuning Test." At the entrance ceremony, The Family's Members will analyze the potential of students through "tuning" and assign them to the appropriate academy.
No one said there'd be an exam!
Dan Heng, can I copy your answers?
别急，这不是真正的考试。
Calm down. It's not a real exam.
唔，学生们的专业是家族安排的？会不会太不「同谐」了。
Hmm, The Family assigns every student their major? Doesn't sound very "harmonious" to me.
放心，如果对结果有异议，学生随时可以申请更换学院。只是…大多数人也不会这么做。
Don't worry. If a student disagrees with the result, they can apply for a transfer to another academy. It's just that most people don't.
毕竟梦里的压力也很大，更何况匹诺康尼上市后放宽了入梦审查，竞争变得更激烈了。家族愿意给我们指条明路，感谢还来不及呢。

The pressure is high even in a dream. Not to mention competition has grown fierce ever since Penacony relaxed their entrance reviews after the place went public. Most of us are just grateful The Family is willing to guide us.
好啦，别聊这些了。你们是要去听校长演讲吗？我和朋友打算去「创意集会」看看，就不奉陪啦——反正也不点名，待会见蕉！

Anyway, let's change the subject. Are you going to attend the dean's speech? My friends and I are going to check out the Creator's Market, so I won't be joining you. They're not taking attendance anyway. See you later, bana!
老师也好学生也好，这儿的人可真有个性。
The teachers and students here sure are unique.
瞧你平时天不怕地不怕的样子，谁信啊。
No one's going to buy that. You're never afraid of anything.
How do you do, fellow student?
算算时间，校庆开幕式也该开始了。我们这就去见校长吧！
Look at the time. The anniversary celebration's opening ceremony should be starting soon. Let's go see the dean.
Look, the dean is going on stage.
这…怎么可能？校长怎么是……
Wha... No way. The dean is...
同学们，大家好——或者说，大*蕉*好！
Hello, students. Or should I say, bananjour?
什么情况，是整人节目吗？
What's going on? Is this a gag?
That's just a mascot head, right?
Is the dean supposed to be this unserious?
我是「普利蒙教授」。当然，大家也可以用更流行的方式称呼我为——*蕉授*！
I'm Professor Primon. You may also call me by my more fashionable moniker — Profnana.
哈哈，各位同学是不是吓了一跳？别担心，我没有傻也没有疯，之所以用这个造型登台，只是为了向新同学们展现折纸大学的风貌——
Haha, did I surprise you? Don't worry, students. I've not gone mad. The reason I'm appearing before you like this is to show our new students the ethos of Paperfold University—
唉，多么美好的愿望啊。可我听说，它如今变成了一句空话，大家都被学业压得抬不起头，根本没空仰望梦境的星空。
A lovely aspiration, but I hear that the words ring hollow nowadays. The pressure of schoolwork has kept all of you from looking up at the beautiful starry sky of the Dreamscape.
「整个学期的课全排满了、每天都在过三点一线的生活、毕业答辩太辛苦、论文根本写不出来……」
"My schedule for the semester is packed. All I do is eat, study, and sleep. It's so hard to prepare for my thesis defense. I'm stuck on my thesis..."
同学们，这不对，这绝不是梦想之地的年轻人该有的样子。所以今天，蕉授要告诉大家一个好消息——
My dearest students, this is not the way. This is not how youngsters in the Land of the Dreams should behave. So today, I bring you good news.
经过讨论，教研组一致决定，取消本学期所有的课程和考试，只需参与校庆便可获取学分！

After some discussion, the teaching research team has come to a unanimous decision to cancel all courses and exams for this semester. Everyone who attends the school anniversary will earn their credits.
是的，不用怀疑自己的耳朵。年轻人，自由——这才是折纸大学想教会你们的。
Yes, do not doubt your ears, young ones. Freedom — This is what Paperfold University yearns to teach you.
把学业和生活的烦恼都抛到脑后，尽情挥洒自己的个性吧，将热爱的事物，比如这只睡蕉小猴，带往校园的每一个角落！
Leave your worries over school and life behind and express yourself! Spread the love of your favorite things, such as Slumbernana Monkey, to every corner of the campus!
欢迎来到彩梦校庆！美梦多彩，理想自由——！
Welcome to the Dreamlight Anniversary! Color your dreams, free your ideals!
这学校的气氛也太好了吧！
Woah, the hype on campus is real!
看来折纸大学的校风比传闻中还要开放，倒也很符合匹诺康尼的气质。
Looks like Paperfold University is more open-minded than the rumors say. It really suits Penacony.
接下来就轮到「测弦考试」了。
The Tuning Test is up next.
走吧，候考地点在公共教室。
Let's go. The waiting area is in the open classroom.
就是这儿了。人好多啊，都是来参加考试的吗？
Here we are. There's so many people. Is everyone here for the exam?
各位{RUBY_B#同学}演员{RUBY_E#}，你们好。我是这场测验的{RUBY_B#主考官}导演{RUBY_E#}，请叫我芮克先生，这是我在片尾常用的署名。
Hello, {RUBY_B#trainees}cast members{RUBY_E#}. I am your {RUBY_B#chief examiner}director{RUBY_E#} for this exam. You may call me Mr. Reca. It's the name I commonly use in the end credits.
芮克先生，请你注意用语。这里是教室，不是片场。
Mr. Reca, please mind your verbiage. You're not on set. This is a classroom.
NG——家族的演员，有我在的地方就是片场。
No good! Cast member of The Family, do remember that everywhere I stand is a set.
天呐，是本人！居然能在学校里看见芮克先生！
Oh my gosh, it's him! It's Mr. Reca in the flesh in the school!
芮克先生！我是你的粉丝啊！
Mr. Reca! I am your biggest fan!
CUT——几位演员，注意你们的台词。我现在饰演的是「客座教师」，而你们则是「学生」，切勿进行不合时宜的表演。
CUT! Cast members, please remember your lines. I'm currently playing the role of a guest lecturer and you are my students. Please stay in character.
这人看着好眼熟…啊，我好像在「蓝调的时刻」见过他的画像，是个很厉害的导演？
This guy looks familiar... Oh! I think I saw a picture of him in the Blue Hour. He's a really famous director, I think.
芮克先生，《魂断黑星》、《一朵星云的凋谢》，还有赫赫有名的《明亚特之夜》都是他的作品。
Mr. Reca. He's known for works such as Soul-Shattered Dark Star, A Fading Nebula, and the famous Nights of Minyatur.
哎，我还以为你只会看纪录片呢。
Huh? I thought you only watched documentaries.
他的作品都改编自真实事件，很有参考价值。
His works are based on real life events. They are worth referencing.
让我看看这场戏的台本。「在考官主持下，家族对考生进行调律，探寻其灵魂旋律中的天赋……」
Let me see what the script for this scene says: The examiner presides over the exam as The Family tunes the students to discover their talents within their soul's melody...
无聊透顶的编排，我要换个拍法。家族的演员，你杀青了。
Boring. I'm changing the directions of this scene. Cast member of The Family, that's a wrap for you.
什、什么？可是调律是测弦考试最重要的环节……
Wh—What? But tuning is the most important segment of the Tuning Test...
丝蒂娜女士，在你任教的十三年零四个月里，你连续进行了七次学术造假——看来怠惰已经让你的艺术修养变成一堆废胶卷了。

Miss Sedina, in your thirteen years and four months of teaching, you've committed seven counts of academic fraud. It seems your laziness has turned your artistic integrity into a pile of decaying film.
学术造假？你在胡说些什么……
Academic fraud? What are you talking about...?
这场戏决定了学生们的未来，可贵校竟然采用这种无聊的摄制方案，难怪鸢尾花几百年来都没拍出过一部好片。
This scene will determine the students' very futures, yet your academy would have me produce such slop? It's no wonder the Iris Family hasn't produced a good film in centuries.
够了！让你来当考官是出于代理校长的面子，少得寸进尺！根据校规……
Enough! You're only here as an examiner because of the acting dean! You can't dictate what we do! According to academy regulations...
根据校规？你再好好<color=#dbc291ff>回忆</color>一下，校规是怎么说的？
According to academy regulations? <color=#dbc291ff>Think</color> carefully now, what do the academy regulations say exactly?
校规说的清清楚楚，在考场上，考官说的就是规则！所以……
The academy regulations very clearly state that the examiner's word is law in the examination room, so...
Wait, but you're the examiner! What's going on here?
对，你终于想起来了，在我的片场，{RUBY_B#芮克先生}导演{RUBY_E#}就是规则。
Good, you finally connected the dots. On my set, {RUBY_B#Mr. Reca}the director{RUBY_E#}'s word is law.
小演员们，我已经和制片方达成了共识，这次考试将更改为一场「试镜会」——
Members of the cast, I've reached a consensus with the producers. This exam shall now be an audition.
做好准备了吗，我一定会为你们找到最合适的角色。
Are you ready? I will surely find the perfect role for you.
那芮克先生三言两语就能说服家族的人，好厉害啊。
Mr. Reca is so amazing. He convinced The Family so easily.
那位家族成员的反应有些奇怪，就像是突然改变了想法。
That Family Member's reaction was strange. It's as if she suddenly changed her mind.
难不成是被大导演的气场震住了？
Maybe she was just in awe of the director's aura?
是芮克先生提到的「学术造假」吧，没想到折纸大学也会发生这种事。
You mean the "academic fraud" Mr. Reca mentioned? I can't believe that sort of thing happens in Paperfold University, too.
芮克先生也会「钟表把戏」？
Could Mr. Reca be using Clockwork?
表现倒是很像，但应该不可能吧……
It looked similar, but it can't be, right?
那位灰头发的同学——轮到你了！快去演艺教室吧！
Hey, student with the gray hair, it's your turn! Go to the performing arts classroom.
到你了到你了，快去吧！要是结束得早，别忘了给我们讲讲面经哦！
It's finally your turn! Hurry and go! If you finish early, don't forget to tell us how it went!
试镜流程很简单，你只需要回答几个问题。当然，我的判断依据不止是答案，也包括你在镜头前的一举一动。
The audition process is simple. You need only answer a few questions. Of course, I won't be judging based on your answers alone. I will be watching your every move on camera.
我知道你是匹诺康尼的盛会巨星，所以我希望这次你也能发挥相应的实力——
I know you're Penacony's Festive Superstar, so I expect you to show me what you're made of.
CUT! Assistant director, change the scene, please.
让我看看…太棒了，你真是位天生的演员！
Let me see here... Perfect! You're born to be a performer!
不客气，你很「礼貌」，礼仪在商务场合是必不可少的敲门砖。
You're welcome. And you're very polite. Good etiquette can get you far in this industry.
呵呵，你很「自信」，自信的演员总能带给观众更多惊喜。
Heh, you're confident. Good. A confident performer tends to delight the audience with surprises.
识人是导演的基本功，演员的一言一行都在体现他的个性——比如你刚刚的台词表现出了「好奇」，而好奇是求知的动力。

Knowing how to read people is a basic skill for a director. The way a performer speaks and behaves reflects their personality. For example, you expressed curiosity just now, which is a driving force for learning.
那么第一个问题：介绍一下自己的身份吧。
Now, for the first question: Please, introduce yourself.
我是星穹列车的无名客。
I'm one of the Nameless on the Astral Express.
嗯，这的确是你最重要的身份，很「诚恳」的答案。
Mm-hmm, that is indeed an important aspect of your identity. A very honest answer.
盛会巨星，匹诺康尼的股东。
I am the Festive Superstar, a shareholder of Penacony.
强调自己最尊贵的身份来彰显个人价值，可谓「精明」。
Emphasizing your most respectable status to demonstrate your personal worth. Very astute.
银河球棒侠，亦是球棒•忍者。
I am Galactic Baseballer, AKA Baseball Bat Ninja.
哈哈，在考场上还要对着考官说笑，你很有「表演欲」啊。
Haha! Joking with the examiner during an exam. You have a desire to perform.
OK，第二个问题：你最引以为傲的优点是什么？
Okay, second question. What are you most proud of about yourself?
I'm willing to put my life at risk.
哦，我理解你的意思，「不避艰险」的精神能为影片创造更多价值。
Oh, I get what you mean. The ability to not shy away from danger can bring great value when film-making.
你是说自己身体好吧？不错，剧组最欢迎「吃苦耐劳」的新人。
I suppose you mean you're in good shape? Yes, the cast welcomes newcomers who are hardworking and persevering.
很好！「坦然豁达」是登台必备的素养，也是许多演员梦寐以求的天赋。
Very good! Staying calm and sanguine is essential when you're on stage. It is a talent most performers yearn for.
接下来是第三个问题，就让「她」来问吧。
Now, for the third question. I'll let her do the honors.
这孩子是「副导演」，一位可靠的搭档，摄影、场记、剪辑…无所不通，在挑选演员的眼光上更胜我一筹。
This is my assistant director. A reliable partner who's skilled at cinematography, script supervising, editing, and more — has a better eye than me when it comes to casting performers.
嗯，她的问题非常犀利。{NICKNAME}，请回答吧。
Hmm, a very perceptive question. {NICKNAME}, how do you respond?
镜头能代替台词传递一切，她的沉默便是提问，你的反应便是回答——一个符合「逻辑」的答案。
The camera can convey everything in place of words. Her silence is a question and your reaction is an answer. You gave a logical answer.
哦，面对他人的刁难，你的反应很「圆滑」，但副导演不喜欢被人夸赞外表。
Ooh, you were tactful in the face of someone making things difficult for you. However, the assistant director doesn't like to be praised for her appearance.
好吧当我没说，她很开心，你蛮会夸人的。
Fine, pretend I didn't say anything. She's very happy with your praise.
呵，你把她给逗乐了，真是位「幽默」的演员。
Hah, you amused her. A humorous performer indeed.
无名客，你的记忆从「智识」的航站开始，登上「开拓」的列车，在旅途中见证「存护」的意志、「巡猎」的决意、「同谐」与「秩序」的争论……

Nameless, your memory began onboard a station of Erudition, where you then boarded a train of Trailblaze. In your journey, you witnessed the will of Preservation, the determination of The Hunt, and the dispute between Harmony and Order...
你跑遍不同的片场，观赏了不同的故事。现在，你是否找到了属于自己的主题——或是说「梦想」呢？
You ran across many different sets and witnessed many different stories. Did you find a theme or perhaps a dream that belongs solely to you?
How do you know so much?
导演当然要在试镜前熟读演员的履历，这很正常。
It's only natural for a director to familiarize himself with a performer's resume before an audition.
这样啊，恭喜你，有清晰的「目标」，影片票房一定不会低。
I see. Congratulations on having a clear goal. Your film will surely be a hit at the box office.
这样呀，没关系，开放的主题能带来更多「创意」。
I see. That's alright. An open theme can encourage creativity.
很有「个性」的答案，风格化能勾起观众的兴趣，就像我越发对你感到好奇了。
A very individualistic answer. You have a style that can hook an audience, just like how you've piqued more of my curiosity.
CUT——你的考试结束了，我们来看看结果吧……
CUT! You have finished your exam. Let's take a look at your results...
大多数回答都很沉稳，像一位可靠的摄影师，还有协助「筑城者」的经历，最适合你的学院是——筑梦学院！
Most of your answers were calm and composed, like a reliable cinematographer. Combined with your experience in assisting the Architects, the best academy for you is... Dreamweaver Academy!
大多数回答都很聪明，像一位机敏的制片人，还有和「星际和平公司」打交道的经历，最适合你的学院是——财富学院！
Most of your answers were clever, like an astute producer. Combined with your experience in dealing with the Interastral Peace Corporation, the best academy for you is... Fortune Academy!
大多数回答都很风趣，像一位镜头前的明星，还有赢得「盛会海选」的经历，最适合你的学院是——谐乐学院！
Most of your answers were humorous, like a celebrity in front of a camera. Combined with your experience in winning the Festivity Auditions, the best academy for you is... Charmony Academy!
怎么样？对这个结果可还满意？
What do you think? Are you satisfied with your result?
很好，感谢你愿意听从导演的建议，不胜荣幸。
Very good. I'm grateful you're willing to listen to your director's suggestions. It's truly an honor.
I'm not satisfied. Let me retake the exam.
好啊，哪怕是同样的剧本和演员，每次拍摄也会有不同的惊喜。

Let's take it from the top once more. ACTION!

没问题，我尊重演员的意愿，你想扮演哪个学院的角色？

这样呀，你的选择未必正确，但错误的选择往往能让故事更加精彩。

试镜结束。你现在是「筑梦学院」的学生了。请收好这张学生证。

{NICKNAME}, can you feel it? The drama concealed within this campus is stirring.
而现在，属于你的情节即将开演——作为主角，别让我和观众失望啊。
This is where your story begins. Don't disappoint me or the audience now, my dear leading character.
试镜结束。你现在是「财富学院」的学生了。请收好这张学生证。
The audition is over. You are now a student of Fortune Academy. Here is your student card.
试镜结束。你现在是「谐乐学院」的学生了。请收好这张学生证。
The audition is over. You are now a student of Charmony Academy. Here is your student card.

我还以为自己很有演艺天赋呢，结果竟然要去筑梦边境打灰，这合理吗？

当然没——没能拒绝。他说我在筑梦学院会遇见「充满戏剧张力」的未来，煞有介事的，可太令人好奇了。
Of course I — did. He was all serious when he said I would encounter a future "full of dramatic tension" in Dreamweaver Academy. It made me really curious.
反正也没损失，就先试试看呗。你们呢？去了哪个学院？

哇哦，那我们就是同学了，请多指教！
Wow, that means we'll be schoolmates! Let's help each other out.
嚯，听说财富学院培养过不少富翁…{NICKNAME}，苟富贵，莫相忘！
Woah, I heard lots of rich people come from Fortune Academy. {NICKNAME}, don't forget me once you're rich!
唉，不愧是匹诺康尼的盛会巨星，真羡慕你啊。

哎呀，丹恒，没想到你心里也有一场明星梦。

只是芮克先生再三表态，外加他自己也是谐乐学院的客座讲师，我不好推辞。

行啦行啦，知道你的明星气质把大导演迷倒了，别炫耀了。

不管怎样，我们总算是把入学流程都搞定了，接着就去逛逛校庆吧——就先从蒙塔娜说的「创意集会」开始？
Anyway, we're finally done with the admission process. Let's go check out the anniversary. How about we start with the Creator's Market that Montana mentioned?
话说回来，那位芮克先生居然问到了贝洛伯格的事，他是怎么知道的？

你、你们好，欢迎来到甜品社……
H—Hello and welcome to the Dessert Club...
甜品社？这都是你一个人做的吗，真厉害！

好像在群里看到过这个名字…

我有个狐人朋友说话和你很像。
A foxian friend of mine talks just like you.
是吗？那她应该也很困扰吧……

不、不是的，这里举办的是「梦境甜品师挑战」，同学们可以从甜品社提供的食材中挑选组合，设计出独属于你们的…香蕉派。

因为…睡蕉小猴特别火，连带着各种口味的香蕉料理也很流行…各位，请来试试看吧。

The first thing you must choose for your dessert is... the banana. There are three types...
遍布翁瓦克雨林、口感酸涩的「碧绿野蕉」；常用于调味、口感刺激的「血色刺蕉」；还有曾风靡宇宙，但已在美梦外灭绝的「金黄睡蕉」……

The sour jadegreen banana from the Vonwacq rainforests. The intense bloodthorn banana commonly used as seasoning. And the extinct golden Slumbernana that was once popular across the universe but now only exists in sweet dreams...

Next, we'll add some "emotions" to give the dessert its unique texture. This is also a feature unique to Dreamscape cooking...
最后是辅料…匹诺康尼的甜梦糖霜，阿斯德纳特产肉桂粉，还有酒店特调辣椒酱。
Finally, for added flavor, we have Penacony's sweet dream icing, Asdana's specialty cinnamon, and the hotel's special chili sauce.
因、因为折纸大学的学生来自各个星球，听一位社员说，他的故乡吃什么都要蘸辣……
B—Because Paperfold University students come from many different planets. One of the members said they dip everything in chili back at home.
Add the hotel's special chili sauce.
这样香蕉派就完成了，我来烘烤一下……
The banana pie is complete. I'll start baking...
经过了短暂的烘烤，你设计的香蕉派出炉了。

看起来不错啊，让我尝尝——

嗯，酸酸甜甜的，还有种大自然的香气……

哇，好刺激的口感，像是什么东西在咬我的舌头……

啊…真是美味的甜品，好开心……

啊…真是美味的甜品，感觉浑身都放松下来了……

Ahh, this dessert is so tasty. It gets better with every bite. It's like I can't get enough.

当然——盛会巨星、无名客、匹诺康尼的股东！不要小看财富学院的情报网，你们还没走进校门，爆料帖子就已经塞满折纸论坛了。

看这充满智慧的目光，光泽柔顺的皮毛，栩栩如生的神态，简直就和真正的睡蕉小猴一模一样！

什、什么，匹诺康尼的股东！？

你露出一个微笑，嘴角划出一道比香蕉还弯的弧度，有如黑云压城，令纪检部学生颤抖不已。
You flash a smile, your lips curving more than a banana, like a storm cloud looming, making the Disciplinary Committee students tremble.
同学们，刚刚就是开个玩笑。来来来，别说前面的摊子了，您三位想去哪就去哪儿，要不要来我宿舍坐坐？来我家也行！
My friends, I was just kidding earlier. Please, you three can go wherever you like. If the booths up ahead aren't enough, why don't you come visit my dorm? Or my home!
这人脸变得比中了「钟表把戏」还快……

What's going on with the student who broke school rules?
唉，就是有个在校园里形迹可疑，还乱涂乱画的家伙。穿着奇装异服，一条发光的围巾，开口还满嘴胡话……
There's someone acting suspiciously and leaving graffiti on campus. They're dressed oddly, wearing a glowing scarf, and speaking nonsense...
呃…你说的是前面那人吗？

找到你了！这下我看你往哪跑！

…「伎乐忍徒」，我等的闲暇时光似乎要结束了。
...Ninja Initiate Gigaku, it seems our time of rest is coming to an end.
是啊，缭乱忍侠。这是此地的奉行武士…不，是我等罪孽召来的厉鬼。
You're right, Dazzling Ninja. They are the warriors of this land... No, they're the evil spirits drawn to our sins.
可叹、可叹…纵使忍•脚步再怎么迅捷，也逃不过因果•报应啊。

忍者的利刃并非不能斩断因果，不如说，我等必须斩断因果。

多么令人敬佩的觉悟！伎乐忍徒，阁下已半步踏入忍侠之境。
Your determination is admirable! Ninja Initiate Gigaku, you have already stepped into the Ninja Hero Domain.
听到了吗？厉鬼啊，在我们的忍法面前化作飞烬吧！

Huh? Are we going to fight!?
还在等什么，奉行武士，出招吧！

我真服了…演艺社的家伙，你边上那姐们犯事儿了，别跟着她发癫！

真是的，陪我们演下去嘛！人家还录着像呢！

所以，这家伙是你们社团的？
So, is she a member of your club?
不是啦。似乎是校外来的，但她多入戏，简直是个完美的演员！
No, I think she came from outside the campus, but look how in-character she is. She's perfect!
在下与伎乐忍徒只是萍水相逢，但也并非孤身一人。在下的伙伴——乃是这群无名•忍者。
My meeting with Ninja Initiate Gigaku was purely happenstance, but I did not come here alone. These Nameless Ninjas are also my companions.
原来是各位股东的朋友啊，那倒是可以理解了。

Hey, what do you mean by that?
既然是访客，这次就放过你吧，以后别再违反校规了。

哟——面对奇兵天降，横行霸道的町奉行退却了！忍者大胜利！
Hah! The tyrannical official retreated in the face of such extraordinary fighters! Victory for the ninjas!
You, put on your school uniform or it's a demerit.
球棒•忍者，久别重逢，真是因缘•巧合！
Baseball Bat Ninja, it is good to see you again. This must be a fated reunion!
还有二位无名•忍者，初次见面，在下乃是缭乱忍侠•AKA•乱破。
It is a pleasure to meet the both of you as well, Nameless Ninjas. I am Rappa, AKA the Dazzling Ninja.
无名忍者？是说无名客吗，咱们有名字的啦…我叫三月七，他是丹恒。

多么响亮的名号——你们好，琉璃•忍者，以及，飞龙•忍者！
What strong names! Greetings, Ninja Ruri and Ninja Hiryū!
遵命，飞龙忍者•AOI•丹恒阁下。
Understood, Ninja Hiryū Aoi Dan Heng.
呃…她好认真啊，这种类型叫什么来着？中二病？
Um... She's taking this really seriously. Is this what people call chuunibyou?
I see hints of the Knights of Beauty.
银河世界千奇百怪，也许真存在一颗「忍法星球」也说不定。

她就是你在梦里看见的忍者？
Is she the ninja you saw in your dream?
正是。在下与球棒•忍者是出生入死的忍道挚友，曾在邪祟幻境中遭遇围困，同休共戚。
Indeed. Baseball Bat Ninja and I are comrades who will risk life and limb for one another. We were besieged in the fiendling fantasia and survived together.
偷听别人说话可不是什么正当之举。
It's not nice to eavesdrop on conversations.
忍者的超•听力连质子入灭的声响也可捕捉，各位在我面前高声议论，不算偷听。
A ninja's super hearing can capture even the death of a proton. You spoke loudly before me. I wasn't eavesdropping.
你自称是我们的同伴，理应表明身份来意。
You claim to be our companion, so it's only reasonable to ask that you state your identity and purpose.
当然，在下正是为此而来。但在此之前——
Of course. That is exactly why I'm here. But before that—
眼下仍有公义需要伸张，乱破当先全力相助。
There is still justice to be upheld. I must prioritize assisting that cause.
可恶的学生会，居然区别对待……
Stupid student council. This is discrimination.
Ninja Initiate Gigaku, what ails you?
别再用戏里的名字称呼我了，叫人家的艺名吧——芭蕉花酱！
Stop calling me by the name of my character. Use my stage name — Nanabloom-chan!
Another one from the group chat?
是哒，人家在群里的昵称是「芭蕉花酱（努力版）」！
Correct! My nickname in the group chat is Nanabloom-chan (Hardworking Edition)!
就是香蕉开的花！很漂亮哦！
Referring to the flowers that bloom on banana trees. They're really pretty!
这是常盘国的同学给我起的，是不是很可爱！
A classmate from Tokiwa calls me that. Isn't it cute?
仔细看过才发现，这届新生的素质还真不一般！请务必要参加我们演艺社的活动——「折纸大学超级闪耀明星计划•写真大挑战」！

You know, I just realized how high caliber our new students are this year. Please, you absolutely must take part in the Performing Arts Club's "Paperfold University Superstar Project Photography Challenge"!
这项挑战需要各位扮演明星模特，选出一位摄影师来拍摄符合要求的照片，我们会印成写真集送给大家。

This challenge requires you to take on the role of celebrity models. You'll choose a photographer who will take a photo that meets our requirements. We'll then print it into a photobook and send it to you.
听起来好棒，我们一起来拍吧！
That sounds great. Let's take some photos together!
既然是伎乐忍徒准备的试炼，在下也没有理由推辞。
If it's a trial prepared by Ninja Initiate Gigaku, I see no reason to refuse.
好耶！那你们选出一位摄影师吧，比起模特，这项挑战更考验摄影师的技巧！
Great! Now choose a photographer among yourselves. This challenge will put the photographer's skills to the test more than the model's!
那个…要不还是{NICKNAME}来？求求了，我比较想要自己的写真嘛。
What? Um... Can't you do it, {NICKNAME}? Please? I really want my own photoshoot! I'm begging you.
The ever-reliable Dan Heng, you're up!
我没给别人拍过照片，还是你来吧。
I've never taken photos of other people before. It might be better if you do it.
抱歉，在下并不擅长使用这种忍具，还是交给阁下吧。
My apologies. I am unfamiliar with this particular ninja tool. It's best I leave it to you.
那摄影就交给你了，加油！至于道具…就用这些睡蕉小猴玩偶吧。
Then you're in charge of photography. Good luck! As for our prop... Let's use this Slumbernana Monkey toy.
来吧同学，一定要让<color=#dbc291ff>所有模特与睡蕉小猴</color>都同时入镜哦！
Alright, make sure you get <color=#dbc291ff>all the models and the Slumbernana Monkey</color> in the shot.
为小伙伴们拍下照片吧！
The moment all little monkeys jump
哇，太完美了！我要把这些场照挂到摊位上！
Wow, perfect! I'm going to display these photos at the booth.
球棒•忍者，阁下的留影•忍法甚是精妙啊。
Baseball Bat Ninja, your Photo Ninjutsu is exquisite!
唉，真羡慕各位这么上相，我也好想成为热砂海选的盛会之星呀……
I envy how photogenic you all are. I want to be one of the stars featured in the Scorchsand Audition too...
算了算了，狂欢的日子不提这种伤心事。请拿好写真集，祝你们玩的愉快！
Forget it. Let's not talk about such depressing topics in the middle of festivities. Here's your photobook. Have fun!
现在不会再有人打扰了，说吧。你这一路都在跟踪我们，为什么？
No one will bother us anymore. Tell me. Why have you been following us all this time?
很敏锐，看来阁下也拥有忍者的超•听力。但同行只是一场巧合，在下前来，只为在校园中布设缭乱•忍符，破除邪忍阵法。

Very astute. It appears you have ninja super hearing too. However, following you was mere coincidence. My purpose for coming here is to set up Dazzling Ninja Seals across the campus in order to dispel the Evil Ninja's matrix.
忍符…哦，就是纪检部的学生提到的「乱涂乱画」吧。
Seals? Oh, the grafitti the student from the Disciplinary Committee was talking about.
因果何其奥妙，在下竟与诸位无名•忍者重逢。飞龙•忍者不认得在下，但一定记得我的同僚——身披银甲，豪迈潇洒，善使枪弹忍法，口中常念甘言美语的忍侠……

Cause and effect is a wondrous thing. It allowed me to reunite with you, the Nameless Ninjas. Ninja Hiryū may not recognize me, but he must remember my colleague: A Ninja Hero clad in silver armor. He has a bold, easy confidence, is proficient in the use of bullet ninjutsu, and frequently spouts sweet and melodious words...
I think I know who that is...
所以，你也是「巡海游侠」的一员？
Does that mean you're also a Galaxy Ranger?
当然，在下生怕引起误会，故而一直在强调「忍侠」名号。
Of course. I didn't want to cause a misunderstanding, so I emphasized the title Ninja Hero.
They both mean the same thing?
这样是谁入住了酒店就有了答案。可巡海游侠为何要重访梦境？
So we now know who checked into the hotel. But why are the Galaxy Rangers revisiting the Dreamscape?
飞龙•忍者，诸位都是习得「开拓」真传的上忍，自然知道在银河忍界中，像我等这般伟力非凡的忍者不在少数，其中亦有邪忍。

Ninja Hiryū. You and your companions are all elite ninjas who follow the true teachings of Trailblaze. You should know in the Cosmic Ninja Realm, there are many extraordinary individuals like me, but also evil ninjas.
邪忍一日不灭，需要我等忍侠出手的险情便日出不穷。在下造访毗乃昆尼，正是为了狩猎一匹恶徒。
So long as the Evil Ninja still lives, danger that requires the presence of us Ninja Heroes will never cease. The reason I visit Pinecany is to hunt down one such scoundrel.
他带领邪祟为害四方，是忍之都的仇寇，亦是在下的死敌——「御猿•邪忍」是也！
He wreaks havoc across the universe with his fiendlings in tow. He is the enemy of the Ninja Capital and my archenemy — Evil Ninja Osaru.
...Do you know what she's talking about?
此乃忍法帖中记载的忍界•事记。
A historical account of the ninja realm logged in the Ninja Scrolls.
这下麻烦了…如果她的游侠身份属实，就不能把这些言谈当成说笑，也许匹诺康尼真的发生了什么。
This is troubling. If she really is a Ranger, we have to take her story seriously. Perhaps something has happened in Penacony.
形势还不明朗，先别轻举妄动，毕竟我们现在的身份只是「旁听生」。
The situation isn't clear. We shouldn't act rashly. After all, we're currently here as guest students.
如果能联系上波提欧就好了，他现在到底在哪呢……
It would help if we could get in touch with Boothill. I wonder where he is...
大家很上镜呢，但没拍到小猴可不行，再来一次吧。
Everyone looks so photogenic, but Slumbernana Monkey is missing from the shot. Try again.
球棒•忍者，阁下的留影•忍法甚是精妙啊。
Baseball Bat Ninja, your Photo Ninjutsu is exquisite!
唉，真羡慕各位这么上相，我也好想成为热砂海选的盛会之星呀……
I envy how photogenic you all are. I want to be one of the stars featured in the Scorchsand Audition too...
算了算了，狂欢的日子不提这种伤心事。请拿好写真集，祝你们玩的愉快！
Forget it. Let's not talk about such depressing topics in the middle of festivities. Here's your photobook. Have fun!
是啊，在我醒来时，我的大脑在说：「仇恨是一切弱者的弱点」。
Sure enough, when I came to, my mind was whisperin': Hatred is the frailty of the weak.
那时我才意识到，原来自己还算有一个脑子是「活着」的。
That's when it hit me. I've got a mind that's still "alive."
去他宝贝的，脑子可管不着我，不然我怎么到得了这儿？
My muddle-fudgin' brain ain't the boss of me! Or how'd I end up here?
客人，恕我冒昧问一句，这已经是您点的第七杯了，可每一杯您又只喝一口…是有什么地方不合口味吗？
Pardon me for asking, but this is your seventh drink and you've only had a sip from each... Is there something the matter with them?
哦，没有的事，这些小甜水味道不错。点这么多只是一种习惯。
Oh, it ain't like that. These little sweet drinks taste pretty good. Ordering a bunch is just a habit of mine.
放心姐们，你很快就知道为什么了。我出去干点活，这些先帮我留着。走了啊。
No need to worry, lady, you'll know soon enough. I'm headin' out to take care of some business. Keep these safe for me.
说是给乱破搭把手，但这地方哪有什么怪动静？
I get that I'm supposed to be helping Rappa, but I don't see anything strange going on here.
我再说最后一遍，你到底有没有审美？
I'll ask you one last time. Do you have any taste at all?
这地方空着，半点用处都没有。但摆上「睡蕉」塑像，建成广场，它就能摇身一变成为流梦礁的象征。咱们就能走在家族前边了。

This place is useless sitting here empty. But if we put a Slumbernana statue here and build a plaza, it'll instantly become a landmark of Dreamflux Reef. We'll be able to get ahead of The Family again.
这事你说了不算，自说自话把这块地据为己有…恐怕没人会接受吧？
It doesn't matter what you say. You can't just stake your claim on this place. No one's going to accept that.
那谁说了算？米凯都没说什么…还要磨磨蹭蹭的？
Then who should we listen to? Micah hasn't said anything! There's no reason to delay.
今天它非得放在这儿不——
I'm going to put this here today or—
得了吧，哥们，我还没问你呢。
Come off it, pardner. I ain't even said anything yet.
别管你们有什么恩怨，先让条道出来？
I don't care what beef y'all got, just make way, will ya?
怎么，这男的是你们找来出头的？
So what? You hired this guy to be your thug?
不，我也不认识这位先生，但无论有没有人出头，我们的态度都不会变。
No, I don't know this man either. But thug or no, our position isn't going to change.
搞什么，听不懂人话？*他宝贝的*，非要我鸣枪才好使？
Forkin' hell, you hard of hearing or something? Do I have to let my gun do the talking?
Alright then! Hope you're ready to get shot.
不用了，先生，我替二位向你道歉。
There's no need for that, sir. Allow me to apologize on their behalf.
请把枪收起来吧，都是「死」过一次的人，恐怕受不了这种刺激。
Please, put your gun away. I'm afraid that's too much excitement for those of us who've already "died" once.
…你又是谁？这儿到底演什么戏呢？
...Who are you, now? What kinda show they runnin' here?
得了，这世上的复杂事多了去，等枪响一声都会变简单。
Forget it. The world's complicated enough as it is, but my bullets will make things real simple.
到那时候再琢磨也不迟，*他香蕉的*，今天就给你们上上这一课……
Act first, think later. You bet your forkin' bananas I'm teaching all of you a lesson today—
等会儿，刚才那什么玩意儿？
Wait a sec. The fudge was that?
他香蕉的？我他香蕉的怎么开始他香蕉的了？
Bet your bananas? When the bananas did I start saying fudgin' bananas?
蕉？我蕉你宝贝？这香蕉什么？
Bananas? Son of a banana? What the banana fudgin' sundae?
米凯，你不是一向不管这些事吗？
Micah, I thought you don't get involved in these matters.
只是放些大家都喜欢的装饰而已，没冒犯任何人。
I'm just putting up a decoration everyone likes. I'm not hurting anybody.
首先，我很难认为大家都喜欢那些猴子。
First, I find it hard to believe that everyone likes those monkeys.
其次，我只是恰巧路过，看到朋友来和他打个招呼。
Second, I just happened to be passing by. I saw a friend and came to say hello.
是啊，实话说，我记不起你的名字了，这些年我见过的人太多。
That's right. Though truth be told, I don't remember your name anymore. I've met too many people over the last few years.
但那双眼睛我还记得——「多好啊，在这里每一个人都能做自己的梦。」刚刚来到这里时，你是这么说的，眼里亮着难得一见的神采。
But I still remember those eyes — "This is great! Everyone can make their own dreams here." — That's what you said when you first arrived. Your eyes gleamed with spirit.
Don't forget the aspirations you once had.
大庭广众的，别讲这些，你也该改改好为人师的毛病了。
Do you have to say these things out in the open? You need to fix your bad habit of lecturing people.
一种事物受到追捧自然有它的原因，你迟早会明白。
There's a reason why things become popular. You'll understand some day.
但今天…给你个面子也无妨，等着瞧吧——我们走。
But fine, I'll back off for today. I'll be back. Let's go.
等等…他香蕉的，先不管了，大不了少说两句。
Hold on! Banana my sundae... Forget it, guess I could afford to say less.
先由着他们去吧，至少对您本人，他们没有任何敌意。
Let them be. At the very least, they harbor no ill will towards you.
更何况我们也没胆量那么做，对吧，游侠先生？
And they certainly don't have the courage to do anything, anyway. Right, Mr. Ranger?
我知道你想问什么，巡海游侠的第一枪响亮非凡，流梦礁还没闭塞到听不见外边的声音。
I know what you want to ask. A Galaxy Ranger's gunshot rings loud and clear. And Dreamflux Reef isn't so isolated that we don't hear what's going on outside our walls.
Good to know I didn't waste my shot.
倒是我开眼了，你们这的气氛怪稀奇啊，还有给猴子立雕像的。
But I gotta say, I've seen it all now. The atmosphere here is real strange. I mean, statues of monkeys?
只是些年轻人的风尚而已，对我来说…一位巡海游侠来到流梦礁才更稀奇。
It's just a fad among youngsters. If you ask me, it's even stranger that a Galaxy Ranger is in Dreamflux Reef.
逐恶而来，还是旧恨未消？
Are you here chasing evil or settling a grudge?
用不着这么弯弯绕绕，瞧我这样还不明白？他香蕉的，一嘴巴都是香蕉。
You don't gotta beat around the bush. Can't you just tell by lookin' at me? Banana sundae, everything's bananas.
原本不过是给别人搭把手，这下倒好，我成最大的怪动静了！你香蕉的，告诉我，那猴子是怎么回事？
I came here to help someone and now I'm the biggest ruckus around here. Son of a banana, tell me what's going on with that monkey!
虽然还没过去多久，但那些人来得也和你一样突然……
It wasn't that long ago, but they arrived just as suddenly as you did...
先等会儿，我走神了？哪些人？
Huh? Did I miss something? Who's they?
他们自称「助蕉」，看着像美梦剧团，但要多奇怪有多奇怪。来这里，只是为了宣扬一种名为「睡蕉小猴」的……
They call themselves Assistananas. They look like the Sweet Dreams Troupe, except much stranger. They came here to advertise something called the Slumbernana Monkey...
嗯…形象也好，文化也罢，就像每一种曾经流行过的事物。
Hm... Maybe it's the appearance or the cultural significance. Just like every other thing that was once trendy.
我对睡蕉小猴没什么意见，它确实讨年轻人喜欢。真要说麻烦，反倒是它的狂热拥趸。刚才那些人你也见到了，很快就迷上了小猴，还自发组织了……

I don't have an opinion on Slumbernana Monkey. The young people love it. The real problem is the level of fanaticism it creates. You saw the group from before. They grew obsessed with the monkey and formed their own society.
「睡蕉社」？应该是这个名字吧，打着社团的旗号，在流梦礁四处搞宣传活动，而且不怎么友好。
I think it's called the Slumbernana Association. They run publicity campaigns all across Dreamflux Reef under its banner, and they're not very friendly.
哦，就刚才那几个小香蕉自称的？没人管管？
Oh, those self-proclaimed banana maniacs just now? And no one's tried to stop them?
没有不会落幕的风潮，在流梦礁，这也不算什么前所未见的事，所以犯不着干涉，更何况……
Fads come and go. It's not all that unusual even in Dreamflux Reef, so I didn't see a reason to intervene. Besides...
在很长一段时间里，这里都是匹诺康尼仅有一处的自由之地，有些事是不该被改变的。
For a very long time, this was the only place in Penacony that had some freedom. Some things just shouldn't be changed.
也行。你不管自有人管。睡蕉社是吧，谢了，哥们。
Fine by me. If you won't deal with it, somebody else will. The Slumbernana Association, huh. Appreciate the tip, pardner.
请留步，游侠先生。我一开始的疑问，你还只字未提。
One moment, Mr. Ranger. You haven't answered my question from earlier.
逐恶而来，还是旧恨未消？
Are you here chasing evil or settling a grudge?
哼，我长得就那么像杀人狂？答案是二者皆有，更多的就别问了。
Huh, do I look like some kind of madman to you? The answer is both. Any more than that is none of your business.
还不放心？这样吧哥们，你去隔壁翠丝那家店，有份七杯的账单。付过以后，就当你买下了我在这的安分。
You still worried 'bout somethin'? Tell you what, buddy, go to Jessie's shop next door. There's a tab for seven drinks. Settle that, and consider my behavior here bought and paid for.
就算不怎么样，但总归是麦芽汁，但凡请我喝的人，我从不对他们食言。
It may not be much, but it's still malt juice. I never break a promise to those who treat me.
这话绝对可信，当初面对这类人时，我宁可挨了几枪，也没背信弃义。
You can bet on that. The first time I met someone like that, I let myself get shot rather than betray them.
抱歉抱歉，入场暂停了，有社员在里面打翻了个大家伙，还在收拾。
I'm very sorry. We're temporarily closed. A member knocked something big over and we're still cleaning it up.
很快就好了，先准备好社员证吧，看起来倒也不用排队。
It won't take long. You should get your membership card first. It doesn't look like there's a queue right now.
睡蕉社…不等那忍者姐们了，我自个儿去探探路。
The Slumbernana Association... I ain't waiting for that ninja gal. I'll find my own way.
潮流不过是种名目，没有不会落幕的风潮。但如果你别有所求…我也不会多过问。
A fad is just a fad. It always comes to an end. But if you're here for something else, then I won't pry further.
这可没法给你行方便啊。
You're not making things easy here.
口口声声说自己是睡蕉小猴的粉丝，但又一问三不知。
You say you're a Slumbernana Monkey fan, but you can't even answer any of my questions.
等等，我只是一下子想不起来了。对了对了，第二十条…第二十条是……
Wait, wait, it just slipped my mind for a moment. I think I got it. Number <unbreak>20</unbreak> is... is...
「希望大家都能认清这个世界，一个正在长成的完美圆弧。」
"May all see the world for what it is: An arc waxing into perfection."
这都哪跟哪啊，你还是先回去吧，这几天的活动特殊得很，随便跟风是进不去的。
What nonsense are you spouting? You'd best go home for now. The events we're holding over the next few days aren't like any other! Jumping on the bandwagon isn't going to nab you an entrance ticket.
先等等，这位朋友，是来参加睡蕉社活动的？
Hold it right there. Here for the Slumbernana Association event, sir?
带社员证了吗？编号多少？
Got your membership card with you? I'll need your member ID.
What the banana sundae are you talking about?
又一个跟风的…回去吧，这里只欢迎真正热爱睡蕉小猴的朋友。
Ugh, another bandwagoner. Exit's over there, sir. We don't welcome anyone but true fans of Slumbernana Monkey here.
哥们，别让我再重复一遍，我可是爱死香蕉了。小心点，别把事情搞太复杂——
Listen, buddy, don't make me repeat myself. I love me some bananas. You don't wanna make things more complicated than they need to be—
别、别掏枪啊，蕉子动口不动手！想参加活动是吧，可以是可以……
P—Put the gun down, sir! We can talk this out without going bananas. I gather you're keen on checking out the event? Well, that's fine and all...
但我也不能就这么放你进去，真感兴趣，就先从了解睡蕉小猴开始吧。
But I can't just let you in. If you're really interested, why not start off by learning more about Slumbernana Monkey?
像刚才那姐们一样？进这道门还要对暗号？
Like that gal from just now? Gotta give a passphrase just to get through this door?
不是暗号，是入社考核。毕竟里面有很重要的活动，不少人都想见识见识。
No, that wasn't a passphrase but an entrance test to become a member of the Society. We're hosting an incredibly important event inside, after all. Everybody wants to be a part of it.
还挺像回事儿，来，让哥们也试试？
Sounds impressive. Sign me up, pardner.
呃，没你想得那么简单，如果只是粗浅地了解过睡蕉小猴，完全不可能通过的。
Uh, it's a lot harder than it sounds. You won't be able to pass the test unless you're an expert on Slumbernana Monkey.
问就完了，先试试，总比打进去方便。
I might as well give it a shot. Gotta be easier than breakin' my way in.
嗯…好吧，睡蕉社不会拒绝任何想成为朋友的人。那就让我来考考你吧。这几道题目，你想先回答哪个？
...Fine. The Slumbernana Association is always happy to make more friends. Are you ready for the challenge? Now, which of these questions would you like to start with?
Ban on derivative works inspired by Slumbernana Monkey.
Banana my sundae! What kind of questions are these?
看来您完全是一无所知嘛，这已经是很简单的题目了。
Looks like you're completely clueless about Slumbernana. These are pretty much no-brainers, you know.
抱歉啦…至少现在，我还不能放你进去。
Sorry, but I can't let you in for now.
哥们，你运气不错。这要是我自己的事儿，肯定就换个法子开道了。可惜这是给别人搭把手，闹不得太大动静。
Pardner, you're in luck. If this were my own business, I'd be makin' my way through by other means. But since I'm just lending a hand, I can't go raisin' too much ruckus.
行啊，那就按规矩来，几个问题能难到哪儿去？
Okay, we'll do things your way. How hard can a few questions be anyway?
知更鸟姐姐，是这样唱吗？
Miss Robin, am I singing it right?
对了，可以让我检查一下你的身体吗？
That reminds me. Shall I give you a checkup?
虽然你学得很快，但这毕竟是种难度很高的唱法，得注意保护自己的嗓子才行呀。
You learn fast, but this is an advanced singing technique, after all. It won't do if you don't take good care of your throat.
Is something the matter, Miss Robin?
没事，是我多虑了，你很健康哦。
Nothing's wrong. I was just worrying too much. Everything is looking good.
真没想到，竟然能在这种地方见到大明星。
I can't believe I just ran into a superstar, and in a place like this too.
别害怕，这位伯伯是好人，你先去其他地方玩吧。
It's okay. This big brother here is a good man. Why don't you go and have fun somewhere else for now?
也对，或许还是让她称呼「先生」更合适？
Um... Maybe I should've just kept it at "Mister." Would that have been better?
波提欧先生，看来您也在那件事后暂时停下了脚步啊，在匹诺康尼玩得还愉快吗？
In any case, Mr. Boothill, it seems you've put your travels on hold after that incident too. Are you enjoying your time in Penacony?
愉快？蕉！破事儿一个接一个。
Enjoying? Hah, more like going bananas! Bananas, I just can't catch a break.
波提欧先生这是…咦，等等？
Mr. Boothill, you... Huh? Hang on.
Sorry, please keep still for a moment...
What in the forkin' hell are you doing?
Fork. Fudge? Fudge! Holy shirtballs, I'm back to normal!
果然，波提欧先生身上也存在着类似的杂音。
I knew it. There's a noise around Mr. Boothill too.
类似？听起来不是第一次了，你知道这宝贝香蕉是怎么回事？
"Too"? Sounds like you've encountered this before. So, what in tarnation is going on with all this "bananas" business?
抱歉，我还没完全弄清楚。
I wish I could tell you, but I still haven't figured out what it is.
最近，我常来这里教孩子们唱歌。放弃美梦不是件容易的事，我希望音乐能给他们一些帮助。
I've been visiting this place a lot lately to teach the children how to sing. Giving up one's sweet dreams takes resolve, so it's my wish that music can bring them some solace.
但渐渐地，我发现流梦礁变得有些不一样了。
But as time passed, I started to notice something increasingly off about the Dreamflux Reef.
您果然也注意到了啊，附近的忆质在它开始盛行后发生了变化。
As I expected, it's come to your attention too. The memoria nearby has been mutating ever since Slumbernana Monkey gained popularity.
不知为何，那种杂音虽然没有实质性的影响，但每当我使用「同谐」的力量进行调律时，却会感到无比疲惫。
Even though the noise doesn't cause any tangible impact, it leaves me feeling awfully drained every time I use the power of Harmony for tuning. I can't explain it.
除此之外，我也拜访了名为「睡蕉社」的社团。
Other than that, I also paid a visit to the Slumbernana Association.
哦，那地方我也去过了，他们让你加入了？
Oh, I swung by that place too. They let you join up?
很遗憾，完全没有。任何人想要进入睡蕉社，都必须通过繁复的入社流程。
They didn't, unfortunately. Anyone who wishes to become part of the Slumbernana Association must undergo onerous entrance procedures before they can become one of them.
况且就算能混入其中，我的身份也太过…招摇。所以我还是把精力放在了杂音这件事上。
Besides, even if I did succeed in infiltrating them, I... would stand out too much. It makes more sense for me to focus on studying the noise instead.
连你也没通过啊…但我必须得进去，有什么办法吗？
So you didn't pass the test either, huh. Well, don't change the fact that I still gotta get in one way or another. Got any bright ideas?
提供些打听的方法倒是很简单，但您怎么突然……
I can offer a few ideas on places you can make inquiries at, but why the sudden...?
匹诺康尼发生什么了吗？
Is something going on in Penacony?
这话可就长了，等我确认完再说吧。反正这入社考试我非得通过不可。
Long story. I'll fill you in once I have more concrete details. But first, I have to pass that entrance test by hook or by crook.
打听啊，倒也不坏。退一万步说，我就不能喜欢睡蕉小猴了吗？铁汉柔情，现在就流行这套。
Hmm, making inquiries, you say? Not a bad idea. And heck, why couldn't I be a fan of Slumbernana Monkey? Tough guys exploring their soft side are a thing these days.
保底，我还有个更利索的法子。<color=#dbc291ff>之前抢地盘的那些小可爱，找他们借张会员证用用</color>，也难不到哪儿去。
If all else fails, I got an easier solution to fall back on: <color=#dbc291ff>I can just "borrow" a membership card from those lil' fudgeheads scrappin' over turf earlier</color>. Easy-peasy.
很奇怪。尽管存在联系，但这里…反而是没有任何杂音的地方。
Strange. They're linked, but this place... I don't detect any noise here.
答案很简单，开火的是枪，但要人命的是子弹。
The answer's simple: The gun may fire, but it's the bullet that does the killin'.
所以…波提欧先生，我听过巡海游侠的事迹，也知道那些被他们追猎的存在。
So... Mr. Boothill, I'm familiar with the Galaxy Rangers and their exploits, as well as with the entities they pursue.
能让您止步于此，流梦礁究竟发生了什么？
For you to stop here... something must be happening in Dreamflux Reef.
用不着那么客气，叫我哥们就得了。
Hey, don't be a stranger. You can just call me "pardner," yeah?
猴子…猴子…全他宝贝的是猴子。
Monkeys... Monkeys... And more monkeys. They're all muddle-fudgin' monkeys!
宝贝「御猿•邪忍」…这景象我见过太多次了，但愿别真是乱破猜的那样。
Evil Ninja Osaru, that doggoned muddle-fudger... This is way too familiar a sight for comfort. Things'd better not turn out the way Rappa feared they would.
Huh? Do you need something else?
Who do I look for to take the entrance test?
Draw your gun and force your way in.
（不是每个人都值得一颗子弹，他们还没到那份上。）
(Not everyone deserves a bullet in them. They haven't gone that far yet.)
我记得你，临时抱佛脚可没用啊。
Oh, I remember you. Last-minute cramming isn't going to help, you know.
放一百个心吧，现在我是小猴专家，跟使枪一样利索，问你的就行了。
Don't worry, I'm a monkey expert now, about as much as I'm a master marksman. Ask away.
好…唉，你真是把睡蕉社想得太简单了啊。那……
If you say so... You're taking the Slumbernana Association way too lightly, if you ask me, but here goes:
请问：睡蕉社的成员都有哪些级别？
What tiers make up the Slumbernana Association's membership hierarchy?
算了算了，你这明明就是一无所知啊，以后再来吧。
Forget it. You clearly know nothing about the topic. Come back again later.
唉，临时抱佛脚可没用啊。
Last-minute cramming isn't going to help, you know.
哦？你就是前辈说的那位…怎么看上去不太一样啊，算了，那倒是可以酌情降低难度。
Oh? Then you must be the one that she was talking about... But why do you look kind of different? Ah, never mind. I suppose I can make things easier for you, then.
那…最可能是睡蕉小猴名言的是哪一句？
Which of the following is most likely to be a famous quote by Slumbernana Monkey?
永生是在死亡前的那一刻被爱。
Eternal life is about being loved in the moment right before death.
不对不对，你这是在瞎蒙吧？这句是我从别的地方偷来的。
That's totally off the mark. You're just trying your luck, aren't you? I lifted this quote from someplace else.
星星徒有虚名，但它们放光。
Glorified the stars may be, yet it is them that light up the dark.
你对睡蕉小猴果然有很深的误解。
You seem to have quite the misconception about Slumbernana Monkey.
放弃所有一切，眼前风光更好。
Life grows beautiful for those who forfeit it all.
呃，我看着像那么不负责任的样子吗？一次就可以了。
Uh, do I look like I have such poor work ethics? I heard you the first time.
Bingo! On to the last question now:
虽然睡蕉社从不禁止对于小猴的二次创作，但哪种类型是完全不应该尝试的？
Although the Slumbernana Association has never banned any derivative works inspired by Slumbernana, what kind of derivative works should you refrain from creating?
对睡蕉小猴来说，没有哪种形容会显得夸张，先生，你怎么回事？
Are you serious? No narrative is too dramatic for Slumbernana Monkey, sir.
没错没错，这是最可恨的抹黑手段。
Exactly! That's the most despicable form of slander.
通过了，先生，你真是令人刮目相看！请进请进。
Congratulations, you've passed! That was impressive! This way, sir.
Huh? Do you need something else?
哦？倒是货真价实的社员证。能人<unbreak>124</unbreak>……
Oh? And a genuine article, no less. Let's see, Denisovan <unbreak>124</unbreak>...
That's me, pardner. Got a problem?
没有没有，传说中您的行事作风和名字格格不入，相当硬派——看来确有其事，请进请进。
No, no, not at all. I've heard that your name and assertive demeanor are quite the juxtaposition, and it looks like there's truth to these stories indeed. Now, if you'll follow me.
欢迎欢迎，要来一只睡蕉小猴的玩偶吗？免费赠送，我亲手缝的！
Welcome, welcome! A Slumbernana Monkey toy for you, mister? I made it myself. Don't worry, I'm not taking any money for it!
你觉得我像是会把这猴子摆在床头的人吗？
Do I look like someone who'd place that monkey beside my pillow?
这可说不好，你看上去多可爱呀。
Well, you never know! You look really cute, after all!
等等等等，我是没睡醒吗？您…您是知更鸟小姐吗？
W—Wait a minute! Am I dreaming? A—Are you Miss Robin?
天哪，我刚才还在听您的新专辑呢！您怎么到流梦礁来啦？
Oh, my! I was just listening to your newest album! What brings you to Dreamflux Reef?
其实我最近一直在，只是我们没遇见。但别担心，这样的日子还会持续一段时间呢。
I've been frequenting this place lately actually. We just hadn't crossed paths until now. Don't worry, you'll be seeing me around these parts for a while more.
——毕竟睡蕉社的入社考验看起来没那么容易呀。
...After all, the Slumbernana Association's entrance test doesn't seem that easy.
睡、睡蕉社？您要加入睡蕉社？
Th—The Slumbernana Association? Are you planning on becoming a member?
我肯定是没睡醒吧？这种双厨狂喜的好事儿，还能让我碰上？
I must be dreaming! Two of my favorite things together? I must be the luckiest fan alive!
如果是知更鸟小姐，怎么也该破格招新呀！
If it's you, Miss Robin, then of course we must make an exception and let you in!
这倒不用，我只是个普通人，就和所有喜欢睡蕉小猴的人一样。
You don't have to give me special treatment. I'm just a normal person like every other Slumbernana Monkey fan out there.
但要好事成双，让让步也没什么。带上这个再去吧，他们看到就明白了——放心，不会破坏规矩，只是提醒他们别刻意刁难。

But you know what they say: Good things come in pairs! There's no harm in making a concession sometimes. Here, bring this with you the next time you head over. They'll know what to do once they see it. And don't worry, we're still playing by the book. This is just to keep them from making things difficult for you.
其实我完全不懂该怎么谱曲。这首是我从其他地方借来的。
To be honest, I'm absolutely clueless when it comes to songwriting. This song was taken from somewhere else.
但我第一次听见它的旋律，就觉得很适合用来讲述睡蕉小猴的故事，于是便重新填了词。
But the first time I heard it, I knew immediately that it was the perfect song for telling a Slumbernana Monkey's story, so I wrote new lyrics for it.
《走在睡蕉上的旅行》，献丑了蕉！
This is "The Slumbernana Traveler." I hope you find it ap-"peeling"!
我曾走过许多世界，是睡蕉小猴陪在身旁~
I've wandered far, I've wandered wide, with Slumbernana Monkey~
它的声音那么清晰，告诉我什么不能忘~
Its voice so clear, its voice so bright, tells me to remember~
它说累了就休息吧，停下来也没关系~
When you're tired, take a rest, take a break, it's for the best~
<size=28>「放弃所有一切，眼前风光才能更好」~</size>
<size=28>"Life grows beautiful for those who will forfeit it all."</size>
还唱上了？专业人士说两句？
They're even singing about it now? So, what's your expert opinion on this?
我很喜欢，歌曲最重要的意义就是任何人都能唱，怎样的苦难都无法夺走人们的歌声。
I love it. A song finds meaning in its existence only when it can be sung by anyone and everyone. No matter how hard or tough an ordeal is, it can never take song away from the people.
好了好了，我们很快就会布置好的。
Soon, soon. Everything will be set up real soon.
明天过后，欢迎大家再来「睡蕉大道」玩。
We welcome you to visit Slumbernana Avenue again for more fun after tomorrow!
哎哎…不是，瞧你这话说的。你来了我家，然后和我说「跟自己家一样就行」？
No, are you mistaken or something? Coming to my place and then telling me to "make myself at home"?
谁答应你们把这里据为己有了？
Who made you owner of this place!?
他宝贝的，贼心不死啊！可算找到你们几个小可爱了。
Well, well. Finally found these lil' fudgeheads! And would you look at that? They just don't know when to quit.
啊，是那些四处宣传睡蕉小猴的社员吗？那不就是说……
Ah, are they the association members going around promoting Slumbernana Monkey? Then that means...
想不到咱们的脾气倒是挺合拍的，我懂你意思。
Yep. Hey, we make pretty good pardners, huh.
Indeed. We need only sound them out and—
嘿！你们几个小可爱，看这儿！
还真是个脑子不好使的——我在找茬，懂了吗？
A little slow on the uptake, ain'tcha? I'm picking a fight here, pardner.
Loud, huh? How's that for soundin' em out?
抱歉，波提欧先生，我以后还是少用些修辞吧。
My apologies, I'll cut back on figures of speech in the future, Mr. Boothill.
No, wait... Argh... Who the heck are you?
你得学着尊重别人的地盘，懂吗？
You need to respect other folks' turf, ya hear?
听好了，现在我会把皮带解下来挂在旁边，然后我问一句，你说一句。
Listen up. I'm gonna take off my belt and hang it up here. After that, I'll ask a few questions, and you're gonna answer every one of 'em.
哦，你别把我当什么善茬，小可爱。
Don't mistake me for a fudgin' saint now, you son of a nice lady.
我也不是没拷问过其他人，有了这根皮带，受不了的时候，你们可以自己爬过去上吊。
I ain't no greenhorn interrogator, pardner. This belt is put here so that ash-voles like you can crawl over and hang yourselves when you can't take no more.
现在知道好好说话了？睡蕉社的？证件拿出来看看。
Hah, I see you finally learned some manners. Now show me your Slumbernana Association ID.
没有进行任何反抗，男人开始在身上摸索起来。
Without any resistance, the man began to search through his belongings.
难道说，是助蕉们让您来找我的？
Don't tell me... Was it the Assistanana that sent you after me?
你尽管猜吧，但别想听见半个字儿，滚。
Rack your brain all you want, but you ain't gettin' a word outta me. Now scram.
走了，姐们，去看看搞事儿的到底几颗牙。
Let's go, pardner. Time to see what those troublemakers are capable of.
…波提欧先生，继续结伴恐怕不是最好的选择。
...I'm afraid it won't be wise for us to continue our investigations together, Mr. Boothill.
如果接下来波提欧先生打算低调行事，那我就会变成拖累。
If you're hoping to keep a low profile, my presence will only be a burden, Mr. Boothill.
而且，如果您打算使用一些特别的手段，我还是不在现场为好。
Moreover, if you intend to employ... certain means of doing things, it'll be for the better if I'm not around.
哼，到底是家族的话事人，懂的远比看上去多啊。
Hmph, as expected of one in a seat of power in The Family. You're a lot sharper than you let on.
不知道接下来会发生什么，稳妥起见，得有人留在外面。
It's hard to tell what all of this is building towards. It'll be prudent for one of us to stay on the outside.
那外头就交给你了。这一路…多谢了。
Gotcha, I'll leave things out here to you, then. Oh, thanks for all the help so far.
哪里，我才更应该道谢吧。感谢波提欧先生愿意伸出援手。巡海游侠的气度…果真名不虚传。
You're too kind. I should be thanking you instead. You have my gratitude for offering your assistance, Mr. Boothill. You live up to the name of a Galaxy Ranger indeed.
哈，毕竟不是自己的地盘，还是把话说明白好些——
Hah, this ain't my turf, so let me just make some things clear.
善恶的事，我不怎么关心。接下来，在那小可爱社团里将要发生的，也和我在其他地方做的事差不多。
I don't give a rat's behind about people doin' good or evil. Whatever's about to unfold in that little club full of shirt-for-brains is no different from the usual stuff I do elsewhere.
场面未必好看，但结果一定公道。我只在乎公道。
Things ain't gonna be pretty, but justice will be served, and that's all I care about.
我明白了，那…祝一切顺利，我也会试着寻找杂音的源头，之后再见了，波提欧先生。
I see... Then I wish you all the best. As for me, I will try to trace the noise to its source. We'll see each other again later, Mr. Boothill.
他香蕉的，半点儿奇怪的地方都没有，藏得够深啊。
Fudge me. There ain't nothin' strange about this place at all. These ash-voles are good.
他香蕉的，什么玩意儿，欢迎仪式这就安排上了？
Well, butter my banana and call me a biscuit, we kickin' off the member initiation rite so soon?
好啊，那就直接来，玩忍者潜入的有一个就够了。
Then bring it on, baby! One ninja's more than enough for this game of infiltration.
他香蕉的，等会儿…这是我自己？
Wait a banana... is that... me?
呃，逃节课的后果这么严重吗？
Ugh, are the consequences of skipping one class that serious?
无论怎么捣鼓，球车都没有启动的迹象。
No matter how hard you try, the Spheroid gives no indication of being activated.
一定是出现了什么故障——牛仔可从不承认自己在某些科技面前略显笨拙。
Something must have malfunctioned — Cowboys would never admit to their technological ineptitude.
不用担心，已经完全没事了。
哦，那还真他宝贝的棒，但我都说过几遍了……
Oh wow, that's muddle-fudgin' fantastic news! As if I haven't already told you that the last few times...
用不着给我看脑子！还问起诊来了？
There's no need for my head to be checked... let alone a consultation!
毕竟还得给你找个理由背锅呢…精神不正常也算是一种？
I mean, we needed an excuse for your behavior anyway... Surely insanity counts?
倒也不用这么消极。现在看来，流梦礁就是敌人真正的目标。
All hope is not lost yet. It looks like Dreamflux Reef is the enemy's real target.
两位在睡蕉社的见闻就是证明。也多亏你们及时出手，阴谋才得以被暂时遏制……
Everything that the both of you saw and heard at the Slumbernana Association is evidence enough. Thankfully, you managed to intervene in time and put a stop to their schemes for now...
但即便如此，现状依旧严峻。
Even so, the current situation is still rather grim.
抱歉，我只带回来一个坏消息……
Apologies, but I only bring bad news...
I wish... But no, nothing of the sort.
好吧，至少没有「一个更坏的消息」……
Oh well, at least you didn't say "worse news"...
「转变」仍在继续，流梦礁的猴子越来越多了，毫无疑问都是这里的居民。
The "conversion" is still in progress. The number of monkeys in Dreamflux Reef is still increasing, and I'm certain they used to be residents of the place.
和我感知到的一样，笼罩流梦礁的弯曲杂音并未消失。
I sense the same. There is still a discordant static on Dreamflux Reef.
嗯。说是蛊惑也好，诱导也罢，那种杂音的确撬开了人们心中的空隙。
Call it bewitchment or persuasion, the fact remains that such dissonance has indeed wrenched open the emptiness in people's hearts.
我拜托了可信的猎犬，只要见到助蕉就立刻消灭，看来还是于事无补……
I went to a few trustworthy Bloodhounds for help, asking them to eliminate any Assistananas that they come across. Looks like that's not helping the current situation...
米凯先生，这里当属你最了解流梦礁，有什么提议吗？
Mr. Micah, you know Dreamflux Reef the best among us. Do you have any suggestions?
时间紧迫，我就免去繁文缛节了。
We're in a race against time, so I'll dispense with the formalities.
流梦礁仍有助蕉在暗中行动，四处寻找尚未变成猴子的居民，把他们推向深渊。如果二位肯搭把手，就能为我们争取更多时间。

In Dreamflux Reef, there are still Assistananas working in secret, searching all over the place for residents who haven't been turned into monkeys and pushing them into that abyss. If the both of you are willing to aid us, it'll buy us more time.
而知更鸟小姐…或许您才是解决这一危机的关键。
As for Miss Robin... you may just be the key to resolving this crisis.
但向您求助也就意味着，最坏的情况下，流梦礁和家族的界线将不复存在。这里之后会变得如何…我需要一个承诺。

But if we were to ask for your help, we have to be prepared for the worst-case scenario where the boundary between Dreamflux Reef and The Family will no longer exist. I... will need your promise regarding the future of this place.
我明白…那就拜托波提欧先生和三月七小姐先行动起来。
I understand... In that case, please go ahead with your plans first, Mr. Boothill and Miss March 7th.
在你们结束前，这边也会做出决定。
Before you wrap up your business, we will have made our decision too.
正因违背了流梦礁的原则，现在我才会这么犹豫。
I'm only hesitating so much because this is going against Dreamflux Reef's principles.
蒙塔娜！等等等等…小心啊！
太好了，原来你还没开始转变呢！
Good thing you haven't been converted!
你看，他们根本就不是什么——
三月七话音未落，蒙塔娜自顾自跑开了……
Montana runs off on her own before March 7th even finishes speaking...
不能放着她不管！我等下再去找你会合，不是临阵脱逃哈。
We can't leave her alone! I'll meet up with you later. This isn't me running away from a fight, okay?
你不说我都没觉得，无名客姐们。
Pfft. I wouldn't have thought that until you said it.
能见到猴子以外的演员，实在令人愉快。
Being able to see an actor who isn't a monkey... fills me with such joy.
否则，这一幕就会显得太过单调。
This scene would be overly monotonous otherwise.
虽然我觉得这样登场也有些刻意。但毕竟时间有限……
Though I too find this way of making my entrance rather excessively deliberate, we're not blessed with the luxury of time...
作为开场，刻意一些也无妨。
What's a little blatant engineering in the opening sequence, won't you agree?
你是谁，知更鸟的人？不对…你是个忆者？
Who are you? Robin's people? No... You're a Memokeeper.
很敏锐的直觉，但那重身份不重要。我出现在这里，只是出于对电影美学的苛求。
Keen intuition, but that layer of my identity isn't important. I am only here because of my fastidiousness toward the theatrical arts.
What in forkin' hell are you trying to say?
本来还打算提醒你离远点，但故弄玄虚的家伙变猴子就变了吧，还能清净些。
I was planning to tell you to stay away from this place, but you're being so annoyingly pretentious that you're better off turning into a monkey. At least you'd be less noisy then.
对你而言，我的出现是有些突然，也称得上缺乏铺垫。换作平时，我断然无法接受这种不够精致的编排。
You may think that I popped up out nowhere — and yes, you can attribute that to a lack of foreshadowing. I wouldn't have approved such a sloppy sequence in usual cases.
但为了这部影片，我愿意放下一些坚持，为两位游侠提供一些小小的关联。
Yet, for the sake of this film, I am willing to forgo some of my standards to offer some tiny clues to you and the other Ranger.
哦，原来是乱破派你来的？难怪说话和她一样弯绕。
Oh, Rappa sent you? No wonder you're talking in that same convoluted manner.
眼下当然存在一种拯救流梦礁的方式。只要家族介入，解决这里的异变绝非难事。但这未必是众人能接受的走向。

At present, there is an obvious way to save Dreamflux Reef. As long as The Family steps into the picture, resolving the mutation that's occurred here would be a piece of cake. However, this is not a solution that the masses may be willing to accept.
是你太看不起这地儿了。
You think too little of the people here.
他们抛弃外面的美梦，只是为了做回自己。你觉得这么群人，会因为区区危机就向家族低头？
They gave up on those sweet dreams out there just so they can be true to themselves. You reckon such people would grovel at the feet of The Family over a mere crisis?
米凯先生也是这么想的。可一腔热血救不了流梦礁，此时此刻，我也不想执导一出悲剧。
Yes, Mr. Micah thinks the same. But that perseverance of theirs isn't going to save Dreamflux Reef. I don't wish for this film to develop into a tragedy either.
若要渡过难关，又不想仰赖家族援助。流梦礁的人们就必须唱出属于自己的「同谐」之歌，这才是我的来意。
If the residents of Dreamflux Reef hope to tide over the crisis without The Family's help, they will have to sing their very own song of Harmony. This is why I'm here.
我为各位准备了一份礼物，那是下一幕的「大纲」。等你揭开它时，自然就会明白。
I have prepared a big gift for all of you — The "outline" for the next act. You'll see once you open it.
And why should I believe you?
在这场戏中，我既是导演，也是演员。对于自己杀青前的最后一幕……
I am the director of this film as much as I am an actor in it. When it comes to the last scene that I will appear in...
我没有理由，不追求极致。
There's no reason for me not to seek perfection.
事实上，我对自己的入戏方式仍不满意。但我相信，你的演绎会将这一幕推向更高的位置。
Truth be told, I do not find the way I entered the act to be satisfactory, but I believe your acting will make this scene better.
哈，我就知道，指望那小可爱不装神弄鬼没戏。
Ha, I knew it. There's no way the lil' fudgehead will come right out and say what he actually means.
Let's see just what you're up to then.
在掀开一角之前，男人心里有很多种猜测——
Before opening it, he has many speculations—
而他也相信，无论自己看到什么，都能维系惯常的不屑，狠狠嘲笑对方的故弄玄虚。
He also believes that no matter what he sees, he can maintain his usual contempt and mock the other for his trickery.
倒是没错！那小可爱有两下子。想让流梦礁的人唱起「同谐」之歌，确实没有比这更好的法子！
Darn right, he is! That muddle-fudger does know what he's talking about. Nothing else can beat this if the people of Dreamflux Reef have to come together to sing their song of Harmony!
该回来见见大明星了！他宝贝的，这地方确实没有逊到要家族帮忙！
Time to go back to that singing queen! Forkin' hell, this place totally ain't shabby enough to ask The Family for help!
我明白了，米凯先生，我会尽力而为。
I understand. I'll try my best, Mr. Micah.
Alright there, hold your horses! What do y'all have so far?
啊，波提欧先生…外面情况怎么样？
Oh, it's you Mr. Boothill... How are things outside?
就那鬼样，眼熟，但不怎么令人怀念。
Same ol' sorry sight. Not that I miss it.
Have we really come to this...?
怎么了哥们，再过一会儿，我就得学着和家族打招呼了？
What's do you mean, pardner? Am I going to have to start learning how to greet The Family now?
恰恰相反。在流梦礁，那是绝不可能发生的。
On the contrary, that's something that will never happen in Dreamflux Reef.
说到底，我只是一位守夜人，并非流梦礁的领袖，也不该干涉居民们选择的权利。
At the end of the day, I'm just Dreamflux Reef's Night Watch... not its leader. I'm loath to interfere with people's right to choose.
选择？你难道觉得他们变成猴子是心甘情愿？
Choose? Don't tell me you believe they chose to become monkeys?
这正是我要说的，对于这些追求自我的人们，我不相信他们愿意通过抹除自我来获得幸福。
That's exactly my point. These are people who seek their true selves. I don't believe they would seek happiness by erasing their individuality.
我不会制止他们奔向毁灭，但前提是…他们能够清醒地作出决断。
But I won't stop them from heading towards destruction... as long as they made the decision with a clear head.
如果有人想变成猴子，我不否认那是一种志向。
If there are people who aspire to become monkeys, I won't deny them of that dream.
但至少，知更鸟小姐能将选择的权利重新摆到他们面前。
But I hope Miss Robin would at least give them that right to choose once again.
的确有一种办法，能让流梦礁在不被察觉的情况下，化解眼前的危机。
There is indeed a way to resolve the impending crisis without drawing The Family's eyes to Dreamflux Reef.
既然「同谐」的调律能够消除杂音。如果居民们愿意在我的引领下合唱谐乐，也许就能驱散回荡在流梦礁的恶曲。

We know the tuning of Harmony can erase the static noise. If the people of Dreamflux Reef are willing to follow my lead in singing a Charmonic tune together, we may be able to erase the heinous noises reverberating around Dreamflux Reef.
但考虑到部分居民对家族的成见，这未必是件容易的事。
But knowing how a number of residents here view The Family... It won't be easy for the plan to work.
更重要的是，如果流梦礁也只剩下家族的谐乐一种声音…那即便我们渡过这场难关，匹诺康尼最后一处自由之地也名存实亡了。
More importantly, if The Family's tunes become the only song left on Dreamflux Reef... We would've survived the crisis, but Penacony's only land of freedom would also cease to exist.
既然如此，让所有声音一起响不就完了！听着，我现在有个绝妙的主意。
Bah, just have every sound and voice come together in a single song! Listen. I have a fudgin' brilliant idea!
跟我来，大明星，接下来就看你够不够离经叛道了。
Come with me, singing queen! Whether it works or not depends on how much of a deviant you are.
瞧好了，大明星，现在，能在流梦礁举办大合唱的法子就这么一种……
You ready for it? Now this is the only way to get everyone in Dreamflux Reef to sing together...
可别说你高高在上惯了，用不来眼前这玩意儿。
Don't tell me that you've been so used to your classy posh instruments that this thing is beneath you.
这倒不会…凡是和音律相关的，我多少都会。
No, that's not it... I know a thing or two regarding everything related to tunes.
但或许胡闹的危机，就应该用胡闹的方式来解决吧。
Perhaps an absurd crisis calls for an equally absurd solution.
这就对了，需要的人我保准给你带齐。
That's the way. Leave the rest to me. I'll make sure to get everyone we need.
