有人跳支舞就拯救了世界，有人哭一场就灭了对手，现在轮到我们了！
Some people saved their world by giving a dance, and some people defeated their enemies by crying... It's finally our turn now!
危机存亡的时候，我们办一场他宝贝的派对！
Got a crisis? Throw a party, yee-haw!
呦——哥几个，怎么颤颤巍巍的？今儿没喝够？
Howdy, pardner! What's wrong, pals? Ooh, that's one distressed look you have there! Haven't been swiggin' enough, eh?
那边的牛仔，有空说风凉话，不如过来搭把手。
Shut up, cowboy. Enough snide remarks. Come over and help us out.
巧了，我就是来搭把手的。给你们指个地儿，去那儿待着吧。
Oh? That's exactly what I'm here for! Here, head over to this place and just wait for it.
我早说过，人犯不着太聪明，有时候去舞池里跳一曲，事儿同样能解决。
Hah, I called it, didn't I? Who needs all that brain when swingin' around on the dance floor solves things just the same?
牛仔？是那时候的…难道说知更鸟小姐……
A cowboy? Oh, right... the same guy as the other time! Could Miss Robin be...?
大家，跟我来吧，他…或许言之有理呢！
Come with me, everyone! I think he might just be making some sense!
算了，疯了这么多，也不差你一个了，那就过去看看吧。
Never mind. What's one more loony to the count? Let's go see what's going on then.
竟然看到了知更鸟小姐，我就知道……
It's Miss Robin, in the flesh! I knew it...
你知道什么了？这会儿就别追星了吧，我是看不出来这哪像个能避难的样子。
What do you know? Now's not the time to be a fan. How's this place even going to be a shelter?
别着急，哥们，现在还不够热闹——你就瞧好吧。
Patience, pal. Wait till the crowd starts spilling in. That's when it'll happen.
哥们，别愣着了，那边有场大派对，相当爱你，不去看看？
Snap out of it, cowpokes! There's a big party going on over there, and it's lit as fudge. Why don't you go check it out?
米凯已经和我们说过了，参加家族的谐乐？滚远点儿。
Micah already told us about it. Chiming in on The Family's harmonic tunes? You best get the hell out of my face!
哈，还抢起我的词儿了？那也好办。
Sheesh, isn't that one of my lines? But sure, if you prefer it this way...
我知道这事荒唐了点，但赶紧挪个地儿，要么去派对上把你们的地盘救回来，要么让派对多给你们奏个哀乐。
I know I'm being a lil' demanding here, but get your hide parts over to that party right now and save your home, or I'll make sure to dedicate an elegy for every one of you!
没见过流氓？我不是米凯，想赌一赌我会不会开枪？
Never seen a thug before? I'm not Micah. Wanna try me and my gun?
这到底怎么回事…没变成猴子的人还更疯了？
What's going on...? Are fellow humans more dangerous than those monkeys now?
就按你说的…先把枪拿开。
Fine, we'll go to the party. Just... keep that gun of yours away.
呦，倒是挺安分，喜欢这吗，哥们？
Oh ho, you sure turned obedient here. So, how do you like this party, pal?
怎么，你还要回来监视我不成？
What? Are you here to watch over my shoulder now?
哈——那大明星今天要做的事情难得一见，我当然要回来看看。
Pfft. That singing queen's gonna put up a once-in-a-lifetime performance. You bet I'm not missin' it.
我可不想错过开场，你最好也一样！
I'll do anything to catch the opening. Make sure you don't miss it too!
…没错，我并不是在劝说，或是高高在上地给出建议。
...That's right. I'm not trying to persuade anyone, or offering a suggestion while standing on high ground.
我只是把一个你们没能想到的选择摆出来，至于要不要拯救自己，那也由你们。
I'm simply offering an option that has never crossed your minds. It's your choice if you want to give up on saving yourselves.
挺顺利啊，算了，就不插一脚了。
He's getting the hang of it. Guess I'll just stay out of it then.
My, my, my, look who's here!
Ahh... I've been looking for you all day!
Hmm, should I believe that or not...
那算了嘛——之前打的助蕉算我一半就行。
Oh, alright then! I'll just take half the credit for those Assistananas we took out earlier.
Yeah, that's also just "half" of the whole lot.
噫——我就说怎么一点变化都没有，走走走，咱们抓紧时间。
Huh? So that's why nothing's going back to normal! C'mon, we need to hurry.
犯不着，现在有新法子了。你这边呢，事儿办完了？
No need for that. We've got a new plan now. How did it go with her? Convinced?
嚯，怎么搞定的？你把她的助蕉解决了？
Jeepers! How'd you get through to her? Mashed her Assistanana to pulp?
三月同学都和我说了，其实我根本没受到助蕉影响啦…是有一些别的原因。
March explained everything to me. I wasn't really influenced by the Assistananas... It was something else.
反正不是你的错。那帮家伙真是坏极了，说什么一无所有更好，实际上要是不把人变成那样，他们才没本事控制每一个人呢。
Anyway, it's not your fault. Those bananas are incorrigible! Preaching about how having nothing is best... More like they wouldn't be able to control a single human if none of us thought that way.
只要能被一枪爱死，有什么哲学都无所谓。
Say whatever they like. They're nothing but smashed fudges once I put my bullets into them.
没事了就跟我来，带你们去个好地方。
Everything ironed out between you two now? Follow me then.
哈，哥们说什么来着？这年头哪还有人玩合唱？
Hah! What was it you said? Who in their right mind would sing in a choir in this era?
但你要说有派对，他们肯定抢着来。
Not when you tell them there's a party. That's when people come flockin'.
其实是米凯先生帮了许多忙。
We wouldn't have this turnout if it wasn't for Mr. Micah.
他们中有很多人不信任我，更不信任谐乐的力量。但…他们愿意相信米凯先生。
Most of them are unwilling to trust me, much less the power of Charmony. But... they chose to put their faith in Mr. Micah.
恐怕不是相信我，而是他们从没想过放弃这里。
I think it's less about believing me than them not wanting to give up on this place.
大伙儿都憋着股劲呢，能用家族以外的方式破除万难，对于流梦礁这还是第一次。
Everyone's got something they want to prove. It's the first time Dreamflux Reef has ever had a way to overcome difficulties on our own, without relying on The Family.
所以你们到底是要干什么啊？
So, what exactly are you gonna do?
你可能也会觉得…有些难以置信。我竟然会认同那种方法，真是疯了。
You're likely to find it... a little unbelievable. I still can't wrap my head around how I actually agreed to this. I must be crazy.
怕什么！我每隔一段时间就得做件够疯狂的事，不然我就会疯了。
What's so scary about that!? I have to do something crazy every once in a while. THAT keeps me from really going nuts.
开始招呼吧！等到最高潮的时候，我非得请大家伙儿都喝一杯，你们这儿的人不赖。
Alright, let's get the party going! Once the hype is at its peak, I'm gonna treat everyone to a drink! Heh, I'm starting to like you guys now.
提前向你致谢，波提欧先生，但我得替翠丝提醒您一下，之前那七杯还没买单。
Thank you in advance, Mr. Boothill, but I'd like to remind you on behalf of Jessie that your seven cups from before haven't been paid yet.
But I'm willing to take care of that bill, of course.
演艺活动我也举办过不少，这次可以说是最特别的那一档。真的能够奏效吗？
I've hosted several acting gigs in the past, but this is the most unusual of the lot. Will it really work?
放心吧，大明星。给你讲个乐子，看见我这副身体没，刚改造完的时候，储存记忆的模块说坏就坏，明明你碰都没碰它。

Don't overthink it, singing queen. Let me tell you something funny. I'm sure you can tell I've been through some modifications on my body. When I just started out as a cyborg, my memory module fizzled out every so often. And I didn't even mess with it.
医生跟我说，那你就把重要的事先记在纸上吧，我过几天就帮你修好，顺便找找原因。
The doctor told me to note things down if they were important, and she'd look up some possible causes before coming to fix me up a few days later.
你猜怎么着？他宝贝的，我记了几天几夜！这下我知道记忆模块为什么总是坏了，它要承担的东西太多。
Guess what? I muddle-fudgin' noted things down for several days straight! And that's when it hit me: I was remembering too much bull pucky! That's why my memory module kept shutting down on me.
可是，您为什么要提起这个？
Is there a reason you're telling us this?
因为我要告诉你，你现在需要相信的不是你自己，而是他们。
I'm telling you that it's not yourself you have to trust, but them.
站在这儿的每一个人，他们的记忆模块可没坏，身上长了这么个坚韧的脑子，不是为了把一切忘掉变成猴子！
Everyone here has a perfectly functional memory module. They didn't develop such robust brains to forget everything and become monkeys!
Yes, let's get this party started.
哈——胡闹的危机该用胡闹的方式解决？我倒不这么觉得。
What was it again? An absurd solution to an absurd crisis? I won't call it that.
流梦礁的歌，就该自由自在！
It's only right for Dreamflux Reef's song to be untamed and free!
Go get the party started, singing queen—
No, I should call you "DJ queen" instead!
走了，无名客姐们——或者你自己去找个位置。
Let's go, Nameless gal. Or you can go grab a seat by yourself.
你从来没觉得文字这么陌生过，就连联觉信标也没法帮你翻译里面的胡言乱语。如果这不是谜语人的手笔，那它的撰写者怕是有什么大病。

You have never found words to be so foreign as they are now. Even the synesthesia beacon can't help you translate this gibberish. If it weren't a work of the Riddlers, one would wonder whether the writer was irredeemably mentally disturbed.
桌上的胶卷封面画着几只古怪的猴子，标题上写着《【修正版】睡蕉小猴经典影像TOP<unbreak>10</unbreak>》，还用烫金字体标注了一行限定编号。

There are several bizarre monkeys drawn on the film reel's cover on the table. The title reads: Remastered — Top 10 Slumbernana Monkey Classic Shots. It even has a limited edition serial number labeled on it in embossed gold lettering.
这似乎是白日梦酒店为你准备的礼物，他们想的可真周到——如果在房间里准备好放映机就更周到了，这儿根本没有播放胶卷的地方。

This appears to be a present prepared for you by The Reverie, a most considerate gesture — it would've been even more thoughtful if there were a projector in the room. There's nothing here to play the reel.
这种胶卷盘的放映机已经在宇宙中淘汰了，但还是总能看到这种胶卷以高价出现在市场中——它们的结局大都是沦为在柜子里彰显主人品味的收藏品。

Projectors that can play such reels have long been phased out in the universe, but you often see these reels appearing on the market selling for a pretty penny. They mostly end up as collectibles, showcased in their masters' cabinets to demonstrate the owner's artistic taste.
你发现房中有一只奇怪的…猴子玩偶？
You notice a strange... monkey doll in the room?
从玩偶的材质可以看出，它的做工十分精巧，但它的形象设计却不太精巧。这幅贱兮兮的样子与充满智慧的眼神…真的会有人喜欢这种角色吗？

Judging from the materials, you can see the doll's craftsmanship is exquisite, but its visual design begs to differ. This sly look and eyes brimming with wit... Do people really like characters like this?
你决定无视这个猴子，就像无视渺小的石子、风吹过的树叶与路边的垃圾桶一样……
You decide to ignore this monkey like you would ignore an insignificant pebble, a stray wind-blown leaf, or a roadside trashcan...
不对，你没无视过垃圾桶。
Hang on. You've never ignored a trashcan.
你试图与它进行交流，这在其他世界可能有点蠢，但在匹诺康尼就再正常不过了——哪个钟表小子粉丝没跟自己的钟表小子玩偶有过倾心吐胆的经历呢？

You try to communicate with it, an act that would be slightly silly in other worlds, yet so reasonably normal on Penacony — which fan of Clockie hasn't had a heart-to-heart conversation with their own Clockie doll?
但很可惜，玩偶不会说话，只会倾听。不过对寂寞的人来说，倾听就足够了。
Pity that dolls can't talk and can only listen. For someone feeling lonely, however, listening is already enough.
你一拳打在了这只猴子的脸上，柔软的触感包裹住了你的拳峰，猴子的面庞包容了你的戾气——你可算是打到棉花了。
You administer a swift punch to the monkey's face, its soft texture enveloping your fist. The monkey's visage accepts your anger — you definitely hit cotton.
你收回蕴含开拓之力的铁拳，但它的表情没有任何变化。你以暴力痛吻它，它却报之以笑容。
You retract your iron fist imbued with the Trailblaze power, but its expression remains unchanged. You have struck it with violence, but it responds with a smile.
它静静地坐在房中，默不作声。看着它的傻脸，你的耳边莫名响起了一声……「蕉」？
It silently sits in the middle of the room, mute and stoic. Looking at its dumb face, a voice inexplicably reaches your ears... "bana"?
这个战利品似乎和你以前遇到的不同。面对你的热情，它不愿敞开心扉，而是将自己紧锁。
This treasure appears to be different from the one you previously encountered. Faced with your passion, it is unwilling to open up its heart, but choosing to fetter itself further.
你喊着什么正义勇气开拓，将周身气力用于双臂，试图使它为你打开一条代表希望与财富的缝隙——
You yell out something about trailblazing justice and courage, channeling all your strength into your arms, and attempt to make it open a crevice representing hope and fortune for you...
但是无用！它的箱盖纹丝不动，彷佛从设计之初就无法打开一般，这让你想起了匹诺康尼街道上那些打不开的门。
But it is useless! Its lid does not move an inch, like it was designed to never be opened. This reminds you of those unopenable doors along Penacony's streets.
你仔细端详面前的宝箱，但却没有发现任何解密界面、隐藏文本内容或道具提交插槽——看来它确实没法打开。
You scrutinize the chest in front of you, but don't notice any encrypted interfaces, hidden text, or item submission slots — it looks like it definitely can't be opened.
你试着用巧妙的手法撬开它…但这儿不是模拟宇宙，没有骰子。你还没有开锁工具，手也不怎么巧，鉴定以大失败告终。

You try using your dexterity to pry it open... but this isn't the Simulated Universe. There are no dice. You also don't have any lockpicking tools available, nor are your hands reliably nimble — the roll ends in Critical Failure.
你喊着什么正义勇气开拓，将周身气力用于双臂，试图使它为你打开一条代表希望与财富的缝隙——
You yell out something about trailblazing justice and courage, channeling all your strength into your arms, and attempt to make it open a crevice representing hope and fortune for you...
但是无用！它的箱盖纹丝不动，彷佛从设计之初就无法打开一般，这让你想起了匹诺康尼街道上那些打不开的门。
But it is useless! Its lid does not move an inch, like it was designed to never be opened. This reminds you of those unopenable doors along Penacony's streets.
你仔细端详面前的宝箱，但却没有发现任何解密界面、隐藏文本内容或道具提交插槽——看来它确实没法打开。
You scrutinize the chest in front of you, but don't notice any encrypted interfaces, hidden text, or item submission slots — it looks like it definitely can't be opened.
你试着用巧妙的手法撬开它…但这儿不是模拟宇宙，没有骰子。你还没有开锁工具，手也不怎么巧，鉴定以大失败告终。

You try using your dexterity to pry it open... but this isn't the Simulated Universe. There are no dice. You also don't have any lockpicking tools available, nor are your hands reliably nimble — the roll ends in Critical Failure.
这几位同学正在聊着你听不懂的话题，诸如什么「蕉版卡」、「睡蕉社」、「蕉书育猴」，让教室里充满了快活的空气。
These few students are chatting about a topic that you know nothing about... BanaCard? Slumbernana Association? Teaching Monkeys with Bananas? At least the classroom's atmosphere is lively.
他们没有理你，依然在继续自己的话题。可能对于小群体的日常来说，三个人就是闲聊的极限，四个人就会想去组乐队，五个人就会发生一段复杂的爱恨情仇故事。

They ignore you and continue with their conversation. For a small group of friends, maybe three people chatting is already their limit. With four, they might consider starting a band, and with five, a complex love story riddled with love and hate might unfold.
别遗憾，相信未来你也能拥有自己的小群体。
Don't be disappointed. Believe that you will be able to have your own little group in the future, too.
很好，很好…音律实在是一部好电影的点睛之笔。
Beautiful, excellent... Music can really bring a film to life...
他宝贝个腿的，你小子不是杀青了？
Holy forkeroni! Aren't you writing off your character?
没错。所以现在我并非演员，而是以「导演」的身份临场观摩。
I am, that's why I am watching this scene as a director instead of an actor.
我也非常好奇，那会是怎样的「同谐」之歌。
I can't wait to hear for myself how this song of Harmony is going to turn out.
在某些时刻，我会打心底里产生一部好片即将诞生的预感。而它们中的大部分，都是由一幕幕群像素材衔接而成。
Sometimes I get hit by sudden hunches that a great film is in the making. More often than not, these tend to be just scenes from different groups of people that are then edited together.
这片子里的大部分人都称不上主角，他们很难展现通常意义上的完整弧光，却同样有着拯救人心的灵魂光亮。

Most of the characters in this film aren't what you would call protagonists. You don't really get to see full character arcs on them, but they still have a light in their hearts that can save humanity's soul.
而当失去一切的时候，这些人最需要的又是什么？智者的指引？强者的援助？
What do these people really need when they have lost everything? Guidance of the wise? Or aid from the strong?
二者皆非。在我看来，他们需要的只是一个镜头。然后，坐在屏幕前的人就能看见这世上最精彩的戏码。
I'd say neither. All they need is a camera to capture them. That's when others would be able to see the most wonderful show in the entire universe.
哈！没那么复杂，导演哥们，要我说——
Bah, don't make things sound so complicated, director pal! If you were to ask me...
Fork it, that's exactly what *life* is!
嗯…您听到那隐约传来的前奏了吗？
Mmm... It's the prelude. Can you hear it?
「小三度音如泣如诉，减六度音叹息不止。」
"Those lesser thirds so plaintive, sixths diminished, sigh on sigh."
"Told them something? Those suspensions, those solutions—'Must we die?'"
「而七度音安慰道：生命能够持续——姑且一试，或未可知。」
"Those commiserating sevenths—'Life might last! we can but try!'"
那么，知更鸟小姐，还需要我做些什么吗？
So, Miss Robin, is there anything else I can do?
嗯，不必再陪着我了，方才的紧张，现在已经完全消失了。
I'm alright now. You don't have to accompany me any further. The butterflies that I felt from before are all gone now.
是派对的氛围提前感染了您吗？
Is that because you're starting to get into the mood for the party early?
恐怕不是呢，只是…发现了一些以前忽略的东西。
No, that's not it. I just... realized something I've never noticed before.
所有人都认为，在经历了那种剧变之后，我的生活理应产生变化。
Everyone expected my life to change after going through something huge like that.
但…并不是这样。关于鸟儿与飞行，我仍未得出更好的答案。
But... that's not the case. I still haven't found a better answer regarding birds and flight.
即便想到了什么，也需要很长的时间去思考，进行很多尝试来证明……
Even when something comes to my mind, I still need a lot of time to deliberate on it and try various ways to prove it...
我想，哥哥现在也在做着同样的事吧。
I believe my brother must be doing the same right now.
那么，您准备从今天开始吗？
Are you going to change yourself from today?
倒也不是啦。只是想到接下来会发生的事，我忽然发现，圣歌总是以虔诚的心性来要求唱诗班保持统一……
Not exactly. It's just when I think about what's going to happen next, it dawns upon me that hymns tend to require a devoted heart and demand the choir to sing in unison...
但在舞池中央，当人们站在恰到好处的灯光下时。即使每个人有所不同，也不妨碍他们看上去毫无区别。
But on the dance floor, there's no need to conform or impose a certain standard for everyone to follow. Even if everyone is different, they will still appear the same.
也许「同谐」真正的问题在于灯光，而非观众。就像此时此刻……
Perhaps Harmony was never about its audience, but about the light it provides. Much like how we see it now...
人们并非只有「齐唱」一种选择，即便发出各异的声音，它们也能彼此串联…这就是「调律」。我相信这首「同谐」之歌，就连不协和音也能够包容。

There are more choices for the people than singing "in unison." Even if they were to contribute their own differing sounds, these can be strung together... That's what it means to "tune." I believe our song of Harmony will be able to embrace even discordant sounds.
我将带来，属于流梦礁的声音。
I will bring forth Dreamflux Reef's very own sound.
这个学生露出了痛苦的神色，似乎在为什么事情感到苦恼。
The student has a pained expression, as if something is troubling him.
可能是他交完学费花光了积蓄，可能是他发现折纸大学的食堂并不好吃，可能是他在入学的时候发现自己高中暗恋的女生挽着学长的胳膊。

It might be that he emptied his savings to pay tuition, or that he discovered that the cafeteria food at Paperfold University isn't great, or that he found out that the girl he had a crush on when he first enrolled is holding an upperclassman's arm.
这哥们没搭理你，看来无穷的苦闷已经闭塞了他的视听。
This guy doesn't acknowledge you. It seems like his endless troubles have shut him off from the world.
就像每个老师都有说不完的道理一样，每个学生都会有无穷的愁绪——没关系，等到他们一天到晚都要工作的时候就没时间发愁了。
Just like how every teacher has endless principles to share, every student also has endless worries — but don't worry. Once they start working all day long, they won't have time to worry.
按照学号的指示，这就是你的位置了，在这里等待老师到来吧。
According to your student number, this is your assigned seat. Please wait here for the teacher to arrive.
终于，迈向情节高潮的所有条件都已完备。
Finally, all preparations leading up to the climax are in place.
现在，让我们迎来华丽的终章吧——
Let us welcome, with bated breath, the beatific final act!
似乎有人总是领先一步。
It appears that someone is already one step ahead.
但眼前的猎杀是否正让居民复原，似乎还难以给出定论。
However, whether the hunt will restore the residents to normalcy remains an uncertain question.
周藏没有激战的痕迹，它们一定是被非常快速地击败，就此丧失自身的全部。
There are no indications of a fierce battle in the area. They must have been swiftly defeated, losing everything that defines them.
在助蕉面前，猎犬们拥有如此压倒性的力量吗——眼前的景象令人忍不住产生怀疑。
Do Bloodhounds possess such overwhelming power in the presence of the Assistanana? This scene raises doubts.
小猴呆呆地站在倒下的助蕉身边，喊叫声中难以窥得情感。
The little monkey stands silently next to the fallen Assistanana, its cries devoid of recognizable emotions.
经由退化，它单纯的大脑中是否还有近似于悼念的情感，恐怕无人知晓。
Do any traces of mourning linger in its simple and regressed brain? This may forever remain a mystery.
为打败御猿•邪忍，女孩成为了缭乱•忍法的传人。她定忍号为「乱破」，开始跟随苦茶大师修习忍法。
To defeat Evil Ninja Osaru, this girl has become the successor to the Dazzling Ninjutsu, adopting the codename of Rappa, she began training under Master Kucha.
为让乱破参透忍法奥秘，苦茶大师给予了极其严酷的试炼。而为解放黑暗中的忍之都，乱破也经受住了重重考验。
To help Rappa master the secrets of the ninja arts, Master Kucha subjected her to harsh trials. And Rappa, in her quest to liberate the Ninja Capital from darkness, determinedly endured every test.
苦茶大师明白，乱破正在向一名真正的忍者蜕变，她的使命也终将到来……
Master Kucha is aware that Rappa is maturing into a true ninja, and her destined mission will soon unfold...
忍历六十一年 忍之都 缭乱•道场。
<unbreak>61</unbreak>st Year of Ninja Era, Dazzling Dojo, the Ninja Capital
你拜入师门已有五年，不惧苦修的熬煎，不畏试炼的艰险，百般忍法皆已精娴。
You've trained under me for five years. After rigorous tests and trials, you've mastered hundreds of ninja techniques.
今日我赐你「缭乱•忍者」之名，你将成为我等讨伐邪忍的尖兵，引领忍之都砥砺前行。
I hereby bestow upon you the title of Dazzling Ninja, entrusting you to be my weapon to defeat the evil ninja and guide the Ninja Capital into the future.
拜谢苦茶大师，弟子不胜荣幸。
Thank you, Master Kucha. This is my greatest honor.
把这卷轴拿去吧。此乃缭乱•忍法的奥义所在，它能释放邪祟畏惧的异彩，将邪忍的阵法尽数破坏。
Take the scroll with you, for within its pages lie the secrets of Dazzling Ninjutsu. It shall cast a brilliance that makes fiendlings fear and destroy the evil ninja's intricate matrices.
将它泼洒在「忍之都」吧，用墨彩将这城的阴霾驱散，扬起反抗罪恶的旗幡。
Paint it throughout the Ninja Capital. Banish the shadows with ink, and raise the banner against evil.
I do not know, my disciple.
你可以画任何东西，诠释你心中所想的画卷。这是属于你自己的忍法。
You may paint anything that you wish. This is your own ninjutsu.
So, the decision is yours to make.
打起精神来，别睡过去啦。
结果还是没联系上波提欧。
Do you think we can trust Rappa?
这么说或许有些失礼，可眼下能佐证她游侠身份的，恐怕只有那奇妙的言行举止。
This might sound rude, but the only proof of her being a Ranger is her peculiar behavior.
但她的担忧不无道理，我也觉得…这股突如其来的猴子风潮太过古怪。
But her concerns are valid. I also find the sudden obsession with monkeys to be rather unusual.
仔细想想，自打我们入学以来，这小猴的存在感是有点吓人。
Come to think of it, ever since we arrived here, the presence of that little monkey has been making me feel a little unsettled.
And the dean dressed up as a monkey...
Let's go and take a look at the classes, shall we?
咦，不是说课程全部取消了吗？
Huh? I thought all classes were canceled?
筑梦学院马上有一堂筑梦设计课，说是课程，实际是校庆活动的一环。
A Dreamweaving class will start soon at Dreamweaver Academy. It's more a part of the anniversary celebrations than it is a regular class.
睡蕉小猴的火爆并不自然，如果有人在背后推波助澜，就需要重点关注教职人员的行为了。
Slumbernana Monkey's rise in popularity seems quite unnatural. If someone is stirring things up behind the scenes, we need to pay close attention to the actions of the teaching staff.
也行，反正早晚要去上课的。筑梦设计课的地点在舞台广场，咱们去看看吧。
Sure, we have to attend classes sooner or later anyway. Dreamweaving class is at the Stage Plaza. Let's go take a look.
睡蕉小猴绝不是「普通的卡通形象」！
Slumbernana Monkey is, by no means, an "ordinary cartoon character!"
梦是潜意识的画布，在梦里，一根香蕉也会蕴含千丝万缕的感情，更不用说承载了无数蕉粉厚爱的睡蕉小猴。
Dreams are the canvas of one's subconscious. Within it, even a banana can carry intricate emotions, not to mention the Slumbernana Monkey adored by countless Ripe Bananas.
哟！球棒•忍者。琉璃•忍者。飞龙•忍者。
Yo! Baseball Bat Ninja. Ninja Ruri. Ninja Hiryū.
缭乱忍侠向每一位在场的忍者行礼，此番举动看似赘余，却是忍者不能忽视的礼仪。
The Dazzling Ninja greets each ninja present. This action seems superfluous, but is a courtesy that cannot be ignored by a ninja.
不用每个人都打一遍招呼吧…乱破小姐也是来上课的吗？
You don't need to individually greet everyone... So, are you also here for the class, Miss Rappa?
当然。忍者所见略同，这名为「课堂」的道场定有诡诈。此地亦有邪祟出没，诸位忍者务必小心•行事。
Certainly, great ninjas think alike. This "class" dojo seems shady. It harbors fiendlings. Exercise caution, fellow ninja warriors.
看来人都到齐了啊。那么同学们，*蕉学*时间到！
Seems like we've got everyone. Alright, let's dive right into our banacademics!
筑梦蕉师摇头晃脑，发出上课铃的声音，周围的同学们都聚了过来。
The dreamweaving BananAdvisor sways their head. The class bell rings, drawing all the students around.
这堂课的内容是「把校园装点成大家喜欢的样子」。来，同学们拿好这个——
Today's session is about "decorating the campus to your liking." Here, grab one of these.
蕉师向学生们发放了一罐喷漆，但你完全试不出这个罐子的重量，就像是空的一样。
BananAdvisor hands out a can of spray paint to the students, but you can't feel the weight of the can at all, as if it were empty.
构成梦境的物质与现实完全不同，筑梦亦是同理。大家手中的是由忆质制成的「模因染料」。
The materials that form the Dreamscape are completely different from those in reality, and the same theories apply to dreamweaving. What you're holding is memetic dye, which is made from memoria.
用它来装饰这面墙壁吧，主题就是我，还有大家最爱的「睡蕉小猴」！
Let's use it to decorate this wall, the theme will be everyone's favorite monkey, Slumbernana Monkey!
所以这堂课的内容是画画？
So this class is about painting?
不不不，这位同学，筑梦和绘画完全不同，让我来做个示范吧蕉——
No, no. Dreamweaving is completely different from painting. Let me show you, bana—
筑梦蕉师抬起喷罐，彩色的墨点喷溅而出。彩墨如同拥有了生命，在墙壁上流淌、翻涌、交融，组合出变幻莫测的图像……

The Dreamweaver BananAdvisor raises the spray can, and colorful ink droplets splatter out. The colored ink seems to come to life, flowing, surging, and blending on the wall, creating ever-changing images...
啊！怎么一瞬间就画好了，像魔术一样。
Ah! How did you paint that so quickly? It's like magic!
保持平和的心态，想好要创造的事物，让情绪与材料共鸣，便能让想象化作梦中的现实，这就是「筑梦」蕉！

Calm your mind, visualize what you want to create, channel your emotions to resonate with the materials, and there you have it! Your imagination will come to life in the dream. That's dreamweaving, bana!
蕉蕉蕉，别担心。模因颜料能感染观者的情绪，看来这幅画让这位同学更理解*蕉声*了啊！真不错！
Bana bana, don't worry. Memetic dye can affect the viewers' emotions. It seems this painting has helped you understand Banagibberish better! Great!
示范结束，有想要上来试试的同学吗？
That's it for my demonstration. Who would like to give it a try?
什么情况…嘴巴自己开口了，这课肯定不对劲。
What's happening? My mouth was running on autopilot. This class definitely seems fishy.
唔…可如果连丹恒你都开始蕉蕉蕉，就太引人注目了吧。
Hmm... But you'd draw too much attention if you started speaking Bananese too, Dan Heng.
还是我和{NICKNAME}去吧。我俩平时没那么正经，就算闹笑话了也不至于特别显眼。
How about {NICKNAME} and I go instead? We're not usually that serious, so even if we mess up, it won't stand out too much.
Who said I'm not a serious person?
这种时候装什么啦，快走。
Quit the act already. Hurry up.
不是说好了要深入调查吗，走！
Didn't we agree to do a thorough investigation? Let's go!
BananAdvisor, we would love to try!
好啊，大家都上来吧！表现优秀的同学有学分奖励蕉。
Excellent! You can all come up here! Those who excel might even earn some course credits, bana!
保持平和的心态，想好你要创造的事物，让情绪与…情绪与什么来着？
Calm your mind, visualize what you want to create, channel your emotions to... what again?
恰丽卡紧闭双眼，紧皱眉头，应该是正在认真作画。出于礼貌，还是不要打扰她吧。
Chaletka has her eyes tightly closed, and her brows furrowed, seemingly focused on her painting. Out of courtesy, it's best not to disturb her.
蕉蕉蕉，快去创作吧，别忘了我*蕉*给你的技巧！
Bana tsk, go create your own work of art! Don't forget to go bananas with the technique I taught you!
这面洁白的墙壁即将被你改变，染上属于你的颜色。一想到这里，你紧握筑梦颜料的小手就开始兴奋地颤抖。
This pristine wall is about to change, taking on your colors. Just thinking about it makes your tiny hand, clutching the dream paint, tremble with excitement.
这定会是一幅能让折纸大学改头换面的大作，为了自己的青春不留下遗憾，你要好好构思这幅画的内容。
This will be a masterpiece that transforms Paperfold University. To ensure you have no regrets about your youth, you must carefully plan the content of this painting.
从配色到构图，从整体到局部，从立意到设计，它值得你花费一个系统时…不，一整天…不，一整年的时间来仔细打磨！在筑梦艺术史上留下浓墨重彩的一笔！

From color schemes to composition, from the big picture to the smallest detail, from concept to design — it deserves not just a system hour, not just a day, but an entire year of meticulous refinement! Make your mark on the history of dream art!
快点画！再墨迹就下课了蕉！
Hurry! Don't dawdle, or the class will be over bana!
可惜，这只不懂艺术的大头猴子打断了你的遐想。但他提醒了你一件事：时间永远是创作最可贵的资源。
Unfortunately, this clueless monkey interrupted your daydream. But he did remind you of one thing: Time is always the most precious resource in creation.
你闭上眼睛，按照蕉师的指导开始冥想——
You close your eyes, and begin meditating as instructed by BananAdvisor—
没错，想想那些能让你平静下来的事物吧——
Exactly, think about the things that bring you peace—
你想起了在列车上看到的茫茫宇宙，万千繁星点缀在真空的漆黑幕布上，而你的画作只会比这星空更迷人，更绚丽……
You remember the vast universe you saw from the train, with countless stars dotting the dark vacuum. Yet, your painting will be even more enchanting and vibrant than that starry sky...
你想起了过去在沙滩上度假的时光，海浪的声音覆盖了耳边的嘈杂声，沙鸥在头顶盘旋，阳光洒在你的身上，身旁那位熟悉的伙伴向你递来一杯椰汁……
You reminisce about past beach vacations: the sound of the waves drowning out the noise, seagulls circling overhead, sunlight warming your skin, and a familiar friend handing you a coconut drink...
——等等，你根本没去过沙滩，这是哪来的记忆？
Hold on, you've never even been to the beach. Where did this memory come from?
想想迷人而深邃的垃圾桶…
Visualize a captivating and profound trashcan...
你想起过去邂逅过的一个个桶，它们如黑洞般神秘而美丽的洞口令你陶醉，你的心神被桶纳入其中，安宁与祥和伴随降临在你胸口鼓动的小小垃圾袋里……

You recall the cans you've encountered in the past, their mysterious and beautiful openings like black holes mesmerizing you. Your spirit is drawn into the cans, bringing peace and tranquility to the little trashbag beating in your chest...
(Then, visualize what you want to create...)
蕉师的要求是睡蕉小猴，但你真的要完全照做吗？
The BananAdvisor demands a Slumbernana Monkey, but do you really have to follow it to the letter?
不知为何，你的质疑声被小猴的*蕉声*掩盖了。似乎是这罐颜料自己的意志，小猴的声音不断从耳边传来，你的脑海中开始浮现小猴的影像……

For some reason, your voice of doubt is drowned out by the Banagibberish of the little monkey. It seemed to be the will of the paint can itself. The sound of the monkey keeps echoing in your ears, and images of the little monkey begin to appear in your mind...
没办法，看来你的画作只能是它了……
There's no choice now. It seems your painting will have to be of the monkey...
这是、是你曾经帮助的那位神秘的桶——是莎塔娜！她压制住了小猴！
This is... the Mysterious Trashcan you once helped— it's Shatana! She has subdued the little monkey!
你是我等一族的救主，收走垃圾的猎王者，怎能在此处屈服？
You are our clan's savior and the king-hunter who took away the trash. How could you give in now?
住口吧，异乡的猿猴，你怎能轻易断绝我们命定的枷锁！
Shut it, monkey from another land! You can't just break our destined chain so easily!
桶与猴的力量在你心中对抗、融合，最终汇聚在你指尖的颜料中，香蕉的气息与垃圾的气息在你的鼻腔交织，而你的脑海中浮现出了两种不同的画面……

The power of the can and the monkey battles and merges within you, ultimately channeling into the paint on your fingertips. The scents of bananas and garbage intertwine in your nostrils, while two distinct images emerge in your mind...
（最后，让情绪与材料产生共鸣！）
(Lastly, channel your emotions to resonate with the materials!)
万事俱备！展现你的才华，在墙壁化作的画卷上释放自我吧——
Everything is ready! Show your talent and unleash yourself on the canvas of the wall—
当你回过神的时候，你脑海的画作已经出现在了墙壁之上。
When you come to your senses, the painting in your mind is already on the wall.
这真是一幅完美的作品，不是吗？快去找蕉师交差吧！
What a masterpiece, isn't it? Hurry and show it to BananAdvisor!
蕉？已经画好了吗？时间也差不多了，让我们开始点评吧——
Bana? Completed already? Well, it's just in time. Let's assess your work—
哦！这副画作…如此漂亮的小猴，简直像一位专业筑梦师的作品！{NICKNAME}同学，你他蕉的真是个筑梦天才——<unbreak>100</unbreak>分！
Ah, this artwork... What a splendid monkey! It looks like it could have been crafted by a master Dreamweaver! You, {NICKNAME}, are a bananarific genius! A perfect score of <unbreak>100</unbreak>!
是的，你将让心中的睡蕉小猴吞没了桶的意志。你收获了蕉师的夸奖和同学们的赞赏，但你抛弃了莎塔娜，抛弃了你作为桶之救主的荣耀……

Yes, you've let the little Slumbernana Monkey in your heart consume the will of the can. You've earned praise from the BananAdvisor and admiration from your peers, but you've abandoned Shatana and forsaken your glory as the Savior of the Cans...
哦！这副画作…你笔下的睡蕉小猴确实非常完美，但混在里面的垃圾桶太碍眼了。主题不够清晰——<unbreak>60</unbreak>分！
Ah, this artwork... Your portrayal of the Slumbernana Monkey is flawless, but the addition of the trashcan is too jarring on the eyes. The theme seems unclear. I'd rate it a <unbreak>60</unbreak>.
因为桶之一族的出现，你失去了许多分数。
Due to the emergence of the cans, you lose a lot of points.
但这并不重要，因为你的坚持带来了更宝贵的东西。总有一天，世人们都会知晓桶的故事，理解这幅画作的深意。
But that doesn't matter, because your perseverance has brought something far more valuable. One day, everyone will know the story of the cans and understand the deeper meaning of this painting.
哦！这副画作…是什么东西啊！怎么全是垃圾桶？小猴呢？0分！
Ah, what's going on here? Only trashcans? Where's the monkey? Zero points from me!
你的坚持为你带来了惨痛的代价，蕉师的责骂与台下同学的奚落声萦绕在你的耳边。你只是画出了自己想要画的东西，难道做错什么了吗？

Your persistence has come at a heavy price. The BananAdvisor's scolding and the mocking laughter of your peers echo in your ears. You were just drawing what you wanted — did you really do something wrong?
异乡人呐…谢谢你的画作，贯彻自己认为正确的事，才是桶的骄傲。
Outlander, I'm grateful for the artwork. True dignity lies in staying faithful to what you believe is right.
让我们看看下一位同学的作品…这是什么蕉？
Let's move on to the next student... What in bananas is this?
三月七同学面前的涂鸦墙一尘不染，但墙前多出了一块巨大的…六相冰？
March 7th's graffiti wall is as clean as a whistle, but in front of it a huge... Six-Phased Ice appears?
忍•六相冰！何等强劲的冰遁，琉璃•忍者真乃上忍也！
Ninja Six-Phased Ice! Such formidable ice mastery! Ninja Ruri truly proves her might!
不是，这筑梦的方法跟凝结六相冰也太像了，我分不清啊。
Well, this dreamweaving method feels just like condensing Six-Phased Ice! I can barely tell them apart!
太、太强了蕉！在这么短时间里筑造出如此大体积的物件，真是堪比专业筑梦猴的手法……
Th—That's impressive, bana! Weaving such a large object in such a short time is comparable to the work of a pro Dreamweaver!
哇，芮克先生果然没骗我，本姑娘真的是天才！
Wow, Mr. Reca was telling the truth! I truly am a genius!
But I'm giving it a big fat zero!
一个大冰坨子有蕉皮用，我让你画睡蕉小猴，不是让你做刨冰！就算是专业筑梦猴也得乖乖听甲方的需求！
I gave you a theme, and that's Slumbernana Monkey! Not this giant useless block of ice! Even pro Dreamweaver monkeys are expected to follow what is requested of them!
什么呀！蕉授不是说要让课堂自由起来吗？你的要求一点也不自由！
What even...! The Profnana was just encouraging freedom in the classroom, and you're not even making the slightest effort in your class!
你有在课上捣乱的自由，我就有给你打低分的自由，这还不够自由吗？标新立异就要付出标新立异的代价，给我下去蕉！
You're allowed to disrupt my class, and I get to flunk you for that. THAT'S freedom for you. You pay a price for trying to be creative. Now, get back to your seat, bana hmph!
最后一位同学…嗯？怎么什么都没有。
Moving on to the last student... Hmm? Where's your design?
别念叨了，嘴是用来吃香蕉的，不是用来筑梦的——白卷！0分！
Alright, that's enough. Mumbling won't weave you any dreams, you're better off snacking on bananas with that useless trap of yours. Zero points for turning in nothing!
等等，请再给我一点时间……
Wait, I just need some more time...
没有对睡蕉小猴的爱，给你再多时间也画不出来…我记得你是班里的吊车尾蕉吧？
Even if I did give you all the time in the cosmos, you won't have anything. Not when you're not passionate about Slumbernana Monkey. Ah... You're at the bottom of the class, aren't you?
不、不是的！我还是考过几次倒数第二的……
N—No! ...Not exactly. I was also the second to last a couple of times...
唉，每次看见你这样的学生，我就觉得心累。没有爬树天赋的猴子永远摘不到香蕉，何必上台难为自己呢？
I'm really sick and tired of seeing students like you. A monkey with no talent for climbing will never reach the bananas. Why volunteer only to embarrass yourself?
还是认清现实，早点放弃这条路吧，蕉蕉蕉。
It's better to face reality and give up on this path sooner rather than later, bana tsk.
What do you think you are doing?
这位同学，你肯定理解不了蕉师这番话里包含的爱。无论如何，你和刚刚那位女同学都还算有天赋，但这位交白卷的姑娘却一无所有。
You can't possibly understand the affection in my words. Both you and the other girl have some talent, unlike her. She has no talent whatsoever to speak of.
如果总在追求得不到的东西，不就是在朝幸福的反方向前进吗？放弃吧，放弃吧蕉！
Pursuing something she can never reach is straying farther from happiness. That's why it's only right to give up, bana!
Have you concluded your articulation, sir?
若结束了，就把目光重新投向这里吧。
If so, please cast your attention this way.
什、什么？你是谁，什么时候上来的……
Wh—Wha? Who are you? And when did you get here—
Wait! What in the bana is this!?
此乃缭乱•符印，还请大头•邪祟评点。
I present to you: the Dazzling Seal. I am eagerly anticipating your appraisal of it, Bighead Fiendling.
评点个蕉皮啊！这玩意擦得掉吗？！
Peel that thought out of your head! Is that permanent ink!?
此番风景正是甘饴•忍者心中所想。方才阁下转身的刹那，她相由心生，灵感如涌泉喷发，整个过程只在<unbreak>0.1</unbreak>微•秒之间，就连忍者的超•视力也无法捕捉！

This magnificence is conceived by none other than Patissier Ninja Initiate. At that precise instant you turned around, a look of dawning eureka graced her visage! Inspiration surged through her and this came to fruition in just <unbreak>0.1</unbreak> microseconds — imperceptible even with a ninja's hypersight!
什么乱七八糟的！这明显是你画的吧！
What bananonsense is that!? I know it was you!
「煮熟的三文鱼不会游泳，忍者也不会妖言惑众。」甘饴•忍徒需要的只是一份助力，在下愿担任她的画笔，助她完成修行。
"Cooked salmon cannot swim, just as ninjas never deceive." All Ninja Initiate Patissier needed was a little nudge. I willingly became her paintbrush, to aid her in completing her training.
甘饴•忍徒，是这样没错吧？
Is that fair to say, Ninja Initiate Patissier?
《银河忍法帖》有云：「蟒蛇没有脚掌也能倏来忽往，蝠鲼没有翅膀也能腾空飞翔。」
As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "Pythons slither without feet, as manta rays glide without wings."
若阁下心中已有决定，不妨怀着信念发出呐喊吧！
If your decision is firm, don't hesitate to roar with conviction!
——怎样都好，我真的很需要学分呀！
—Whatever it takes! I really need to earn my credits!
大头•邪祟殿下，师者传道、授业、解惑，切不可轻易否定一位忍徒的忍道！
Bighead Fiendling, educators impart knowledge, cultivate skills, and clarify doubts, but they must never deny any ninja initiate of their way of the ninja!
就是就是，再怎么说刚才的批评也太过了。而且我的六相冰也不差嘛！
Yeah! You were being way too mean to her. And my Six-Phased Ice is pretty good too!
气死我了蕉！哪来的校外野猴，不仅扰乱课堂秩序，还用歪理煽动我的猴生们。
Grah, you've really banannoyed me, unruly monkey! You barged in here disrupting my class, and now you're even corrupting my students with ruinous ideas!
滚出去，不然我就要用铁拳*蕉育*你——还有你们这些跟着起哄的坏猴生蕉！
Get out! Or my iron fists will show you some Bananenlightenment! The same goes for you no-good monkey inciters!
Wh—What's it got to do with us!?
终于露出残暴的本性了吗？那在下可要开始壮绝•狩猎了。
Alas, the pretense of your tyranny has shattered. With that, a magnificent hunt shall be set in motion!
助蕉们，跟我上！给这群差生好好上一课蕉！
Give it to them, Assistananas! Show those unruly students what it means to be disciplined, bana!
胜负已分。让在下为你吟诵忍•真言吧——
Now that you are vanquished at our feet, allow me to recite to you the ninja mantra—
「无论有何条约律令，采用暴力的行径，便要准备迎接暴力的回应。」
"Doesn't matter what the rules say, if you bring the violence, then the violence is comin' back your way."
好了，这位同学…他已经被你砸坏了。
Alright, girl... You've already crushed him.
各位同学，真是抱歉，是校方没看护好这些*蕉师*，给大家添麻烦了。
The university failed to take these BananAdvisors in hand. Please accept my apology for the distress they brought upon you.
阁下就是这折纸村的城主？
Are you perhaps the governor of Paperfold Town?
城主？说笑了，我只是一介教职员工，校园的主人永远是学生们。
Governor? You humor me. I'm merely an educator. Here on our campus, our students are the true masters.
听说筑梦设计课有些骚乱，我特地前来看看。原来是这些美梦剧团失去了控制啊，再次向大家致歉。
I came over after hearing of a ruckus in the Dreamweaving class, but it seems like it was these Sweet Dreams Troupe who went out of control. My apologies once again.
不过这位同学，你看着有些陌生，应该不是折纸大学的学生吧？
Pardon me, but I don't think I've seen you around here before. You're not a student of Paperfold University, are you?
这么说来，据说最近有个身份不明的偷渡犯潜入了匹诺康尼…粉发、红衣、燃烧的围巾，猎犬的目击报告和你有几分相似啊，同学。

I'm only asking because we know a stowaway has recently snuck into Penacony. Eyewitness accounts from the Bloodhounds describe someone with pink hair, red attire, and a blazing scarf... And you seem to match that description.
阁下不必弯弯绕绕，直言便是。
No need to beat around the bush, sir.
Of course. What I'm trying to say is...
如果罪犯真的图谋不轨，又何必来折纸大学上课呢——你只是个热爱学习的好孩子吧？
If the stowaway is indeed plotting something nefarious, it wouldn't make sense for them to attend classes at Paperfold University. So, I'm certain you're just an inquisitive student.
任何香蕉幼苗都有结出果实的可能，每个人都有接受*平等蕉育*的权利。折纸大学是自由的！所以同学，你完全可以留下来旁听，要好好学习哦！

Every banana seedling has the potential to bear fruit, that's why everyone deserves bananenlightenment. Paperfold University advocates freedom in education, so feel free to sit in our classes and be sure to apply yourself!
来——让我们拿出热情，欢迎新同学！
Join me in a round of applause for our new student!
同学，你刚刚居然敢反抗蕉师？真是太酷了，我早看他不顺眼了！
Wow, did you just challenge the BananAdvisor? That's SO COOL! I've always found him annoying!
你为什么说自己是忍者啊！你的星球真的有忍者吗？
Why do you call yourself a ninja? Are there really ninjas on your planet?
谢谢你帮我解围！能教教我你的涂鸦…忍法是怎么做到的吗？
Thank you for standing up for me earlier. Um, could you show me how you did that graffiti, I mean, your ninja move?
…那是在下的忍法，难以传给外人。
...That's my ninjutsu. It's hard to teach it to others.
但假以时日，阁下定能寻得自己的忍道。
But I say with certainty that you will discover your own way of the ninja someday.
呵呵，宿命啊，真就像香蕉皮一样……
Yes, destiny is no different than a banana peel...
我们都是被囚禁的果肉，永远无法挣脱它的束缚。
Like bananas within their peels, we can never break free of its encapsulation.
少女盯着乱破的画作，似乎在思考着什么。
The girl stares at the Rappa's painting, seemingly lost in thought.
我自己的忍法…唉，感觉完全没有头绪，还是学学怎么画小猴吧蕉……
My own way of the ninja...? I don't even know what that is. Maybe I should just practice monkey weaving, bana...
乱破被学生包围住了，不方便打扰。
Rappa has been surrounded by students. Not a good time to disturb her.
哎，跟老师干架的学生在哪呢？不会错过了吧……
Geez, please tell me they're still duking it out with the teacher!
哦？赵相机同学，还有丹恒同学和巨星同学，又见面了！
Oh, Say~Cheese~! And Dan Heng and Superstar too! We meet again!
那个…你还是叫我三月七吧，这网名起的有点潦草了，别用啦。
Um... I came up with that name on the fly, so let's forget about it. Just call me March!
好呀，那你也不要叫我蒙塔娜了——我现在的名字是「能人<unbreak>426</unbreak>」！
Gotcha. You can drop "Montana" too! I'm now known as Denisovan <unbreak>426</unbreak>!
没错，我终于加入了折纸大学最受欢迎的社团「睡蕉社」，这是我的社名！
That's right, I finally got into the Slumbernana Association — the GOAT club at Paperfold University! And that's my name in the club!
Can't they just call you Montana?
用真名多无聊啊，一点都不个性！
Pfft! Real names are boring and not special at all!
我也不知道，这是社团规定的，或许是说这个级别的社员很能干吧！
I don't know, but it was decided by the club. Maybe members in this tier are more capable, haha!
这是「社员编号」，每个人都有自己的，独一无二！
That's my membership number. Each member has their own unique number!
「睡蕉社」是睡蕉小猴粉丝组成的社团，成员不止在校学生，还囊括了整个匹诺康尼的*蕉粉*。
The Slumbernana Association was founded by fans of Slumbernana Monkey. Our fan base stretches far beyond the campus and includes Ripe Bananas from all over Penacony!
我们会为小猴制作同人周边，组织睡蕉展会，还会定期开展「校外活动」——各位同学感兴趣吗？我可以内推哦！
We create fan art and merch based on Slumbernana, host Slumbernana Cons, and hold a few other off-campus events from time to time. Itching to join us? I can refer you!
哇！听起来好有意思，可以内推我们吗？
Wow, that sounds like a lot of fun! Can you get all of us in?
当然没问题！不过入社有相对严格的考核，一次人数也不能太多，如果推荐了三月同学，剩下二位就……
Count on me! It's just that the club has a rigorous screening procedure and we only take in a few members each time. If I refer March in, then the two of you...
I need to focus on my studies!
那就让三月同学独享宝贵的名额咯~正巧下午就有场「校外活动」，听说会去个特别神秘的地方，我都等不及啦。
Okie-dokie! This coveted spot will go to March then! Ooh, there's an off-campus event happening later today at a supposedly mysterious location. I can't wait!
好耶！那等我和他俩道个别，就带我去办理入社吧。
Great! Let me say goodbye to those two, and then you can show me where to sign up.
不愧是咱们仨，还是这么默契。
Good job playing along back there, guys!
这小猴还有社会团体，真是越来越诡异了…机会难得，容本姑娘去一探究竟吧。
Things are getting weirder, huh? This monkey even has a fan club now. But since we have a way to get into the club, I'll go see what they're up to!
Will you be alright on your own?
没问题，单独行动更不容易打草惊蛇嘛。学校这边也得有人看着，咱们就分头行动咯。
Yeah, it's less suspicious than all three of us joining the club together. Let's split up for now. This way, you two can keep an eye on what's going on in the campus.
你就放一百个心吧。{NICKNAME}也是，晚点见！
Aww, I will. Don't worry about me! You too, {NICKNAME}. Catch you guys later!
但愿不会出事吧。刚才蕉授明显在转移话题，我们也回去找乱破吧，看看她有何见解……
I hope she'll be okay. Profnana was clearly steering the conversation his way earlier. Let's go find Rappa and hear what she thinks...
…睡蕉小猴？它身上有个标签——「财富学院，蕉开富贵」。
...Slumbernana Monkey? I see a tag on it: "Peelin' Richie, Fortune Academy."
是你们买的玩偶，造型还挺别致。
This is the toy you ordered. It looks rather unique.
That store really keeps its promises.
我以为得补一笔尾款呢。
I thought I still needed to pay an extra fee.
你想伸手试试它的质量，但睡蕉小猴似乎被你吓了一跳，突然拔腿跑掉了……
You reach out to feel its quality, but the Slumbernana Monkey is startled and suddenly bolts away...
My <unbreak>8,800</unbreak> Alfalfa credits!!! Don't let it get away!
I didn't even get to play with it!
Alright, let's go get the toy back then.
姐啊！我这不卖芋圆，也没有什么屑人，您饶了我吧！
Give me a break, Miss! I'll repeat this for the millionth time: I'm not evil, nor do I sell any gorge roe!
百货•忍徒！在下已向忍徒们求证，这些邪祟傀儡皆来自阁下商铺。速速招来，你是否受到了御猿•邪忍的蛊惑？
Nay, Ninja Initiate Merchant! The other initiates have verified that these fiendling puppets are from your shop. Confess at once! Are you under the spell of Evil Ninja Osaru?
Torture a confession out of him!
两位大佬，快跟她解释一下，我就是个勤工俭学的好学生，不是什么忍徒！
Oh! Hey! It's you! Please, help me talk some sense into her. I'm just a well-behaved student working to pay my tuition fees, not whatever "initiate" she thinks I am!
先不说这个，你卖给我们的小猴一直在逃跑，你确定它只是个玩偶吗？
Never mind that. The monkey you sold us keeps running off on its own. Are you sure it's just a toy?
邪祟傀儡形同活物，可谓是极致的忍•自动化。
Fiendling puppets imbued with life... The epitome of Ninja Automation.
你、你们这些有钱人真是无理取闹！要真是什么高级玩意，我能卖这个白菜价吗！
You rich folks are just being unreasonable! If it were really some high-end stuff, would I be selling it at such a low price?
别缠着我了，体谅下穷学生吧！每天除了上课就是卖货，为了处理这批订单，我已经三天没合眼了……
Please, take pity on this poor student! Have a heart! As if squeezing in sales between classes isn't enough, I haven't slept a wink in three days, just so I can get this batch of toys ready!
蕉蕉蕉！富贵同学，怎么能这么对客户说话呢？
Richie! Bana tsk! How could you speak so rudely to your customers?
我是怎么*蕉*你的？天大地大，客户最大——你们好呀，亲爱的同学们……
"The customer is always right!" Did I not teach you that? Greetings, dear students...
这只邪祟…身躯好似虫豸，想来是邪祟中的下等。
This fiendling assumes the form of an insect-like pest. Clearly a lowly fiendling.
啊？你们说什么？给我再说一遍蕉！？
Wh—What did you just say!? Bana grr! Repeat that if you dare!
蕉师，客户最大！客户最大！
Psst, BananAdvisor! "The customer is always right!"
咳咳，失态了——同学们，大家可能对财富学院的新产品有些误会。
Ahem, pardon me... My dear students, you may have some misunderstanding about Fortune Academy's new product.
这些小猴玩偶之所以如此活泼，是为了给年轻消费者提供更多情绪价值。
These monkey toys are made this lively so that they bring more emotional value to our young customers.
折纸大学表面上很热闹，但其实许多学生的蕉皮下都藏着孤独，难以适应太阳时刻的热情氛围，也融入不了匹诺康尼的本地生活……

Paperfold University might seem to be an enjoyable place, but beneath their peels, many students are in fact bogged down by loneliness. You know... Struggling to embrace the vibrant energy here in the Moment of Sol, but also realizing that they're unable to live as the Penaconians do.
但睡蕉小猴是最好的伙伴！它不会跟你争绩点，不会跟你攀比，不会偷用你的东西，你大可与它*蕉*心，不用担心它把你的秘密告诉别人。

But the Slumbernana Monkey is the perfect companion! It won't compete for grades, won't compare itself to you, won't use your things without asking. You can trust it completely, without worrying about it sharing your secrets with others. Consider it your bestest palnana!
Is campus social life really that messed up?
Any mention of grades makes me weak in the knees.
呀！看看时间，梦境营销课马上就要开始了蕉。
Bana gosh, look at the time! I have to get ready for my Dreamscape Marketing class!
先失陪了，同学们，有什么问题咱们课后再聊吧。
Excuse me, students. I'll take all other questions after class.
各位大佬，我也去上课了。有什么事你们找我就行，别再把蕉师搅合进来了……
I should get to my class too. But do me a favor buddies, just come look for me if you need anything. Let's not involve BananAdvisor again...
再纠缠下去他也不会松口，不如跟上去看看吧。
I doubt he'll say anything more. Let's just follow him and see what we can learn.
♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪
同学们看好了，这就是当下最具商业价值的流行文化蕉！
Behold, the sensational B-wave that's been raking in all the money these days!
吃完香蕉就睡觉，快快乐乐没烦恼！
Eat bananas, nap the day away. Worry no more, be happy everyday!
来，仔细品读一下这句话，为什么睡蕉小猴能在匹诺康尼引发香蕉热潮？
Now, let's take some time to think about this slogan. What is it about Slumbernana Monkey that allowed it to spark a banana frenzy in Penacony?
那位灰头发的同学——你怎么在这？！算了，就你了，你来回答一下。
How about that gray-haired student— Wait, what are you doing here!? Oh, never mind. You can answer the question then.
蕉蕉蕉，我们的小猴确实可爱，但这只是它的优势之一，最重要的还是因为它切中了匹诺康尼用户的「痛点」蕉！
Bana bana! There's no denying how cute Slumbernana Monkey is, but that's just one of its selling points. More importantly, it addresses the pain point of Penaconian consumers!
因为它的口头禅够有趣蕉。
Because of its viral catchphrase, bana bana!
不全对。*蕉声*和*蕉语*确实促进了传播，但最重要的还是它切中了匹诺康尼用户的「痛点」！
Not quite. While Banagibberish and Bananese helped propagate the banana craze, the key lies in how Slumbernana Monkey addresses the pain point of Penaconian consumers!
小猴的生活很让人羡慕。
Because people want to live like Slumbernana Monkey.
答对了！幸福的生活，这就是匹诺康尼用户的「痛点」！
Bingo! To live a happy life! That is exactly the pain point of Penaconian consumers!
无论穷人还是富人，大部分人来匹诺康尼，就是为了「更有意义的生活」。
Both rich and poor alike come to Penacony in the hope of leading a more fulfilling life.
但只要在梦里待上一阵子，就会发现这是句彻头彻尾的空话，逐梦客很快就会在奔波劳碌中倒下，游客也会在一场场狂欢后疲倦。

Unfortunately, a couple of days in the Dreamscape is all it takes for them to realize this is nothing more than a fantasy. Dreamchasers soon give in to exhaustion and tourists eventually grow weary from the endless festivities.
我们追逐的传奇富商、盛会巨星，他们的精彩人生是那么遥远，仿佛属于另一个世界……
Those famed tycoons and Festive Superstars that we pursue lead lives we can never hope to experience... So dramatic, eventful, and out of this world.
但睡蕉小猴展示了一种全新的生活态度！它们每天都在睡觉和吃香蕉，别的什么也不想什么也不做，体会着最纯粹的幸福蕉！
But Slumbernana Monkey epitomizes a wholly different lifestyle! Sleeping and snacking on bananas without a care in the world... This is what pure happiness should be!
♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪
为了让同学们更有体会，蕉师为大家准备了一款特别的睡蕉小猴玩偶，各位财富学院的学生购买时能享受折上折……
I have just the thing to help all of you understand this better. Fortune Academy students get a bonus discount when purchasing this special model of the Slumbernana Monkey toy...
蕉师，上一批货已经卖完了。
BananAdvisor, I sold everything from the last batch.
太好了！睡蕉小猴的人气远超我们想象。富贵同学，跟蕉师来取货吧。
That's fantastic news! We underestimated Slumbernana Monkey's popularity. Come with me, Richie. I'll get you more stock.
原来推销这些玩偶是财富学院的任务，但为什么要让学生做这种事？
So, the Fortune Academy's supposed to promote these toys. But why did they rope students into their plan?
可惜我们听不懂它的*蕉声*……
It's a shame we don't understand its Banagibberish...
…我有个想法，{NICKNAME}，你能对它使用「钟表把戏」吗？
...I have an idea, {NICKNAME}. Can you use Clockwork on it?
不知道，但借此我们可以验证一些猜想。
We'll find out, but this is one way to confirm some of our assumptions.
钟表•忍法！银枪•修罗殿下曾向我描绘过它的壮绝玄妙，请务必让在下领教一二。
Clockwork ninjutsu! Silvergun Shura once recounted its magnificence to me. Please, it will be my honor to witness it with my own eyes.
这只颓废的小猴露出一副悲伤的神情，这似乎不符合常理，因为你见过的小猴总是快乐的。
This dispirited little monkey shows a sad expression, which seems unusual because the monkeys you have seen are always happy.
I need a moment to get ready.
在钟表把戏的作用下，这只小猴恢复了平静。
Under the spell of Clockwork, the little monkey calms down.
在你关闭它表盘的一瞬间，你似乎与它的镇定产生了共鸣，你看到了流水线上的一个个纸箱，看到了阴暗街道里踌躇的人群，还有一台又一台的…电视机？
The moment you shut its dial, you seemed to resonate with its calmness. You saw the conveyor belt's boxes, the hesitant crowds in shadowy streets, and... TVs?
在你还未消化这些情感之时，小猴坚定地跑向了远方……
Before you could process these emotions, the little monkey resolutely dashed off into the distance...
在钟表把戏的作用下，这只小猴找回了自己的笑容。
Under the spell of Clockwork, the little monkey found its smile again.
在你关闭它表盘的一瞬间，你似乎与它的快乐产生了共鸣，你看到了一封录取通知书，一个年轻人迈入校门的背影，还有一封塞了几张苜蓿币的信……

The moment you shut its dial, you seemed to resonate with its joy. You saw a college acceptance letter, a young person stepping through a campus gate, and a letter stuffed with a few Alfalfa credits...
在你还未消化这些情感之时，小猴欢快地跑了远方……
Before you could process these emotions, the little monkey happily dashed off into the distance...
在钟表把戏的作用下，这只小猴开始发出生气的*蕉声*。
Under the spell of Clockwork, the little monkey began making angry Banagibberish sounds.
在你关闭它表盘的一瞬间，你似乎与它的愤怒产生了共鸣，你看到了一份不理想的成绩单，一份更不理想的工资单，和一个少年失望的神情……
The moment you shut its dial, you seemed to resonate with its anger. You saw a disappointing report card, an even more dismal paycheck, and the look of frustration on a young face...
在你还未消化这些情感之时，小猴激动地跑向了远方……
Before you could process these emotions, the little monkey excitedly dashed off into the distance...
财富蕉师，您不是让我来取货吗？可这里什么都没有啊。
Uh, Fortune BananAdvisor? Aren't we supposed to pick up more stock? I don't see anything here.
唉，筑梦蕉师明明说会搞定新一批货的，真是不靠谱蕉。
Geez, Dreamwaver BananAdvisor said he'd get a new batch ready. Looks like we can't rely on him, bana tsk!
这些<color=#dbc291ff>变成小猴的人</color>真的是自愿的吗…？
当然了，富贵，你难道不能理解当小猴的幸福吗？
Why, of course, Richie. Can't you see how happy it is being a monkey?
看来你完全没有听讲啊，还是那些旁听生又给了你不切实际的幻想？
I take it you haven't been paying attention in class, huh? Or did those guest students plant unrealistic ideas in your head again?
可你知道那帮无名客的背景吗？你一个从公司扶持的边星不远万里来这读书的苦学生，想和他们比？

Do you have the slightest idea about the backgrounds of those Nameless? You're just a poor student from a faraway fringe planet, one that relies on the IPC for aid! Do you really think you can compare yourself to them?
我知道自己比不上那些大佬…但我也有自己想做的事啊……
...I know I can't measure up to those bigwigs, but there are things I hope to achieve too...
我当然知道，你想赚钱、赚很多钱。毕竟折纸大学的学费是笔天文数字，对普通中产家庭还是太过高昂了蕉。
I get it. You're aiming to make a lot of money. After all, the sky-high tuition fees at Paperfold University can really take a toll on the average middle-class family.
哦，我听说令尊也一起来到了匹诺康尼。他换了份工作，在早霞工厂没日没夜地上班，真是感人蕉。
Oh, I heard your father came to Penacony, too. He's been working day and night ever since taking up a new job at Dawn Factory, hasn't he? Aww bana, how touching!
蕉蕉蕉，因为就在几天前，他来过这里，想看看你过得如何。
Bana bana! He swung by a few days ago to check on how you're doing.
我亲自招待了令尊，真可怜啊，一把年纪了，还要抛下大半辈子积蓄，来这种举目无亲的地方工作。我感受到他的疲惫和焦虑……

I took the time to chat with him. Looking at how old he is, my heart really went out to him. Throwing in most of his life savings, only to slog his guts out in a foreign land... I could sense his exhaustion and distress.
所以我进行了*蕉学*，开导他成为一只睡蕉小猴——就在你刚刚送出的那批里，没想到吧？

So, I instilled in him the tenets of our banacademics, convincing him that becoming a Slumbernana Monkey is the right thing to do. Oh, that's right! He's in the batch of toys that you just delivered. Quite a turn of events, huh?
什、什么？您怎么能这么做？！
难道…它就是百货•忍徒的父亲，百货•村长？
Could it be... the father of Ninja Initiate Merchant, Merchant Chief?
为什么？因为令尊太累了蕉。我问他有没有后悔过，他说没有。但当我撕开那层蕉皮伪装，看到的却是那封被你藏起来的退学警告书。

Why? Because your dad was simply too tired. I asked if he ever had regrets, and he said no. But when I stripped away that banana peel facade, what I found was the expulsion warning letter you had hidden.
是啊，我怎么就忘了蕉，你是个无可救药的差生，与其留着浪费教学资源，不如变成财富学院的商品，那样多少还有点价值，蕉蕉蕉。

Of course, bana... Why didn't I realize this sooner? You're a hopeless student. Rather than squandering our educational resources on you, why don't you become one of Fortune Academy's products? At least scrape some worth out of yourself, bana hyuk hyuk!
我答应了令尊，会给你同样的幸福。富贵，是时候休息一下了蕉。
I assured your father that you'll get to be happy like him. It's time for you to rest, Richie.
怎、怎么会这样？老爹，如果连你都放弃了，那我留在这到底是为了什么啊……
Wh—Why did it come to this!? What use is it for me keeping up the struggle if you've already given up, Dad...?
Dad, there's nothing else keeping me going...
富贵的样子不太对劲，快阻止他！
Something's happening to Richie! We have to stop him!
虫豸•邪祟，你对百货•忍徒做了什么？
Fiendling Pest! What tricks did you pull on Ninja Initiate Merchant?
什么！这里怎么会有忍者！
Gah! How did a ninja get in here!?
Get your hands off him now!
I have no hands to begin with, bana.
Back up! Being this close is bad for eyesight!
I want to be a monkey too!
Please see more value in your life!
同学们，先别激动，让我说几句。
Hold your bananas, students. Allow me to explain myself.
我只是想帮助这些可怜娃摆脱痛苦，换一种身份来享受幸福——顺便在这过程中赚点小钱——这在匹诺康尼也不是什么稀罕事。

I was only trying to help relieve those pitiful kids of their suffering, letting them enjoy the rest of their happy life from a different perspective... And maybe make some extra cash while I'm at it, but this isn't anything new in Penacony.
毕竟你们有显赫的身份和花不完的信用点，但我的学生什么都没有。所以我提供了一种更好的选择，而这对父子自愿接受了它。

You may have your esteemed background and a never-ending supply of credits, but that's not the case for my students. All I did was offer a better alternative, one that both father and son willingly took up.
一场很公平的*蕉易*，不是吗？
Seems like a fair and banaworthy deal, wouldn't you say so?
《银河忍法帖》有云：「炙烤的烧鸟不知冰清，冷藏的刺身不知火明。」倘若堕入邪道是百货•忍徒的选择，在下确实无权干涉。

As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "Sizzling yakitori knows not refreshing ice, as chilled sashimi knows not blazing fire." If Ninja Initiate Merchant has indeed chosen the way of the fiend, it is not my place to intervene.
蕉蕉蕉，你比想象中通情达理得多嘛。
Bana geez! I didn't count on you being this reasonable.
但口说无凭，让在下确认一番——百货•忍徒，这可是阁下的意思？
Your words alone will not suffice. Ninja Initiate Merchant, is this truly your intention?
看来他回答不了啊。那么——百货•村长，这可是阁下的意思？
He does not seem capable of a response. Merchant Chief, is this a willing decision of yours?
奸佞邪祟，满口胡言。看！他们根本无法证明阁下的说辞。
Deceitful fiendling! You spoke with a forked tongue! They can't prove a word of your claims.
什么乱七八糟的，猴子哪能说人话啊！
Have you gone bananas!? Monkeys can't speak the human language!
所以阁下所行之事，就是令痛苦之人失明失聪？实在荒谬！
In that case... Your calling is to render those in misery blind and deaf? Utter absurdity!
「恶魔在陷阱前面摆满宝藏，把虚无的地狱扮成天堂的模样，猎人引诱的雏鸟坠入罗网，用虚伪的善意将欲望乔装。」

The path to hell is paved with heavenly treasure; devils trying to fool you, better get your head together. The hunters hide greed with a welcoming smile; don't be beguiled, it could be your last mile.
在下无意否定落入骗局的忍徒，但绝对不会放过设置陷阱的恶党。虫豸•邪祟殿下，忍•巡猎要开始了，吟诵辞世句吧！
Censure shall not fall upon the ensnared ninja initiate, but the trap's orchestrator ought to be punished. I beckon the Ninja Hunt upon you! Say your final words, Fiendling Pest!
这都什么跟什么！助蕉，快给我揍她！
The banana was that? Assistananas, beat her to a pulp!
竟用邪术将忍者变作邪祟，多么可怕。
Resorting to sorcery to turn ninjas into fiendlings... Dreadfully horrid.
这不正常。方才的忍•战中在下理应收手了，难道这些邪祟背后另有他人操纵？
Something's awry. I believe I should've held back in the ninja battle just now... Perhaps someone is controlling these fiendlings behind the scenes?
We were supposed to hold back?
Oops, guess I shouldn't have built my ATK so high.
也罢，邪祟就应就地正法。然而百货•忍徒……
No matter. The fiendling deserves its rightful punishment. Ninja Initiate Merchant, though...
看着地上多出来的一只猴子，你意识到，富贵已经在酣战之际变成睡蕉小猴了。
Seeing an additional monkey on the ground, you realize that Richie has already transformed into a Slumbernana Monkey during the fierce battle.
两只小猴聚在一起，发出深情的*蕉声*，你不忍心打断这父子团圆的温馨画面。
The two little monkeys gather together, making affectionate Banagibberish. You can't bring yourself to interrupt this heartwarming reunion between father and son.
百货•忍徒已身中邪术，一时无法再起了。
Ninja Initiate Merchant succumbed to their sorcery. He is expected to be out of action for a while.
乱破小姐，现在可以谈谈游侠前来匹诺康尼的理由了吗？
Miss Rappa, can we talk about why the Rangers came to Penacony now?
飞龙•忍者已经有所察觉了吗？
Did you pick up on something, Ninja Hiryū?
虽然之前也怀疑过，但见到这一幕我才敢肯定，巡海游侠的死敌，将人类变为猿猴的恐怖科学家，你口中的「御猿•邪忍」……

Even though I had doubts before, it was only when I saw this that I felt sure of it. The sworn enemy of the Galaxy Rangers, the horrific scientist who transforms humans into monkeys, the Evil Ninja Osaru you spoke of...
正是。御猿•邪忍…就是「御猿•邪忍」。
Astute. Evil Ninja Osaru... it's definitely Evil Ninja Osaru.
