霸道的忍力又一次倾注在你的眉心，将你从沉沦中唤醒。从刚刚的击打声判断，台上的每位忍者都受到了帮助，哪怕是路过的睡蕉小猴都要吃上一记手刀。

The overpowering ninja force surged into your forehead once more, snapping you out of your daze. Judging by the recent sounds of impact, every ninja on stage received assistance, even the passing Slumbernana Monkey got a swift chop.
《银河忍法帖》有云：「忍心当如磐石，凌轹之下不离析，谰言之风难磨蚀。」
As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "The stone heart of a ninja is immune to pressure, immune to lies, come wind, rain, or shine."
伎乐忍徒，务必要坚守自我啊。
Never forget who you truly are, Ninja Initiate Gigaku.
这、这是又换了一场戏吗？是忍者电影？
A—Are we onto another film now? Is this going to be about ninjas?
不，现在正是最精彩的桥段！只不过演员发生了一些小小的变化——谐乐蕉师，现在由你来饰演反派。
No, but we've come to the climax of the film! Just a small swap among the roles... Charmony BananAdvisor, you're up for the villain this time.
搞什么！我说了关机、关机！
What are you even... I said to stop filming! STOP, FILMING!
CUT——有我在的片场，我就是导演！来吧诸位演员，用高潮的*打戏*来拯救这部烂片吧。
Cut—! When you're on my set, I AM the director! Come on now, dear actors, let's salvage this lousy film with an electrifying fight scene!
Yay, I'm no longer the villain!
Yes! My favorite kind of episode!
蕉…你们这群差生，既然执意要破坏课堂，那就必须进行*蕉正*了——助蕉们，跟我上！
Bana grr... If you unruly students insist on disrupting my class, you're in for some corrective bananishment! Teach them a lesson, Assistananas!
此刻——侠客领会了忍者的觉悟，不会再因恶语而却步。
From this very moment... Back down, retreat? The hero says "never" — the way of the ninja burning in their heart forever.
忍者的苦无沾染邪祟血污，自由的学府斩断一切约束！
With fiendling blood the sword of justice will be stained, as the school casts off every shackle every chain!
Hey, do I really have to fight too?
恶语伤人的邪祟已落败，残虐不仁的奸计被破坏。侠客抹去了学府的祸灾，宴会重拾往日的多彩——
Wicked tongues, wicked lies, all of them destroyed, say goodbye to evil plots, strategies and ploys. The life of the party, savior of the school, let's hear it for the hero, here to keep it cool...
伎乐忍徒，说出最后的台词吧。
Ninja Initiate Gigaku, deliver your final line.
蕉…不对！卑劣的厉鬼，你的恶语没有打倒伎乐忍徒！忍者大胜利！
Bana—scratch that! Evil thing! Your vile words cannot bring Ninja Initiate Gigaku down! It's a victory for us ninjas, hurray!
这家伙也停止运作了，真的就像有人在背后操纵一样。
This one has ceased operating as well. It's as if some unseen puppeteer cut its strings.
No pinning the blame on me this time!
Sweet Dreams Troupe gotta up their game.
所以，虾蟇•忍者，现在阁下能将一切阐明了吗？
Ninja Gama, can you kindly enlighten us on the proceedings thus far?
各位演员也意识到了啊，那就由我来翻开剧本的下一页吧，关于这所折纸大学发生的罪恶——
So, you actors have caught on... Let me reveal the next act in the plot then. We'll be exploring the misdeeds going down at Paperfold University...
各位演员，听说过「模因病毒」吗？
Alright now, dear actors. Ever heard of a memetic virus?
这就是「睡蕉小猴」的真面目？
Is that what Slumbernana Monkey is?
没错。模因污染是一种传播现象，它会影响认知的信息粒子，把受污染者对特定事物的感官变成另一种模样，就像是影片的特效。

You're right. Memetic corruption comes about from the dissemination of data. It alters particles of information picked up by the cognitive module, skewing the sensory perception of certain objects in those that have been corrupted. Much like special effects in a film.
话语、音乐、视频…这些东西都是传播媒介，人类天然对未知的事物带有好奇心，而模因病毒便会趁虚而入。
Words, songs, videos... these are all mediums of transmission. Humans naturally have a curiosity for the unknown, and memetic viruses take advantage of this.
即便在现实中，模因污染也能改变一个人的思想。而在这梦境的世界——便会催生出将人变作猿猴的噩梦。
Memetic corruption is known to influence one's thoughts even in the real world. And in the Dreamscape, they catalyze nightmares that corrupt humans into monkeys.
所以，邪忍先让邪祟们散布装饰过的媒介，以娱乐为掩饰，在诸位忍徒心中植入邪术的种子。
Hence, the evil ninja instructs the evil fiendlings to spread through media, masking it as entertainment to implant the seeds of dark sorcery in the hearts of the ninja initiates.
又谋篡了师长之位，对诸位忍徒的心智施以凌虐，使他们心中的邪术发作。
Misappropriating the role of actual educators gave them the perfect chance to mangle the minds of innocent ninja initiates, only to hasten the growth of those fiendish seeds they sowed.
如此循环往复，折纸村的忍徒就会被邪祟同化，成为邪忍的傀儡…真是一场无心、无情、无慈悲的大阴谋！
And so all ninja initiates of Paperfold Town will succumb to fiendishness, becoming puppets of the evil ninja... What a dispiteous, degenerate, and dastardly ploy!
呃，你们在说什么呢？这也是剧本上的台词吗？
Uh... What are you talking about? Are these lines in the script?
这位演员的台词有些晦涩，但剧情走向大体没错。
This actor's lines may be somewhat cryptic, but yes, the general plot direction is on point.
既然虾蟇•忍者早已洞察真相，为何迟迟不行动呢？
But Ninja Gama, why are you bogged down by inaction when you've long realized the truth behind their pretense?
我只是一介过路导演，怎么敢轻举妄动？要战胜可怕的反派，还得仰赖各位身份显贵的主角。
I'm just a director that stumbled upon a sinister plan. A reckless move on my part can bring dire consequences! It is up to very important stars like you to defeat that hellkite of a villain.
这些蕉师都是由代理校长「蕉授」任命的，不必我多说，去校长室问个清楚吧。期待各位的后续情节哦。

These BananAdvisors were appointed by the acting dean, Profnana. I believe I don't have to make this any more explicit. Go to the dean's office to find the answers you seek. Oh, and keep me updated on how the plot unfolds!
那接下来还有我的戏份吗！
Ooh, what about my part? Do I still have any scenes coming up?
这位演员，你不是很想出演我的影片吗？来这里挑份剧本吧。
You're keen about appearing in my films, aren't you? Come over here and choose a script.
C—Can I really? Thank you so much!!!
加油啊，小演员，我很看好你。
Give it your best shot, fledgling actor. I see great potential in you.
我一定不会让您失望的！
I—I will live up to your expectations!
亲爱的同学们，虽然你们既没有预约也没有敲门，但还是欢迎你们蕉。
What a surprise, my dear students. Hmm, no appointment or a polite knock on the door... but, I welcome you banantheless.
不要再胡枝扯叶了，速速招来——阁下就是御猿•邪忍的邪祟•总长吧！
Cease the shady evasion! I urge you to come clean now! You're Evil Ninja Osaru's Fiendling Chief, aren't you!?
旁边的同学，能帮我翻译一下吗？
Excuse me dear student, could you help me translate that?
简而言之，折纸大学出现了一种模因病毒，正在大肆传播并感染学生们的心智。
The short story is that a memetic virus has broken loose in Paperfold University. It's going around infecting the students' minds as we speak.
蕉授，它就是「睡蕉小猴」，而散布这种病毒的正是你手下的蕉师。
Slumbernana Monkey is that virus, Profnana. And its transmission was orchestrated by none other than your BananAdvisors.
我还以为这堂课能拖得再久一些。
I had thought this class would last a little longer than this.
你的坦白比预想中更快。所以，这果然是原始博士的阴谋？
Your confession came sooner than we expected. So, is this one of Dr. Primitive's schemes?
阴谋？蕉蕉蕉，未免太高看匹诺康尼了。这座只剩下铜臭味的金钱乐园，怎么配得上博士崇高的人类实验？
A scheme? Bana tsk, you're thinking too highly of this place! Penacony is nothing but a cesspool of riches. It will never be worthy of the great Doctor's sublime experiments on humans!
这里只有我，一位「二等研究猿」，来匹诺康尼完成自己的毕业课题：基于「模因」的返祖实验。
Here, it's just me. A second class research ape working in Penacony on my graduation thesis: An atavistic experiment centered around memetic entities.
课题很顺利，这里的人都爱睡蕉小猴，尤其是以学生为代表的年轻人。他们将创造出新的联觉梦境「睡蕉的时刻」，并催化它成长、扩张、甚至进化……

My research is going along smoothly. People here adore Slumbernana Monkey, especially students from the youth demographic group. Soon, they'll create a new Synesthesia Dreamscape, "the Moment of Slumbernana," and foster its growth, expansion, and evolution...
御猿屋戕害天下苍生，只为建立一座百祟•夜行的邪恶国度？
The endless atrocities that Osaru unleashed onto the world... just to build an Evil Realm where a hundred malevolent spirits prowl at night?
这位同学，你的话真的很难懂，不会是在骂我吧？
Girl, I cannot begin to fathom your cryptic speech. It doesn't sound like you're speaking ill of me... Or are you?
也罢，庸人难以理解返祖实验的伟大。在传道解惑前，先来个随堂测验吧：同学们知道香蕉是如何繁殖的吗？
...Never mind. Ordinary folks will never understand the great cause of our atavistic experiment. How about a pop quiz before I clarify your doubts? Who knows how bananas reproduce?
为了保证口感，大多数商品香蕉都是「无性繁殖」。没有种子也没有花粉，需要用相同的根茎培育芽苗。
To maintain their taste, the majority of commercial bananas are produced through "asexual reproduction." Lacking seeds and pollen, they are grown from the same rhizome.
回答正确。五个琥珀纪前，博识学会培育出了一种人类自认完美的香蕉，那便是「金黄睡蕉」。
That's correct. Five Amber Eras ago, the Intelligentsia Guild cultivated a banana species that humans deemed perfect: the golden Slumbernana.
金黄睡蕉迅速统治了水果市场，它营养丰富、味道甜美、表皮还会散发出迷人的金色光泽，让每个星际香蕉园的夜晚都如同「黄金的时刻」一般闪耀。

The golden Slumbernana swiftly dominated the fruit market. Nutritious, sweet, and its peel gives off a mesmerizing golden sheen. It transformed every interstellar banana plantation into a spectacle akin to the Golden Hour at night.
But it eventually became extinct, didn't it?
没错，只能人工繁殖的睡蕉没有进化的可能性，相同的基因赋予了它们相同的弱点。当一种致命的太空真菌随着生产线开始传播……

Exactly. Because it was cultivated by humans, the Slumbernana lacked room for evolution. Having the same set of genes also meant sharing the same vulnerabilities. And when a fatal cosmic fungus wormed its way into the production line...
这一统治寰宇的物种在短短几个月内便消亡了。
The same banana species that reigned over all the others of its kind was scrubbed clean from the entire cosmos in just mere months.
Are you saying that humans will suffer the same fate?
是啊，睡蕉的前身是繁殖力极强的碧绿野蕉。如果没有人为干预，它本应绽放更加多彩的光芒，就像这匹诺康尼一样。

Of course. The golden Slumbernana's predecessor was the highly reproductive jadegreen banana. If not for human intervention, it would have blossomed much more vibrantly over the years, much like Penacony as we know it.
但这里的人们却选择了粗劣的模仿：修筑高楼、建立都市、印刷货币，然后自愿成为宇宙市场中的一块拼图。

It's a pity those on Penacony just had to be second-rate copycats. What with constructing skyscrapers, building cities, printing currencies, and even making the decision to become like the other cogs in the cosmic marketplace.
就像金黄睡蕉一样，一成不变、一触即溃、最后一无是处。
Following the exact path of the golden Slumbernana, stubbornly holding onto the status quo, creating fatal vulnerabilities for themselves, and ultimately becoming useless.
因为它接受了错误的*蕉育*，所以博士要让误入歧途的世界变回充满潜力的胚胎，给予它们再次成长的机会，这就是返祖实验。
Having undergone a flawed Bananenlightenment, the Doctor seeks to return these misguided worlds to their embryonic potential, giving them a fresh chance to develop. This is the atavistic experiment.
然而在下到访过那些星系。
However, I have visited those planets.
在下一颗星一颗星地走过，却找不到任何能开口说话的忍者，全都是邪祟……
As I traveled from one planet to the other, a prevalent but unpalatable observation struck me: Not a single ninja could speak, they had all become fiendlings...
而且你又明明白白地知道，他们不是生来如此。
But I know for a fact that they were not born this way.
刚从你脚边爬过去的猴子，几年前还是个水手，平日里总是自己酿酒喝。
The monkey that scurried past you was once a sailor. He knew how to ferment his own wine, and would do so regularly.
在远处为了个果子和其他猴子打成一片的，是那颗星球上最聪明的人，他曾经知道人要怎么飞到天上去。
The one in the distance, fighting with the other monkeys over a piece of fruit, used to be the smartest person on his planet, even having the knowledge to send people soaring into the sky.
但从今以后，他们就只是猴子。
But from now on... they're monkeys. Just monkeys.
是我的错觉吗？同学，你好像学会正常的说话方式了。
Am I imagining things? Or did you learn how to speak like a normal person?
还是说，此情此景——让你想起从前了？
Or... could it be that this familiar scene reminded you of your past?
博士是天才，他的理想足够崇高，也一定能实现。但平庸者只会沉沦于不切实际的幻想，成为文明进化的赘余。

Given the Doctor's brilliant mind, his ambitions are lofty and are sure to be realized. But the commoners? Hmph, all they do is lose themselves in unrealistic fantasies, becoming an impediment to a civilization's evolutionary progress.
人尽其才，物尽其用。这么久了，还没学会这个知识点吗……
Whether imbued with life or not, everything ought to be used to its full potential. Ah, how long has it been now? I'm surprised that lesson hasn't stuck...
哦？知道我为什么会放任各位在校园里胡闹，甚至一步一步引导你们来这里吗？
Is that so? Ever considered why I allowed you to do as you please on campus? Even going as far as to guide you to me?
折纸大学就是个培养皿，丢掉也不可惜。但如果它能把实验室里的害虫一网打尽…那就是「物尽其用」。
Paperfold University is nothing more than an incubator, no great loss if discarded. But if it can eradicate the pests in the lab, then it'd be used to its full potential.
蕉蕉蕉，时间到了，该下课了。
Bana bana! That's all I have for you. Class dismissed.
Just what do you think you're doing, <color=#dbc291ff>Memokeeper</color>?
亲爱的制片人，您的要求已经全部完成，按照约定，请为我解除这毫无艺术细胞的{RUBY_B#模因病毒}诅咒{RUBY_E#}吧。

I've already met all your demands, dearest producer. Please hold up your end of the deal as we've agreed: Lift this abominable {RUBY_B#memetic virus}curse{RUBY_E#} that stifles my artistic expression.
要求？不不不，芮克先生，把那群难以*蕉化*的顽猴交出来。你才谈得上「完成了要求」。
Demands? I'm afraid not, Mr. Reca. Until you hand over those incorrigible and willful monkeys, you have not met all of my "demands".
这不对啊。我费尽心力帮各位混入学校，妨碍家族监视，又解决了你们最头疼的游侠，现在你还要我交出演员的所有权？

But that's not our deal! I went to great lengths to help you infiltrate the school, disrupted The Family's surveillance, and even dealt with the Ranger who was causing you the most trouble. And now you want me to give up ownership of the actors?
他们都是稀世罕见的好演员，还有许多留待挖掘的故事，我可不能让他们就这么杀青啊。
We're talking exceptional talents that are incredibly rare to come by! They have so many more stories waiting to be unearthed! I can't allow their journey to end here.
芮克先生，我没有在和你商量，我没必要和一位俘虏商量。
Mr. Reca, there is no room for negotiation here. I have no need to negotiate with a captive.
不出三个系统时，你也会和这群学生一样变成睡蕉小猴。不想自己的导演生涯就此结束，就乖乖把他们交出来。
If you don't acquiesce, then in less than three system hours, you'll turn into a Slumbernana Monkey like those students. Hand them over now if your directing career even means anything to you.
NG——我拒绝！蕉授，你知道我为何会落入你们之手吗？
No, I refuse! Profnana, have you ever wondered why I ended up under your control?
能追查到博士的下落，算你有点本事。但偷偷摸摸跟过来还认为不会被发现，未免有些太过傲慢了？
Tracking down the Doctor's whereabouts shows you have some skill. However, believing you could follow us unnoticed was quite presumptuous, wasn't it?
即便以实验动物的标准，你也远远不够资质啊，*大导演*。
Even if we were to need animals for our experiment, you're nowhere near qualified... "great director."
可惜，我铤而走险，一心只为拍摄精彩的{RUBY_B#记忆}影片{RUBY_E#}。从一开始，我就已经做好为艺术献身的准备了，所以你的威胁毫无意义。

What a pity. I put my life on the line just so I could make this wonderful {RUBY_B#memory}film{RUBY_E#} a reality. I decided a long time ago that I'd do anything for art, so your threat means nothing to me.
对于剧组，开机就要承担风险，真正的导演哪怕让字幕里的名字加上示亡号，也绝不会让摄影机停下来。

Every film crew knows full well the risks they run the moment filming begins. And in turn, a dedicated director would never stop rolling the cameras, even if it meant having to insert an obelus next to a crew or cast member's name in the credits!
说到底，你也是一只为没用的梦想挣扎的可怜猴啊。
In the end, you too are just a pitiable monkey, struggling for worthless dreams.
那你就做好献身的准备吧。
Be prepared to sacrifice yourself then.
瞧。乱破也在这里，这下咱们和她想一块儿去了。
Look! Rappa's here too. Looks like she's thinking along the same lines as us!
怎么能在课堂上使用暴力啊！
You're not supposed to use violence in the classroom!
这是*蕉育*！暴力也是一种*蕉育*！
It's Bananenlightenment! And violence is one way to enforce that!
这下事情闹大了…一下子来了好多看热闹的人。
Looks like things blew up real quick... Everyone's flocked here to see what's going on.
这玩偶…简直就跟活物一样。
Does this toy... have a life of its own?
Isn't this the way to the Fortune Academy?
乱破？她什么时候跑前面去的。
Rappa? When did she get ahead of us?
这气氛…真的是在上营销课么？
This atmosphere... is this... really a marketing class?
有效果了。它似乎要带我们去什么地方，跟上吧。
It's working. It seems to be leading us somewhere. Let's catch up.
（怎么感觉今天一直在追猴子……）
(Why does it feel like I've been on a wild monkey chase all day...)
是百货•忍徒和虫豸•邪祟——
It's Ninja Initiate Merchant and Fiendling Pest—
等等，先听听他们在说什么。
Hold on. Let's listen in on their conversation first.
这些蕉师绝不是普通的教职员工…你们的目的是什么？
There's no chance those BananAdvisors are actual faculty members... Just what is your goal?
蕉蕉蕉，当然是用睡蕉小猴为人们带来幸福蕉！
Bana mwuhaha! Why, spreading joy with Slumbernana Monkey, of course!
想必这位谐乐蕉师也是幕后黑手的同僚。另外我有种预感，那位芮克先生也不简单。
Charmony BananAdvisor must be in league with the mastermind behind this. And I can't help but feel like there's more than meets the eye with Mr. Reca.
在下亦有同感。飞龙•忍者果真心思缜密。
I concur with you. Ninja Hiryū is a punctilious ninja indeed.
你们这些差生注定不能成才，还是乖乖享受睡蕉小猴的幸福吧！
Hopeless students like you are destined to be nothing! Just accept Slumbernana Monkey's grace of a happy life!
注定？多么可笑。「忍者的利刃并非不能斩断因果，不如说，我等必须斩断因果！」
...Destined? Hmmph, all nonsense! "The ninja's blade can and must sever the chain of cause and effect!"
对…对！「厉鬼啊，在我们的忍法面前化作飞烬吧！」
R-Right! "Evil spirit, be reduced to ashes before our ninjutsu!"
天守阁对峙的时刻到了，危情刻不容缓，各位请用上自己的忍•脚步吧。
A castle showdown looms ahead of us, fellow ninjas. We ought to make haste with ninja speed.
"Hatred is the frailty of the weak."
这就是我从睡蕉小猴身上学到的一切……
And that is everything that Slumbernana Monkey taught me...
仔细想想吧，诸位，我们所感受到的欢欣、悲伤、灵光一闪…它们近乎全部依赖于这副身体中，化学物质的微妙变化。
Think about this, everyone: The emotions we experience, be it joy, sadness, or an epiphany... every one of them is produced from a subtle shift in chemical composition within this vessel of ours.
略施手段，它们就会产生、消逝，你甚至能让自己在短时间内性情大变。
With some manipulation, we should be able to easily create or erase emotions. That means triggering a sudden change in your own temperament isn't out of the question!
所以，这就是我的结论了：任何深思熟虑的行为，并不比「跳起来」这个简单的动作高级多少。
So here's my conclusion: Even if a behavior is generated after thorough deliberation, it is no more sophisticated than the simple act of "jumping."
你要去哪，好不容易把你内推进来，别再做惹眼的事啦。至少…别再掏枪指着别人？
Where are you going? It wasn't easy to get in, so don't do anything that'll draw unnecessary attention. At least... stop pointing your gun at people?
多谢了，无名客姐们。没想到你在这话语权还挺大——星穹列车开拓到猴子身上了？
Appreciate it, Nameless gal. You have quite the authority 'round here, eh? Has the Astral Express begun to take on monkeys?
我也不想那么有天赋嘛。但助蕉非说本姑娘是个优秀人才，一上来就给我发了级别很高的社员证……
I wasn't expecting that either, but the Assistananas insist I'm a great talent. They even gave me a membership card with a high level of clearance...
呃，在主张放弃思考的社团很有天赋？
...Wait, talented for a club that advocates the abandonment of all thought!?
也没说错吧？姐们，刚才你听得都走不动道了。
Ain't wrong, am I? You were so darn mesmerized by their speech back there.
听听而已嘛，我又没信。他们说话都不押韵，肯定不靠谱。
Well... I was just listening to what they had to say. It's not like they managed to convince me anyway. Plus, if they don't talk in rhyme, it's probably just nonsense.
所以…你是怎么找到这的？总不能是因为喜欢小猴吧。
So, what brought you here? You don't look like you're a fan of these monkeys.
是啊，他香蕉的，巡海游侠都这样，见到猴子就恨不得翻个跟头。
Why not? Galaxy Rangers are forkin' monkey fans. We go bananas at the mere sight of them.
所以…这位先生其实是在追查什么通缉犯吗？难怪穿得像个警长……
So... He's on the hunt for some kind of fugitive? That explains why he's dressed like a sheriff...
啊，没有没有。其实…他自己就是通缉犯？
Ah, no, no. I guess... you could say he IS a fugitive?
你慢慢跟她解释吧。我先自己转一圈。
Yada yada, tell her my life story then. I'm gonna go check the place out.
没事啦，他只是看上去凶巴巴的。听丹恒说，他动不动就喵喵叫呢。
Aww, there's nothing to be afraid of! He just looks a little scary, but Dan Heng says he's more bark than bite.
哎呀…这位朋友，你还真是冒昧。
Ah my friend... you really are bold.
你怎么知道我弄到了一张超级稀有的「蕉版卡」？还是烫金卡面！
How'd you find out I got my hands on an ultra rare BanaCard? Look, it's even embossed in gold!
Hey brother, you ain't right in the head.
还真让你说着啦，自从有了它，我可是茶不思饭不想……
You're right. Ever since I got it, I haven't been able to think of anything else...
半个奇怪的地方都没有——这可真香蕉的怪。
Not a single thing around here makes sense — this is downright bananas.
无名客姐们，借一步说话？
Hey, Nameless gal. Can we have a little talk over yonder?
借一步？有什么不能在这聊的……
Just me? Why can't we just talk here...?
啊…没关系的，三月同学，你们先聊吧。我去那边等你。
Um, it's okay. You guys go ahead. I'll wait for you over there, March.
尽管语气一如往常，但匆匆跑远时，蒙塔娜的神情中仍带着几分紧张……
Although her tone is normal, there was still a hint of nervousness in Montana's expression as she hurriedly ran off...
What are you up to? I only just convinced her everything's fine, you know...
不然呢，真把哥们当哥们了？
Awful chummy with someone you just met, ain'tcha friendo?
别装了，大名鼎鼎的无名客，你们那边进展如何，什么时候盯上原始博士的？
Alright, great Nameless one, drop the act already. What's the deal on your side? When did you guys start layin' eyes on Dr. Primitive?
咳咳，是啊，来交换下情报吧，你先！
Ahem. Oh yeah, that's right. Let's swap intel then. You first!
想讲清楚原始博士的事迹并不需要太多时间……
It doesn't take much time to tell Dr. Primitive's stories...
原来…果然是这样啊，不出所料。
Oh, I see... Uh-huh, exactly as we suspected.
那你在流梦礁查到什么没？
So, did you find anything at Dreamflux Reef?
什么都没有，但无所谓。这种事我见得多了，解决办法也只有一种。都是见过大场面的人，用不着我多说了吧？
There ain't a thing here, but who cares. Seen this plenty of times, and there's only one solution. We've all rid this rodeo, so I reckon I don't need to spell it out.
准备把这儿砸了吧！/带我成为高级社员。
Prepare to tear this place apart! / Help me become a high-ranking member.
呃…我只是想开个玩笑，怎么你还开了个更大的？
Uh... I was just trying to make a joke, but you took it even further?
这不是个香蕉玩笑！换成公司狗，我现在就让他们排队等枪毙。
You're rufflin' my bananas now. That wasn't a joke! If it were the IPC lackeys, I'd have them lined up right this instant for a one-way ticket to other side!
但这地转来转去净是些孩子，让我为难他们？原始博士没少干过推人当靶子的烂事，类似的套中一次就够了。
But they only planted kids in this place. I can't be using my ways on them. It's not the first time Dr. Primitive's used others as scapegoats. I ain't gonna step on the same rake twice.
可你现在不还是在往陷阱里跳嘛。
But aren't you doing that right now? Falling for the trap.
哈，见过手枪炸膛吗？只要能用对时候，强过给人一梭子。
Hah, ever seen a squib load? When timed right, it's more effective than unloadin' a full clip.
我是不知道这社团背后到底是什么香蕉，但从流梦礁的杂音来看，它肯定对这地方很感兴趣。咱们真动手，它坐不住的。

I got no clue what kinda monkey business this club's up to, but I know from the static noise at Dreamflux Reef that they're sure as heck interested in Penacony. They'll definitely step in if we raise the roof offa this place.
如果你没有其他法子，就按我说的做吧，优秀会员。
Unless you've gotta better idea you can think of, then let's do it my way, star member.
唔，倒也有个主意。总之你先别急，咱们再去会会蒙塔娜——记得要温柔点啊。
Hmm, I do have an idea... sort of. Just hold your horses. Let's go back and meet Montana first. Remember — be nice!
Why did it run off? Aww, I wanted to play with it too!
正好正好，重新介绍一下。他叫波提欧，之前有些误会啦，其实他很友善的。
Yeah! Let's do this again — the right way. This is Boothill. You guys started off on the wrong foot. He's actually a really nice person.
没事啦，我后来又想了想，匹诺康尼人来人往，出现什么样的人都不该大惊小怪才是。
Oh, don't worry about me. I thought about it earlier. Penacony sees a ton of visitors and transiting travelers. It's only normal to meet people of all sorts of background here.
是啊，我都有那么几次被通缉…不对，十几次？算了。
Yeah, I was wanted on a few occasions too... Ehe, maybe a dozen times? Never mind, that's not important now.
还是说正事吧。你说睡蕉社今天有大人物的讲座，怎么样，我们赶上了吗？
Let's talk about the Slumbernana Association. There's an important seminar scheduled for today, right? Are we in time for that?
你又搞错了，三月同学，可比讲座厉害多了！真要说…那可是「显圣」。
Oh, March! You remembered wrong again. This is far grander than a seminar! I guess... you can call it a theophany?
接下来，我们能见到「真正的睡蕉小猴」。
In just a bit, we'll get to see the actual Slumbernana Monkey in the flesh.
他香蕉的，这玩意还有盗版？
Holy bananas... There are rip-offs of this thing?
不是不是，睡蕉小猴几乎是在一夜间爆火的，对于它的起源，人们众说纷纭。
Haha, that's not it. Slumbernana Monkey went viral overnight, but people have different opinions on how the fad began.
但无论如何，唯一的源头肯定存在，我们马上就能见到了——没有被胡乱加上各种定义，回归本真的睡蕉小猴。

No matter what people choose to believe, there has to be a Slumbernana Monkey that started it all, and we're about to see it! The original Slumbernana Monkey in all its unfiltered glory, free from all sorts of stereotypes.
没听懂，但应该很厉害吧。
I'm not quite following, but it sounds impressive, I guess.
校园里也有参加过前几次显圣的学生。
We have a few other students from campus who attended a few theophanies before.
What did they say about it?
什么都没说。但他们看起来…嗯，像是去过了世界的尽头。
Nothing, really. But they had this look... Um, like they'd been to the world's end.
他们无一例外都变得非常幸福，看起来真令人羡慕。
Every single one of them looked like they were in a state of absolute bliss. I want to feel like that too.
这倒是有意思，我非得会会它不可。还得一会儿是吧？
Well, ain't that somethin'. I reckon I gotta see it myself. Still got a bit to wait, huh?
很难形容出对方在人群中究竟有何不同——他看了过来，眼神中的清澈令人惊叹。
It's hard to describe what exactly sets him apart in the crowd — he looked over, and the clarity in his eyes was astonishing.
这个人似乎不准备给出任何回应。
It seems this person isn't planning to respond.
Hey, you can see me, right?
对这种毫无来由的冒犯，对方袒露出笑意，然后不再言语。
In response to this unprovoked offense, she revealed a smile and then fell silent.
怎么，看个电视麻烦成这样？
What's this now, watchin' TV gotta be this complicated?
这就是蒙塔娜说的显圣，说是什么…见到睡蕉小猴的唯一方法，就是和助蕉链接起来。
This is the theophany that Montana told us about. The only way to see Slumbernana Monkey is apparently through forming some kind of connection with the Assistanana.
久等了。哦，又多了一位想见睡蕉小猴的社员吗？
Thank you for waiting. Oh, another member hoping to see Slumbernana Monkey?
噫——又想浑水摸鱼，不够了解睡蕉小猴可是链接不上的哦。
Tsk, trying to worm your way in again, huh? But you won't be able to establish a connection if you know nothing about Slumbernana Monkey~
这位先生…虽然看着很陌生，但应该不是普通的社员吧？
You... look unfamiliar. But you don't seem like a regular member either.
没错，你们说我很有天分。
That's right. Been told I'm quite talented.
Huh? What talent do you have...?
我是能人级会员，编号<unbreak>244</unbreak>，三月七。
啊！原来是您，早有耳闻，您有潜力成为真正迈入本源的人，请到我身边来吧。
Oh, it's you! Yes, I've heard about you. You have the potential to truly reach the source. Please, come over to me.
Not so fast! What are you up to this time?
脑子不好的人接招，脑子清醒的人还击。
The dimmer of us two plays the bait, the other get ready to fight.
真的假的，难道他真的很有天分？
Really now? So he's actually talented?
可惜的是，痛觉尚在——无论何时何地，都最适合用来唤回某人的痛觉，此刻尚在。
Unfortunately, the sense of pain remains — whenever and wherever, it's appropriate to use it to bring someone back to their senses.
赶上了！你没有被变成那样！
Phew, I made it in time! Thank goodness you didn't end up like that!
没时间解释了，快来帮忙！
No time to explain. Hurry, I need your help!
我去把蒙塔娜也叫醒，动作快点——
This is my grace, Miss Nameless.
而你这位游侠朋友，你亲手打断了他获得幸福的过程。
As for your Ranger friend though, you just single-handedly destroyed his path to happiness.
Stay where you are. Don't come any closer.
当然，诉诸武力并非我的目的，我来此是为了「证明」，而非征服。
Naturally, resorting to violence is not my intention. I'm only here to prove something, not to subjugate.
...is in line with the desires of humans.
三月七…你这是要干什么？
March 7th... What are you trying to do?
不是吧…蒙塔娜，你还没搞清楚情况吗？你身后那是个坏家伙啊！
Gosh... Montana! Don't you see what's going on? The bad guy's the one behind you!
你…怎么能这么说？我还以为你也是真心喜欢睡蕉小猴的……
H—How could you say that? And here I thought you loved Slumbernana Monkey from the bottom of your heart...
Let's get out of this place now, hurry!
请便吧，我期待您为我的证明补上最后的一环。
As you wish. I look forward to you providing the last link in my proof.
搞什么鬼啊，怎么还主动拦路？
What's your problem! Why are you blocking our way!?
您想要离开当然无所谓。可是，您怎么能擅自带走我的观察样本呢？
You're free to leave, if you wish. But not with my subject. He's still under observation.
没错，肉体经由改造，异于常人，无法在物质层面经受退化。心性坚如钢铁，绝不动摇，能将任何腐蚀嗤之以鼻。
Mm-hmm. Unlike typical humans, his modified body is impervious to physical deterioration. With a steely grit and determination that never wavers, he can easily resist all forms of corruption.
这样一位巡海游侠…我能让他变成什么样子，这非常值得观察。
Ah, a Galaxy Ranger like him... It'll be worthwhile to see what I can turn him into.
我猜您之所以畏首畏尾，只想立刻求援，是认定这些由人类转变而来的小猴在失去心智后，是由我控制的。
Let me guess. You want to call for help right away because you're convinced these monkeys, formerly humans who have lost their minds, are under my command.
既然如此，您又凭什么认为…自己真的唤醒了那位游侠呢？
If that's the case, why do you believe... that you really woke up the Ranger?
巡海游侠先生，麻烦你了，向这位小姐开枪吧。
Mr. Galaxy Ranger, would you please fire a shot at this young lady?
在匆忙转身时，她已经做好了最坏的打算，就算看见一只睡蕉小猴端着枪对自己扣动扳机，她也不会太过惊讶。
As she turns in a hurry, she's already prepared for the worst. She wouldn't be too surprised even if she sees a Slumbernana Monkey aiming a gun at her and pulling the trigger.
然而波提欧给出的回应，还是远远地超出了她的想象——
However, Boothill's response is far beyond her expectations —
可是，这位先生，杀人可是犯法的，更何况是对着这么一位美丽的女士？
But sir, killin' folks is against the law, especially when it's a lovely lady like her.
伴随着从未听闻过的语调，呈现在三月七面前的，是一副在忆域中才有可能出现的奇景。
Accompanied by an unusual tone of voice, what appears before March 7th is a fantastical scene that can only exist in the realm of memories.
呃…该不会现在，我变成主角了吧？因为这把枪？
I'm the star of the show now? All 'cause of this here gun?
它看着是不错，但用它取了谁的命？我可没这意思。
It's a nice gun alright. But using it to take a life? I have no such intention.
要不，两位的恩怨自行解决，我先走一步？
How about the two of you settle your own scores, while I'll be on my way?
等等，你想让我见证的就是这个？
Wait a minute... Is this what you wanted me to see?
没错，你应该也猜得到，毕竟只是一场空梦，即便在梦中变成猴子，人们在现实中的身体，也不会产生生理性的退化。
That's. Right. ...This is merely a hollow dream, so even if they turned into monkeys here, their physical bodies in the real world will not be subjected to any biological deterioration.
而他，凭借自己坚韧无比的心智，成为了更加可贵的样本。他的心智没有被彻底毁灭，反而……
The Ranger's extraordinarily staunch and unyielding mind made him an even more valuable specimen to be studied. His mind hasn't been completely wiped out, instead...
…站在这里的既不是一只猴子，也不是一位巡海游侠。
...he is neither a monkey, nor is he a Galaxy Ranger.
而是多年以前，家乡仍未被毁于一旦时，无忧无虑地生活在草原上的他，一个「过去的波提欧」。
He's a young Boothill, one from many years back. Back when his homeland hadn't been ravaged, when he lived as a carefree child in the grasslands.
A partial regression... How very interesting indeed.
依照记忆推算，这副模样距离他第一次对着土匪扣动扳机，至少还差着十年光阴。
If memory serves, this version of him is at least ten years removed from the older Boothill when he first fired a shot at a bandit.
多么神奇啊，无论是这美梦剧团，还是我本尊，他只需一枪就能了结。
Miraculous... Be it the Sweet Dreams Troupe or myself, he can end it all with just one shot.
但扣动扳机的力量…偏偏来自心灵，而非血肉之躯。现在，他不过是个孩子，偏偏就不懂如何开出这一枪。
But it just so happens that the decision to pull the trigger has to be made by his soul rather than his body. The child version of him now is completely incapable of firing his own gun.
好了，牛仔先生，请到这里来吧。现在我们来完成你最后的课题——
Alright, Mr. Cowboy, come to me. Let's finish your final lesson now...
一个站在原始博士这边的巡海游侠，一位经由培养而诞生的背叛者…这值得再多写几篇论文。
A Galaxy Ranger that stands on the side of Dr. Primitive, a traitor born from nurture... this warrants several more research papers.
安静些，小姐，请留意旁听课程时的素养。
Be quiet, young lady, and mind your manners while class is in progress.
当然，基于你的记忆…你最后的记忆停留在哪里？在放牧，还是在劈柴？
Yes, of course. This dream is based off your memories... What do you last remember? Were you herding? Or chopping firewood?
都不对，是在吃热乎乎的炖菜，怪了，我怎么睡着的？
Neither of those. I was eating some piping hot stew. That's strange... How did I fall asleep?
还有大把事情呢，一会儿得是被尼克踢醒了。
There's a lot of things I should be doing. I guess Nick's gonna kick me awake soon.
哈哈，你有很长时间没提起过这个名字了。也对，对此刻的你来说，公司所做的一切可都还是遥远的未来。

Haha, you haven't brought up that name in quite a while. But I suppose that's only right considering where you are on the timeline. For you at this point, everything the IPC does is still in a far-off future.
哈，在胡说八道些什么，真是个怪梦。
Hah, what a strange dream. Everything sounds like nonsense.
总之，你该回到现实了。感觉如何，从梦里醒来会让你觉得痛苦吗？
It doesn't matter. It's time for you to come back to reality. How does it feel? Does waking up from a dream bring you misery?
可惜你是个梦里的人，看不见我熟悉的那片大地，它美得让你心甘情愿死在那儿。
It's a shame you're stuck in a dream, can't lay eyes on the land I love. It's so gorgeous, you'd be willin' to die right there.
想不到你年纪轻轻，竟会用上这种比喻。
It's hard to believe someone so young would use that kind of analogy.
这可不奇怪，人总得学着安慰自己，其中就包括怎么看淡生死。
Ain't nothin' strange about that, people gotta find ways to soothe their souls, part of that is comin' to terms with life and death.
阿尔冈-阿帕歇有句俗话：「死亡是最公平的爱护」。
There's a saying from Aeragan-Epharshel: "Death is the fairest form of grace."
对于老好人，死亡能保全他的高洁。对于狡诈恶徒，死亡会干脆利落地结束一切。
For the good-hearted, death keeps their purity intact. For the cunning scoundrels, death ends things clean and quick.
这样啊。也就是说，你并不害怕死亡？那么请向我伸出手吧。
I see. Does that mean you're not afraid of death? If so, please extend your hand out for me.
想来，你一定愿意将这种「最公平的爱护」播撒到宇宙的每一个角落去……
I suppose you're perfectly willing to apply the "fairest form of grace" to every corner of the universe?
In the name of Dr. Primitive, that is.
这就是最后的教导了，我会让你彻底领会他的哲学。
This is my final lesson for you. You shall thoroughly understand his philosophy.
而一颗星星，也将就此…可怜地熄灭。
And with that, a star will pitifully fizzle out.
没问题，老师。不过我还有一件事想说……
No problem, Teacher. But there's something else I have to tell you...
我担心自己打不准，但既然抓住了你，那就不会了。
I was worried about missing my shot... but now that I've gotten ahold of you, I reckon I won't.
这…怎么可能…「退化」明明已经发生了……
H—How's this possible...? The regression should've occurred already...
呼…知道吗，刚才我还一直担心自己搞错了呢！
Phew... Wanna know something? I was worried I had it all wrong just now!
但现在没问题了，恶徒死前才会问「为什么」。
But now, there ain't no problem, 'cause only an evildoer asks "why" before he dies.
我可不聋啊。你们聊那么大声的时候，就没想过我分得清善恶？
I ain't deaf, alright? While you were yappin' so loud, did it ever cross your mind I could tell good from evil?
还真像尼克说的一样，复仇不用找借口，就像世界上只有一件事不用学——
It's as Nick said: Revenge needs no excuses, just like how there's one thing in the world that doesn't need to be taught...
Taking a shot at bad guys.
怎么会这样…你明明还只是个孩子……
How did things take such a turn...? You're just a child...
就算是天生坏种，第一次做这种事…也该有心理负担……
Even for someone born with a bad nature, the first time doing something like this should weigh heavily on their conscience...
是么？那我想你误会了一点。
Is that so? Well, I reckon you got that wrong.
有那么一种本能，满手杀债的通缉犯有，从没开过枪的牛仔小子也有，二者没有任何区别……
Be it a wanted criminal with the blood of many on their hands or a young cowboy who's never fired a gun, both share a common instinct in every sense of the word...
...And that's to put a bullet in anything evil, muddle-fudger!
这就是死的另一件好事，管你有什么苦衷和理念，我都犯不着浪费时间听。
That's another good thing about dyin'. Whatever your excuses and ideas are, I ain't gotta waste time listenin' to 'em.
你是说已经结束的事，还是现在才要开始的事？
You referrin' to what's finished, or what's only just beginnin'?
现在才要开始？啊…对哦，得去找人帮忙才行，还得抓紧时间帮你看看脑子。
The one that's about to begin? Oh... right! I should go get help. You need to get your head checked, like, right now.
Get my head checked? What in forkin' hell...
联觉信标也好了？他宝贝的太宝了个贝的好啦！宝贝！
My Synesthesia Beacon's back to normal? Dagnabbit, that's forkin' amazing! Hot diggity fudge!
咦？意思是说，你把这东西打烂后，就立刻恢复正常了？
Huh? So you're saying everything went back to normal once you smashed this thing to pieces?
哦，难怪那些助蕉要一对一教学……
I see. No wonder those Assistananas only want to teach students one on one...
我就知道，有时候事情就是简单得要命，人犯不着那么聪明。
I had a hunch, sometimes it's just dead simple, don't gotta be a genius.
走吧，无名客，用不着叫援兵了，既然四处开枪就能解决这档子事儿……
Follow me, Nameless. No need for reinforcements, seein' as how a few bullets will clear this up...
他宝贝的，匹诺康尼还能有人比我更擅长？
Forkin' hell, you think you can find a better shot than me in Penacony?
波提欧先生，现在见面可还不是时候。
It's not yet time for us to meet, Mr. Boothill.
It's you? Get over here, you shirthead!
没错，各位社员，接下来将要发生的一切并非终结。
That's right, fellow members. Everything that's about to happen next isn't the end for us.
以流梦礁作为起点，美丽的世界将会降临，而他的目光，也会投向我们一同铸就的伟业。
With Dreamflux Reef as our starting point, a beautiful world shall descend upon all. And he will eventually cast his gaze upon us and the grand cause that we've forged together.
Grand...? Grand in what way, muddle-fudger?
来！都朝我看！我就明说了吧，这就是个宝贝的阴谋。
Alright, folks! Eyes on me! Now listen here: This whole thing is a muddle-fudgin' scheme!
现在都躲远点，犯傻无所谓，识相点儿。
Go, scurry off and hide. Ain't no harm in bein' foolish, but know when to steer clear.
又是你们，之前的事也就算了，但在普利蒙蕉授面前诋毁睡蕉小猴…你们知道自己在干什么吗？
You two again? I can forget everything else you've done, but slandering the name of Slumbernana Monkey before Profnana Primon? Do you even know what you're doing?
Montana, would you please just hear me out?
得了吧，你怎么还觉得他们能听进去？
Save it. You really think you can still convince them?
游侠先生，或许回归原始……
Mr. Ranger, perhaps going back to our origins—
谁问你了？话我只说一遍——你有什么哲学和苦衷我都懒得听。
Who asked you? I'm only gonna say this once — I ain't interested in hearin' your philosophies or sob stories.
你是个狡诈恶徒，你挨一枪一样会死，而我现在就握着那把枪。
You're a dastardly evildoer who'll cease to exist once a bullet's put into you. And guess what? I just so happen to be holdin' a gun right now.
既然所有的事都这么简单，那我也犯不着太聪明，懂了吧……
Since everything's turned out to be so simple, there's no need to use too much of my intellect. You catch my drift?
小可爱，我不是来给你们上课的……
See, I'm not here to teach a class, shirtbrain...
Hey, hold up! Where are you heading off to again?
这边！你怎么呆头呆脑的，没睡醒？
This way! Why do you seem so out of it? Haven't you woken up yet?
既然你修改过我的联觉信标，小可爱，附赠你个秘密。
I'll let you in on a secret, lil' fudgehead. For tampering with my Synesthesia Beacon.
我要一枪「爱」死你，这一句还真没被篡改过——我真这么觉得。
I'm gonna put a bullet in ya! And if you think this is the faulty Beacon talking, no shirtball, I actually mean it.
死亡是最公平的爱护，尤其是对你这种会越变越坏的小可爱。
Death is the fairest form of grace, especially for muddle-fudgers like you who'll only become worse forms of evil with time.
Prepare to tear this place apart!
Help me become a high-ranking member.
可惜的是，感官隔绝得太快了些，他没能来得及听到少女的疑问，并以此重新斟酌自己的冒险。
Unfortunately, the sensory isolation happened too quickly. He didn't have time to hear the girl's question and reconsider his adventure.
"The answer is simple, Miss, this gentleman here..."
「比在场的任何人都更希望回到过去。」
"He wants to visit the past more than anyone else in the room."
What's the big fudgin' idea here, is this all there is?
哼。我见过最破的酒吧也要比这儿气派，你们管这叫显圣？
Hmph. I've seen rundown saloons fancier than this place. You call this a theophany?
营造美好而又虚假的前景，那是拙劣的手段，和睡蕉小猴想要传达给人们的精神截然相反。
Crafting an attractive but deceptive vision is a crude method, entirely opposite to the values that the Slumbernana Monkey aims to share with people.
有很多社员到过这里，试图得到些什么，真理、幸福、平静…无非就是这些。
Many other members before you have come here seeking something. But these tend to be the usual... truth, happiness, peace, and the like.
可惜这里没有答案，只有一个疑问——「您会因此更加不幸吗？」
Unfortunately, there are no answers here, only one question: "Will this make you worse off?"
别担心，我会细致地为您讲解。
Have patience. I will explain everything in detail.
Boothill: Just One Stalk of Malt
"Nuh-uh, don't pull that nonsense on me. A classic will always be a classic."
「话不能这么说，哥们，偶尔也要来点新的。」
"Now, hold on there, pardner. Sometimes you gotta try somethin' new."
无论何时，自我审视都至关重要。
Introspection is key, no matter the hour.
看——这就是面对这个问题，您脑海中浮现的思绪。可惜，无论怎么选，似乎都会留下遗憾。
You see, these are the thoughts that come to your mind when you were given that question. Sadly, it appears that whichever option you choose, there will be some lingering regret.
所以，我们来设想一种现实中不存在的情境——
With that, let's go on to imagine a scenario that doesn't hold true in reality...
就在两人的注视下，两道思绪瞬间消失，不留一丝痕迹……
Under the gaze of both, the two streams of thought vanishes instantly, leaving no trace behind...
如果那种对饮品的依赖从一开始就不存在，这个问题自然也不会产生，连带着因此产生的两种思绪也一并消失。
If the dependence on the drink was never there to begin with, this problem would naturally not exist, and the resulting thoughts would also disappear.
请问——「您会因此更加不幸吗？」
Here's a question: "Will this make you worse off?"
（…他香蕉的，怎么回事？还真的一点想喝的念头都没了。）
(...Holy bananas, what's gotten into me? He's right, I don't have the urge to drink at all.)
（敢这么乱翻我的脑子，难怪联觉信标会变成这鬼样。这破东西做不到这事，它背后的混蛋在哪？）
(Messin' around in my head like that, no wonder the Synesthesia Beacon's all screwed up. No, this busted thing can't do it alone. So who's the scoundrel behind all this?)
那可真是一道无穷无尽的怒火。
I see. That is one vast and endless wall of rage you have there.
既然知道，开口前就先过过脑子，别引火烧身，香蕉。
Since you know, think before you speak, don't go askin' for trouble, ya banana.
别心急，睡蕉小猴不会讲什么宽恕或放下的大道理，那实在令人生厌。
Calm yourself. Slumbernana Monkey wouldn't preach about forgiveness or burying the hatchet. Now that's something even I'd find annoying.
它当然会支持您亲手复仇，就像现在这样——
Instead, it'd support you taking vengeance into your own hands... Just like this—
废话，打假靶子会让你有兴致？
What a load of hogwash, you reckon takin' aim at phony targets is gonna get your blood pumpin'?
我理解。但解气向来能让人放松，而人在放松时，才更容易接受一些逆耳的忠言。
I understand, but venting your anger can help relieve the tension you built up. And when that happens, you'll be less averse to accepting unpalatable advice.
现在，和刚才一样，设想一种现实中不存在的情境——
Now, just like before, imagine a scenario that doesn't hold true in reality...
一个为了复仇而活着的人，如果失去了仇恨，会发生什么？
For a person who has made revenge their sole purpose in life, what would happen if their hatred were to vanish?
他香蕉的，你到底在讲什么歪理？
Rottin' bananas, what wacky theory are you trying to prove?
但…怎么回事，我现在感觉还不赖。是呢，谁香蕉在乎？
Well... what the heck, I actually feel pretty good right now. Yeah... who banana fudgin' cares about revenge!?
很好，您真的很有悟性，那让我们继续下一堂课吧……
Excellent. You're very perceptive. Let's move on to the next lesson then...
当然，我也明白，仇恨不是那么容易被抹去的事物。
I know very well hatred isn't something that can be easily erased.
这会是最艰难的一课，所以我会陪在你的身边。接下来……
This will be your toughest lesson, but I'll be with you throughout. Now then...
如果了断一切因缘，忘记你和世间的一切联系……
If you end all connections and forget everything that ties you to the world...
游侠先生，你会因此更加不幸吗？
Will this make you worse off, Mr. Ranger?
这是决定性的一刻，那个名为波提欧的男人心知肚明。
This is a decisive moment, and the man named Boothill knows it well.
或者…那个曾经名为波提欧的男人。
Or rather, the man that was once known as Boothill.
我…不太清楚你在说什么。不过…你看上去挺有意思。
I... ain't quite sure what you're talkin' about. But... you sure seem mighty fascinatin'.
初次见面，哥们，怎么称呼？
Nice to meet ya, pardner. What's your name?
虽然不是初次见面，不过……
This isn't the first time we've met, but...
你可以称我为「普利蒙蕉授」。
You can call me Profnana Primon.
No, I'm just a research ape.
至于你…很快就会被我写进研究报告了。
And you... you'll soon be mentioned in my research report.
要摆平大学里的闹剧轻而易举，重点从来都是这里，流梦礁。如果不是为了抹杀你这个变数，我不必特意放慢脚步。

Handling the commotion at the university is easy, the main concern has always been here, Dreamflux Reef. If it weren't for the need to eliminate you as a variable, I wouldn't have purposely slowed down.
但现在，这边的课程也结束了。
And with that, the class here has come to an end.
动起来吧，同学。我会在终点等你，为你的人生…揭开新章。
Get a move on, dear student. I'll be waiting for you at the end, to unveil... a new chapter of your life.
所谓「智识」，是一种常人无法承受的诅咒……
Erudition is but an affliction that the average person cannot bear...
黑暗在阒寂中覆过万物，即使无法再听见，似乎也猜得到，此时是怎样一句话正在回荡——
Darkness envelops everything in silence. Even though no sound can be heard, it's easy to imagine what words are echoing at that moment—
「即使失去注视万物的能力，你也不会变得更加不幸。」
"Even if you lose the ability to see everything, you won't be any less happy."
无论从任何角度来看，男人终究棋差一招，这个他主动迈入的陷阱，偏偏熄灭了他准备用以炸膛的枪火。
No matter how you look at it, the man is always one step behind. The trap he willingly walked into has extinguished the very firepower he intended to use.
因此，在找到了自己的宿敌之后，他的下场显而易见——和曾经为人的那些存在一样，就此变成猴子的样貌。
Thus, after finding his nemesis, his fate is clear — just like those who were once human, he too will transform into a monkey.
比如…如果我要求您戒掉麦芽果汁，您首先会想到什么？
For example... if I asked you to give up malt juice, what would be your first thought?
当然是喝上一杯，对吧？此时此刻，您也是这么想的。
You'll want to get a drink before that, won't you? That should be the exact thought in your head right now.
接下来，让我们把目光投向一些更复杂的问题。
Moving on, let's turn our attention toward issues that are a little more complicated...
比如您的「仇恨」，对公司的仇恨。
Say, your hatred for the IPC.
命运将时间如拉面般拉长，忍之都在御猿•邪忍的摧折下有如奈落地狱，其惨状令大岚神也不禁合眸长叹……

Destiny elongates time, in the same way ramen noodles are stretched. The Ninja Capital has turned into an abyssal hell under the devastation of Evil Ninja Osaru. Even the mighty Lan would rather close THEIR eyes to the capital's sorry state and let out a long sigh...
而最后的忍者，缭乱•忍者AKA乱破，在苦茶大师门下历经十年苦修，百般忍法无所不通，万字真言倒背如流。

The only remaining ninja, Dazzling Ninja AKA Rappa, has trained an entire decade under the tutelage of Master Kucha to be adept in a wide variety of ninjutsu, gaining also the ability to recite lengthy mantras fluently.
可苦茶大师明白，唯有令乱破接受其他忍侠的教导，成为践行无上忍道的「缭乱•忍侠」，方能拯救忍之都。

But deep down Master Kucha is aware that it is only when Rappa receives the tutelage of other Ninja Heroes and embarks upon the paramount way of the ninja as Dazzling Ninja can she save the entire Ninja Capital.
丑时三刻，一颗飞星坠落划破长夜，此乃忍徒•乱破的终点，亦是忍侠•乱破的起点……
In the darkest hour of the night, a falling meteor streaks across the sky, marking the graduation of Ninja Initiate Rappa and her new identity as Ninja Hero Rappa...
夜雾下的城郊，街道无色，有色之物乃是遍布街头的霓虹看板、缭乱•忍符的异彩，以及缭乱•忍者的身姿。
In the suburban night fog, the streets are colorless, save for the neon signs scattered about, the splendid hues of Dazzling Ninja Seals, and the swift silhouette of the Dazzling Ninja herself.
地上如垃圾袋般横竖零落的并非塑料垃圾，而是御猿屋的爪牙。在缭乱•忍者面前投下影子的亦非亡命冤魂，而是一位散发着劲霸忍•力的陌生来客——

What's scattered on the ground like garbage bags are not plastic garbage. Instead, they are the lackeys of the Osaru. The one casting their shadow in front of the Dazzling Ninja is not a dead spirit, but rather an unknown visitor who exudes a powerful and suppressive power...
初次见面…阁下何许人也？
初次见面，我等乃是得「巡猎」真传的忍侠，前来讨伐御猿•邪忍。
My pleasure to make your acquaintance too. We are Ninja Heroes who have received the true teachings of The Hunt. We come forth to punish Evil Ninja Osaru.
忍侠？看来在下的试炼已然告终……
Ninja Hero? Huh, it seems that my trial has finally come to an end...
末法日下的终极•试炼…破除御猿屋的阵法，灭却笼罩此地的灾厄。
The final trial of the Mappou Age... Destroy the matrix of Osaru's house and end the catastrophe that has befallen this land.
请问…在下是否已经称得上「忍侠」之名？
Pray tell... Have I proven myself worthy of the title of "Ninja Hero"?
大岚神在上！何等坚毅的忍•魂。诚然，如此纯度的忍者，应当以忍侠相称。
O mighty Aeon of The Hunt! What indomitable ninja spirit she has! Indeed, one as devoted as you rightfully deserves the title of Ninja Hero.
十年苦行，一朝封名…在下未曾辜负缭乱•忍法，苦茶大师，真希望你能见证此景……

Ten arduous years of training finally culminated in this, a new title will be conferred upon me today... I can proudly say that I have never gone against the tenets of Dazzling Ninjutsu all this time. How I wish you were here to witness this glory of mine today, Master Kucha...
那么，我要前去讨伐邪忍了，告辞。
With that, I shall continue my journey to take down the Evil Ninja. Farewell.
且慢，既然在下已是能与邪忍抗衡的忍侠…可否助你一臂之力？
Make no haste. Since I am now a Ninja Hero fit to contend with the Evil Ninja... Would you let me join you in your crusade?
不，你的狩猎已经完成了，这是属于我等的狩猎——
No, for your hunt is long complete. This is mine and mine alo—
原来如此，这位演员的戏路是「特效电影」。
I see... This talent would do well in special effect films.
今日的演员可谓有趣。一位生活在绿幕中的演员，一位更替过身份的演员，还有……
Ah, we have quite some fascinating actors today. One perpetually films before a green screen, another has been through a change of identities, and...
当然还有你，最具潜力的一位，梦想之地的盛会巨星。
And you, of course. The one with the most potential, Festive Superstar from the Land of the Dreams.
Your camera's gonna be a victim of my bat~
Traitorous ninja, engage me in combat!
容我再次道歉，我和蕉授的确有合作关系。但这一切情非得已，身为<color=#dbc291ff>模因生命</color>，我不慎落入敌手，染上了致命的模因病毒。

Please, let me apologize once more. Yes, it is true that I had a working relationship with Profnana, but I was coerced into it. As a <color=#dbc291ff>memetic lifeform</color>, I inadvertently fell into the hands of my enemies and became infected with a lethal memetic virus.
不不，我比那类群众演员要正式得多。
No, not those. I have a much bigger role than those extras.
No... at least not right now.
原来如此，方才的空间•忍法实属精妙，若阁下是来自「流晄忆町」的忆忍，便不足为奇了。
I see. The spatial ninjutsu that you displayed earlier was truly ingenious. I wouldn't be surprised if you were a Memo Ninja from the Garden of Zencollection.
所以，对于你在校长室的所作所为，我可否理解为背叛只是一场表演，真实目的是为了将我们带来这里？
So, am I right to see your act of betrayal at the Dean's Office as a ruse to teleport us to safety here?
或者，我更愿意称它为一场自救。
Perhaps I was just trying to bail myself out of the situation.
答案正在于此，*蕉声*的影响已经深入你我肺腑。
Well, this seems to be the answer for everything. Banagibberish has long infiltrated every cell and organ of our body.
匹诺康尼的梦扎根于公众的欲望，模因污染在其中产生不可逆转的影响。睡蕉小猴的风靡并不是开始，恰恰相反，是结束——

Since Penacony's dreams are rooted in the desires of the masses, the memetic corruption has had an irreversible impact on the Dreamscape itself. Slumbernana Monkey's sweeping craze wasn't the beginning of things. Rather, it heralded the end...
从那一刻起，「睡蕉的时刻」就已注定会诞生。
From that point onward, the Moment of Slumbernana was fated to be born.
但区别在于，它的持续时间和影响规模，是吗？
But what differentiates this from other memetic viruses is the period and extent of its influence, is that right?
不错。丹恒演员不但擅长表演，还深谙传播学的道理。
I'm impressed. It seems Dan Heng is not only a skilled actor, but also has profound knowledge on communication theory.
流行事物潮起潮落，没有不会落幕的风潮。虽然无法压制睡蕉小猴的兴起，但我们仍有可行之事，那就是让风潮的退去提前上映。

Trends come and go, but every single one of them eventually dies down, much like how a violent storm quells with time. We may not be able to dampen the increasing popularity of Slumbernana Monkey, but we can always work to hasten the trend's recession.
要怎么做？那就该请出今晚最重要的演员了——
How do we accomplish this, you ask? We'll have to introduce our lead actor for the night!
Yes, it's none other than you, ninja actor.
答案就在在下的「过去」中，是么？
The key is in my "past," isn't it?
普利蒙蕉授曾这么称呼你——「博士的失败品」。
Profnana Primon once called you... "the Doctor's failed creation."
对此我深感好奇，是什么促使你坚持使用这种奇妙的忍者世界观进行叙事？
I am extremely interested in this. What lies behind your insistence on narrating everything from the intriguing worldview of a ninja?
联系到此前的蕉学，我逐渐意识到这或许就是你能免疫睡蕉小猴污染的原因。而蕉授的台词更是点出了一种串联所有的可能——

When I made the connection between that and the banacademics that we've seen earlier, I came to the realization that this might be the very reason you're immune to Slumbernana Monkey's corruption. What Profnana said also hinted at a possibility that links everything else up.
这是原始博士的另一场实验？乱破演员，你早就是另一种模因病毒的感染者了。
That this is but another one of Dr. Primitive's experiments. As for you, actor Rappa, you were already infected with another memetic virus.
《银河忍法帖》有云：「蝎毒巧用能解蛇毒，鸩酒有时亦是甘露。」
As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "When used correctly, the venom of a scorpion neutralizes snake venom, just as poisoned wine may sometimes be used to quench thirst."
阁下所言不错。在下曾落入御猿屋手中，深受邪忍妖术之苦，又历经千生万劫破除邪法，终于逃得生天。

What you said is right. I once fell into the clutches of Osaru's domain, when sorcery ninjutsu was inflicted upon me. I had to undergo endless tribulations to break the fiendish spells. Only then did I manage to escape.
那段往事已是如浮云般久远的过去。但如今，若毗乃昆尼的明日需要它，便让我等拨开云雾重见天日吧。
That memory has long become a story I leave behind in my past, though if Pinecany's future hinges on it... I am willing to bring back that memory and face it once more.

你要想拷打一个道具，我没意见。但某只在阿斯德纳边境刚醒过来的猩猩，应该已经准备启航了吧。
Go ahead if you really want to torture a prop. But a certain gorilla who has just awakened at the border of Asdana is probably about to depart.
银枪•修罗殿下，在下的超•听力无法捕捉到邪祟的声响了，虾蟇•忍者所言非虚。
Silvergun Shura, even with my super hearing, I'm no longer able to detect the sounds of the fiendling. Perhaps Ninja Gama is right.
他宝贝的，费了这么大功夫，最后扑了个空？
Forkin' hell! That muddle-fudger still got away even after all our effort?
姐们儿，这么淡定？你天天把那什么屑人挂在嘴边，恨得死去活来，现在又无所谓了？
Gal, why are you so calm? You're always talking about how much you hate that scum. Why are you so unconcerned right now?
长夜漫漫，忍侠的仇恨，应由忍侠封藏。毗乃昆尼已迎来太平盛世，眼下，就让梦土的芸芸众生拥抱阳光吧。

This night is long. The hatred of a Ninja Hero should be borne solely by themselves. Since Pinecany has finally ushered in a period of peace and prosperity, then let the mortal beings of this land of dreams embrace the sun once more.
仇恨总有一天会消解，但人们心中的忍道…不会。
The hatred in one's heart might dissipate one day, but the way of the ninja within their hearts will never be forgotten... ever.
让他交代御猿•邪忍的去向。
Make him tell us where Evil Ninja Osaru is.
让他交代原始博士的去向。
Make him tell us where Dr. Primitive is.
乱破，你知晓自己的*忍道*了吗？
Rappa, have you found your own way of the ninja?
在下的忍道，当然就是成为缭乱•忍侠啊。
Of course, becoming the Dazzling Ninja is my way of the ninja.
不，这可算不上忍道，忍道是忍者愿为之贯彻一生的事物。
No, that cannot be considered the way of the ninja. The way of the ninja is something a ninja lives by for the rest of their life.
你早晚会击败御猿•邪忍的，那之后呢？成为缭乱•忍侠只是为了打败仇敌吗？

Of course... In the Cosmic Ninja Realm, evildoers are as abundant as the glittering stars. The gods have no spare attention to protect the mortals and the powerful ninja masters with extraordinary ninjutsu powers constantly fighting against one another. That is the Mappou Age of the Dharma.
Then, my way of the ninja shall be...
祓除万恶，不死不休，纵使箭在弦上，永不复还，也当一心不乱，破邪显正！
Eradicating evil, till my last breath. My bow drawn, no turning back. My heart shall remain unmoved until evil has been purged and justice enacted!
Till the end of the Mappou Age.
原来你们遇到了这么刺激的事情…真是的，下次这种冒险一定要带上我啊！
You guys actually experienced something so exciting... Seriously, bring me along on such adventures next time!

算了，反正我也在你们看不到的地方大展身手了。你们能这么顺利地解决问题，可少不了本姑娘的功劳！

学术研讨会已经结束了，真正的代理校长与老师们也回来了。
The academic conference has concluded, and the actual acting dean and teachers are back.
校方并没有把事态扩大化…或许是芮克先生取走了部分当事人的记忆。
The university did not escalate matters... Perhaps it's because Mr. Reca extracted a portion of the people's memories.

嗯，听说知更鸟小姐要在广场主持新的开幕式，我们去看看吧。

Hi Montana, are you feeling alright?
嗯？你不知道吗，这是现在最流行的{RUBY_B#梗}模因{RUBY_E#}。源自芮克先生的新作《银河忍法帖》！
Hmm? Don't you know, this is the most popular {RUBY_B#mimeme}meme{RUBY_E#} right now. It originated from Mr. Reca's latest work, the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions!

That guy... I don't think he has paid our salary yet... By the way, Montana, do you still like Slumbernana Monkey?
睡蕉小猴？哈哈，你怎么提这么过气的东西啊。
Slumbernana Monkey? Haha, that's so last year.

好了，三月七同学，现在流行的是《银河忍法帖》！你要赶得上潮流才行！

我要去参加「观忍社」的活动了，待会一起来吗！
I'm going to the Ninja Appreciation Society's event now. Do you want to come along?
不、不了！我要去看看彩梦校庆的新开幕式！
N—No thanks! I'm heading to the opening ceremony of the Dreamlight Anniversary!
了解——那么告辞，三月•忍者。
That's Ninja Ruri to you! Farewell!
这就是匹诺康尼的潮流更替吗……
So, is this what they mean by the rise and fall of trends in Penacony...
恰丽卡，你做的点心太好吃了！
Chaletka, the desserts that you made are so delicious!
再给我一份，再给我一份！
Give me one more, give me one more!
各、各位同学…排好队，人人都有份！
F—Fellow students... There's enough for everyone, so please queue up!
恰丽卡，你简直就是个做甜点的天才！
Chaletka, you're simply a genius of dessert making.
谢、谢谢！或许毕业后…去当个甜品师也不错……
Th—Thank you! Maybe becoming a patissier... after graduating doesn't sound too bad either...
（看来恰丽卡学姐好像找到自己的「忍符」了……）

Son, I've thought it through. If you're too tired, let's just return to our hometown...
No, Dad, I'm not going back.
我这次在校庆上赚了一大笔——虽然我的理论课不行，但以后可以当个销售嘛，在匹诺康尼也能养活自己！
I've earned a fortune during the anniversary celebration — even though I don't do well in my theory courses, I can still become a salesperson in the future and make a great living!
你瞧着吧，老爹，我今后一定能在匹诺康尼闯出个名堂来！
Just watch, Dad. I'll be sure to make a name for myself in Penacony!
儿子…呵呵，或许我这个当爹的也该更努力一点吧……
Son... Heh, as your dad, perhaps I should also try a little harder...
（富贵和他的父亲好像已经想通了……）
(It seems like Richie and his father have figured it out...)
芭蕉花酱，听说你要出演芮克先生的新片了？
Nanabloom-chan, I heard you're going to be featured in Mr. Reca's new film!
啊哈哈，只是个无关紧要的小角色而已。

今后你一定会成为大明星的，先给我签个名吧！
I'm sure you'll become a superstar one day. Can I get your autograph in advance?

是我的名字——以后我不用艺名了，既然要当我的粉丝，就要记住我的名字哦。
That's my name — I'm not going to use a stage name anymore. So, if you're going to be my fan, please remember that my name is Gabbana.

是啊，听说校庆突然延期，我们就尽早结束了研讨会，也想来凑个热闹。
That's right. We heard the anniversary celebration had been delayed, so we wrapped up the conference early and came straight here to see if we could catch the fun.
怎么样，这段时间的校园生活还愉快吗？
How was it? Did you enjoy your time on campus?
那就好，人们常说学校里的日子是人生中最快乐的时光，你今后一定不会忘记的。
Glad to hear it. People say that academic years are some of the happiest of their lives. I'm sure you'll be leaving with fond memories.
呵呵，看来{NICKNAME}不怎么喜欢上学呢。没关系，人生本就是一场求学的旅程，宇宙本身就是一个巨大的学校。
Haha, not an eager student, {NICKNAME}? Never mind — life itself is a journey of study, the universe a boundless ocean of learning.
是吗？看来你们的学习生涯没那么悠闲啊。没关系，比起平凡的生活，意外才是青春中最难忘的事情。
Is that so? Sounds like student life wasn't boring after all. Look on the bright side — sometimes the most memorable things are the accidents of our youth.
各位同学们，你们好。很高兴能为大家主持这次的「彩梦校庆」。
Hello, students. I'm very happy to be hosting the Dreamlight Anniversary this year.
天呐，是真的知更鸟小姐！这次开幕式可比上次强多了！
Oh gosh, it really is Miss Robin! The opening ceremony this year is much better than last time!
等等，上次演讲的是谁来着？
Hold on, who was the speaker last time?
很久以前，我也曾在折纸大学修习过一段时光，所以也算是大家的同学。
A long time ago, I also spent some time studying at Paperfold University. So, I can be considered an alumnus of the school.
那时的折纸大学和现在一样，算不上多么自由自在，也有让人头疼的考试，各种各样的作业，要求严苛的答辩…没办法，谁叫这里承担着培养未来的重任呢？

Paperfold University back then was just like how it is right now. There was a lack of freedom, exams were a source of headaches, we had plenty of homework, and our thesis defense had stringent requirements... Well, it can't be helped since this place bears the burden of training the future of Penacony.
只有在每年的彩梦校庆期间，同学们才能暂时抛去那些烦恼。但校庆终有一天会结束，就像梦…总有一天也会醒。

The annual Dreamlight Anniversary is the opportunity for students to temporarily toss their troubles aside. However, the anniversary celebrations will come to an end, just like how... we'll eventually awaken from our dreams.
但有一种梦不会醒来，也不应该醒来——
But there is a type of dream that we will never awaken from, and should never awaken from...
这个梦，就是我们的梦想。
And that is the dreams woven by our highest ambitions.
有的同学想要创造美好的事物、有的同学想要拥有美好的生活、有的同学想要让自己成为美好的人——这些梦想都很棒。
Some students wish to create beautiful objects, while others desire to lead amazing lives. There are some who even wish to become a better person. These are all amazing dreams.
梦想是生命的航标。只要点亮了这个航标，我们随时都可以休息。但这并不意味着放弃，因为只要看到航标的光，我们就有勇气重新启程。

In our lives, dreams act as beacons that guide us forward. Once we have lit up the beacon, we may choose to rest at any time. This does not signify that we have given up, for as long as the light of the beacon can be seen, we will have the courage to restart our journey.
希望大家能在折纸大学找到自己的梦想，然后用一生来贯彻它。
I hope that all of you will be able to find your dreams at Paperfold University and will dedicate your lives to realizing them.
因为你们有美梦，才能创造多彩。你们有理想，才能拥抱自由。
It is because of your sweet dreams that you can create color. It is because of your ideals that you can embrace freedom.
欢迎来到彩梦校庆！美梦多彩，理想自由——！
Welcome to Dreamlight Anniversary! Color your dreams, free your ideals!
Color your dreams, free your ideals!
此处虽与邪恶国度相似，但也并无任何线索…
Despite the similarities to the Evil Realm, there are no clues here...
真希望下一场戏，你能给我换个称呼，我的好演员。
How I wish that in the next film, you can call me something better, my wonderful actor.
每位忍侠都有自己的「猎物」，银枪•修罗殿下此次只是人情相助，当下已去继续他的狩猎了。
Each Ninja Hero has their own prey. Silvergun Shura only came to repay a favor, after which he returned to his own hunt.
呵呵，你帮我拍摄了这么精彩的影片，我是来奉上片酬的。
Hehe, after helping me shoot such an exciting film, I'm here to hand you your remuneration.
酬谢就不必了，在下行侠只为心中忍道，从不贪慕财物。

别这么说，你一定会对这份片酬感兴趣的，因为这份片酬的内容是……
Don't say that. I'm sure you'll be very interested in my remuneration. After all, this remuneration is...

(Mr. Reca said using this camera will help me get to the final set, bana.)
（…快出发吧，真的不想再「蕉」了蕉。）
(...Yes, let's hurry up and get there. Please no more "bana," bana.)
那不是蒙塔娜和其他同学们吗？他们也回来了！
Isn't that Montana and the other classmates? They're back!
快看，是姬子姐姐和杨叔！
Look! It's Himeko and Mr. Yang!

Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions\nThe Final Chapter: Upturned Dreamfall
一片——长满香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！
An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernanas!
再熟悉不过的*蕉声*响起，你脑海中本就蠢蠢欲动的小猴们开始鸣叫……
The familiar Banagibberish rings out, and the monkeys in your mind start making noise...
♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪
诸位，在下用忍符破除了邪祟的幻术。现在可否清醒了？
I shattered the fiendling's deception with my ninja talismans. Has everyone snapped out of their trance?
看来芮克先生没有骗我们，你的记忆确实可以消解睡蕉小猴的影响…我们的话语也恢复正常了。
Looks like Mr. Reca did tell the truth. Your memory worked in overwriting the Slumbernana Monkeys' influences. Our speech seems to have gone back to normal too.
这里就是「睡蕉的时刻」吗？到处都是睡蕉小猴的踪迹，它们应该都是折纸大学和流梦礁的*蕉粉*吧。
Is this the Moment of Slumbernana? This place is crawling with Slumbernana Monkeys. I'm guessing they're the Ripe Bananas from Paperfold University and Dreamflux Reef.
This is the strange dream I mentioned!
没错，这里无疑是在下曾与{NICKNAME}•忍者到访过的幻境，但当时还未有如此多的邪祟。看来受到邪术迫害的人越来越多了……

That is true. This is undoubtedly the illusory realm Ninja {NICKNAME} and I had once visited. There were not as many fiendlings around back then. Looks like more and more people are being afflicted by the sorcery...
这些都是阁下做的好事吧——邪祟•总长。
Fiendling Chief... You're behind all of this, aren't you?

我等要做的，只是唤醒这些失意的百姓，令波涛汹涌的邪祟浪潮重归平息。
All we need to do is bring those disillusioned fans back to their senses to quell the rogue waves of fiendlings.

而当他们都不再盲目追逐睡蕉小猴时，我们就能轻易摧毁这场梦境。
And when people no longer blindly follow Slumbernana Monkey, we will be able to easily destroy this Dreamscape.

I can't tell what's up his sleeve, but we should take care of these Slumbernana Monkeys as soon as possible. Stopping the memetic virus is still our priority for now.
飞龙忍者所言极是，在下已将「超•忍•卷轴」交予诸位，就用空手道来令踏上邪祟之道的忍徒们醒悟吧！
Ninja Hiryū is right. Since I have already relinquished the Super Ninja Scroll, I'll rely on my fists to awaken these ninja initiates that succumbed to the way of the fiendling.

Fashionable trends are what drive people. In the sweet dreams of Harmony, this is equivalent to strength.
邪祟•总长乘坐这台忍•科学•弹丸离开了，我等也快追上去吧！
The Fiendling Chief left atop this ninja tech bullet! Let us quickly give chase!

We should fully utilize what we have. These results will pave the way and eliminate any obstacles in our future experiments...
别再把时间浪费在没用的试题上了，马上就要交卷了……

There's no need for hesitation, Ninja Hiryū. If there's an ambush, we foil the ambush. If there's a scheme, we thwart the scheme.

Banahaha... Such perfect experimental results. It would be a waste to use it to eliminate you pests...
蕉蕉蕉…实验的成果有所损坏，但用来清除害虫也足够了……
Banahaha... Despite the imperfections in the experimental results, it's more than sufficient for eliminating you pests...
蕉（无奈）…实验成果居然受到了这么大的损伤，你们这群差生……
Bana... The experimental results have been so badly damaged. You're such a bunch of unruly students...
邪祟•总长，阁下已无处可逃，面对缭乱•忍法的制裁吧。
Fiendling Chief, there's nowhere left to run. It's time to face your punishment delivered by my Dazzling Ninjutsu!
「AK-A-3」，承载着返祖实验进从<unbreak>32</unbreak>个文明中筛选出的优质灵长类基因，却因一位见习研究猿的错误培养而误入歧途。
"AK-A-3," carrying high-quality primate genes selected from <unbreak>32</unbreak> civilizations for the atavistic experiment, went astray due to a trainee research ape's erroneous cultivation
而这位见习研究猿还不知悔改，私通巡海游侠，为实验室带来无比惨重的损失，最终只留下了一件极其糟糕的「失败品」——

Moreover, that trainee research ape showed no remorse and even colluded with the Galaxy Rangers, resulting in a devastating loss for the laboratory. In the end, we're only left with an abysmal piece of "failure"...
只懂得听命邪忍，为害四方的邪祟，有何资格评判在下。
You're a fiendling who only knows how to take orders from the Evil Ninja and go around causing trouble. What right do you have to judge me?
Of course, it's because of... my dreams.
让我们延续之前的课题吧：香蕉是无性繁殖的植物。一个块茎可以滋生无数香蕉树，从而诞生出一大片香蕉林，解决一整个星系乃至宇宙的饥荒。

Let us continue from where the previous lecture left off: Bananas are plants that propagate asexually. Each rhizome can bear several buds that will grow into a sea of banana trees, thus eliminating hunger problems plaguing planets and perhaps even the entire universe.
而那些自私的植物，强调着「个性」与「自我」，却将种子肆意播撒，野蛮生长。只知道延续自己的基因，却不知为同类奉献。

As for the selfish plants that place emphasis on personality and individuality, they will willfully spread their seeds and grow uncultivated. They only care about whether their genes are passed on but do not know to contribute to the cause of their kind.
告诉我，从宇宙的尺度望去，应该被淘汰的是谁，应该被留下的又是谁？
Tell me, on a cosmic scale, which should be eliminated, and which should be left to thrive?
开学时，你让大家追随自由，如今却讥讽着自由的意义。先前判定香蕉是失败的植物，现在又开始赞颂它的无私。

When school started, you encouraged everyone to pursue their desires freely, but now you ridicule what it means to be free. Previously, you judged bananas to be a failed plant, but now you are singing praises of their selflessness.
呃…这…这是不同的语境，你不能一概而论……
Ugh... This... The context is different. You can't generalize it in this manner...
恶人做恶事永远都有无数的借口，总想要将自己摆在正义的位置上。
When evil people do evil things, they always have a myriad of excuses to try and justify their own actions.
自相矛盾，强词夺理，只为自己的欲望。这种课根本没有听的必要——
You're self-contradictory and unreasonable, only striving to further your own agenda. There's no need to listen to such lessons!
邪祟•总长，比起编造狂言，不如好好构想阁下的辞世句吧！
Fiendling Chief, rather than continuing to weave lies, why don't you think about your last words!
失败品…你们都是不可*蕉化*的失败品。
Failures... A bunch of failures that cannot be cultivated.
对于失败品而言，天才的「智识」遥不可及。但我可以用更「原始」的方式*蕉*会你们这个道理……
How can failures possibly comprehend the Erudition of a genius? However, I can always rely on primitive methods to banaducate you on this theory...
看到这颗美丽的梦泡了吗，家族用万千家徒「同谐」的心愿与星核的力量筑造了匹诺康尼，而我则将万千小猴「放弃」的心愿汇聚为这个梦泡，筑造了「睡蕉的时刻」。

See this beautiful dream bubble? The Family relied on the Harmonious wishes of thousands of Family members and the power of the Stellaron to construct Penacony. But I simply gathered and converged the abandoned wishes of thousands of monkeys into this dream bubble to create the Moment of Slumbernana.
现在，我会将它所有的力量交予诸位「蕉师」与「助蕉」——
Now, I will hand over its power to all BananAdvisors and Assistananas...
小猴的数量实在太多了，最好尽量解决掉它们。
There are too many monkeys. It's best that we try to eliminate them.
在下的忍法只会将邪祟送出此处，莫要担心，尽情施展忍•空手道吧！
My ninja arts will only send the fiendlings out of this place. Fret not, freely use my ninja fist!
糟糕，在下的忍力不足了。
Oh no, my ninja power is dwindling.
此处姹紫色的忍•泡影秘药似乎能补充忍力，击破此物来补充忍力吧。
This purple Ninja Secret Brew seems like it would replenish my ninja power. Shatter it and replenish some ninja power.
休要继续逃窜，若阁下有战胜我等的信心，何不一决高下？！
Stop trying to escape. If you believe that you can defeat us, why not settle it once and for all right now!?
蕉蕉蕉，还没到上课时间，别心急。
Bana bana bana, it's not time for class yet. There's no need to be in such a hurry.
这些漂浮的密咒都是忍徒们的心音吗？看来他们之所以放弃忍道，不只因为邪祟•总长的蛊惑。
Are these floating mantras the inner voices of those ninja initiates? It seems the Fiendling Chief's beguiling isn't the only reason they gave up on the way of the ninja.
是的。匹诺康尼的生活并非表面那么理想。站在悬崖的边缘，轻风也能将人推入谷底。
That's right. Life in Penacony is not as ideal as what is seen on the surface. If someone is standing on the edge of a cliff, even a gentle breeze can easily tip them over.
但我等必须令这阵风止息——哪怕忍徒渴望纵身一跃，也必须是自己的选择，而非妖风所致。
We have to stop this breeze from growing. Even if the ninja initiates decide to make the leap, it should be a conscious choice of their own, and not sorcery that coerced them into it.
快点追吧，来吧，教室就在前面了。
Hurry up and give chase. Come on, the classroom is just ahead.
小猴的数量变多了，看来我们离梦境的核心越来越近了。
There is an increasing number of monkeys. It seems like we are getting closer and closer to the core of this dreamscape.
诸般迷失的邪祟啊，速速惊觉…继而寻回自己的忍道吧！
Oh, disillusioned fiendlings... Awaken now and continue down the path to seek your own way of the ninja!
这群小猴好像正在阻拦我们……
This bunch of monkeys seems like they are trying to stop us...
那就令它们全部醒悟吧！
Then let us snap them all out of their disillusionment!
睡蕉小猴的数量越来越少了，病毒的强度一定也会有所削减。
The number of Slumbernana Monkeys seems to be declining. The virus must have also been weakened somewhat.
邪祟已然所剩无几，战况值得欢喜！
There aren't many fiendlings left. This is cause for us to rejoice!
此处是在下与{NICKNAME}曾经相遇之地。看来壮绝狩猎的起点亦是终点，实属巧妙•因缘——
This is the place where I met {NICKNAME} before. It seems like the starting point of this formidable hunt will also be where it shall be concluded. How ingenious fate is...
蕉蕉！睡蕉小猴的力量保护了我们！
Banahaha! The power of the Slumbernana Monkey is protecting us!
邪祟退却——超•正觉彩墨绽！
Fiendlings, be gone! Super Brilliant Enlightenment!
蕉…睡蕉小猴的力量被削弱了……
Bana ugh... The power of the Slumbernana Monkey has been weakened...
邪祟退却——极•正觉彩墨绽！
Fiendlings, be gone! Ultimate Brilliant Enlightenment!
蕉！蕉糕…睡蕉小猴的力量都不见了……
Bana wha! Holy bananas... The power of the Slumbernana Monkey has disappeared...
差生们，你们已经严重违反了蕉学规范。
You bunch of unruly students have seriously violated the banacademic code of conduct.
蕉蕉蕉，准备好接受处分吧！
Bana bana bana! Prepare to be disciplined!
暴力即是原初的「智识」——这就是*蕉育*的力量！
Violence is the most primitive form of Erudition — this is the power of Bananenlightenment!
时钟的指针拨回匹诺康尼之旅起点：星穹列车应「钟表匠」邀请，前往银河度假胜地「白日梦」酒店赴宴，却在美梦乐园意外被卷入两起离奇的「杀人案件」。

The clock winds back to the start of the journey to Penacony — the Astral Express, upon invitation from the Watchmaker, heads to a Cosmic vacation spot, The Reverie hotel, for a banquet. However, in this Sweetdream Paradise, they unexpectedly become entangled in two bizarre "murder mysteries."
声势浩大的遗产争夺战拉开序幕。众多派系先后入场，因势而动，家族东道主也意图借机将「钟表匠」捉拿归案，令谐乐大典如期召开。

A grand struggle for a legacy begins. Numerous factions enter one after another, acting in response to the situation. The Family hosts also plot to capture the Watchmaker with this opportunity and ensure the Charmony Festival takes place as scheduled.
「虚无」令使黄泉与公司使节砂金的对决成为整起事件的转折点：后者借一场「盛大的死亡」粉碎了家族的谎言，也揭示了原初梦境「流梦礁」的存在。

A confrontation between the Emanator of the Nihility, Acheron, and IPC representative, Aventurine, becomes the turning point of the entire event: The latter, through a "grand death," shatters The Family's lies and reveals the existence of the Primordial Dreamscape, Dreamflux Reef.
列车组由此深入事件核心。在这里，加拉赫向众人讲述了梦境、星核以及米哈伊尔等无名客的真相。众人终于寻得「开拓」的遗产，更因此蒙受「同谐」瞥视。

The Express Crew thus delves into the heart of the situation. Here, Gallagher reveals to everyone the truths about the dreamscape, the Stellaron, Mikhail, and the other Nameless. They finally uncover the legacy of the Trailblaze and, in doing so, receive a glimpse from the Harmony.
为实现前人的遗愿，众人向匹诺康尼大剧院进发，意图封印星核，却不得不与心向「秩序」的橡木家主星期日决一死战，而这场大战以「秩序」的再度陨落作结。

To fulfill the wishes of their predecessors, everyone heads to the Penacony Grand Theater with the intention of sealing the Stellaron. However, they are forced into a deadly battle against Sunday, the head of the Oak family, who is aligned with the Order. This great battle concludes with the fall of the Order once again.
匹诺康尼的未来依旧悬而未决。可喜的是，经列车组斡旋，家族与公司同意让渡部分权益，达成一致。匹诺康尼重新获得了决定自己命运的权利。

The future of Penacony remains uncertain. However, thanks to the mediation of the Crew, The Family and the IPC agree to cede some of their interests, and reach a consensus. Penacony regains the right to determine its own destiny.
最后的最后，花火隆重返场，上演了一出触目惊心的炸弹秀。这场「危机」最终在盛大的烟火中落幕，每个人都收获了各自最好的结局，美梦的悲喜剧落下帷幕。

In the very end, Sparkle makes a grand return with a startling bomb show. This "crisis" is ultimately resolved amidst spectacular fireworks. With everyone receiving their own best ending, the tragicomedy of the sweet dream comes to a close.
此刻，缭乱•忍侠被热情的忍徒们团团包围，有如落网之鱼，难以脱身。
At this moment, the Dazzling Ninja is surrounded by enthusiastic ninja disciples like a fish caught in a net, rendering her unable to escape.
忍法或许可以轻易从群敌环伺的恶意中脱身，但却难以抵御汹涌的善意。大岚天在上，热情炽热胜烈火，忍•心亦难解人心。

Perhaps Ninjutsu can allow her to easily slip away from the encirclement of enemies, but such a power is helpless against surging kindness. By Great Lan above, these passions burn hotter than fire. Even the heart of ninjutsu finds it hard to decipher the human heart.
当你跨入此门，梦境的空间开始扭曲，你又来到了芮克先生的片场……
When you enter this door, the Dreamscape's space begins to twist, and you once again return to Mr. Reca's set.
{NICKNAME}•忍者未能抵御邪祟的妖术蛊惑，{F#她}{M#他}的开拓•忍道——就此断绝！
Ninja {NICKNAME} was unable to resist the allure of fiendlings' evil. {F#Her}{M#His} trailblazing way of the ninja has now been severed!
但步入邪祟的国度，{F#她}{M#他}将不再有忧烦愁苦，终日与群猿相伴，尽享无为之乐，余生也算逍遥。

But upon entering the realm of fiendlings, {F#she}{M#he} felt no more worries or suffering and spent {F#her}{M#his} time with the ape-friends. When every day is drowned in joy, the rest of one's life will also become free and unfettered.
在{NICKNAME}•忍者如贼星坠落之后，其余诸忍亦会延续蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉——
After Ninja {NICKNAME} fell like a deceitful star, the rest of the ninjas will also banananananaa...
蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉——

Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana BananaBananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas...
根据苦茶大师的指示，乱破踏入了忍•科学的玄妙器皿中……
Following Master Kucha's instructions, Rappa ventures into the magical vessel made of ninja tech...
摄影机转向一个片场，另一组演员们的故事继续……
The camera shifts to a new scene, unveiling the story of another group of actors...
根据苦茶大师的指示，乱破踏入了忍•科学的玄妙器皿中……
Following Master Kucha's instructions, Rappa ventures into the magical vessel made of ninja tech...
自称伎乐忍徒的学生被纪检部部长抓走了……
The individual who claims to be Ninja Initiate Gigaku has been detained by the head of the Disciplinary Committee...
<color=#dbc291ff>放弃所有一切，眼前风光更好。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Life grows beautiful for those who forfeit it all.</color>
桌上有一张奇怪的传单，上面写着——「睡蕉社招新新生蕉粉，蕉学探讨，蕉语蕉流蕉友蕉往,欢迎蕉入！」

There's a strange flyer on the table. It says "The Slumbernana Association is recruiting freshman Ripe Bananas for banacademic discussions, Bananese communications and banafriends for bana fun. All are welcome to banajoin!"
Banana my sundae! What kind of questions are these?
二人来到了流梦礁的露天舞台前……
The two arrive before the open-air stage in Dreamflux Reef...
