In an instant, within the many delves of Amphoreus, everyone felt the world overturn and the mountains and rivers tremble. It was as if the imperial bow had returned to shoot the stars, splintering sacred trees and raising clouds of dust...
…咳咳，不对，串台了，这里是翁法罗斯，不是《开拓豪侠传》。那么，水车动了么？
Oops, wrong channel, this is Amphoreus, not the Legend of the Trailblazer. So, did the waterwheel move?
——没有，因为水车得有水才能动。真是太让人遗憾了。
— No, because it needs water to turn. What a pity.
承认自己只想开个玩笑。
Admit that you were only joking.
一言既出，驷马难追。要是用悬锋人的口头禅来说，那就是：开拓者的字典里绝没有「玩笑」二字。
Once spoken, words are irrevocable. As the Kremnoans would often say, "the word 'joke' does not exist in the Trailblazer's dictionary."
以防你良心受到谴责，还是再好好想想吧。别让你的伙伴失望！
To avoid a guilty conscience, think it over carefully. Don't let your partners down!
她有，但是好伙伴，我忍住了！
She's laughing. But I managed to hold it in!
虽然败了…但必可活用于下次。
Although it failed... I'm sure I can put it to good use next time.
真是看到了…珍奇无比的场面。
Truly a rare sight to behold.
这也是一道无比珍贵的记忆呀。
This is indeed an incredibly precious memory.
这颗心脏是树庭一切水流之源……
This heart is the source of all water in the Grove...
正是。新灵感的火花每每在树庭中迸发，露水便会自此垂落，落入池中。
Indeed. When the sparks of inspiration burst forth within the Grove, dewdrops fall and land within the pool.
那我来努力开动脑筋…呣呣呣…
Then let me ignite my creativity... Ummmm...
你屏息凝神。嘀嗒！一滴水落入池中。
You hold your breath and focus. Drip drip! A drop of water falls into the pool.
…不，那只是普通的一滴露水，遵循水的三态变化之规律，而非因灵感而生。
...No, it was merely an ordinary drop of dew, following the natural laws of water's three states, not born of inspiration.
看来只凭我们几个是没法灌满它了……
It seems like it won't be possible to fill it up with just the few of us...
Actually, I have some Solid Water.
你置入一枚固态净水，很快融化得无影无踪。
You placed a piece of solid water, and it quickly dissolved without a trace.
杯水车薪。但你想要救活这颗大树的期盼是如此热烈，以至于不知何种存在从遥远多元宇宙深处向你投来赞许的目光。
A futile effort. Yet your fervent hope to revive this great tree was so intense that some presence from the distant multiverse cast an approving gaze upon you.
看来只凭我们几个是没法灌满它了……
It seems like it won't be possible to fill it up with just the few of us...
要想唤醒它，得先去取来一样「宝物」才行哪。
We must first retrieve a treasure if we want to awaken the heart.
瞧见那边厢的浅塘了么？那水间生着睡莲，乃是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}最初挥泪浇灌，并以{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}携来「友亲之爱」呵护成的，两位尊神永世相伴之信物。

See that shallow pond over there? Water lilies grow there. Initially, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} watered them with their tears while Mnestia nurtured them with affectionate love. They are a token of the eternal companionship between the two gods.
且请二人越过深井，为吾采来那<color=#dbc291ff>「金枝誓言」</color>，便就够了。
All the two of you have to do is to cross the deep well and retrieve the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Bough of Vows</color> for me.
…小卡，你说话也太难懂了。总而言之，就是要我们把那朵花取来嘛？
...Cal, you're making things sound too complicated. All you want us to do is to retrieve the flower, right?
你就拿这个考验我无名客？
Is this how you're going to test a Nameless?
正是。莫非汝不知怎生是好了？
Indeed. Could it be that you actually do not know how to proceed?
Could the deep well be a trap...?
呵呵，怎说得这样不吉利话哪。
Heh, you're making it sound so ominous.
取来可以，但劝你别费心思打别的算盘。
We can retrieve it, but I advise you not to waste your time on any schemes.
啊呀，只道是吾为汝等排了忧、释了难，却得不着报应么？
Oh my, I'm helping you to eliminate your worries and obstacles, and yet I receive nothing in return?
况且，此物也是唤醒那心脏、引出水源的紧要物事。倘若今番寻不来，你我便就困驻此地，永世逃将不得了哪。
Besides, the bough is essential for awakening the heart and drawing water out of the source. If you can't find it this time, we can just remain trapped here for the rest of eternity.
什么意思，你是要缠上我们，把我们永远关在这里嘛？
What's that supposed to mean!? Are you planning to keep us here forever?
呵呵，哪里的话。一根绳上，两只蚂蚱罢了。
Heh, you're overthinking things. We're all in the same boat.
不过，要说吾没甚二心，那确是胡搅蛮缠了。嗯，倒不如接住这话头交代了好——
Although, it would be absurd to say that I have no other motives. Since you've brought it up, I might as well take this chance to explain...
眼下，吾仅想借此机会，验验汝二人成色如何。怎样，足够真诚了么？
I'm simply making use of this opportunity to see what you two are made of. So, is that truthful enough for you?
「验验成色」…这种理由也太直接了吧。
See what we're made of... Could you have phrased that any more directly?
多的暂且不便多说。言至于此，去罢？
Now is not the time for me to elaborate further. So, please proceed?
身为那刻夏的门生，「等价交换」应是寻常不过的道理了哪。
As a student of Anaxa, "equivalent exchange" should be something that you are familiar with.
{NICKNAME}，眼下我们利益一致，还是先依她指示行事吧。况且，她知道我的过去…虽然不便展开，但她有理由忌惮我。

{NICKNAME}, since our interests are aligned right now, it's better for us to do as she says. Besides, she knows about my past... Even though I'm not able to elaborate much, I can tell you that she has reasons to fear me.
如果她最终的目标不幸是阁下…请放心，我会及时出手的。
If you unfortunately turn out to be her ultimate target... Please don't worry. I will promptly intervene.
有蝶在，好让人放心呀。那人家也得开动脑筋——
It's so reassuring to have Cas around. I should put my brain to use too, then.
So, this is the Golden Bough of Vows...
...I hope that the Titan will not take their anger out on us.
原来我们这是在泰坦头上动土…
So, what we're doing is simply provoking the Titans...
没事，有好几个星神给我撑腰。
Don't worry. There are several Aeons that have my back.
…要是祂们也能干涉泰坦的事务就好了。
...If only THEY could interfere in the affairs of the Titans.
呵，美轮美奂，熠熠生辉…果真似当年。
Heh, so lustrous and beautiful... It's even more magnificent than before.
呀？！小卡，人家的心脏本来就小小一颗，你别突然冒出来吓人家好不好…这都第二次了！
Hey, Cal!? Don't suddenly appear out of nowhere and scare me like that! My tiny little heart cannot take it... This is already the second time!
知道了。抱歉呢，粉色的小兔子。
这回又是「粉色小兔子」了吗？人家的物种还真是包容万象呢……
It's pink bunny this time? I'm truly an all-encompassing species...
这…真的是传说中的「金枝誓言」么？
Is... this the legendary Golden Bough of Vows?
Hehe, we'll know once we test it.
到了。烦请为吾撷取一枚花瓣，置于池中。
We're here. Could you kindly pluck a petal for me and place it into the pool?
(Remove a petal from the Golden Bough of Vows.)
接下来，小女神，请汝再演绎一遍那个吧。
Now, can our little goddess perform that again?
就那个——{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}祭司的誓词。
That being the oath of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s priests.
「{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}呵！以『引纬』封证誓约，我向你求愿——愿你的金丝与爱缠绕我身！」
"O {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}! With the Weft as my vow, I beseech you: Entwine my body with your golden thread and affection!"
What is the principle behind this?
不过是…呵，泰坦与人子们陈旧的约定罢了。
Heh, it's just... an ancient promise between the Titan and humans.
如何？这确是真正的「金枝誓言」——两位也并未遭吾暗算吧？
So, what do you think? It really is the Golden Bough of Vows, and I did not set any traps for you, right?
呵呵，可汝这神情，却依旧像条挨了鞭笞的犬崽呢。即便这确是吾欲擒故纵的把戏，眼下汝等也只得束手就困，不是么？
Haha, you look like a sad lost puppy. Even if this is indeed a scheme to get you to lower your guard, you don't have any other choice but to play along, do you?
依吾所见，倒不如宽下心来，合衷共济，先踏过难关，再论谁是谁非。
Therefore, why don't we just put everything aside and work together? We can always determine who's right and who's wrong once we overcome this.
甚好。那么，吾等就登上水车……
Great. Then, let's ride the water wheel...
但藏头露尾可不是谈合作该有的态度。
However, giving us half-truths is not the right attitude for cooperation.
况且，依「等价交换」的原理：既然我们通过了你所谓的考验，你也该把用意一五一十地交代出来了。
Furthermore, according to the principle of "equivalent exchange," since we have passed your so-called trial, isn't it time for you to make your intentions clear to us?
啊呀，这委屈的小模样真教人目不忍视。虽然方才不过一道考验而已…但吾甘心破例一次，并当坦诚相待。
Ahh, I really can't bear to look at your sad expressions. Although you only cleared a simple trial... I'm willing to make an exception and treat you with sincerity.
一人一个问题…啊，那小兔子不算在内。问罢。
I'll allow each of you to ask a question... Ah, but not the little bunny. So, ask away.
怎么区别对待呀，是怕人家太聪明，问出颠覆整个翁法罗斯的问题吗？
What's with this unfair treatment? Is it because I'm too smart and you're afraid that the question I ask will turn Amphoreus upside down?
Well... In that case, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, please go ahead.
<color=#dbc291ff>方才已告说过了，吾乃神悟树庭七贤人之一。若觉着这答案不够利落，再附赠一条：吾实为七贤人之首。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>As I've previously mentioned, I'm one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany. If you think that this answer is insufficient, then I'll add to it. I'm the leader of the Seven Sages.</color>
你为什么不以真面目示人？
Why don't you show your true appearance?
嗯…这倒是个不错的问题。
<color=#dbc291ff>不是不愿，而是不能。而要吾以正身示人，还需汝等鼎力相助。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>It's an inability to do so rather than an unwillingness. For me to appear in my true form, I'll require your help.</color>
What is your purpose in testing us?
嗯…这倒是个不错的问题。
<color=#dbc291ff>吾想确认汝等是否有实力，为吾夺回正身…更从黑潮手中夺回树庭。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I want to ascertain your ability to help me reclaim my true form... and reclaim the Grove from the black tide.</color>
为什么说我们与你利害攸关？
Why do you say that our fates are intertwined?
嗯…竟能一下切中要害呢。
<color=#dbc291ff>因着黑潮，泰坦在此地布下天罗地网。若想逃出生天，还需汝等为吾夺回正身才行。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The Titans have cast a net over this place because of the black tide. If we want to escape, I'll require your help to reclaim my true form.</color>
不好…这可算两个问题喏。
That's no good... You asked two questions.
…卡吕普索阁下，还请别玩这种文字游戏。
...Let's not get into a game of semantics, Lady Calypso.
{NICKNAME}阁下，我会根据你的提问观察她的反应，以便判断她回答是真是假。
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I will observe her reaction based on your question to determine whether she is being truthful.
所以，不必顾虑，随意提问就好。
So, don't worry about it. Go ahead and ask your question.
喏，小小的「死亡」女神，轮到你了。
Well, it's your turn now, little goddess of Death.
试问：你方才的回答是否字字属实，毫无隐瞒？
My question is: Was your previous answer the whole truth and nothing but the truth?
故弄玄虚可没有意义哪。
There's no point in making this unnecessarily complicated.
这句话我原样奉还。但我们并无敌意，一切只为了自己免遭潜在的恶意伤害。
That applies to you as well. However, we do not harbor any hostility. We merely want to avoid any potential harm to us.
为了更好地合作，卡吕普索阁下，还是正面回答我的问题为好。
Lady Calypso, if you want us to work together more effectively, I advise you to answer my question honestly.
呵呵…好。吾方才回答字字属实，不打诳语，过去与未来亦是。
Hehe... Alright. I was completely truthful in my response just now. I have not deceived you, nor will I.
恕我冒昧，剪接事实可也算是谎言。
With all due respect, omitting facts can also be considered deceit.
是吗？即便如此，吾也不会更改方才的回答哟？
Is that so? Regardless, I still stand by my previous response.
…那就请带路吧。「事实胜于雄辩」——等到启蒙王座，谁是谁非自然不攻自破。
...Then, please lead the way. After all, facts speak for themselves. The truth will come to light once we arrive at the Luminary Throne.
好，好。本以为你是那{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}在人间播下的花蕾…现在看来倒像朵气鼓鼓的毒蕈了。

Alright, alright. I originally thought that you were just a beautiful flower planted in the mortal realm by the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}... But now, I see you have some prickly thorns too.
就当阁下这是在夸我好了。
I'll just consider that a compliment.
正是，吾在称赞你憨态可掬呢。
Indeed, I'm complimenting your charming naiveté.
哇，小小灰、小小蝶，还有粉色小狗！
Woah, it's Little Gray, Little Cas, and the pink puppy!
我…哎，算了，小狗就小狗，包容——包容！
I... Forget it. I'll just be a puppy. Be forgiving... Be forgiving!
缇安大人！还好吗，没有受伤吧？
Lady Trianne! Are you alright? Were you hurt?
没有，缇安飞得高高的，怪物根本够不到缇安。
No, Trianne flew high up into the air so the monsters couldn't reach us.
All that matters is you're alright.
嘿嘿，不仅如此：阿雅给的纺锤好厉害，缇安好像找到小那刻夏啦——
Heh heh, also, the spindle that Agy gave us is so powerful that Trianne seems to have found Nax...
嗯！阿雅给的纺锤好厉害，缇安好像找到小那刻夏啦——
Yup! The spindle that Agy gave us is so powerful that Trianne seems to have found Nax...
「制空权已确保！」…好帅，但这是什么意思？
"Air supremacy secured!" ...That sounds so cool! But what does it mean?
不过，言归正传！阿雅给的纺锤好厉害，缇安好像找到小那刻夏啦——
Wait a minute, let's get back on track! The spindle that Agy gave us is so powerful that Trianne seems to have found Nax...
——他就在树冠附近！虽然感应很微弱，但和刚才的仙女木们不一样。
He's near the treetop! Even though our perception of him is very weak, it's not like the White Dryads from before.
不过，缇安因为是一个人，怕危险，没有飞下去看。
But, since Trianne was alone and afraid that it might be dangerous, we did not fly there to take a look.
看来缇安大人有好好记得我们的约定。
It seems like Lady Trianne did not forget our promise.
那刻夏老师也确实还活着，并且就在启蒙王座…至少这件事上，卡吕普索阁下并没有说谎。
Anaxa is indeed still alive, and he's at the Luminary Throne right now... It seems like Lady Calypso did not lie regarding this.
似乎是「莲食学派」的所有者。
She seems to be the head of the Lotophagists.
唔，原来大家找到幸存者啦！不过，金丝似乎一直没感应到你们说的人呢。
Oh, so you found a survivor! But the golden thread doesn't seem to be able to sense the person you're talking about.
一位路过的迷之好心人。
唔，原来大家遇到好心人帮忙啦！不过，金丝似乎一直没感应到你们说的人呢。
Oh, so you received help from a kind-hearted person! But the golden thread doesn't seem to be able to sense the person you're talking about.
一个在树庭游荡的…幽灵？
A spirit... wandering around the Grove?
呜哇，幽灵…缇安好想见识一下，连金丝都感应不到的幽灵！
Whoa! A spirit... Trianne wants to meet this spirit that even the gold thread can't sense!
小卡，来认识一下我们的另一位同伴吧！
Cal, come and meet our other companion!
Hm? Where did she go off to...
来无影去无踪啊…真是个怪人。
Coming and going without a trace... She's such a strange person.
唔，其实缇安还找到了这个——会不会和你们说的那个人有关系呀？
Oh, actually, Trianne also found this. Could this be related to the person you're talking about?
这是…一片烧焦的布料么？
This is... a piece of burnt cloth?
嗯！缇安不久前在一根树枝上找到的。缇安还顺着用金丝找了找，发现整个树庭到处都有类似的气息。
Yup! Trianne found it on a branch not long ago. Trianne even used the golden thread to search around and found that the entire Grove is giving off a similar aura.
可能是…那位那刻夏用「炼金术」留下的，想教我们做事？
Maybe... Anaxa left it behind using alchemy, in order to guide us?
缇安觉得不是。因为缇安捡到的时候，什么也没看到…而且从金线看，那个气息像是在跑来跑去！
Trianne doesn't think so. Because when Trianne picked it up, we didn't see anything at all... And judging by the golden thread, the aura seems to be all around!
…缇安大人，现在这道气息的位置在？
...Lady Trianne, where is the aura gathered at right now?
好像…就在高一点的地方，我们前面不远处。
It seems to be... a little higher and a little ahead of us.
难以置信。是为了抵御黑潮，还是……
That can't be. Was it for fending off the black tide, or perhaps...
这个「绅士之蝶」，到底是什么呀？是很厉害的守关怪物吗？
What exactly is this "Butterfly of the Vine Mine"? Is it a very powerful guardian monster?
不，怎么说呢…算是泰坦火种的一道保险吧。这只蝴蝶由{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}残存的神识幻化而成，肩负着守卫火种的职责。

No, how should I put it... It's considered a safeguard for the Titan's Coreflame. This butterfly is created from {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s remaining divine mind and bears the responsibility of guarding the Coreflame.
据说，只有向其证明心中存有「纯粹无私之爱」，才能通过蝴蝶的考验，唤醒大树开道，觐见{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。

Legend has it that someone can only pass the trial of the butterfly by proving they possess pure and unselfish love within their heart. Only then can they awaken the Great Tree to open up the path to meet {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.
But how are we... going to prove it?
对泰坦说「我爱你」就可以吗？那迷迷很擅长哦！
Will telling the Titan "I love you" work? Mem is good at doing that!
抱歉，我也不知道…毕竟这可是整个树庭、乃至翁法罗斯，都只有极少数人知晓的秘中之秘。
Sorry, but even I don't know how... After all, this is a secret among secrets that only a select few in the entire Grove and even Amphoreus know.
比起这个——缇安大人，金线有对周围产生任何反应么？
Rather than worry about this, Lady Trianne, did the golden thread react to anything around here?
唔，没有。那个不知道是什么的东西，好像还在更前面，更上面。
Umm, no. That unknown thing seems to be even farther ahead and higher up.
Uhhh, but... Isn't that a dead end up ahead?
也许，我们可以再试试看…消散的蝴蝶，会不会再对「金枝誓言」产生反应？
Perhaps we can try again... Let's see if the butterfly will still react to the Golden Bough of Vows despite having dissipated.
如果真是神话中的信物，理应会有效果。
If it's indeed the token mentioned in the legends, there should be a reaction.
Take petal from Golden Bough of Vows
你将「金枝誓言」一瓣取下，双手呈上。
You take a single petal from the Golden Bough of Vows and offer it with both hands.
The butterfly didn't even move one inch.
再坚持一会儿，心诚则灵。
Just hang on a little longer, a sincere heart will prevail.
即便是翁法罗斯本土神话，也不外乎「心诚则灵」四个字。只要你能展现出诚意，蝴蝶便绝不会无动于衷……
Even in the native myths of Amphoreus, it all boils down to "sincerity brings miracles." Show genuine intent, and the butterfly will surely respond...
…很遗憾，看起来它就是无动于衷。
拿起花瓣在蝴蝶面前晃晃。
Pick up the petal and wave it in front of the butterfly.
凭借你与小动物打交道的诸多经验，你坚信蝴蝶决不会无动于衷——除非它能忍住。
With your extensive experience in dealing with little creatures, you are certain the butterfly will not ignore you—unless it can resist the urge.
…很遗憾，看起来它确实忍住了。
...Alas, it seems it has indeed resisted the urge.
以极其挑衅的表情嚼嚼花瓣。
Chew on the petal with a highly provocative expression.
以你对人类社会普遍水准的理解，争强好胜是生命的天性——蝴蝶定当也不例外——而掠夺共同的猎物必定能唤醒这种深藏于基因中的原始本能。

Understanding the common nature of human society, you believe that the drive to compete is an innate instinct of all living beings — surely the butterfly is no exception — and that vying for shared prey should awaken this primal urge deeply embedded in its genes.
…很遗憾，看起来它拒绝了你的决斗邀请。
...Alas, it seems to have declined your challenge for a duel.
我尽力了，蝴蝶纹丝不动。
I did what I could, but the butterfly didn't even move an inch.
是不是还得用什么妙妙咒语？
Do we also have to use some kind of special spell?
「{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}呵！以『引纬』封证誓约，我向你求愿——愿你的金丝与爱缠绕我身！」
"O {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}! With the Weft as my vow, I beseech you: Entwine my body with your golden thread and affection!"
The butterfly still didn't move one inch.
缇安大人？…等等，还有迷迷，她们俩跑哪去了？
Lady Trianne? ...And even Mem? Where have they disappeared to?
<size=36>Little Gray, Little Cas... Look over here... Quick!</size>
<size=36>Memmy... is about to burst into flames!</size>
呼哇…小小灰，小小蝶！出事了，出大事了！
Waaaah... Little Gray, Little Cas! It's bad... It's very bad!
没事…好伙伴，人家没事…！只是人家的身子…稍微有点点烫…！
Don't worry, friend... I'm fine...! I just feel... a little warm...!
不过…你们要是别让人家变成这些小东西嘴里的点心，就更好了…！
But... It would be best if you could keep me from becoming a snack for these little things...!
对不起，人家不该说你们是小东西…！
Sorry, I shouldn't have called you guys "little things"...!
Calm down, we'll be right there!
既然如此，那我们先撤了。
If that's the case, let's get out of here.
缇安大人，到底发生什么了？
Lady Trianne, what exactly happened just now?
缇安和小小咪，想在附近看看，有没有机关什么的……
Trianne and Memmy were looking around to see if there were any mechanisms nearby...
结果，它看到了那块大琥珀，刚想看看，就被大家包围了！
But just as they went to take a closer look at that big piece of amber, they were surrounded!
动身吧，阁下。附近有{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}祭司的宝珠…但愿可堪一用。
Let's get a move on. The orbs belonging to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s priests should be nearby... Hopefully, they'll be of some use.
I'll... leave it in your capable hands...!
趁还没熟透…人家先想想该怎么谢罪…呜呜……
Before I'm cooked... let me first think about how to apologize... *sniffle*
终于来了，伙伴！等你们很久了……
You're finally here, friend! I've been waiting for a while now...
我们，包夹它们吧！一起让这些不懂得怜香惜玉的家伙，尝尝人家滚烫的致命引力！
Let's surround them! It's time to give this bunch of ungentlemanly fools a taste of my fiery and fatal allure!
精准而优雅，简直不费吹灰之力…这也算得上是挑战嘛？
Precision, and grace. That did not take much effort... Was this supposed to be a challenge?
…开个玩笑！人家只是想感叹一下，{NICKNAME}和小蝶两人每次面对危机都能轻松化解呢。
...Just kidding! I just wanted to marvel at how {NICKNAME} and Cas always manage to resolve crises so effortlessly.
I'm just so-so, only third best, ya know?
太谦虚啦好伙伴！那人家就勉为其难当第二，小蝶当第一吧。
Friend, you're too humble! In that case, I'll just have to settle for being second best while Cas can be the best.
哦，对！对不起，忘记小缇安了。
Oh, right! Sorry, I forgot about Trianne.
没关系！缇安，刚刚才飞下来来着。
It's all right! Trianne only just flew down.
大家没事就好。言归正传，这枚琥珀是…？
I'm glad that everyone is alright. Speaking of which, this piece of amber is...?
…是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}火种的残渣喔。
只要诸位以「金枝誓言」采撷眼前余火，献与神蝶，便能前去树冠的王座了。
To get to the throne at the treetop, gather the embers before you with the Golden Bough of Vows and present it to the divine butterfly.
呜哇…你是从哪里冒出来的？！
Whoa... Where did you come from!?
终于出现了…卡吕普索阁下。
嗯…是有段时间没见面了哪。方才那场战斗十足酣畅，吾心中实在欢喜……
Yes... It's been some time. The battle just now was a true delight, and I feel quite elated...
…看来果真能倚仗诸位，夺回吾之正身了。
...It seems like I'll really be able to rely on all of you to reclaim my true form.
…缇安大人，金线对她有反应么？
...Lady Trianne, how does the golden thread react to her?
呵呵，当然了。毕竟汝等方才拾得的残片，与吾没有分毫干系。
Hehe, obviously. After all, the fragment that you picked up just now is completely unrelated to me.
好了，速速照吾说的做便是——倘若诸位足以通过这道考验，吾便将真相如实相告吧。
Alright, just do as I say. If you're able to pass the trial, I will tell you everything truthfully.
真是的，人家最讨厌说话说一半的家伙了！
Come on, I hate people who don't finish their thoughts!
但是，要找到小那刻夏，就得去到树冠吧？
But we have to go to the treetop to find Nax anyway, right?
我差不多有头绪了。走吧，取得余火，找到她当面对质。
I've got a hunch. Come, let's collect the embers and go confront her.
按照卡吕普索所说，我们须「以『金枝誓言』采撷眼前余火」么……
According to Calypso, we just have to "gather the embers before us with the Golden Bough of Vows"...
金色的睡莲甫一与琥珀相接，火光便自花瓣流溢而出。
As the golden water lily touches the amber, flames spill from its petals.
神奇的是，火焰并未吞噬整个花朵，仅有些微火星汇聚于瓣尖，隐隐燃烧。
Curiously, the fire does not consume the entire flower. Only faint sparks gather at the tips, subtly burning.
呵呵，看来诸位已采得余火了。
Hehe, it seems like you managed to gather the embers.
既已至此…就将其供奉神蝶罢。
In that case... just offer it to the divine butterfly.
没关系，阁下，就照她说的做吧。
It'll be fine. Let's just do as she says.
(Offer the faintly burning Golden Bough of Vows.)
It's a success! The path has appeared...
呵…诸位果真通过考验了啊。
Heh... All of you have indeed passed the trial.
Hmm? The sound of a butterfly's wings...
Of course, our promise still stands...
只是，现在…轮到吾献身了。
But now... It's time for me to sacrifice myself.
若西风有其尽头，吾等便在那重逢罢。
If the west wind ever ends, let that be the place where we reunite.
感谢诸位相助——现在应由吾来履行约定了。
Thank you so much for your help. Now it's time for me to fulfill my part of the promise.
事已至此，就由我来起头好了……
Well, in that case, I can start...
您…其实正是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>理性之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>瑟希斯</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>本尊</color>吧？
什、什么情况？你？泰坦本尊？
Wh—What's going on? You're the Titan?
啊呀，人子们…终于通过最后一道考验了。
Oh my, the children of humanity... have passed the final trial at last.
吾还在想，汝等要到何时才打算揭穿吾呢。怎么发现的？
I was wondering when you were planning to expose me. How did you know?
谜题般的试炼、多疑却直诚的性格、称{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}为吾爱，还有……
The riddle-like trials, your distrustful-yet-sincere character, referring to {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} as your love, and...
「莲食学派」的掌门人，其真名为美狄亚，而非卡吕普索。
The head of the Lotophagists is actually called Medea and not Calypso.
既然汝从初时起便明白吾并非其人，怎到了现在才戳穿？
Since you knew from the start that I was not who I said I was, why did you wait until now to expose me?
因为我不相信{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}竟会以人形行走在大地上，也担忧泰坦已遭黑潮挟制，恐将置我们于死地……

Because I did not believe that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} would walk this world in a human form. I was also afraid that the Titans were under the control of the black tide and would do us harm...
还有，「出言必有据」——这正是我在树庭求学时习得的宝贵知识。
Also, "to make a claim, one must have evidence" — this is the precious knowledge that I acquired during my time at the Grove.
呵…甚好。吾等竟能于死境中取得如此生机，命运还真是深奥难解哪。
Heh... Excellent. To think we were able to gain a new chance at life in the midst of death — fate truly is a mysterious thing.
既然如此…也该告诉我们，您为何要大费周章，设下如此谜题了吧？
Well... Shouldn't you also tell us why you went through all the trouble of setting up these riddles?
吾需要帮助——可就像诸位对吾有所提防一样，吾也须确保，汝等并非妄图染指火种的恶徒，且有能耐对付近在眼前的威胁。

I needed your help, and just like how you were wary of me, I had to ensure that you were not villains who were trying to get their hands on the Coreflame. I also had to ascertain that you were capable of dealing with the threat at hand.
Is this threat related to the black tide?
正是，更与方才那失物有关。其主人乃是沉默且多疑的猎手，似是自黑潮中脱胎，与黑潮一道袭来。
Indeed, and it's even more related to that lost item from before. Its owner is a quiet and paranoid hunter who seems to have been reborn from the black tide and is attacking along with it.
吾实在奈何他不得，只得裂身而逃，以免戕害，迁延日月，伺机求援。可惜，这也并非长久之计。
As I could not do anything about them, I split my body up and escaped to avoid harm. I bided my time for a chance to seek assistance. Unfortunately, this was not a sustainable long-term plan.
唔…你的意思是，你把自己的火种藏起来了？
Uh... What you mean is that you hid your own Coreflame?
正是，分作了三份。一份藏于「金枝誓言」中，一份与{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的余火一道封入琥珀……
Indeed, I split it into three. I hid one within the Golden Bough of Vows, and sealed another in the amber along with {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s remaining embers...
至于那最后一份…<color=#dbc291ff>如今正在那刻夏的躯壳中，亟待修复呢</color>。
As for the last one... <color=#dbc291ff>It's currently in Anaxa's body, which is in dire need of repair</color>.
什么？难道说，你是用这种方法……
What? Do you mean that, you're using such a method...
呵呵，毕竟树庭的学者们为了捍卫吾之火种，不惜赴火蹈刃，从容就义…吾既贵为尊神，若只眼睁睁看着人子们舍己成人，未免太没面子。

Hehe, after all, the scholars of the Grove have always been willing to lay down their lives to defend my Coreflame... As a respected god, it would be too embarrassing if I were to do nothing and simply watch the children of humanity give up their lives for me.
尤其是那名唤那刻夏的异端——不惜磔裂灵魂当作础石，引发奇迹，在这树庭中布下天罗地网，将一众黑潮造物困于樊笼中，以免殃及他方。

Especially that heretic named Anaxa. He did not even hesitate to tear his soul apart and use it to perform a miracle. He trapped all the creations of the black tide within the Grove so that they would not be able to harm others.
吾觉着这道思想如此奇异，随黑潮白白消散实属可惜，便出手救了人子一命。
His way of thinking was so out-of-the-ordinary that I felt it would be a waste for him to meet his demise in the black tide. And so, I decided to save his life.
当然，吾也得以匿身潜藏…嗯，这也是「等价交换」的一道侧面吧？
Of course, this also meant that I was able to conceal myself and remain hidden... Well, that's also an "equivalent exchange," right?
啊，人家搞明白了！所以，你是想借我们之手，把自己的火种再拼起来，还能救活那刻夏！
Ah, I finally understand! So, you want us to lend you a hand in piecing your Coreflame back together! We'll also be able to save Anaxa that way!
真是只伶俐的小兔子。如此，吾既能夺回正身，汝等也能将火种和恩师迎回奥赫玛……
What a smart little bunny. This way, I'll be able to regain my true form, and you will be able to bring the Coreflame and your teacher back to Okhema...
…还有，与诸位一道会猎于王座，将那黑衣的剑士一举拿下。
...We'll also take down the black-robed swordmaster at the throne, together in one go.
可是…瑟希斯，你不是理性之泰坦嘛？
But... Cerces, aren't you the Reason Titan?
呵呵…虽然不得「纷争」权柄，可吾毕竟也贵为神灵哪？
Heh... Even if I do not have the authority of Strife, I'm still a god.
只须得各位，在那斗士剑下为吾多争取些时间…一旦火种铸成，吾便能及锋一试。
I just need you to buy me some time against the warrior's blade... Once the Coreflame is re-formed, I'll be able to show my hand.
交给我吧，我最会拉扯了。
Just leave it to me. Buying time is my specialty.
Let's take him down in one go!
甚好。那么，就向上攀登，到吾之王座去吧。
Excellent. Then, just continue climbing to reach my throne.
将「金枝誓言」化作柴薪，令理性之火种再度燎燃……
Turn the Golden Bough of Vows into firewood to reignite the Coreflame of Reason...
也是…我们即将踏上的战场。
And also... the battlefield that we're about to step onto.
伙伴们，你们感觉到了吗？
这里的记忆，味道十分强烈……
The memories here have a very intense smell...
…这是蔺草、飞沙和烈日才有的味道。
...It's the scent of bulrush, sand, and the blazing sun.
{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}没说错，他果然在这里。
{RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} was right. He's indeed here.
他、他还在昏迷吗？{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}又在哪儿？
I—Is he still unconscious? Where's {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}?
这个人，它就是刚才那缕味道、回忆的源头…不，它简直就是回忆本身！
This person is the source of the smell and the memory... No, he's basically the memory itself!
燃烧的仙境、破碎的太阳，还有……
The burning paradise, the shattered sun, and...
各位，做好准备…想必它就是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}方才所说的，自黑潮中脱胎的猎手了——
Everyone, brace yourself... This must be the hunter reborn from the black tide that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} was talking about...
那缕残纱的主人…送来{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}死雾的北风。
The owner of the piece of cloth... The north wind that sent over the deathly fog of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.
大家…快逃！只有我们…只有我们是赢不了它的……
Quick... run! It's just us... We won't be able to defeat them...
等到泰坦进攻就会好起来的。
Things will get better when the Titan attacks.
嗯，我们尽量为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}争取时间。
That's right, let's do our best to buy time for {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.
I—Is there still time for us to escape now...
它已经发现我们了…我们尽量为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}争取时间。
He has already discovered us... Let's do our best to buy time for {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.
缇、缇安也会保护大家的，缇安很勇敢！
T—Trianne will also protect everyone! Trianne is brave!
唯有这次…愿「死亡」捍卫你我！
Only this time... may Death protect us!
浴场都是人呢。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}被击败后，城中战士终于可以放松些时日了。
The baths are bustling. Now that {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has fallen, the soldiers in the city can finally catch a break.
那是…缇宝大人和缇安大人？
Is that... Lady Tribbie and Lady Trianne?
唉，两位大人…真让人摸不清头脑。
It's so hard to understand what they're thinking sometimes...
好啦，这算是路上的小插曲。
Alright, back to business after that little detour.
我们接着赶路吧，阁下请跟紧我——阿格莱雅女士已经等了些时候了。
Let's keep moving. Don't stray far now — we've already kept Lady Aglaea waiting long enough.
看来，阁下的朋友早已到了。
It seems your friend arrived before us.
我看到她和缇安大人了！…可她们在围着谁呢？
Look, there she is... and Lady Trianne! But who's that they're looking at?
大家，跟缇安走！从奥赫玛，飞呀飞！
Everybody, follow Trianne! Fly, fly, fly away from Okhema!
Look, a huge tree! It's... huge!
Wow, it's so majestic! {NICKNAME}, hurry up and capture this moment!
还真是静得出奇啊…发生什么了？
This place is too quiet... What in the world is going on?
缇安，找到了——大家可以飞到对面去！
Trianne found it! Everybody, fly across to the other side!
The entrance on the other side... Where could it be?
Little Gray's eyes are so sharp!
不愧是阁下。前方…应是慈爱之庭了。
I knew you would find it. The Courtyard of Storge should be just ahead of us.
Oh... Trianne will be on high alert!
The smell of Death... is becoming more and more intense.
果然，「黑色」的「利剑」和「斗篷」……
嗅嗅…会有记忆的气息吗？
I wonder if I'll find any memories.
或许能找到有价值的记忆——人家试试看。
Maybe I'll find some useful memories here... Let me try.
呀，门能打开了！原来那道讯息还是个门锁呀。
Hey, the door can finally be opened! It seems like that message also served as a lock.
炼金就是这么…不可思议。
「神明眷顾沃土，遍地欣欣如火……」
"Happiness abounded in this lush land by gods chosen..."
慢、慢一点，不要打草惊蛇！
S—Slow down. We don't want to alert them.
只要令水车转动，便能随之拾级而上……
As long as we can get the water wheel turning, we'll be able to use it to ascend...
Is that the... "Chamber of Purifying Tears"?
...Why exactly did you bring us here?
嗯？宝珠映出的时空…生着睡莲呢。
Hm? The time dimension revealed by the orb shows... water lilies growing there.
这花看起来软蓬蓬的…嘿，我跳！
This flower looks so soft and fluffy... Heh, watch this!
嗯？这里竟还存放着<color=#dbc291ff>「灵液匣」</color>么……
Huh? There are <color=#dbc291ff>ichor vessels</color> stored here...
哇…原来花是这样长出来的呀！
Wow... So, this is how flowers are grown!
Let's hope that this is not a trap set by her...
池塘后方有条密道，走这边快些。
There's a secret passageway behind the pond. It's faster if we take that path.
...How do you know this place so well?
毕竟…我是七贤人之一哪？
Well... I'm one of the Seven Sages after all.
好了，去乘坐水车吧？吾在上边恭候各位。
Alright, go ride the water wheel. I'll wait for you up there.
呃…原来你根本用不着水车啊。
Eh... So, you don't actually have to take the water wheel?
说起来，汝等还有位红发的同伴不是？
Speaking of which, don't you also have a red-haired companion?
不是吧…你到底对我们了解到什么程度？
Seriously... Exactly how much do you know about us?
呵呵，没多少。只是似乎听见蜜蜂嗡嗡振翅的声音了。
Hehe, not too much. It's just that I seem to hear the sound of a bee buzzing around.
阁下，你的比喻…真不敢让人恭维。
Lady, your metaphors... are not worthy of praise at all.
呼，终于能呼吸到新鲜空气了！
嘶，吹得人家毛冷飕飕的……
Brr... But the wind feels so chilly...
卡吕普索…你到底在隐瞒什么？
Calypso... Just what are you hiding?
唔，金线抖得越来越厉害了……
Ugh, the golden thread is vibrating more and more violently...
Everyone, let's be even more cautious.
没人…等等，「神识之蝶」不见了？
There's no one... Hold on, the Butterfly of Divine Mind is gone?
声音是从「逐星天井」传来的，我们快走。
The voice seems to be coming from the Star-Chase Atrium.
{RUBY_B#人家感觉…凉快多了…！}咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟……{RUBY_E#}
{RUBY_B#It feels so much cooler now!}Bloop bloop bloop bloop...{RUBY_E#}
天上飘来睡莲了…好厉害！大家是不是可以走上去？
I see water lilies floating in the sky... So cool! Can we walk on it?
打通了！大家，跑快点，小小咪已经烫得跳起来了！
It's connected! Let's hurry! Memmy is already bouncing around due to the heat!
才、才不是…这是人家表达歉意的甜美舞蹈…！
N—No... This is a sweet little dance to express my apologies...!
糟了，阁下。我能闻到香味了。
Oh no, I'm starting to smell something delicious.
哈哈…那一定是人家忍不住释放的优雅魅力吧？
Haha... That must be because I can't help giving off an irresistible charm.
手感有七分…不，九分甚至十分火热呀…！
It feels like I've reached medium-well... No, perhaps I'm on the verge of becoming well-done...!
唔，接下来…把它献给蝴蝶就可以了？
Uhh, so... We just have to present it to the butterfly?
交给你们啦，人子们。祝君好运。
I'll leave it to you, children of humanity. May you be blessed with good fortune.
看来…一场恶战在所难免了。
It seems like... a fierce battle will be inevitable.
大家，不用担心！缇安保护大家！
Don't worry! Trianne will protect everyone!
Ha... My eyes can no longer see...
无妨…只要把这副身体置入阵眼……
No matter... All I have to do is to place this body at the core of the array...
为了翁法罗斯…给我陪葬吧，泰坦。
For the sake of Amphoreus... Die with me, Titan.
好强…{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}说的是真的……
她人呢？火种还没拼好吗！
Where is she? Is the Coreflame still not pieced together yet!?
Offer your souls... to the fire.
偷袭不成，就难再次得手了…可惜。
Since the ambush failed, it'll be difficult to find another opportunity... What a pity.
那刻夏老师？不…是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}？
You're finally here! I missed you so much!
难缠。人子们，切勿动摇，逐个击破便是。
How annoying. Children of humanity, don't waver now. Let's just destroy them one by one.
呵呵，真要应接不暇了——战斗竟比思考累人得多哪。
Heh, I'm about to be overwhelmed. Fighting is so much more tiring than thinking.
各位，麻烦互相看好背后！
啊呀，人子们…哪面是背来着？
Ahh, children of humanity... Which side is the back?
老师…不，泰坦，别开玩笑了…！
不容易…吾要精疲力尽了。
That was tough... I'm truly exhausted.
别担心，小敌。这种情况也不是第一次啦，很久以前……
Don't worry, De. This isn't the first time he's been like this. A long time ago—
Oh... Alright. You're a little quiet, though.
…失礼了，我不该这么粗鲁。那个男人能挺过去，我心里清楚。
...I'm sorry, that was rude of me. What I meant was, I know that man can pull through for sure.
没关系啦，直接一点，才像是你的风格。
Hehe, it's alright! Being straightforward suits you better.
小敌，*我们*想问的是…你在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的试炼里看到了什么？
Actually, De, there's something we are curious about... What did you see in {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s trial?
讽刺么？悬锋人的字典里本不该有「害怕」二字。
Isn't that ironic? There shouldn't even be a word for "fear" in the Kremnoan language.
你觉得…自己有机会战胜它吗？令你害怕的那样东西？
Do you think... you stand a chance? Against that thing that terrifies you?
这也在你们的布局中么？
Is this also part of your grand scheme?
阿格莱雅知道白厄可能会失败……
Aglaea knew that Phainon might fall...
让我成为他的递补，你们原本就是这么打算的。
...And she expected me to take his place. That was the plan all along, wasn't it?
我并无谴责之意。逐火之旅不是儿戏，这我早有觉悟。
I have no intention of condemning you for it. The Flame-Chase Journey is not a game, and I have long understood this.
「纷争」陨落，黑潮的威胁再度加剧…倘若{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}也受到影响，后果不堪设想。

With the downfall of Strife and the ever-growing threat that the black tide poses, if {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} are also impacted, the ramifications will be dire.
是啊。它们是唯二尚存理智，还愿意与人类共存的泰坦了。
Mm-hmm. They are the only two Titans who are still lucid and willing to coexist with humanity.
可惜，完成试炼的关键不在于我。若想战胜那道恐惧，我需要其他悬锋族人的帮助。
Regrettably, I do not hold the key to completing the trial. If I wish to conquer that fear, I need the assistance of my fellow Kremnoans.
给我些时间，让我和族人对话…不会花上太久。
Give me some time to speak with my people... It won't take long, I promise.
噢，人多力量大，对吧？不过半神的试炼终究要落到个人身上……
Ah, I see — there is strength in numbers. But you must know that the trial to become a demigod is ultimately meant for only one individual.
小敌，你的族人…始终在期盼一位新王加冕，是吗？
De, your people... They have been eagerly awaiting a new king all this time, haven't they?
如果接过神权的是你，他们一定会心甘情愿追随的…因为你是悬锋城的英雄。
If you take on the divine role, they will have no reservations about following your lead... After all, you're the hero of Castrum Kremnos.
我曾经是。而这，缇里西庇俄丝女士……
I once was. But Lady Tribios...
这就是我心中<color=#dbc291ff>最深的恐惧</color>。
...We'll talk again later. I'll be back.
无论发生什么，*我们*都会站在你背后的。
Regardless of what happens, we will always be there for you.
孩子们，别在这里嬉戏打闹。
You shouldn't run around in here, kids.
呀，是王子！王子也是来泡澡吗？
Hey, it's the crown prince! Are you also here for a bath?
喔，王子来了！ / 今天真走运！ / 我想听你讲战场上的故事！
Oh, the prince has arrived! / What a lucky day! / I want to hear your tales from the battlefield!
王子…你们，都是悬锋之子？
The crown prince...? Are you Kremnoans?
没错，我们都是悬锋人！听长辈说，我家以前就住在竞技场隔壁…的隔壁！
Yeah, we are! The grown-ups said we used to live next to the arena! ...Well, next to the parts next to it anyway!
我爸爸是蛇妖枪骑兵队的百夫长，妈妈是神盾旅最勇敢的战士，<color=#dbc291ff>克拉特鲁斯爷爷</color>给我家发过好多好多银币呢！
My dad is a centurion with the Hydra Lancers, and my mom is the bravest warrior in the Godshield Brigade. We used to get tons of silver coins from <color=#dbc291ff>Mr. Krateros</color>!
我父母现在在圣城守备队中服役…他们是悬锋的战士，比所有奥赫玛人都勇敢。
My parents are serving in the Holy City Garrison now. As warriors of Kremnos, they're braver than any Okheman!
怎么只有你们几个？大人呢？
Why are you kids here alone? Where are the grown-ups?
嘿，爸爸妈妈都睡着啦，我们是偷偷溜出来的，和克拉特鲁斯爷爷玩捉迷藏！
Hee-hee, Mom and Dad were asleep, so we snuck out to play hide-and-seek with Mr. Krateros!
这老顽童…我正好有事找他，克拉特鲁斯在何处？
That old man can be such a child sometimes... Do you know where Krateros is? I happen to be looking for him.
不知道。好一会儿没见他了，不会是找不着我们了吧？
Sorry, I don't. Come to think of it, we haven't seen him in a while. Did he get lost while trying to find us?
怎么可能，克拉特鲁斯爷爷可是{RUBY_B#国王近身护卫官}王翼冠军{RUBY_E#}，最擅长追踪敌人了。
No way! Mr. Krateros is a member of the {RUBY_B#King's Guards}King's Aegis{RUBY_E#}. He's the best at hunting down enemies!
他前边在真言狮口那儿数数呢。我好奇想跑过去瞧瞧，但又怕是他设下的陷阱……
He was counting near Verax Leo when we went to hide. I thought about taking a peek, but who knows if it might be a trap he set?
不错，很警惕。真言狮口，哪一个？
It was prudent of you to be cautious. So, which Verax Leo was he with?
就在…这里出去，拐几个弯…反正就在浴场附近！
It's... Um, just take a few turns after you go out from here... It's close to the baths!
我去找他。你们就当游戏已经结束，趁早回家吧。下次别在高温浴池区玩耍了。
Alright, I'll go look for him. You should consider the game over and head home for now. And don't play around the hot baths again!
我听人们说，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的火种已经被您接回来了……
I heard you retrieved {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} Coreflame...
我们…是不是很快就能回家了？
Does that mean... we get to go back home soon?
你们几个，可曾去过悬锋城？
Have you ever been to Castrum Kremnos?
你们出生在圣城，生活与奥赫玛人无异，对一族的了解也只来自旁人口述。
You were all born in the holy city and are living lives no different from the Okhemans. Everything you know about our people comes only from the tales of others.
你们甚至没有亲眼见过那柄天上的锋刃…既然如此，何谈返乡？
You have never even witnessed that blade in the sky with your own eyes... How, then, is a city you have never seen your home?
Because this place is definitely not home.
爸爸妈妈说，悬锋的孩子打出生起就手持利剑，注定要奔向战场。
Mom and Dad told me that the children of Kremnos are born to wield swords and fight on the battlefield.
他们还说，王子率领的{RUBY_B#悬锋城流亡军}悬锋孤军{RUBY_E#}是翁法罗斯最勇猛的军队，战无不胜。
They also said that the {RUBY_B#Kremnoan army in exile}Kremnoan Detachment{RUBY_E#} led by the crown prince is the bravest army across all of Amphoreus. No one can defeat them!
圣城的小孩子不愿和我们一起玩。知道爸爸妈妈是悬锋人，他们就躲得远远的……
The kids in the holy city don't play with us. The moment they find out that our parents are Kremnoans, they shun us...
但我们不在乎。所有人都知道，总有一天，王子会带我们还乡！
But we don't care. We all know that the crown prince will take us home one day!
还不是时候。悬锋的年轻人，听我口令：回到父母身边，从今日起，把全部时间用在饮食和锻炼上。想成为合格的悬锋勇士，这两件事决不能落下。

That time has not yet arrived, but... Young men of Kremnos, heed my command! Return to your parents at once. From hereon, you are to dedicate yourselves to rigorous training and a healthy diet. You must not neglect these two aspects if you are to become a brave warrior of Kremnos.
唯有如此，你们才具备「还乡」的资格。
Only by following this path can you be deemed worthy of returning home.
糟了，是他，那悬锋城的王储……
Drat! It's the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos...
慌什么！有元老院的指示，黄金裔也不敢对我们怎么样。
Get a grip! We're here by order of the Council of Elders. Even the Chrysos Heirs have to think twice before doing anything to us.
Out of my way, lackeys of the Council.
奥、奥赫玛的宪兵队正在执行公务，请勿随便靠近！
Th—The Civil Guard of Okhema is on official duty. Please keep out of this area!
Calm down, my lord. Play nice...
这次，呃…这次就先放你过去，下、下不为例！
I—I'll allow you to pass this time... but just this once!
你觉得自己博古通今？那我考考你，你可知道悬锋城的黄金狮首，是怎么被砌到墙上去的？
So, you think yourself knowledgeable? Then here is a question for you: Do you know how Chryseus Leo in Castrum Kremnos came to be mounted on the wall?
我…我不知道啊，大人，哈哈…怎么上去的？
I—I don't know, my lord, ahaha... How did it come to be?
哈哈哈，那我就给你说道说道。当年，悬锋城的建立者带着一众战士在特雷托斯城郊围猎雄狮……
Hahaha! Let me enlighten you. A long time ago, the founder of Castrum Kremnos led a group of warriors to hunt down a lion on the outskirts of the city of Tretos.
那牙尖爪利的恶兽为害多年，巢穴里的骸骨垒得比环绕奥赫玛的山峰还高。
That vicious beast had been a menace for years, and the bones in its den were stacked even higher than the peaks around Okhema.
可你猜怎么着？那畜生刚一探头，悬锋的战士就立刻冲上前去，电光石火间将它抱摔在地，只一击就劈碎了它的膝盖。然后……

But do you know what happened? Nary a moment had passed after the beast's head peeked out of its den when the Kremnoan warriors surged forward and brought it down within the blink of an eye, shattering its knees with a single strike! And then—
还没到精彩处呢，你怎么就脸红了？
...Why are you red-faced already? We haven't even gotten to the best part yet!
您、是您讲得太生动了，听得我精神焕发！您继续，大人……
I—It's your storytelling, my lord. You're weaving such a captivating tale that it got my blood pumping. Please, go on...
——哎哟，这不是，万敌阁下嘛？！真是好久不见哪，哈，哈哈……
— Well, well. If it isn't Lord Mydei! It's been a while, ahaha...
哦？这奥赫玛吹的是什么风……
Oho, what in Okhema is happening?
居然把<color=#dbc291ff>歌耳戈之子</color>带到我面前了？
To what do I owe the pleasure, <color=#dbc291ff>son of Gorgo</color>?
换个地方说话吧，迈德漠斯。跟这石头脑袋交谈，我已经厌烦了。
Let's talk somewhere else, Mydeimos. I'm tired of speaking with this silly lion.
元老院的眼线，不用管么？
两条装模作样的鬣狗，只知道捡食腐肉，压根没有咬人的本事。
Those two hyenas are nothing but scavengers of rotten meat. They couldn't bite even if they tried.
走吧，让他们跟着也无妨。
They can follow us if they want to. Let's go.
所以，那黄金狮子到底是怎么上的墙？
Wait, so how in the world did Chryseus Leo get mounted on the wall!?
这里不错，适合私下谈话。
This is a nice spot for a private chat.
说吧，你有何事要找我这老人商量？
So, tell me, why have you come to seek this old man's counsel?
我想与你讨论…悬锋族人的未来。
I came to discuss... the future of the Kremnoans.
有趣。我听闻{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的火种已然归位，却并非由你亲手交还。你甚至想将尼卡多利的神力拱手相让——此事当真？

Interesting. I heard the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury has been restored — though not by your hand — and you're even considering giving up {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} divine power. Is this true?
Those rumors are not entirely groundless.
言外之意…你曾想过放弃悬锋的王权，放弃领导你的族人。
In other words... you did entertain the thought of giving up the throne of Kremnos and forsaking your people.
神力不等同于王权，我族的出路也不止「纷争」一条——
The divine power is not equivalent to the throne. The path of Strife is also not our people's only way—
——文字游戏！你对悬锋人的境遇心知肚明。
...Enough with the word games! You, of all people, should understand the plight of the Kremnoans!
随你一同离开故乡的悬锋孤军，还有他们的后人…支撑我们走到现在的，正是对旧日荣光的渴望。
Think about all the warriors of the Kremnoan Detachment who left their homeland with you! Think about their children! ...Only the yearning for our former glory days has kept us going all this time.
假如让他们知道，备受族人尊崇的王储萌生了放弃的念头…迈德漠斯，你该如何向你逝去的母亲交代？
If they ever learn that the crown prince they look up to so much is actually toying with the notion of stepping down... think of the disgrace it would bring upon your departed mother, Mydeimos.
别忘了，她可是为了你——为了重振悬锋的荣光——才会死于{RUBY_B#悬锋先王，万敌之父}欧利庞{RUBY_E#}的毒计！
You'd best remember that she died for you because of {RUBY_B#Former Kremnoan King, Father of Mydei}Eurypon's{RUBY_E#} schemes! To restore the glory of Kremnos!
既然话已说到这个份上…我问你，是谁杀死了父亲？
Since you've brought that up... Tell me, who is responsible for my father's death?
你是在羞辱我吗，迈德漠斯？我是老了，但还没老到愚痴。我当然记得，欧利庞死于悬锋孤军的围剿……
Are you trying to shame me, Mydeimos? I may be old, but I haven't become so decrepit that I've forgotten it all. Of course, I remember that Eurypon died when the Kremnoan Detachment surrounded him.
<color=#dbc291ff>是你亲手用长矛贯穿了他的胸膛。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You drove the spear into his chest with your very own hands.</color>
That was merely the final outcome.
你还没看清吗，吾师？将我的父母，还有悬锋一族送上末路的，正是你我口中的「纷争」，对所谓荣光的追逐，一声声「宁战死，毋荣归」的口号……
Do you still not see it? What led my parents and our people to their downfall is none other than this Strife we speak of. The quest for glory, the tenet of "Valorous Death Before Glorious Return"...
是每一个悬锋人的执念，无论它正确与否。
This is the creed of every Kremnoan, no matter whether these beliefs are justified or not.
可笑。能杀死一位王的只有长枪，就连悬锋的婴儿都明白这个道理。
Don't be ridiculous. The only thing that could slay a king is a spear... Even an infant knows that much.
我曾向你的母亲发誓，要以生命捍卫你的王冠。但我未曾想过，歌耳戈之子会带头质疑…背叛悬锋精神。
I swore to your mother that I would guard your crown with my life... I never foresaw that the son of Gorgo himself would be the first to turn his back on the Kremnoan spirit.
「歌耳戈」…你的母亲与悬锋城的建立者同名，她的作为也配得上这名字的重量。但你——你若要远离她的荣光，做个逃兵…恕我无法再献上自己的忠诚，迈德漠斯。

Gorgo... Your mother bore that name, the name of the great founder of Castrum Kremnos, and she upheld that name with honor. If you choose to turn your back on her legacy like a wretched deserter... do not fault me for withholding my loyalty, Mydeimos.
我本想与你共议族人的未来。但…现在似乎不是时候。
I came to discuss the future of our people with you, but... it appears this is not the right time yet.
走吧，万敌——那些黄金裔是这么称呼你的——走你自以为正确的道路。你骨子里是个我行我素的战士，一旦下定决心，没人能阻止你。

Go, Mydei... Hah, that's what those Chrysos Heirs call you, isn't it? Go down the path you have deemed correct. Deep down, you have always been one to do as you please, and I am well aware that no one can deter you once you've made up your mind.
可是不要妄图否定悬锋的传统…我们身在奥赫玛，但永远是「纷争」的子民。
But don't you ever dream of renouncing the traditions of Kremnos... We may reside in Okhema now, but we remain eternally bound to Strife by blood.
在行将毁灭的时代，谈论血统没有意义。
Bloodlines no longer hold any significance in this era of destruction.
少主，记住：切勿将软肋示人，一头雄狮绝不应混迹于它的猎物之中……
My young lord, always bear this in mind: Never reveal your vulnerabilities to anyone. A lion should never dwell amidst its prey...
尤其，是它足以主宰整片猎场的时候。
...Especially when it wields power enough to dominate the entire hunting ground.
欧利庞，{RUBY_B#万敌}这孩子{RUBY_E#}没做错任何事！
这是一场谋杀！别让婴孩无辜的鲜血玷污悬锋人的荣耀——别把软肋暴露给你的敌人！
This is murder! Do not sully the noble name of Kremnos with the blood of an innocent child! You mustn't reveal your weaknesses to the enemy!
够了！朕心意已决。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的战魂必须用这孩子的命延续。
Enough! My decision is final. We must use this child's life to preserve the soul of the great {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.
荒谬！他的手就连枪头都举不起来，你觉得他能威胁到悬锋城？
Don't be absurd! Those tiny hands lack the strength to even lift a spear! Do you truly believe him a threat to Castrum Kremnos!?
你要是真这么做，那才是断绝了悬锋的血脉——让我们千百年的荣光变成彻头彻尾的笑柄！
You'll be ending the bloodline of Kremnos if you do this. Our millennia-old glory will become nothing more than a joke!
你忘了，悬锋人不相信血脉。我们的王只能从{RUBY_B#悬锋祭典}浴血的角斗{RUBY_E#}中诞生……

Have you forgotten that we Kremnoans place no value in bloodlines? It is through {RUBY_B#Kremnos Festival}pure bloodshed and slaughter{RUBY_E#} that the kings of Kremnos have ascended to the throne...
至于悬锋城千百年的「荣光」，那本来就是个笑话——杀戮就是杀戮，为虚荣而高兴的杀人凶手，并不比翁法罗斯最凶蛮的野兽更高贵。

As for our millennia-old "glory"... it has always been a joke in my eyes. Glorify it all you want, but it will not alter the nature of slaughter. Those who revel in it are but murderers. They are no more noble than the most monstrous beasts in Amphoreus.
大言不惭！你，还有悬锋诸王，你们的每一顶王冠，哪个不是从父辈的尸身摘得……
Enough with your words! Among all the kings of Kremnos, which one did not inherit the crown only after plucking it from the lifeless body of his father?
可现在呢？难道你想用短短几句话，洗清自己染血的双手么？
But listen to yourself now! Do you truly believe you can cleanse the blood from your hands through mere words alone?
不，恰恰相反：我正要结束这血腥的循环……
Nay, quite the contrary. I will end this cycle of bloodshed...
就从这孩子开始——就在我染血的双手中结束。
...Starting with this child. With these bloodstained hands, I will end it all.
你做不到，欧利庞！你只是个懦夫，一个只敢将屠刀挥向自己骨肉的卑鄙小人，弑亲禽兽……
Your failure is inevitable, Eurypon! You are just a coward who can only raise his blade against his own child! A beast that murders his own kin!
王翼冠军们、督政官们，你们不能袖手旁观！如果你们还是光荣的{RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子，就提枪跟上我，结束这场血腥的闹剧！

King's Aegis and Ephors of Kremnos, you cannot sit idly by and watch this atrocity unfold! If you consider yourselves the honorable sons and daughters of {RUBY_B#Kremnos Founder}Gorgo{RUBY_E#}, then take up your spears and join me in putting an end to this bloody charade!
可还有人…提出异议？若有，就拿上铜枪，上前来证明自己！
...Does anyone else have any objections? If so, come forward with your spear and prove your mettle!
没有人敢随我来么？你们这些懦夫，那王冠竟让你们变得如此软弱？
No one dares stand by my side? Cowards! Has that crown stripped you of your courage!?
看来无人提出异议。基于悬锋元老院「一致沉默」之原则，此事已无复议必要。
It appears there are no objections. Then, in accordance with the Kremnoan Council's principle of tacit consent, the decision is final.
在列位公民见证下，此子将沉入冥海：以飨{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}，并与天地间众英灵。
With all present as witnesses, this child shall descend into the Sea of Souls, where he will nourish the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} and join the fallen heroes.
May fate and the gods await your arrival...
说吧。看在你我同出生、共入死的份上…朕给你最后一次机会。
If you have more to say, then speak. On account of the life we have shared together, I grant you this one final chance.
「天谴之锋」在上，并由元老院诸将士共作见证：我，歌耳戈，依悬锋法典发起「挑战王权」之动议——
With the Blade of Fury above us and the Council bearing witness, I, Gorgo, hereby move to challenge the crown in accordance with the laws of Kremnos!
失格的王啊，以元老院之名，我勒令你与我角斗！
O unworthy king, in the name of the Council of Elders, I demand that you duel me!
那就来看看…悬锋将落向谁的头颅吧。
We shall see who the Kremnoan blade strikes down.
他们总劝我遗忘…可我岂能忘记？
They all tell me to forget... But how could I ever?
{RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子，浴血代冠……
The son of {RUBY_B#Kremnos Founder}Gorgo{RUBY_E#}... will be crowned in blood.
若无王冠便无以为悬锋…那我就夺来它，掷碎它，激醒众人吧。
If there is no Kremnos without the crown... then I shall seize the crown and smash it to pieces to bring the people to their senses.
唯有啼哭与昏黑的冥海涛声回荡。
Only the cries and the waves of the Sea of Souls echoed.
Haha... the sweet taste of blood...
去给你们的疯王陪葬吧！
Join your Mad King in death!
You lot are just like me...
一段时间之前 云石天宫内
Some time before, in the Marmoreal Palace...
怎么了…是树庭那面遇到麻烦了么？
What's wrong...? Is there trouble at the Grove?
是。有一道感应转瞬即逝，但特别强烈…{M#他们}{F#她们}似乎遇见了棘手的麻烦。
Yes, I sensed something... It was fleeting, but very strong... It feels like they're in some big trouble.
Can you see what's actually happening?
不行，和平时一样模糊。但敌人的气息消失了，也许{M#他们}{F#她们}转移到了安全的地方吧…大概。
No. It's fuzzy like always, but the enemy's aura has disappeared. Maybe... they've moved to a safe place...?
但愿只是虚惊一场。相信{NICKNAME}和遐蝶吧，吾师……
Let's hope that it's just a false alarm. We should place our trust in {NICKNAME} and Castorice, teacher...
你怎么把*我们*当小孩子啦，阿雅。
Agy, you're talking like we are little kids.
总有一天，缇安会走到极限，缇宝会从她手里接过「门匠」的职责，这事*我们*心知肚明。
One day, Trianne will reach her limit, and Tribbie will take on the role of gatekeeper from her — we are all aware of that.
*我*只是…有些担心她的心智。出发前，缇安已经连短句都念不清了……
I am just... a little concerned about her state of mind. Trianne was already unable to speak even in short sentences when they left...
至少让*我们*好好道个别吧。
We want to say a proper goodbye at the very least.
谢谢。阿雅，这次得麻烦你陪*我们*去趟浴场，放松一下啦……
Thanks. And Agy, it looks like we will need you to come with us to the baths this time to unwind...
感觉，我俩都很久没有笑过了。
It feels like neither of us have laughed for a long while.
悬锋人？这片惨状…是他们造成的？
阿雅，先别管这些了，快救救伤员！
Agy, now's not the time to dwell on that. Let's help the injured people first!
二位！你们也在，那我就放心了。
Oh, you two are here as well! That's a relief.
怎么昏光庭院也来了！到底出了什么事？
Even the Twilight Courtyard is involved? What in the world happened here?
其实我只是来放松的…只是刚到附近，就见好多人横七竖八倒在地上。
I actually just came to relax... But as soon as I got here, I saw all these people lying on the ground.
我检查了一番，他们没有大碍，感觉只是…水温太高，泡得太久。
I've examined them, and they don't seem to be seriously ill. It feels like... they've just spent too much time in the hot water.
「好多人」同时因为池水高温昏迷？浴场的管理人在何处？
Multiple individuals fainting simultaneously from the hot pool's steam? Where is the manager of the baths?
他消失了，不知去向。有些人嘴里念念有词，说是「悬锋人」干的…阿格莱雅女士有头绪吗？
He disappeared, and no one knows where he's gone to. Some people have been saying that the Kremnoans are behind this... Lady Aglaea, what do you think about this?
让这些人好好休息吧。两位，随我来。
Let these people rest. The two of you, please come with me.
Have you thought of something, Agy?
当然。虽然不知道他们究竟在打什么算盘，但是时候结束这场闹剧了。
Yes. While their intentions elude me, it's time to bring this farce to a close.
De! What did you do to everybody!?
哼…不过是在又一场角斗中胜出了而已。
Tch... It's just another duel where I claimed victory.
这二人，表面上是圣城最强大的战士，但终究掩盖不了少年心性……
On the surface, these two are the mightiest warriors in the holy city, but they're still impulsive youths at heart...
说说吧，万敌？告诉我们，你和白厄做了些什么傻事。
Speak up, Mydei. Tell us exactly what kind of foolishness you and Phainon indulged in this time.
(How's your recovery coming along, my friend?)
(Winning and losing are all part of a warrior's life. Don't let it get to you.)
(Why don't you take a bath to recharge, buddy?)
(Keep your chin up. You have greater things to achieve.)
(Want to grab a drink with me, pal?)
(If you're up for it, let's have a talk.)
I see you're still alive and kicking, Deliverer.
…我没看走眼吧？了不起的「救世主」，终于愿意出门见光了？
...Am I seeing things? Is the magnificent Deliverer finally deigning to step outside?
"Hmph"...? What kind of response is that?
没什么——模仿你平时的样子罢了。
Nothing. I was just imitating your usual response.
我没在你身上感受到特别的气息…半神的考验，你通过了么？
I don't feel anything special from you... Have you passed the demigod trial?
仪式还未重启。免得你忘记——距离我将你揪出试炼才没过多久。
The ritual hasn't reopened yet. In case you forgot — It hasn't been THAT long since I pulled you out of the trial.
「…长夜最后的光亮，城垣坚固的奥赫玛。」
"In twilight's last gleam, Okhema stands bold. Her walls sturdy, tales untold."
「有多少人远道而来，以为她是常有无花果和橄榄的丰美园林……」
"Dreaming of her fruitful gardens, pilgrims arrive from distant lands. Figs and olives, O so grand..."
「…却不曾想，跌入了燃烧的炉膛？」
"...Yet little do they know, that they will step into flames, fuel to the fire, a burning brand."
What are you playing at this time?
一时来了兴致，想念几句诗而已。悬锋的王子，不会听不懂诗歌吧？
I just felt like reciting a few lines of poetry. Surely the crown prince of Kremnos knows how to appreciate poetry, right?
悬锋人不读这种软弱的文字，但{RUBY_B#歌耳巴尼帕耳大图书馆}我的图书馆{RUBY_E#}里不乏这类藏书——
Kremnoans steer clear of such weak literature, but {RUBY_B#Garbaniphoro Grand Library}my library{RUBY_E#} doesn't lack collections of this kind —
这几句表达了作者的思乡之情，正如奥赫玛离大部分人的故乡都很遥远。
These lines express the poet's yearning for their home, just as Okhema is distant from many people's homes.
哈…别装深沉了，朋友。感谢你在危机关头拉了我一把，但依我看，你也没做好试炼的准备吧？
Ha... There's no point in pretending to be profound, my friend. Thank you for helping me out when I was in a tight spot, but it seems to me that you aren't prepared for the trial either.
别把你我的处境混为一谈。我背后还有族人，在解决他们的问题前，我不能独自登神。
Don't compare your situation with mine. My people are still relying on me. I can't ascend to godhood on my own without first resolving their issues.
嚯…听你的意思，勇猛的迈德漠斯，悬锋王位的继承人，居然想打破一族延续千年的古老传统？
So... are you suggesting that you, the mighty Mydeimos and the heir to the throne of Kremnos, wish to defy the tradition that has endured among your people for millennia?
I'm still thinking about what I should do.
算了，恐怕还轮不到我来给你提建议。
Never mind. It's probably not my place to offer you counsel.
不过，我倒是突然冒出一个想法……
An idea does strike me, though...
Go ahead. Let's see what terrible ideas you've come up with this time.
或许我们都需要释放压力。来吧，迈德漠斯，延续你我之前的竞赛……
Maybe we both need to relieve some stress. Come, Mydeimos! Let's recommence our previous competition...
这次——就比比谁能在*超高温*浴池里坚持更久！
This time... We'll see who can stay in the super hot bath for longer!
悬锋人的字典里没有「怯场」二字。我只是觉得可笑。野史学家，你难道没听说过悬锋人沐浴，用的都是锻剑淬铁的滚烫铁水？

The phrase "chickening out" does not exist in the Kremnoan language. I just find the situation absurd, that's all. All-knowing historian, are you not aware that we Kremnoans use boiling water from sword forging for our baths?
今日，我就来教你这些宫廷礼数！
Looks like I'll have to teach you some royal etiquette today!
于是！一场旷古绝伦的桑拿大战开始了。
And thus, an unprecedented sauna battle commences.
那二人的决心登峰造极，强烈的意志令水汽都为之色变，气焰裹挟着水汽直冲云霄，遮天蔽日，使人目不能视……

With unparalleled resolve, the two warriors' determination even alters the very hue of the steam. Flames intertwine with scalding vapor, reaching toward the heavens, shrouding the sky and the sun. The spectacle is so magnificent that none dare gaze upon it directly...
既然看不清现场赛况…闲着也是闲着，不如来听我讲一段与「王」有关的故事吧？
Since we can't see what's happening in the competition... Why don't I regale you with a tale of "kings" to pass the time?
还记得某位老战士提及的，「歌耳戈猎狮」的传说吗？故事的主人…主狮公，其实并非一方之霸，还有一头剑羚能与之分庭抗礼。

Do you recall the legend of the "Gorgo Lion" mentioned by a certain veteran? The central figure — the "mane" character — was not the sole sovereign of that land. An oryx stood as its formidable rival.
早在黄金世前，两头野兽便已在特雷托斯平原上捉对厮杀。雄狮当剑羚作盘中餐，而剑羚视之为一堵蔑视、压迫、磨难的高墙，它誓用犄角将其推翻……

Long before the dawn of Era Chrysea, the two beasts started their timeless battle on the plains of Tretos. The lion regarded the oryx as its food, while the oryx perceived the lion as a scornful, oppressive, and challenging barrier that it swore to topple with its antlers...
于是，数万年如一日地，两头野兽在荒野中开始了角逐和追逃——
For tens of thousands of years, without respite, the two creatures thus continued their relentless pursuit and rivalry...
It fixated on its rival's fleeing form in the chase.
It set its sights on the other's neck, nearly within reach.
It was stuck in a corner.
翁法罗斯的大地上，有些生命死于黄昏，有些生命死于拂晓，而有些生命——它们命中注定死于正午的烈阳！
On the land of Amphoreus, some lives meet their end at dusk, some at dawn, and yet others... are fated to perish under the blistering sun at noon!
终于！到了一日中最为炽烈的时刻，强有力的命运应召而至——
And at last, the most scorching moment of the day descended upon them! The formidable hand of fate heeded their call and arrived...
两位阁下，需要我把温度调低些么？
My lords, would you like me to reduce the temperature a little?
Wh—What? Heh... You're chickening out already?
A—Are you asking me to get lost? Or...
不自量力地向悬锋人发出挑战，这就是下场。
This is what you get for daring to challenge a Kremnoan without understanding your own place.
我是说…你们的小小游戏，可是连带着让不少人一起遭了殃呢。
What I'm saying is... Your little game dragged down quite a few innocent souls alongside you.
…那些被杀气震晕的浴客，我们会送他们离开的。
...We will personally escort back home the customers left awestruck by our formidable presence.
You are wearing... way less... than I am...
…全副武装扎进高温浴池，这是什么新风尚吗？
...Is this the latest trend now? Getting into the baths while dressed in full armor?
别用那眼神盯着我…是他下的战书。悬锋的字典里没有「逃避」二字。
Don't look at me like that... It was he who challenged me. There is no word for "flee" in the Kremnoan language.
好了，这场闹剧就到此为止吧？勇士们，该动起来了。
Very well, let us bring this farce to a close, shall we? Warriors, it is time to get moving.
状态恢复后，白厄与万敌将晕倒的浴客们送离了案发现场……
After recovery, Phainon and Mydei escorted the fainted bathers away from the scene.
这一次的护送较量，白厄以<unbreak>27</unbreak>比<unbreak>25</unbreak>的惊人优势险胜。
This time, Phainon narrowly triumphed with a stunning <unbreak>27</unbreak> to <unbreak>25</unbreak> victory in terms of the number of trips safely escorted.
呵…逐火之旅，真是道阻且长啊。
Alas... The Flame-Chase Journey is destined to be a lengthy one, replete with obstacles.
…不过，多亏了他俩，悲伤的气氛都烟消云散了。
...But thanks to those two, all the gloom has vanished into thin air.
虽然刚经历一场闹剧，但云石天宫难得这么清净，不如继续先前的行程吧。小风堇，你也一起来吗？
Though we just had quite the commotion, it's not every day that we find the Marmoreal Palace this serene. Shall we continue with our previous plans? Hyacine, would you care to join us?
这么空旷的浴场是难得一见……
Such an empty bath is indeed a rare sight...
我本意也想在术后放松一下，那就承蒙缇宝女士邀请啦！
I was looking forward to unwinding after work. I'd be delighted to accept your invitation, Lady Tribbie!
让我先试试…水温刚好呢！
Let me check... The water temperature feels just perfect!
如何，这就是享用整座浴场的滋味。
So, how is the feeling of having the entire bath to yourselves?
不过，缇宝老师…你不一起泡泡么？
But, Lady Tribbie... Aren't you going to soak in the bath with us?
*我们*就不啦，毕竟变成小孩子了嘛。
We will have to pass. After all, we've become children.
请见谅。受{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的{RUBY_B#诅咒}赐福{RUBY_E#}影响，她已不能耐受这池子的水温了。
Please understand that she can no longer endure the heat of this pool due to the blessings of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}.
你是对*我们*的事感到好奇吗，小风堇？
是有些好奇啦，但直觉告诉我…是不是换个话题比较好？
I am, but something tells me... that it might be better to change the topic?
紧张什么呀，不是不能说的事！其实呢，*我们*在很久很久以前…也像阿雅一样，是<color=#dbc291ff>成熟的大人</color>哦。
Don't get all nervous. It's not something we can't discuss! The truth is... a long, long time ago... we were a mature adult just like Agy.
但因为种种原因，*我们*接过{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的神职，得到了「门径」的力量……
Then, because of reasons... we inherited {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' divinity and gained the power of "Passage"...
而作为交换，付出的便是<color=#dbc291ff>灵魂分裂</color>的代价。
And in return, the price we had to pay was the splitting of our soul.
每一次洞开「百界门」，都会深化分裂对缇宝她们的影响。从肉体到心智，一步步向着婴儿退行。
Each opening of the Century Gate intensifies the strain on Tribbie and the others. They are gradually regressing towards infancy, both in body and mind.
其实*我们*也不知道终点会是什么样子。总而言之，这就是*我们*变成小孩子的原因。
We don't know what awaits us at the end, either. But anyway, that's why we have turned into children.
那…先前和{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}对决时，你们在奥赫玛上空张开的巨大「百界门」，岂不是……
In that case... when you opened that giant Century Gate above Okhema during the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}...
没办法，逐火之旅注定不会一帆风顺嘛。
Well, there's no way around it. We all know that the Flame-Chase Journey won't be a smooth ride.
也许…会有办法的。智种学派的核心课题就是灵魂，针对它的损耗，或是弥补已经消散的灵魂…只要研究继续下去，没准会有新的发现。

Maybe... We can find a way to fix it. The primary research focus of Nousporists is the soul. We explore its depletion and methods to restore dispersed souls... As long as research continues, there might be a breakthrough that can help.
We will do everything we can.
第一反应竟然是否定么？不愧是那刻夏的门生。
So, your first reaction is in fact denial? You're indeed Anaxa's student.
我期待你的好消息，风堇。
I look forward to your good news, Hyacine.
哈哈，这样又多了一个盼着明天的理由呢……
Haha, now there's another reason to look forward to tomorrow...
好像…不太对劲，强烈的感应又来了…是缇安？
Something's... off. It's that strong feeling again... Is it Trianne?
Wait, no... It's not Trianne this time...
哈，这次护送浴客是我赢了。
Ha, I win this round of escorting the bathers home.
单方面开启的竞赛，如何能够作数？
How does one contender alone make a valid competition?
看看你，说两句恭维话又不会掉层皮。
Offering a compliment or two wouldn't be the end of you, you know.
海乙…你在说什么，家乡话？
Hai... What is that word? Is it your native tongue?
「鬣狗」——我在将你比作一条瘦弱的鬣狗。顺带一提，你的重音完全不对。
It means "hyena" — I'm likening you to a weak hyena. By the way, you emphasized the completely wrong syllable.
咱俩认识也有段时间了，听你说悬锋古语的次数…屈指可数啊。
Though we've been acquainted for some time, I have... rarely heard you talk in the ancient tongue of Kremnos.
因为我也不擅长这门语言。听和读不成问题。但若要让我以古语写作……
It's because I'm not exactly a master at it, either. I can listen and read just fine, but when it comes to writing...
你的发言仿佛没有脑子。
You speak as if you don't have a brain.
哈哈，开玩笑的。也难怪，毕竟你童年一直在…漂泊，离家很远。
Haha, that was in jest. I understand. After all, you... spent all your childhood wandering far from home.
多关心下你自己吧，救世主。除去自报家门的场合，你也从不提及故乡。
Worry about yourself first, Deliverer. You also never mention your hometown apart from when you need to introduce yourself.
呵…因为实在没什么可说的。哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，因为战火，早就不复存在了。
Well... It's because there isn't much to say. Aedes Elysiae is simply a tiny village that disappeared many years ago in the flames of war.
我唯一能见到它的场合就是在梦中。还有……
The only times I get to see it are in my dreams... and in...
…在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的试炼里。
...And in the trial from the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}.
嗯，我看见了，燃烧的哀丽秘榭，我的亲人、朋友、同族…所有人都倒在火海里。
Yes, I saw it all. Aedes Elysiae ablaze, with everyone — my family, friends, and my kin — lying in a sea of flames.
天上挂着半轮血日，就和那时一样，那个凶手在我面前……
A blood-red half-sun hung in the sky, just like on that day. And before my eyes, that murderer...
不过这一次，我看清了它的样貌：<color=#dbc291ff>黑色的斗篷，诡异的面具。破碎的、散发着不详气息的巨剑……</color>
But I saw its form this time... <color=#dbc291ff>A black cloak, an eerie mask, and a broken giant sword that carried an ominous aura...</color>
在试炼里，我和那家伙交手了。但过去这么久，即便我带着决心一路战斗、成长、变强…我还是战胜不了它。
I fought it in the trial. But even though I've been fighting, improving, and resolutely getting stronger all this time... I still couldn't defeat it.
仇恨蒙蔽了你的双眼，你差点就要迷失在那试炼里了。
You were blinded by hatred and almost lost yourself in that trial.
对…所以我由衷地感谢你，迈德漠斯。
That's right... And that's why I am truly thankful to you, Mydeimos.
哼，总算学会礼仪了，倒也不算太晚。
Hmph, you've finally picked up some manners. Better late than never.
那你呢，万敌？你在那试炼里看见了什么…你的恐惧又是什么？
Then what about you, Mydei? What did you see in that trial? ...What do you fear?
首先，悬锋人的字典里没有「恐惧」二字。
There is no word for "fear" in the Kremnoan language.
…你们的字典里是不是压根没字？
...I'm getting the feeling that your language has no words at all.
然后，我在其中看到了奥赫玛。以及……
But to answer your question, I saw Okhema in the trial, as well as...
赫菲斯辛、帕狄卡斯、莱昂、托勒密，还有朴塞塔…自我从冥海归来，那五人便始终拱卫左右。
Hephaestion, Perdikkas, Leonnius, Ptolemy, and Peucesta... Ever since I returned from the Sea of Souls, these five had been by my side.
流亡的岁月，他们与我同生共死。那十年时光，颠沛流离，但也值得怀念。每个夜晚，我们都会在营火边围坐，畅饮蜜酿，纵情高歌……

We faced life and death together during our days in exile. Those ten years were arduous, yet filled with moments worth treasuring. Each night, we would gather by the campfire, savoring honey brews and singing our hearts out...
翁法罗斯的野风有铁锈的味道。赫菲斯辛总笑话我喝蜜酿加羊奶，说把鲜红的血色拌得不伦不类。他生得瘦小，但在战场上凶悍无比，杀敌如麻。

The wind in the wilds of Amphoreus smells like rust. Hephaestion would always tease me about adding goat milk to the honey brew, claiming I ruined the blood-red color of the drink. He had a scrawny figure, but was a relentless force on the battlefield, dispatching foes without so much as a blink.
帕狄卡斯精通制药，净整些偏方怪方；莱昂善于奔跑，是最受信赖的信使。
Perdikkas was an expert in concocting medicines, delving into all those strange folk remedies. Leonnius was a swift runner and our most reliable messenger.
托勒密总爱咬文嚼字，离开悬锋时，从大图书馆顺走了不少古籍——都是我家的，也不用还了。至于朴塞塔…呵，他不爱说话，但弹得一手好琴……

Ptolemy was a real bookworm, always spouting off in chapters and verses. When we left Kremnos, he made off with a stack of ancient tomes from the grand library — not like it mattered, since my family owns the library. And then there was Peucesta... Heh, he was the silent type, but a truly masterful musician...
这五位…我还是第一次听说他们的名字。
...This is the first time I've heard you mention these five and their names.
当然。在悬锋孤军与奥赫玛联合前，他们就战死了。
They died on the battlefield before the Kremnoan Detachment managed to join Okhema.
先是帕狄卡斯，他死在第二个{RUBY_B#四月}耕耘月{RUBY_E#}，被拉冬人的毒箭射中腹部。他的药方能救所有人，唯独没救下自己。

Perdikkas was the first to go. He was shot in the stomach by a poisonous arrow from the people of Ladon in the second {RUBY_B#Fourth Month}Month of Cultivation{RUBY_E#}. In the end, his remedies mended all but himself.
「迈德漠斯，不要悲伤。我已挣得荣耀，用光荣的死亡回敬夙敌……」
"Mydeimos, do not mourn. I have achieved honor by bestowing a noble death upon the enemy..."
莱昂死在第五个冬天，哀地里亚的暴风雪持续了整整三个月。风雪最大的那夜，敌人发动了袭击。
Leonnius died in the fifth winter. Aidonia's snowstorm lasted three full months. On the night of the fiercest storm, our foes launched their assault.
哀地里亚…是遐蝶以前所在的城邦？
Aidonia... Is that the city Castorice used to live in?
就是那群狂信徒，他们如悬锋人一般视死如生，唯独少了对荣誉的敬畏。
Yes. Those zealots were as fearless as Kremnoans in the face of death, but they lacked respect for honor.
他们在无底沼泽中围追堵截，莱昂为了殿后被斩断双腿。他消失在异乡的泥土里，尸骨无存。
They cornered us in a bottomless swamp. Leonnius covered for our retreat, and they cut his legs off. He vanished into the mire of a foreign land, his body never to be recovered.
「多好啊，迈德漠斯…我终于能将你成王的讯息带向冥界了……」
"This is perfect, Mydeimos... I can finally deliver the news of you ascending the throne to the nether realm..."
那之后的第二十个黄昏，我们终于反攻入哀地里亚城中，接受了僭主的求和，但负隅顽抗的叛军却在城中设伏……
Twenty dusks later, we finally breached the walls of Aidonia and entertained the tyrant's plea for peace. However, the rebels refused to surrender and set up an ambush within the city...
托勒密和他的骑兵队，还未来得及品尝胜利便全军覆没。燃烧崩塌的方尖碑林成为了他们的坟丘。
Ptolemy and his cavalry met their end before they could even relish our triumph. Those obelisks that collapsed after being set on fire became their final resting place.
「迈德漠斯，请你转告我的家人：打倒我托勒密的并非歹毒的诡计，而是翁法罗斯一切历史的重量。」
"Mydeimos, please tell my family: It was not cunning schemes that vanquished Ptolemy, but the immense weight of Amphoreus' entire history."
再后来是朴塞塔。他在厄涅俄努斯城中以歌声诱敌深入，为我们争取了宝贵的时间。
Then, it was Peucesta. He lured the enemies into the city of Aenionus with his melodies, buying us invaluable time.
恼羞成怒的敌军不惜点燃大火，将我军和整座城池一道焚烧殆尽…他的遗言只留在一小块被烈火烧裂的泥板上。
Our enemies, consumed by indignation when they discovered the trick, set the entire city and my soldiers on fire... His final words were recorded on a small clay tablet, fractured by the flames.
最后，我最信赖的赫菲斯辛…他本该与我一道见证尘埃落定，却在我与父亲角斗的前夕宿疾复发……
And at last, my most trusted friend, Hephaestion... He was supposed to stand by my side through it all, but a sudden relapse of his illness hit him on the eve of my duel against my father...
他隐瞒了病情，待我手刃{RUBY_B#先王欧利庞}仇敌{RUBY_E#}凯旋，他已只剩一丝气息。
He hid his condition from me, and by the time I returned victorious, he had but a breath left in him.
「身为悬锋人，却只能在床榻上了却一生…说出去要教人笑话啊。」
"A Kremnoan dying on a sickbed... I would be a laughingstock to everyone."
「赫菲斯辛，我的挚友…省些力气罢，我去叫医师来……」
"Hephaestion, my dear friend... Spare your strength. I'll go get a physician..."
「不必了…就算帕狄卡斯还在这里，也无法替我挡下命运。」
"No need... Even if Perdikkas were here, he couldn't stop destiny from taking me away."
「迈德漠斯…{RUBY_B#悬锋人}我们{RUBY_E#}的王啊…不要落泪，那不称你的身份。」
"Mydeimos... {RUBY_B#Kremnoan}Our{RUBY_E#} king... Do not shed tears for me. It's not befitting of your status."
「别了，挚友。你一定要…带领我等还乡……」
"Farewell, my dear friend... You must... lead us back home..."
我现在能理解，你为何会把「不死」视作一种缺陷，甚至诅咒了。
Now I understand why you see "immortality" as a defect... or even a curse.
先王为断绝宿业，将我投入冥海，却没料到此举反造就了我的不死之躯，给他招来了命运的复仇。
My father threw me into the Sea of Souls to break the wheel of karma, but little did he realize it would grant me an immortal body and summon a fated revenge on his head.
他死后，我本想过带领族人回归故乡。但彼时的悬锋已是一片荒芜，能在其中生长的只有黑暗与疯狂。
Following his demise, I considered leading my people back to our homeland, but Kremnos had already turned into a wasteland. Only darkness and insanity thrived there.
顶着许多人——也包括克拉特鲁斯——的反对之声，我让悬锋孤军留在了奥赫玛。但我明白，他们的荣耀不可能被磨灭。
Against the dissent of many — Krateros included — I made the Kremnoan Detachment stay in Okhema, but I know that their glory will never be doused out.
只要你接过{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，就必须踏上还乡的旅程。
If you take over {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, then you must begin the journey back to your homeland.
所以，你觉得让族人留在圣城才是更好的选择？
So... You hesitate because you think leaving your people in the holy city is a better choice?
但因为我从未加冕为王，那五人从未被册封…也无人知晓他们的荣耀。
But I have never been crowned, and those five were never endowed with any titles... None is aware of their glory.
我很难给出有用的建议，或许…你可以找更多人谈谈，比如大工匠。哈托努斯的族人应该经历过相似的困境。
I don't know how I can give you any useful advice. Maybe... you could seek counsel from more people, such as the Grand Craftsman? Chartonus' people seem to have been through comparable dilemmas.
还有你的那位老师，克拉特鲁斯……
And that teacher of yours, Krateros...
De! We've got a big problem! Big problem!!!
缇宝老师？发生了什么，竟然让你如此惊慌？
Lady Tribbie? What's making you so flustered?
快去救人，缇宁她，缇宁她……
Hurry up and go save Trinnon! She... She...
It's time to head out with the west wind!
…好重的热气，平时有这么热吗？
...The air's really hot and heavy. Has it always been like this?
Who in the world did this...?
可悲的「救世主」，不过如此。
This is all you can do, huh? Pitiable "Deliverer."
那不如，就去最大的浴池吧！
How about we go to the biggest bath?
不久后 奥赫玛城下
呼…真是险之又险的逃生。但幸好，终究是安全抵达奥赫玛了。
Phew... That was a close call. Thank goodness that we returned to Okhema unharmed.
奥赫玛，你的球棒侠回来了！
我都想躲在圣城不出去了。
I never want to leave the holy city again.
唔…小小蝶，缇安还是…头疼。
Ugh... Little Cas, my head... It still hurts.
对不起…明明你都，嘱咐过我，不要开门了……
Sorry... I know you... told me... not to open the gate...
不对，缇安大人。若不是你挺身而出，我们早已葬身树庭了。
Please don't blame yourself, Lady Trianne. If it weren't for you, we would've already met our end at the Grove.
缇安，好不舒服…要先回去，睡觉……
I feel awful... I need to go back... to get some rest...
缇安大人自从醒来，状态就一直很不好…自己回去真的没关系吗？
Lady Trianne, you haven't been well since you woke up... Are you sure you can make it back on your own?
真是嘈杂…奥赫玛还是老样子啊。
All this noise and commotion... Okhema hasn't changed a bit, has it?
不必怀疑，那泰坦不出声了。是我，智种学派的阿那克萨戈拉斯。
There's no need for doubt. The Titan no longer speaks. It is I, Anaxagoras of the Nousporists.
…会这么称呼自己，确实是本人没错。
...Indeed. You are the only one who would refer to yourself like that.
…老师，我直说了：阿格莱雅大人给我们的任务是，寻找幸存者、弄清树庭之灾的原委，以及…回收{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种。

...Professor, let me be frank: The mission Lady Aglaea entrusted us is to search for survivors, uncover the truth about the disaster at the Grove, and... retrieve the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.
嗯，我丝毫不感到意外。如你所见，我既是幸存者，又了解灾变始末，在身负一颗火种的同时，还毫无反抗能力。
That does not surprise me. And now, I'm a survivor who witnessed the entirety of the disaster, as well as the defenseless bearer of a Coreflame.
所以，你要将我呈给阿格莱雅复命么？
Are you going to bring me to Aglaea to fulfill your duty?
那是我的义务。但我不想将您以俘虏或战利品的形式交给她。
That is indeed my duty, but I prefer not to present you to her as a captive or spoil of battle.
也罢，我不为难你。面见那女人，我不反对。
Fine. There's no need to make your life difficult. I'm not against meeting that woman.
只是在那之前，我还有些事情要办。树庭有几位同僚的家属就住在圣城，我想在面见阿格莱雅前…先去慰问一下他们。
But I have some things to take care of first. The families of some of my fellow Grove scholars live in the holy city. Before we meet Aglaea... I want to visit them.
为什么是面见阿格莱雅前？
Why do you have to do it before meeting Aglaea?
因为阿格莱雅大人…恐怕不会允许。
Because Lady Aglaea... will probably be against it.
呵…我猜猜，她不但会拒绝让我慰问死者家属，还会封锁树庭的消息，那女人就是这般冷血。
Heh... Let me guess. That woman will not only prevent me from visiting the families of the deceased, but will also suppress any information about the Grove. She's always been that cold-hearted.
树庭的一些朋友为了和我一起捍卫火种，抗击黑潮，不幸牺牲，他们的家属…有权利得知这一切。
My fellows at the Grove gave their lives defending the Coreflame and fighting the black tide alongside me. Their families... deserve to know the truth.
You intend to do it without her knowledge?
就算我不节外生枝，老老实实跑去向那女人献忠心，她就会给我好脸色？我可不惮往她的脸上多宣泄几分忿怒。
Do you really think that woman would treat me well even if I behaved and proved my loyalty? I wouldn't mind seeing a bit more anger on her face.
Are you going to stop me, Castorice?
…我陪您同去。但您也要明白，阿格莱雅大人同样有她的考虑。
...I will accompany you, but please understand that Lady Aglaea has her own considerations.
…呵，换位思考，你的确是读书的料。
...Heh, you truly have the makings of a fine scholar, putting yourself in other people's shoes like that.
Let's go. I won't go overboard.
老师，这么多年了，您与阿格莱雅大人还是……
So, after all these years, you and Lady Aglaea are still...
我们都不是小肚鸡肠的人。矛盾的根本，你应该很清楚。
Neither of us is narrow-minded. You should know the root cause of our conflict.
你好。没记错的话，你是卡林尼库斯的妻子吧？
Hello. If I'm not mistaken, you are Callinicus' wife, right?
是的。啊，你是信使吗？哎呀，我就说消息怎么来得这么迟，原来是换了个人呀。
Yes. Oh, are you a messenger? No wonder I haven't heard any news for so long. There's been a change in personnel, hasn't there?
女士，卡林尼库斯在几日前，为了保护树庭，牺牲在抗击黑潮的过程中了。
Ma'am, Callinicus passed away a few days ago defending the Grove against the black tide.
So... did he manage to defend the Grove?
听闻噩耗，第一反应竟然是……
This is the first thing you ask after hearing of his passing...?
是的，他誓死守住了{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种。
Yes. He managed to protect {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} Coreflame at the cost of his life.
知道了。我会择日整理好遗物，给他挑一处好的坟墓。
I see. I'll select some of his possessions and pick a nice resting place for him.
…女士，如果你需要帮助，请尽管吩咐。
...Please let us know if you need any help, ma'am.
我是悬锋人。死亡、牺牲…我皆能坦然面对。
I come from Kremnos. Death... and sacrifice... are things I have learned to face with composure.
卡林尼库斯…他虽是一名学者，但每次回来探望我的时候，都会向我讨教武艺。可笑吗？一名黄金裔，竟向我这样的普通人学艺。

You know, Callinicus... Even though he was a scholar, he'd always ask me to teach him how to fight whenever he came back. Isn't it funny that a Chrysos Heir like him wants to learn from an ordinary person like me?
我早已做好了心理准备…在这个时代，每一次平凡的道别都可能是永别。
I've been prepared for this for a long time... In times like these, any ordinary goodbye might just turn out to be a final farewell.
没什么可抱歉的。我曾是一名战士…也终会重新投身于战场。
There's nothing to be sorry for. I was once a warrior... and I'll find my way back to the battlefield someday.
如今，悬锋的新王要降临了。丈夫的仇债，我自会用手中的长枪问黑潮怪物们讨回。
With the coming coronation of the new king of Kremnos, I'll take up my lance against the creatures of the black tide and seek vengeance for my husband.
你们好呀，年轻人。找老费贝尔有什么事情么？
Hello, young ones. Is there anything I can help you with?
您是库娜涅和阿塔卡玛的父亲么？
Are you the father of Cynane and Artakama?
啊呀，是的。我那俩女儿又在学校闯了什么祸——
Ah, yes. Did my daughters cause trouble at school again...?
哎哟，你瞧我，都老糊涂了。我那俩争气的女儿，早就毕业啦，现在在树庭做学者呢。你说我，年纪大了，总是一个晃神，就看到好多年前的事情。
Alas, forgive this old brain of mine. Both of my daughters graduated long ago, and they are now scholars at the Grove. As I get older, memories from years past tend to blend together.
怎么啦，年轻人，怎么不说话？总不能是我的女儿们，真闯祸了吧？
What's the matter, young one? Why so quiet? Did my daughters really get into some trouble?
她们要不肯道歉，尽管和我说，我这个老父亲在她们那儿，还是有些脸面的……
If they refuse to apologize, just let me know. Their old dad can still talk some sense into them...
...What should we do? I really can't tell him...
别问我，看不出我眼圈也红了么？
Don't ask me. I'm getting all teary-eyed as well...
…费贝尔先生，库娜涅和阿塔卡玛她们…被黑潮杀死了。
...Mr. Fabio, the black tide... took Cynane and Artakama.
…她们为了保护树庭、抗争黑潮，战至最后一刻了。
...They fought until their last breath against the black tide to defend the Grove.
我是驻留树庭的黄金裔，没能保护好她们，费贝尔先生，如果您有怒火……
As the Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, I failed to protect them. Mr. Fabio, if you're upset...
…瞧你说的。我家的阿塔卡玛，即便并非预言中的黄金裔，但不也是英雄么？
...Don't put it that way. Even if my Artakama wasn't one of the Chrysos Heirs mentioned in the prophecy, she was still a heroine, wasn't she?
什么事？我正忙着，最近城里可不太平，大小事务弄得我头昏眼花……
What's wrong? I'm busy. There's a lot going on in the city, and I've got my hands full...
Mister, we're sorry to bother you, but...
…啊，是遐蝶女士？莫非是我工作上出了什么差错，阿格莱雅大人派你来敲打我？
...Wait, Lady Castorice? Did Lady Aglaea send you because of some mistake I made at work?
冷静，提图斯。我是神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，与你的父亲老提图斯是同道。
Keep your cool, Titus. I'm Anaxagoras from the Grove of Epiphany and a colleague of your father, Old Titus.
不久前…你的父亲，去世了。
A few days ago... your father passed away.
Wait, what? My old man died?
哈…倒也正常。老爷子一把年纪，什么时候掉进冥河里都不稀奇……
Heh... That's no shocker. At his age, he was due for the River of Souls any time.
How can you say that!? He's your...
哈…混账老爷子，走得倒是轻巧……
Heh... Just up and left me behind, that old man...
我早和他说过，一把年纪了，老老实实回圣城养老不好么？非要去什么树庭，和一群神神叨叨的学者瞎折腾。
I've been telling him for ages to stay in the holy city and enjoy his retirement. But no, he just had to go off to that Grove and mess around with those scholars.
吵了那么多回，愣是不肯听话…老犟种！
Still wouldn't budge after all those arguments... That stubborn old thing!
他回心转意后住的房子我都物色好了…现在，别说养老，连最后一面都没见上……
I already got him a retirement home and was waiting for him to come around... All my effort is wasted now, and he didn't even give me a chance to say goodbye...
...That bullheaded old man! Stubborn as a mule!
…就这样吧。我记得的同僚家属，就这些了。
That is it. That's all the colleagues' families that I remember.
牺牲者和家属们都令人敬佩。
Those who sacrificed their lives and their families are truly admirable.
走吧，带我去见阿格莱雅。
Let's go. Take me to see Aglaea.
遐蝶小姐，{NICKNAME}阁下，你们回来了。
你好，我们有要事求见阿格莱雅大人，麻烦通报一下。
Hello. We have an important matter to discuss with Lady Aglaea. May we trouble you to inform her of our presence?
抱歉，遐蝶小姐…阿格莱雅女士此前已吩咐过我，她现在无暇接待任何人。
My apologies, Miss Castorice... Lady Aglaea has just informed me that she has no time to receive anyone at the moment.
呵，这下倒好——她甚至不愿意见我一面。
Hmph, that's just great. She refuses to even see me.
这位朋友，换我来问问，阿格莱雅有没有命令你，直接将我扭送至监狱？
Answer me this, friend. Did Aglaea order you to take me directly to prison?
请别开玩笑了…她大概确实在忙。我们稍等片刻，我尝试用石版联络一下。
