Please don't jest... It's possible that she really is busy. Let's wait here a moment, and I'll try to contact her using the slate.
不用拖着病躯与那女人对峙，真是一桩幸事。遐蝶，还有这位来不及认识的朋友，我今日就先行告退了。
It's fortunate we don't have to confront that woman while I'm hauling around this sick body. Castorice, and this friend I haven't gotten the chance to know — I'll take my leave for today.
那泰坦自顾自对我做了一番手脚…到现在脑袋还是隐隐作痛。如果可能，我不想在这聒噪的城里再多晃悠一秒。
That Titan made a myriad of adjustments on their own... My head still aches from that. I don't want to stay a second longer in this noisy city if I can.
还请小心。奥赫玛不是树庭，这里……
Please be careful. Okhema isn't the Grove. This place...
——遍地都是她的金丝，我知道。那女人相当自信，笃定我逃不出她的掌心。
...Is covered by her golden threads, I know. That woman is extremely confident I won't escape her grasp.
放心吧，就如我之前所说，我会保持分寸。
Don't worry. As I said before, I'll mind my behavior.
{NICKNAME}阁下，这趟树庭之行…实在发生了太多意料外的事情，我们本无意将你卷入危险，遑论直面黑潮……
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, so many unexpected things happened on our journey to the Grove... We truly had no intention of putting you in danger, let alone face the black tide head on...
Trouble is my old friend by now.
活着回来了，黑潮也不过如此。
We made it back alive. So much for the black tide.
阁下，万不可小觑黑潮这等威胁。
Please do not underestimate the threat the black tide poses.
黑潮是奥赫玛，乃至整个翁法罗斯的大敌。曾经，纷争的势力对圣城虎视眈眈，但不可否认的是，那群战争眷属也将黑潮阻拦在悬锋城外。

The black tide is not just an enemy of Okhema, but all of Amphoreus. Even back when the forces of Strife coveted the holy city, their warriors still undeniably halted the black tide outside Castrum Kremnos.
如今{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}火种缺位，黑潮卷土重来…作为对黑潮研究最深的学院城邦，树庭绝非不堪一击之辈，却在朝夕之间倾覆，徒留一城英灵血泪……

{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} Coreflame now sits vacant and the black tide has returned... The Grove is an academic city with the best understanding of the black tide. It shouldn't have fallen so easily, and yet it was taken overnight, leaving the city in blood and tears, haunted by the spirits of departed heroes...
「纷争」的试炼已是迫在眉睫，希望万敌…能尽早下定决心吧。
The trial of Strife is imminent. I pray Mydei will be able to steel his resolve soon...
树庭的可怕敌人，也是黑潮造物？
The dreadful enemies of the Grove are also creations of the black tide?
缇宝老师曾走遍翁法罗斯万千城邦，可就连她们都对这个黑袍剑士毫无印象…此人绝不可小觑，一人一剑便将我们逼得喘不过气，对黄金裔来说，无疑是新的威胁。

Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...
缇宝大人为了抗击黑潮踏上旅途，然而自旅途伊始，到走过万千城邦，她们都未曾在黑潮中遭遇如此强敌。说不定是「纷争」陨落，暗中激起了更为骇人的影响……

Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...
至于我…我在它身上探到了浓厚的死亡气息——并非是它与{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}有什么关联，恐怕…单单只因它无数次手握他人的死亡吧。

As for me... I detected a strong stench of death from that entity, but it wasn't because he had a connection with {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... I'm afraid it's purely because he has sent countless others to their deaths.
说到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}…{NICKNAME}阁下，还有一事，希望与你确认。
Speaking of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, there is something else I wish to verify with you.
阁下对我背负的…诅咒，应该已经有所了解。我生来便是死亡的影子，是其它有生之物避之不及的剧毒……
You must have an idea of the... curse I bear by now. I was born as the Shadow of Death, a poison shunned by all living beings...
但当时，在树庭，你接下我的时候……
Yet when you caught me in the Grove...
…我只是好奇，为何{NICKNAME}阁下能不被我的力量影响？
...I'm curious why you weren't affected by my power, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?
你不说我都想不起来这事。
I had totally forgotten about this until you brought it up.
Maybe it just hasn't taken effect yet?
如果只是以指尖轻触，或许还能解释。但当时的情况……
That might be the case if we only brushed the very tips of our fingers, but back then...
习惯了，我就是这么特别。
I'm used to it. I'm just special like that.
这么说来，在涡心时似乎也…
Now that you mention it, I think the same thing happened in the Vortex...
抱歉，是我的提问太唐突了。迄今为止的人生，我始终在思考：死亡一事，于我而言究竟为何，我又为何与{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}有着千丝万缕的联系……
My apologies for the abrupt question. For all my life, I've always wondered: What is my connection to death? And why am I inextricably linked to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}?
奔波数日，想必{NICKNAME}阁下也很疲惫了吧？请暂时将树庭的惨剧抛在脑后，好好休息一日吧。
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, you must be tired after being on the move these past few days. Please set aside the tragedy at the Grove for now and rest for the day.
好久不见。你的遭遇，我听白厄说了…真是辛苦了。
Long time no see. I've heard about what happened from Phainon... You've been through a lot.
Not at all. It's all in service to Trailblaze.
呵…没想到翁法罗斯还能锤炼无名客的意志。
Heh... I wasn't expecting Amphoreus to temper the will of the Nameless.
…但愿你不会堕入「开拓」的黑暗面。
...May you never succumb to the dark side of Trailblaze.
亲爱的朋友，我想死你啦！
I missed you so much, my dearest friend!
...It seems you took things pretty hard.
我不在的时候，你在做什么？
What were you doing while I was gone?
整理日志，顺便从风堇那里要了些树庭的研究资料。
I was organizing logs. I also asked Hyacine for some research material from the Grove.
发现一件很有趣的事。还记得么？翁法罗斯的天空被一位泰坦封锁了，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}…它的存在让这个世界与天外隔绝。

I discovered something interesting. Do you remember that Amphoreus's sky was sealed away by a Titan? {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} presence keeps this world isolated from the rest of the world beyond the sky.
而风堇的先祖…似乎就是信仰{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天空祭司。要找到返回星穹列车的办法，也许她能提供更多线索。
It seems Hyacine's ancestors were the Sky Priests who worshipped {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}. Perhaps she can give us more clues to find a way back to the Astral Express.
这几日，圣城没什么突发状况，也不用和人打交道。独处的感觉还不坏。
Nothing out of the ordinary happened in the holy city in the past few days. I didn't have to talk to anyone either. It was kind of nice spending time alone.
别急，你的好日子要到头咯！
Just you wait. Your good times are coming to an end!
树庭事发，接下来肯定又会有几番动荡。事已至此，先休息吧。
After what happened at the Grove, there's sure to be unrest in the coming days. We should rest for now.
苦啊！还不如陪你整理文件呢。
Awful! I should have stayed and organized documents with you.
…恐怕你整理到一半一样会叫苦罢工吧。
...I'm afraid you'd probably find the task of organizing just as awful.
看你满脸疲惫，明日出发前还是多睡会儿为好……
You look tired. You should get some sleep before we set off tomorrow...
…对了。我听到一些风声…如果你要出去闲逛，建议先避开高温浴池。
Oh, by the way, I heard some rumors... If you're going to wander around, I suggest avoiding the hot bath.
没想到，是我先暴露了软肋…呵。
It seems I was the one who exposed my vulnerabilities first... Heh.
阿格莱雅！给我一个解释。
这个男人以武力挟持了缇宁，强迫她带自己来到创世涡心。
This man abducted Trinnon by force and forced her to bring him to the Vortex of Genesis.
然后，他竟然还大胆踏入了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的试炼…当然，以失败告终。
He then brazenly stepped into the trial of the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}... And naturally, failed.
她说的是真的吗？你为何要这么做？
Is she telling the truth? Why did you do that?
因为我不想再等待了，你的犹疑令人绝望。
Because I don't want to wait anymore. Your hesitation made me desperate.
你若想逃避成王的宿命，那便逃吧。总有人会站出来，填补「纷争」的空缺…引领我族还乡。
If you want to run away from your destiny to become king, then keep running. Someone will eventually stand up and fill in the gap left by Strife... Then they will lead our people home.
吾师，岁月怎会让你变得如此蒙昧！
你还没看清吗？令我彷徨的理由，正是你这溶入骨血的鲁莽和冲动。
Can't you see that I'm hesitating because of this very recklessness seared into your blood?
克拉特鲁斯，你当真觉得自己有资格染指试炼，亵渎神谕？
Krateros, do you truly believe you're worthy of entering the trial? To blaspheme against the prophecy?
我等黄金裔的使命，在你眼中就是这般儿戏？
Does the mission we Chrysos Heirs bear seem like child's play to you?
想知道你在悬锋人眼里是什么模样吗，阿格莱雅？
Do you know how the Kremnoans see you, Aglaea?
伪善者…野心家！创世的神谕，逐火之旅，不过是你用来攫取权力的说辞罢了。
You're a hypocrite... and a megalomaniac! The prophecy of genesis and the Flame-Chase Journey are just excuses for you to seize power.
住口，克拉特鲁斯！你知道自己在说什么吗？
Silence, Krateros! Do you even know what you're saying?
你要维护这女人吗，迈德漠斯？过去的千年里，围绕她——还有她们宣扬的神谕，多少战火燃起，多少城邦自相残杀？
Are you defending this woman, Mydeimos? How many wars did people start because of her and her so-called prophecy? How many cities fell in the past millennium, their people massacring each other?
就算所谓的「创世」真的存在，那新世界里会有悬锋族人的一席之地吗？
Even if this so-called "genesis" really exists, will there be a place for the Kremnoans in that new world?
依照黄金裔与元老院达成的协定，私闯创世涡心之人无需经过议会审判，可由我自行发落。
By agreement between the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Elders, those who trespass upon the Vortex of Genesis need not be tried by the Council. I am allowed to pass judgment alone.
克拉特鲁斯，你的行为无可宽恕。我在此宣判……
Krateros, your actions are unforgivable. I hereby sentence you...
*我们*…有一个提议。这场城邦之间的矛盾，总得有人站出来解决。
...We have a proposal. Someone has to resolve this conflict between the cities.
克拉特鲁斯阁下并未用暴力伤害*我们*。*我们*能感受到，他的焦虑源于对族人前途的担忧。
Lord Krateros did not use violence to harm us. We can sense that his anxiety stems from his concern for his people's future.
拜托了，阿格莱雅，请先听听*我们*的想法。
抱歉，克拉特鲁斯阁下。我们终日只顾着解读预言的碎片，却忽视了那些未被神谕青睐的人们…你的指控尽管刺耳，但也合乎情理。
I'm sorry, Lord Krateros. We were so preoccupied with deciphering the fragments of prophecy that we neglected those of you not favored by its message... Your accusations were harsh but justified.
我们想得到你，还有悬锋族人的信任。我想，最好的办法…就是带你亲眼见证<color=#dbc291ff>预言的源头</color>。
We wish to earn your trust, and those of the Kremnoans. I think the best way to do that... is to take you to witness the <color=#dbc291ff>source of the prophecy</color> for yourself.
…你要如何让我看见虚无缥缈之物？
...How are you going to show me something that has no form?
你已听说了那位异乡人的事，对吗？出于某种原因，{M#他}{F#她}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}建立了联系，能完整地复现往日的风景。
You've heard about that outlander, right? {M#He}{F#She} has somehow made a connection with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and can completely replicate scenes from the past.
*我们*会请求{M#他}{F#她}的帮助。明日，在命运重渊，雅努萨波利斯的神殿…克拉特鲁斯，*我们*愿意为你展示那段久远的记忆，毫无保留。
We will ask for {M#his}{F#her} aid. Tomorrow, at the Abyss of Fate in the Temple of Janusopolis... we will show you everything from that distant memory, Krateros.
…听上去很公平。我接受这个提议。
但在那之前，你将被剥夺行动的自由。这是我的底线，决无让步的可能。
Until then, you will be stripped of your freedom. That is my one condition and I will brook no argument.
呵，这不是我第一次做别人的阶下囚了。悉听尊便，「半神」。
Hmph, it is not the first time I've been made someone else's prisoner. Do as you please, "demigod."
吾师…为何要做到这个地步？
Teacher... why did you do this?
抱歉，少主…我不能再忍耐了。
Forgive me, young master, but I just cannot wait any longer.
自你的父亲死后，我和族人就一直在等待复兴悬锋的时机。我们将一切希望寄托于你，却迟迟没有得到回应。
Ever since your father died, our people and I have been waiting for a day to revive Kremnos. We placed all of our hopes in you but never received an answer.
还乡的执念已成了我族的病根！你如此睿智，我不相信你看不清简单的真相……
This obsession for returning home has become a sickness for our people! Wise as you are, I refuse to believe that you can't see the truth...
你很清醒，因此才无比孤独。聪明的人，只能选择与世俗沉沦。
You have a clear head, which is why you're also incomparably alone. A smart person can only choose to tangle himself with the mundane of this world.
你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.
就像你当时做到的那样……
Just as you did back then...
真是勇猛的斗士…软弱的奥赫玛人，竟也拥有如此豪杰。
A fierce fighter... I did not expect such heroism from a feeble Okheman.
履行胜者的义务，报上名来，战士！我向你索求荣耀的死亡！
Fulfill your duty as the victor, warrior, and tell me your name! I seek an honorable death from you!
As if you have any honor!
洗耳恭听吧！我是悬锋孤军之首，{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}——
Listen closely! I am the leader of the Kremnoan Detachment — {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}!
I'm here to finish you, father.
是你…遭人唾弃的野兽，你真的拒绝了死亡。预言不假…朕的悬锋王朝，终究要结束在你手里……
It is you... the beast spurned by all. So, you did defy death. The prophecy was true... You will bring an end to my Kremnoan dynasty.
拒绝？你错了，是死亡惧怕我。拜它所赐，我才有了这副钢铁之躯。
Defy? You're wrong. Death fears me. It's the reason I have this body of steel.
而你，你已病入膏肓了，父亲。将我抛入冥海的人是你，妄图奴役{RUBY_B#尼卡多利}泰坦{RUBY_E#}、亵渎神体的人也是你……

As for you, you already stand at death's door, father. You were the one who threw me into the Sea of Souls, the one who tried in vain to enslave a {RUBY_B#Nikador}Titan{RUBY_E#}, and the one who desecrated the body of a god...
{RUBY_B#混账}HKS{RUBY_E#}！软弱的王，哪怕是最卑劣的鬣狗，也比你高贵千倍！
{RUBY_B#Scoundrel}HKS{RUBY_E#}! You're a weak king! So weak that even the lowliest hyena is a more noble existence than you!
而现在，命运的复仇找上你了！
And now, fate's reckoning is upon you!
那就挥剑吧！拿走我的王冠，用先王的血加冕，继承一切…名正言顺，成为悬锋的新王。
Then swing your blade! Take my crown, coronate yourself with an old king's blood, and inherit it all... Become the new rightful king of Kremnos.
不，我不要王冠。听好了——倘若悬锋的王只有一种宿命，那它对我毫无意义……
No, I don't want the crown. Listen — If there's only one end for the kings of Kremnos, then the crown means nothing to me...
我只要你的命！为了给母亲和同袍复仇，仅此而已！
All I want is your life! To avenge mother and my comrades!
但悬锋的城墙不会随我一同崩塌…吾儿，你以为自己逃得出命运的掌心？
But the walls of Kremnos will not fall with me. Do you truly think you can escape fate's grasp, my son?
哈哈哈…都一样，你和我…我们都把纷争和恐惧当做食粮……
Hahaha... You and I, we're both the same... We feast on strife and fear...
歌耳戈之子，注定要浴血代冠——！
The son of Gorgo is destined to be crowned in blood!
那家伙说，也许能从大工匠那得到建议…哈托努斯，去见他吧。
He said the Grand Craftsman Chartonus might have some suggestions. Might as well go see him.
Grand Craftsman, how have you been?
悬锋的王，是你。你会来，我有预感。
King of Kremnos, it is. That you would come, I knew.
我听说了，你的事。前进的方向，你在寻找；疑问，有许多。
Your matters, I've heard. The path forward, you seek. Many questions, you have.
悬锋，王者的印戒，属于你母亲。重铸、修复…由我。
A signet ring. For the king of Kremnos. Belonged to your mother. Recast and restore it... I did.
母亲明明将它抛入冥海了……
What... Mother threw it into the Sea of Souls...
打捞，花了很久。运气很好，我们。
A long time to fish out, it took. Very fortunate, we were.
要从冥海中捞出一枚小小的印戒，我无法想象需要多少耐心和勇气。我欠你一个人情。
I can hardly imagine how much patience and courage it must have taken to find such a small signet ring in the Sea of Souls. I owe you one.
感谢，不必。你的救命之恩，我要报答。
Gratitude, there is no need for. Repayment for saving me, this is.
疑问，你带着它来。说吧，现在。
Questions, you bring with you. Ask, now.
我一直否定的命运，终于还是找上了门。
The fate I've always denied has finally caught up to me.
我理应接过「纷争」的权柄。如此一来，所有人都会满意：黄金裔、元老院、悬锋族人，还有谱写诗歌的吟游诗人……
By all rights, I should accept Strife's authority. It would make everyone happy: the Chrysos Heirs, the Council of Elders, the Kremnoans, even the bards who will write it all into song...
但还在犹豫，你。年轻的王，为何踌躇？
Yet hesitate still, you do. Hesitate, why do you, young king?
男人、女人、长者、孩童…悬锋人对归乡的渴望深入心髓，他们一直在等待这天，企盼王者的归来。
Be they men, women, the elderly, or children... the hearts of all Kremnoans yearn for home. They've all been waiting for this day, for the day their king returns.
如此，纷争的子民便能够还乡，拥抱传统——即便他们中的大多数人只在史诗中听闻过那「传统」——然后，他们便能围绕在王的身旁，投身战场。

The children of Strife would then be able to go home and embrace the old traditions — never mind that most of them have only ever been heard in these so-called "traditions" in song. They would then gather around their king and throw themselves into battle.
这不是一件好事，你认为。
This is not a good thing, you believe.
…过去的千年，悬锋人活在血腥的轮回里。复仇、征战、昌盛、衰败…那段历史中，多少无辜者的血汇入冥河，多少无谓的牺牲可以被避免？

...The Kremnoans have been trapped in a cycle of bloodshed for the past one thousand years: They seek vengeance, start wars, become prosperous, then decline... How much innocent blood flowed into the River of Souls in all of those years? How many needless sacrifices could we have avoided?
若要我接受这命运，成为「纷争」的图腾，并带领我的族人重蹈覆辙…那我的确会感到恐惧，对「成王」的恐惧。
If I accept that fate and become the totem of Strife, then lead my people into repeating the same mistakes... then of course I would be terrified. I'd be terrified of becoming king.
不同的悬锋人，你果然是……
A different kind of Kremnoan, you truly are...
（遐蝶说得对，先回去休息吧。估计迷迷也累坏了，一直都没出声。）
(Castorice is right. I should get some rest. Mem is probably exhausted too. {F#She hasn't}{M#They haven't} made a peep.)
(I wonder how Dan Heng has been holding up these past few days.)
(Oh, he looks like he's been well.)
不久后 缇宝的房间
妈妈，妈妈！我昨晚做了一个梦。
Momma, Momma! I had a dream last night.
哦？梦到什么了，缇里西庇俄丝，我的好女孩？
Oh? Now, what did you dream about, my darling Tribios?
我梦见自己变成了好多好多个！我们一起把月亮当做船，把星星当做帆，在海上漂来漂去。风吹向哪里，我们就漂到哪里！
I had a dream that I turned into many mes! Then we made the moon into a ship and made the stars into our sails! Then we floated on the ocean and let the wind blow us in any direction it wanted!
Well that sounds like a lovely dream.
是啊！虽然大海，还有天空，都好黑好黑。但是好多好多个我一点都不害怕，因为我们会一起唱歌！
Yeah! The ocean and the sky were really, really dark, but there were so many of me that I wasn't scared at all. Because we'd all sing together!
海风把我们送往一座小岛，那里的风有花朵的味道。还有绵羊咩咩，小鸟啾啾，欢迎我们去作客。岛上有好多动物，但大家从来不争吵！

The ocean wind blew us onto an island where the wind tasted like flowers. There were bleating sheep and chirping birds inviting us to be their guests. There were so many animals on the island, but none of them ever fought!
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的圣女能聆听门神的指引，也许你梦见的，就是翁法罗斯某处仙境的景象哦。
{RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' Holy Maidens can receive guidance from the god of passages. Perhaps what you saw in your dream is a divine land somewhere in Amphoreus.
怎么了，缇里西庇俄丝，你好像不开心？
What's wrong, Tribios? You look unhappy.
因为…在那座小岛上，我还看见海的另一边有片黑色的山，很高很高。
Because... on that same island, I saw a dark mountain on the other side of the ocean. And it was very, very tall.
那山就像活着似的，一直在向小岛靠近。后来我才发现，那根本不是山，是很高很高的海浪…海浪拍在小岛上，像是要把它吃掉。小动物们想把它赶走，但根本拦不住……

The mountain looked alive, and it kept getting closer to the island. Then I realized that it wasn't a mountain, but a very, very tall wave made of water... When the wave smashed against the island, it looked like it was going to eat the island up. The small animals tried to chase it away, but they couldn't stop it...
最后「轰——！」的一下，我就醒了。
Then there was a "bang!" and I woke up.
妈妈，现实里有这么可怕的东西吗？
Momma, does something that scary exist in real life?
嗯…很遗憾，它确实存在于翁法罗斯，只是离我们的圣殿还很遥远。
Yes... Unfortunately, it does exist in Amphoreus, but it's very far away from our temple.
人们称之为「黑潮」，但其实和大海无关。它无形无貌，却能把动物、人、甚至泰坦一口吞下…把他们变成黑色的怪物。
We call it the "black tide," though it has nothing to do with water. It has no shape or form, but it can swallow up animals, humans, and even Titans... turning them all into monsters.
喔…黑潮好坏！我不想让大家变成它的小面包，有办法赶走这个家伙吗？
Ooh... The black tide is a baddie! I don't want everyone to turn into its food. Can't we chase it away?
当然了，好孩子。只是你要乖乖的，听大人的话，好好学习知识和礼仪，成长为合格的圣女……
Of course, my dear. You only need to behave well and listen to what the adults tell you, study all the knowledge and etiquette you need, then grow up and become a proper Holy Maiden...
神圣的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}就会降下指引，让你为人们点明正确的道路。
The divine {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} will then give you guidance and help you light the way for the people.
呼哇…好好吃饭，好好学习，成为圣女！
Wow! I'm gonna eat a lot and study a lot and become a Holy Maiden!
可是，妈妈刚才说，黑潮也会吃掉泰坦…如果连{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}也被吃掉了，那该怎么办呢？
But, Momma, you said the black tide can swallow up Titans too. What do we do if even {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} is eaten?
那…就得由圣女来为人们指点迷津了。毕竟我们就是门神在人间的化身，对不对？

呵呵。不过，只有一个人是不够的。等你长大了，一定会遇见许多朋友。你要尽全力团结他们，这也是我们身为祭司的职责。
Hehe. But one person alone is not enough. Once you're older, you'll make a lot of friends. You must do your best to unite them because that's also our duty as priests.
朋友？他们都像妈妈和我一样，有好看的红头发吗？

傻孩子，当然不是梦了。妈妈一直都在你的身边。

我的好女孩，别闹别扭了。我们把{RUBY_B#玩偶娃娃}你的伙伴{RUBY_E#}也一起叫来——
Now be a good girl and call {RUBY_B#doll}your friends{RUBY_E#} over too...
就像平日那样，来玩「捉迷藏」，好不好？缇里西庇俄丝的脑瓜最聪明了，你肯定记得大家都躲在哪里。
Let's play hide-and-seek just like we used to, okay? My Tribios is the smartest girl. I'm sure you remember where everyone is hiding.

当然是要和你一起，赶走黑潮的同伴啦。

在那艘好大的船上，会有一位厉害的船长。她开朗乐观，胆大心细，能把大家联系在一起。
There will be an amazing captain on that big ship. She's cheerful, optimistic, bold, and cautious. She'll be able to get everyone together.
呼哇，好厉害！我可以当这个船长吗？

当然可以。但我的好女孩，你会找到更合适的人选。
Of course you can! But you'll find someone else who's better for the job, my dear.
我想，那人应该住在一座华丽的神殿里，那神殿矗立在长满金色无花果树的山坡上。
I think that person lives in a beautiful temple that sits atop a hillside covered in golden fig trees.
那里有一位尊贵的女孩，她聪慧过人，但也细腻敏感。

或许吧。不过在找到船长前，小船还需要一位领航的伙伴，她是谁呢？

唔…我也可以学着战斗，保护大家！

好吧，那他们都来自哪里呢？

I believe one warrior hails from a lovely village where bulrushes flourish, while another comes from a magnificent royal city. Though each has their own troubles, both are ready to lend their strength for the ship's long voyage.
既然这样，就让「缇安」和他们并肩作战吧！

当然啦。大海不是陆地，一不小心就会迷失方向。所以，学会辨认{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的神迹可是很重要的。
Oh, sweetie. The ocean isn't like the land. It's easy to get lost. That's why it's important to learn to recognize the miracle of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.
好吧！虽然我的脑瓜已经特别特别聪明了，但我还是会努力！
Alright! Even though my brain is already super-duper smart, I'll still try my very best!
{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}也会眷顾认真的孩子。它会派出知识渊博的学者，当大家的老师，帮助你实现理想。
{RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} also favors children who try their best. They will send a wise scholar as everyone's teacher to help you reach your dreams.
我也想当老师！不对，我很厉害，所以要当老师的老师！

好孩子，睡糊涂了吗？这可是你的发明呀。
Sweetheart, are you still groggy from your nap? You invented it!

我的好缇宝…你平时那么聪明，怎么今天看起来呆呆的？
Oh, my lovely Tribbie, you're usually so bright! What's gotten into you today?
既然这样，不如眼见为实…把好伙伴们放上来，看看会有什么奇妙的反应吧。
Well, you might as well see for yourself. Put your good friends on it and see the wonders it can do.
It's rotating! And I can hear something...
没错，八音盒。只要在合适的位置放上娃娃，触发机关，它就会转动，演奏出好听的乐曲……
That's right! It's a music box. If you place the dolls in the right spots, it will start rotating and play beautiful music...
…这也是你所有发明里，妈妈最喜欢的。
...Out of all your inventions, this one is my favorite.
没关系，好孩子。让妈妈就着旋律唱出歌谣，你就全部想起来啦。

「神明眷顾沃土，遍地欣欣如火。十二星宿如目，巨人举杯对酌。」
"Happiness abounded in this lush land by gods chosen. Giants raised their glasses in a toast beheld by the twelve constellations."
「三者开辟天地，三者编织命运。三者捏塑生命，三者引渡灾祸。」
"Three carved the heavens and the earth, three wove the threads of fate. Three molded life with their hands, and three guided calamity's gate."

{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle —"</color>{RUBY_E#}
既然心意已决，就穿越黑潮，为翁法罗斯拨开迷雾吧……
Since your mind is made up, then traverse the black tide and dispel the fog for Amphoreus...
明天见，我亲爱的缇里西庇俄丝。
I shall see you tomorrow, my dearest Tribios.
（这是我…童年的事吗？想不起来了……）
(Is this... from my childhood? I don't remember...)
Use the spindle to connect everyone!
Bad chest, you can't lock me away!
…或许吧。明明*我们*已经好久没做过梦了。
...Maybe. But it's been a long time since we had any dreams.
现在还未到{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，你还可以休息很久。
It's not yet the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}. You still have plenty of time to rest.
不了…*我们*的心脏还在怦怦跳呢。
许是那粗鲁的悬锋老兵让缇宁受了惊吓，也连带影响了你。若你有意，我现在就可以用金线荡破他的胸膛。
It must be that reckless Kremnoan soldier who startled Trinnon — and you as well. If you want, I can pierce through his chest with the golden thread right now.
阿雅…！别总说这种吓人的话……
Agy...! Cut it out with the scary talk...
这是玩笑话。若有必要，我不会等到现在。

想聊聊那场梦么？若长久郁结心中，容易落成病根。

不过，梦本身没什么…只是无缘无故在这时做梦，令人有些不安。
The dream itself was nothing... It's just the timing that feels a bit unsettling.
就算*我们*从今往后，再也不使用「百界门」的力量…她的魂息也在慢慢飘离身体。

时间…恐怕已经所剩无几了。
或许…让她提前让渡「门匠」的职责，就作为一个普通的孩子无忧无虑地活到最后，也不失为一件好事。

我理解你的想法，阿雅。但在这件事上…*我们*已经下定决心。
You have a point, Agy. But... our decision has already been made on that matter.
我想，此事还有回旋的余地。
I believe there's still another way.
灵魂磨损，直至归于尘土，那就是*我们*的命运。
Souls will be spent until they dissolve into dust — such is our fate.
曾经，*我们*也有完整相连的身体。如果把那副躯体比作大树，那么树干和枝叶都会因命运使然，以相同的速度凋零。
Once, we had a whole and connected body. If that body were a tree, then its trunk and branches would share the same fate, decaying at the same pace.
现在，*我们*分成了许许多多个自己…虽然失去了树干，却也多了一种选择……
Now, we are fragmented into numerous selves... Despite the absence of a trunk, we are offered another possibility...
…*我们*能以对逐火之旅最有益的方式，决定枝叶以何种形式腐朽。
...We can choose how our branches will perish in a way that is most beneficial to the Flame-Chase Journey.
比起与一人道别…看着许多人在眼前陆续消逝更令人伤怀。
Compared with saying farewell to one person... watching many fade away before me is even more sorrowful.
可…毕竟<color=#dbc291ff>「前进」</color>是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}试炼注定的结果，*我们*从来没有退路可言。
But "advancing" is the destined end of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus'{RUBY_E#} trial. There's no retreat in our path.
不要为和*我们*道别伤怀——我们早就约定好了，对不对？
Don't feel sad about saying goodbye to us. We have already agreed on this, right?
用不了多久，我可能就品尝不出悲伤的滋味了。
It won't be long before I forget what sorrow tastes like.
So, what would you like for breakfast, Agy?
What? Where did that come from...?
聊了这么久，肚子有点饿啦。况且，不是快到{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}了嘛。
After all this talking, we are feeling a bit hungry. Plus, it's nearly the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} now.
说到这个，阿雅，你还记得吗？应该是刚见面不久的时候，你也还是个小不点，半夜嘴馋偷吃燕麦粥被*我们*逮住……
Do you remember when we first met, Agy? You were still a little one, and we caught you secretly eating oatmeal late at night...
呵…我的情感在流逝，但那些片段——我全都记得，吾师。
Heh, while my emotions might be fading, those memories are still as vivid as ever, teacher.
还是我去吧。你想吃些什么？
Please, let me do it. What would you like to eat?
不用不用，交给*我们*。你先休息会儿，很快的，*我们*准备好了就来叫你。
It's fine. Leave it to us. You should rest for now. It won't take long, and we will call you once it's done.
（话是这么说，但噩梦是个坏兆头。记忆越来越模糊不清了，连妈妈的样子都……）

（果然…还是得先去趟<color=#dbc291ff>命运重渊</color>才行。希望{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}愿意帮帮*我们*。）
(Just as expected, another trip must be made to the Abyss of Fate. Hopefully, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} will be willing to help us.)

Long time no see, Professor Anaxa.
久违了，我是那个在灵魂物理学的课堂上掀翻了教室的学生。
It's been a while. I'm the one who once overthrew the entire classroom in that spiritual physics lecture.
不是吧，老师，我就随口一说…你真记得这事？
No way... Do you really still remember that, professor?
还记得你的油嘴滑舌。找我做什么，可不只是为了叙旧吧？
I remember that glib tongue of yours. What brings you here? Surely you're not looking to reminisce.
当然，你只有在别有企图时，才会这么拐弯抹角。
Of course. You only beat around the bush when you have a hidden agenda.
哪里的话。我可是来诚心求教的，一如既往……
That's not true. I'm here to seek enlightenment, as always...
还请不吝赐教：有关您所知的，那位黑袍剑士的一切。
Could you please teach me everything you know about the black-robed swordmaster?
可惜，我对它也一无所知，能告诉你的：只有它身披黑袍，手持重剑…大概是重剑吧，形如半轮扭曲的太阳……

Unfortunately I, too, know nothing about it. I can only tell you that it is clad in a black robe and wields a greatsword... At least, it looks like a greatsword. It's shaped like a twisted half-sun...
还有一柄古怪的匕首，如同一弯新月。
And a peculiar dagger resembling a crescent moon.
By the way, take this with you—
偷袭时得手的战利品，送你了。
I got it from the sneak attack. It's yours now.
不会错…就是它。烧毁了哀丽秘榭…杀害所有人的凶手。
I was right... It is this thing. The one who torched Aedes Elysiae to the ground... and killed everyone.
奉劝你别逞英雄。眼下的奥赫玛，恐怕没人是它的对手。
Don't try to be a hero. No one in Okhema stands a chance against that thing right now.
{RUBY_B#「理性」之泰坦，瑟希斯}那位泰坦{RUBY_E#}也是这么说的？
Is that what {RUBY_B#Cerces, the Reason Titan}the Titan{RUBY_E#} said as well?
哼，开始不是，但领教到它的厉害后也甘拜下风了。就算请神上身，我也难以招架对方的锋刃……
Hmph, not at first. But the god relented after having had a taste of its power. Even with a god possessing me, I couldn't fight against that blade...
那不可思议的力量，不像是任何一位泰坦的赐福。
That incredible power doesn't seem to be granted by any Titan.
你想主张…它来自翁法罗斯之外？
Are you suggesting that... it originates from beyond Amphoreus?
不无可能。就跟黑潮一样，不是么？
It's possible. Much like the black tide, no?
…无论如何，那是我们必须战胜的敌人。
...Nonetheless, it's an enemy we must overcome.
我们？别异想天开了，白厄，没人想看你横死在它的剑下。
We? Drop the pipe dream, Phainon. No one wants to see you fall by their blade.
只要那家伙存在，就会威胁到圣城，还有逐火的征程。
Their mere presence will endanger the holy city and the Flame-Chase.
You know that I don't believe—
——你不相信所谓的神谕，我知道。但我来寻求你的帮助，不是出于阿格莱雅或缇宝的命令……
—You don't believe in the so-called prophecy. I know. However, I'm here to seek your assistance, not at the request of Aglaea or Tribbie...
我只想为自己发誓保护的城邦除掉一个祸端，仅此而已。树庭的惨剧，绝不能再度上演。
I just want to eliminate a threat to the city I pledged to protect. That's all. The tragedy at the Grove must never happen again.
Take a seat. Since you are sincerely seeking enlightenment...
那我就再告诉你一件事。
I suppose I can tell you one more thing.
Soon after, in the Abyss of Fate
没什么！只是…又想起树庭的事。
Nothing! Just... remembering what happened at the Grove.
黑色斗篷的怪物，很可怕。大家，遇到危险…噩梦，忘不掉。
Monster in the black cloak, so scary. Everyone, in danger... Nightmare, can't forget.
乖…这里没有坏人。缇安，你不是用「百界门」保护了大家吗？
Don't be scared... There are no bad guys here. Didn't you save everyone with the Century Gate, Trianne?
缇安，把它丢到了很远的地方，远远的，再也回不来。
Trianne threw it away. Far, far away. It's never coming back.
树庭之行平安无事，这都是缇安的功劳。多亏有你在，逐火之旅才能平稳地继续。
We got back safe from the Grove because of you, Trianne. You're the reason the Flame-Chase Journey can continue.
对不起，缇安…有点晕晕的，*我们*为什么要来这里？
Sorry, Trianne feels... a bit dizzy. Why are we here again?
当然是为了同样的事。记得吗？明天，*我们*要为大家揭示神谕的过往。
For the same thing, of course. Remember? Tomorrow, we will reveal the prophecy's past to everyone.
可在那之前，必须先擦亮因为分裂而变得浑浊不清的记忆，*我们*希望能将真相原原本本地呈现给大家，而不是有所隐瞒。
But first, we need to restore the memories that have been blurred by the fragmentation. We hope to present the full truth to everyone, without hiding anything.
但分裂毕竟是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的影响，也只有同为泰坦的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}能帮*我们*了。
Since {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} caused the fragmentation, we can only turn to another Titan, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, for help.
还有…别忘了在{RUBY_B#清晨}明晰时{RUBY_E#}前为阿雅备好早餐。
Also... remember to get breakfast ready for Agy before the {RUBY_B#Morning}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#} tomorrow!
喔！是这么回事，缇安都想起来了！
说到这个…在觐见泰坦前，*我们*最好准备一些「番红蕊」。
Oh, on that note... we had better prepare some "saffron" before we meet with the Titan.
番红蕊？哦…那是三相殿祭祀仪式的必需品，你是觉得不能空手去见{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}？
Saffron? Ah, it's an essential offering for rituals in the Temple of the Three Fates. You think we shouldn't go to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} empty-handed?
嗯。它也是雅努萨波利斯的象征物之一。如果要复现记忆，*我们*最好能有一些历经当年岁月的事物做基底……
Yes. It's also a symbol of Janusopolis. If we are to replicate memories, we need to use something that has experienced those days...
以及，和阿雅第一次见面时，*我们*为她做的粥里就放了这个，她很爱吃。
And when we first met Agy, we added that to the porridge we made for her, and she really loved it!
I see! It's like killing three birds with one stone!
不过…前提是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}愿意帮助*我们*。
But... it all depends on whether {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is willing to help us.
毕竟，当年夺走了它至亲{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}火种的人…就是*我们*。
After all, it was us who took the Coreflame from {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... From Oronyx's kin.
只能先试试看了。如果真的无路可走……
We will have to give it a try. If there is truly no other way...
…以*我们*现在的状态，恐怕也没法对它做什么。到时再想想其他办法吧……
...In our current state, we probably can't do anything to them. We'll cross that bridge when we get there...
到时候，可以交给缇安，缇安最会卖可怜了！
Leave it to Trianne. Trianne knows how to play cute!
总之，先去找番红蕊吧，但愿神殿里还有存储，没有被{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的士兵毁掉。
In any case, let's look for saffron first. I hope there's still some left in the temple, untouched by {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} soldiers.
我记得，熟成的番红蕊都是装在瓮里密封起来的……
I remember that aged saffron is preserved in sealed jars...
嗯，看到了。那是…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}在警告*我们*吗？
Yeah, I saw it. Was that... a warning from {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?
缇宝，缇宁，你们在说什么悄悄话呢？
What are you two whispering about, Tribbie? Trinnon?
（缇安，连*我们*自己的交流也感应不到了吗……）
不说这个了，缇安忽然觉得，这里好像很熟悉！
Well, never mind. Trianne suddenly feels like this place is quite familiar!
房间里，好像有「翻红瑞」的气息，就在…那里！
There's a whiff of "safari" in this room. It's... right over there!
就在这儿！「我呼唤你，欧洛尼斯——激起往昔的涟漪！」
Right here! "I summon thee, Oronyx! Stir up ripples of past reverie!"
这…是一封信吗？倒是提到了「番红蕊」，但还有…「缇里西庇俄丝」？
Wait, this is... a letter? It mentions something about "saffron" and... "Tribios"?
…先不说这个，这封信为什么会出现在这里？缇安又是怎么感应到的……
...Never mind that for now. Why is this letter here? And how did Trianne sense it?
难道…这是*我们*丢失的记忆？
莫非，*我们*已经被{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}发现，踏入了它的考验？
Is it possible that we were already noticed by {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and entered their trial?
可是它为什么一言不发？
But why haven't they said a word?
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的性格反复无常，就像是一名孩童。也许…是存心想要作弄*我们*吧。
{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has the whims of a child. Perhaps... they're toying with us on purpose.
缇宝，缇宁！这回找到啦，这是那个「翻红瑞」吗？
Tribbie! Trinnon! Look what I found! Is this the "safari"?
什么！明明就在这个陶罐里……
What? It was right in this dolium...
咦，真的什么都没有？不可能，刚刚还看到了……
Huh? There's really nothing here? That can't be! I swear I saw it...
真的！缇安没骗人…刚才还有的，怎么突然就不见了呢？
I swear! Trianne is telling the truth! It was right there — where did it go?
缇宁、缇宝，为什么不说话？从刚才开始，缇安就听不见*你们*的声音了……
Trinnon, Tribbie, why aren't you saying anything? Trianne can't seem to hear you at all...
…因为*我们*在发呆呢，缇安。别紧张。
...We were just lost in our thoughts. Don't worry, Trianne.
你看到的，或许是只雅努萨野兔，被*我们*吓到就一溜烟跑走了。
What you saw was likely a Janus hare. We must have startled it away.
这是…打算动摇*我们*吗？{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}为什么要做这种事？
Could {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} be trying to make us falter? But why would they do that?
不对劲…缇宝，你有没有觉得，神殿有些太安静了？
Something feels off... Tribbie, don't you think the temple is a little too quiet?
也许只是错觉，缇宁只是在想……
It might just be an illusion, but Trinnon wonders...
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…真的是在考验*我们*吗？
Is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... really putting us through a trial?
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…消失了？
你是说…这黑袍剑士不仅与黑潮有关，还在四处猎取火种？
Are you saying that the black-robed swordmaster is not just tied to the black tide... but is also hunting for Coreflames everywhere?
这个猜想的可能性最大。第一，它持有火种的容器；第二，我也是它的目标之一。
This is the most plausible possibility. First, it has a vessel that can hold Coreflames. Second, I'm one of its targets.
先说第一条论据：它那造型古怪的「仪式剑」能和火种相互作用——刺入我胸口时的引力就是证明。我猜测那柄剑具备感应、吸收…甚至容纳火种的能力。

Let's start with the first premise. Its peculiar "ceremonial blade" can interact with the Coreflame, as evidenced by the pull I felt when it stabbed into my chest. I hypothesize that the blade can sense, absorb... or even retain Coreflames.
第二条论据就更直接了：它早前陷入混战时，虽然多有分心，但从始至终都在盯着我，或者说，我体内的{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。

The second premise is even more explicit. When it was engaged in fierce battle with many of us and was heavily distracted, it remained consistently focused on me — or rather, on the Titan {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} inside me.
Heh, so it's plundering the flames...
但要是如你所说，它岂不是很快就会冲着奥赫玛来？创世涡心可是摆满了泰坦的火种。
But if your argument holds up, wouldn't they be headed to Okhema soon? The Vortex of Genesis is full of the Titans' Coreflames.
未必。我们暂且将此人称为「盗火行者」。假设推测成立，此人的目标共有三处。
Not necessarily. Let's call that person the "Flame Reaver" for now. If my presumption holds, that person has three targets.
一是我本人；二是仍未陨落的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}；三是保管诸神火种的奥赫玛和创世涡心。
The first target is me. The second target is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, who hasn't yet fallen. And the third is Okhema and the Vortex of Genesis, where the Coreflames are housed.
不过，我猜奥赫玛不会是首选。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种有元老院的秘法管控，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的水幕应该也足以隔断外界的感应。

But I suspect Okhema won't be their first target. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame is guarded by the Council of Elders' arcane power, and {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} water curtain should be able to block out any external perceptions.
那{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}呢？它们的火种也还没归位……
What about {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}? Their Coreflames are yet to be restored...
{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}去向成谜，无人知晓它的所在。至于{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}……
The whereabouts of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} remain a mystery to all. As for {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}...
No, I can't. Why are you asking that?
…啊，说的也是。可万一它肋下生翼……
...Ah, good point. But what if they do grow wings...
它若生有羽翼，我就不可能从树庭活着回来。
If they had wings, I wouldn't have made it out of the Grove alive.
那还真该庆幸啊。那么，既然盗火行者可能的目标有二，我们更得加快动作了……
That's a relief. Anyway, since the Flame Reaver has two targets, we need to move fast...
考虑到奥赫玛、树庭和这几处目标地点的距离，我想，最应该设防的是……
With the distances between Okhema, the Grove, and these potential targets, I believe we should bolster our defense in...
——缇宝失踪了！她们最后一次被人目击到是在……
— Tribbie is missing! The last time the three of them were seen was in...
是预感到了*我们*会来，躲进迷雾中了吗？还是……
Did they foresee that we were coming and hide in the fog? Or...
缇宝…*我们*恐怕得走了。这座神殿里……
听——脚步声，很急促，有三、四个人，正在往这边赶来。
Listen — footsteps, fast ones. Three or four people, coming this way.
先找个地方藏起来。无论对方是谁，*我们*都不能被看见。
Come on, we need to hide! Whoever they are, we can't let them see us!
Tribbie, Trinnon... Come check this out.
总觉得…缇安在哪里见过？
Trianne feels like... it's so familiar.
Let's be on the lookout as we go.
"It's a dead end ahead — turn back, teacher."
What, Agy? No, it's an illusion!
「即便离别注定，无谓赴死也绝非正途。」
"Even if separation is our fate, a futile death is not the solution."
真是的…玩闹也要看场合呀。
Come on... This isn't the right time to be playing games.
"Separation and death are two sides of the same coin..."
"Reconciliation doesn't come easily for a mortal."
这些景象，也都是岁月的涟漪吗？
Are these visions also fragments of the past?
唔，结果！还是没找到「翻红瑞」……
Ugh, still no luck finding any "safari"...
没有…应该也没关系，试着说服{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}吧。
I suppose we can do without it... Let's try to convince {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.
至少它没有直接赶走*我们*。
At least they didn't toss us out straight away.
哇…缇宝、缇宁，快看，好厉害！
Wow! Tribbie! Trinnon! Look at this! So cool!
There are... so many of us now!
好安静啊！泰坦都住在这么暗的地方吗？
It's really quiet in here! Do all Titans live in dark places like this?
他们是自发前来应战的？还是……
Did they come to fight on their own accord? Or...?
You sure know how to keep a man waiting...
你们再不赶来，这泰坦怕是要牺牲我了。
Any later, and I fear the Titan would have sacrificed me.
呵，纤弱的人子…保你在刀下留个全身，可比解明至理还费力哪。
Heh. Frail child of humanity... 'tis more effort keeping you hale and whole against that blade than it is in seeking the truth of the world.
人海战术…我们分而击之！
They're trying to overwhelm us with numbers... Split up and take them out!
呵呵，派头十足啊，「救世主」。
老师，准备动手！我们快顶不住了！
Get ready, Prof! We can't hold out much longer!
Quiet! I know what I'm doing!
黑潮的走卒——朕，悬锋众军之王，前来做你的敌手。
Minion of the black tide, I, king of the Kremnoan legion, will be your opponent today.
我权赐你与悬锋众英灵，同享尸床的权利——
Rejoice, for I grant you the honor of sharing your final resting place with Kremnos' departed heroes!
也不过…沉没一座王朝而已。
I am but sending a dynasty to its end.
好身手！为祭典开场足以尽兴……
Well fought! That was a good opener to the ceremony!
继续，就用你我的厮杀飨宴{RUBY_B#尼卡多利}死去的尊神{RUBY_E#}！
Now, we honor the {RUBY_B#Nikador}fallen gods{RUBY_E#} with this fight to the death!
又来这套…万敌，我配合你进攻。
Not the same trick again... Mydei, I'll follow your lead.
不足为虑，放手搏杀便是！
This is nothing to be worried about. Just fight to your heart's content!
来吧！悬锋人的投矛一向利落——命运自会为我制导枪头！
Come! The Kremnoans' spear always finds their mark — Fate itself shall forge my speartip!
好消息我已知晓：吾师能安然归来，便是证明。
I already know the good news. Tribbie's safe return is proof of that.
你应当先和我商议一番的，白厄。
You should have come to me first, Phainon.
阿雅，还是不要苛责小白了…奥赫玛的处境，非常危险。
Agy, there's no need to scold Snowy... Okhema is currently in grave danger.
我知道。难以想象，人类唯二能仰赖的泰坦竟在如此短的时间内先后遭遇毒手…金线前所未有地紧绷，仿若一触即溃。

I know. It's beyond my imagination that the only two Titans humankind can still rely on fell in such quick succession... I've never seen the golden thread pulled this taut, as if it could snap at any moment.
白厄，你们的计划…时间紧迫，长话短说吧。
Phainon... Tell us your plan. Time is of the essence.
白厄转述了那刻夏的发现……
不仅是狩猎泰坦，还要剥夺它们的火种…？
This being is not just hunting Titans, but taking the Coreflames, too?
对，和「逐火之旅」如出一辙…那刻夏老师认为盗火行者的出现，也许是黑潮进一步蔓延的表征。
Yes, just like the Flame-Chase Journey is doing. Professor Anaxa thinks the Flame Reaver's arrival is likely a sign that the black tide has spread further.
且不论推论的真伪，它远比想象中更来势汹汹啊。
Regardless of whether you're right, this being is still far more aggressive than we expected.
但这股疯狂也是我们的机会：既然火种是它的目标，人类就能诱导它落入陷阱。
But its madness is also an opportunity for us. If its goal is the Coreflame, then that means us humans can lure it into a trap.
在我们前去重渊之时，那刻夏老师已带着{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种离开圣城，提前赶往战场布局。
Anaxa had already left the holy city with {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} Coreflame while we were on the way to the Abyss, so he can make preparations for the battlefield.
说说看，凭什么你们觉得——结局不会是又一颗火种的丢失？
Tell me, what makes you think this won't end with us losing another Coreflame?
因为这一次，天外的伟力同样站在我们身边……
Because this time, the power from beyond the sky is also at our side...
I knew it. Of course it's got to be me.
Really? Are you sure I can do it?
我有一颗星核，能冒充火种吗？
I have a Stellaron. Can we pass it off as a Coreflame?
还需要你的另一位同伴。
We need your other companion too.
原来如此。白厄，你方才提到的「战场」……
I see. Phainon, that "battlefield" you mentioned...
正是。各位一定记得，{NICKNAME}和{M#他}{F#她}的伙伴在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一役中施展过令人惊叹的神迹，唤醒了悬锋城的过往。

Yes. I'm sure everyone remembers the astonishing miracle {NICKNAME} performed with {M#his}{F#her} companion during the battle with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and how they awakened Castrum Kremnos' past.
这便是致胜的关键——我们要重施故技，用{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的力量打开往日之门，诱敌深入……
That will be the key to our victory — We will use {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s power to once again open a passage to the past and lure our enemy inside...
然后，将盗火行者「封印」在岁月的迷宫。
Then, we'll "seal" the Flame Reaver in the Maze of Time.
不错，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}已经陨落，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的神力也为奥赫玛所有。只要能夺回火种，那剑士便毫无逃离的手段。

Impressive. {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has fallen, and {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' divine power already belongs to Okhema. Once we take back the Coreflame, the swordmaster will have no means of escape.
并非裹血力战，而是以奇制胜——很聪明的做法。
It's very clever, using the element of surprise instead of brute strength.
Can you do it, little one?
是说把黑色的家伙，丢到过去，再关起来吗？因为有记忆碎片，开启入口当然没问题，可剩下的……
I just have to throw that black-cloaked guy into the past, and lock them there, right? With the memory fragments, I can open a door no problem. As for the rest...
只能说——相信人家和{NICKNAME}一起，就什么都能做到吧！
Well, let's just say that {NICKNAME} and I can do anything as long as we're together!
That's right! We can do anything!
是的！感受到大家热切的目光了吗？这么重大的场合，可不能让他们失望呀！
Yeah! Can you feel their fervent gazes? This is a big deal! We can't let everyone down!
Really? I'm not so sure about this...
拜托啦，感受到大家热烈的目光了吗？这么重大的场合，可不能让他们失望呀！
Aw, come on! Can't you feel their fervent gazes? This is a big deal! We can't let everyone down!
Really? Then I'm gonna make a wish!
拜托啦，感受到大家热烈的目光了吗？这么重大的场合，可不能让他们失望呀！
Aw, come on! Can't you feel their fervent gazes? This is a big deal! We can't let everyone down!
很激动的样子呢…看来是颇有信心。
Such enthusiasm. I'm glad to see you're confident.
几位有所不知：吾师失踪的同时，元老院也已告急。凯妮斯一派还是得知了树庭的事，暗中开始造势，恐怕在下一次公民大会前就会有所行动。

By the way, the Council of Elders declared a state of emergency when Tribbie went missing. Caenis and her following have heard tell of the incident at the Grove and are galvanizing support in secret. I fear she'll make her move before the next assembly of the citizens.
目光短浅的野心家，大概是觉得黄金裔的利用价值将尽，准备提前布局吧？总有一天，我们也必须面对「人」的问题。

That short-sighted politician likely believes the Chrysos Heirs have outlived their usefulness and is making preparations for her next step. That ugly side of humanity is something we'll have to deal with eventually.
但…不是现在。我已派遐蝶赶往元老院，捎去口信。有她在，足以暂时稳住局势。
...But that's a problem for another day. I've sent Castorice ahead to the Council with a message. She should be able to keep the situation under control for the time being.
白厄，我希望与你达成共识：我们要将那盗火行者一举拿下，斩获战果。此后，面对元老院的挑战，我们也将有自己的底牌。

Phainon, it is my hope that we can come to an understanding on this: We must take down the Flame Reaver in one go and retrieve the Coreflame, and in doing so, grant ourselves an advantage against the Council of Elders.
Of course. You may count on me to lead the charge.
抱歉，{NICKNAME}阁下，如今奥赫玛内忧外患，又将你推上浪尖。
I apologize for tasking you to spearhead the plan once again, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, but Okhema is currently beset by enemies from within and without.
但事态紧急，实在没有与你细细磋商的余地…此事核心在你，我尊重你的选择。
The situation brooks no delay, and we have precious little time to confer and discuss the plan with you... That being said, you are the key to our success, and I shall respect any decision you make.
如何保证计划的可行性？
How do we make sure that the plan will work?
虽然对「百界门」的掌握不如缇安，但只要各位能争取些时间，*我*也可以开启一扇漂亮的门。
I may not be as masterful as Trianne when it comes to the Century Gate, but even I can open a nice, big gate if I have enough time.
至于能否夺得火种，就端看那刻夏的能耐了。
As for whether we can take back the Coreflame... that will be up to Anaxa's capabilities.
以我对那个人的认识…他一定能做到。
Based on what I know of him, he can do it.
How do we guarantee my safety?
坦率地说，我们无法保证这个计划的安全性……
但…盗火行者的剑想要伤到你，得先穿透我的胸膛。
But the Flame Reaver will have to step over my dead body if they wish to do you harm.
迷迷的计划就是我的计划。
Whatever Mem's plan is, I'll follow.
太好啦！人家还怕你生迷迷的气呢。
Hooray! I was so worried that you'd be mad at me.
我们保留随时抽身的权利。
We reserve the right to withdraw at any time.
自然。与盗火行者交锋后，若阁下心力不支，自可抽身脱离战场，我们另寻他法。
Of course. Should you feel fatigued after our confrontation with the Flame Reaver, you are free to withdraw from the battlefield. We will find another way.
感谢阁下慷慨相助，也再次感谢各位。立刻开拔，围猎敌人吧——
We are grateful to you for your aid, and to the rest of you as well. Now, let us be off to begin the hunt.
愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}使你我眸光锋锐，克敌制胜。
May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} sharpen our gaze and grant us victory over the enemy.
你说万敌么？他正在解决另一桩难题呢。
You mean Mydei? He's dealing with a different problem.
放心，那个男人是绝不会缺席这场战役的。
Don't worry. That man would never miss out on this fight.
一旦夺回火种，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的门径就会开启。大家必须马上逃离，绝不能停留。
Once we take back the Coreflame, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' passage will open. When that happens, you must evacuate immediately. Don't stay behind.
剩下的…就看*我们*的默契啦。
The rest... will be up to how well we work together.
在你们踏入战场前，我有一事想托付给你。
Before you step into battle, there's something I wish to ask of you.
请替我照看白厄，人面对仇敌时，总会叫愤恨迷了双目，连沉重的命运都难以看清。
Please, look after Phainon for me. Humans are often so blinded by hate when their enemy is before them, thus have trouble seeing even the heavy weight of destiny.
Don't worry. I'll be by his side.
我试试，不一定拦得住他…
I'll try, but I don't know if I can stop him...
他视力挺好啊，我相信白厄。
He can see just fine. I have faith in Phainon.
感谢你。愿你们荣归，战场的骄子。
You have my thanks. May you return in glory, elites of the battlefield.
别了，挚友。你一定要…带领我等还乡……
Farewell, my dear friend. You must... lead us back home...
都一样…你和我…我们都把纷争和恐惧当做食粮……
You and I, we're both the same... We feast on strife and fear...
你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.
我听说了，你们马上就要远征。
I heard you're about to set off on an expedition.
没错，这会是无比艰难的一仗。目的地…还是悬锋城。
That's right. It's going to be a tough battle, and our destination is... turns out to be Castrum Kremnos.
所以，你是来向死去的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}祈祷的？
Is that why you're here? To pray to the dead {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?
不，恰恰相反。我来是为了告诉你……
No, just the opposite. I'm here to tell you...
这一次，你只管把前线交给我们。你将要面对的战场…同样不容失利。
You can entrust the front line to us this time. You can't afford to lose your upcoming battle either.
「开山者」吉奥刻勒斯——他的故事，你听过么？
Have you heard the story of Geocles the Mountainbreaker?
看来你和哈托努斯聊过了啊。这个名字，是那位传说中的山之民吧？
Sounds like you've spoken with Chartonus. That's the name of the legendary Mountain Dweller, right?
Let's have a chat before we go our separate ways.
哈托努斯告诉我，远古，山之民们都隐居在山丘中。他们终日挖掘、采集…过着平和质朴的生活，远离纷争。
Chartonus told me that back in ancient times, the Mountain Dwellers lived in seclusion. They spent their days quarrying and gathering, living a simple and peaceful life away from strife.
但吉奥刻勒斯是个异类，他不认可传统，向往山外的世界。温吞的习俗，在他眼中仿佛一座监牢。
But Geocles was different. He resisted their traditional way of life, yearning for the world beyond the mountain. Their safe but humdrum culture was like fetters around him.
He sounds a lot like you.
没错，所以他也必须面对同样的抉择：某日，吉奥刻勒斯一如往常，翻出山丘。但他看见，山脚下驻扎了一整支拉冬人的营队。
Yes, that is why he, too, faced the same dilemma as I do. One day, during one of Geocles' many ventures beyond the mountain, he spied a battalion of Ladonians stationed at the foot of the mountain.
那群拉冬人正和宿敌坎帕人交战，把山岳当成了游击的本营。吉奥刻勒斯自学了通用语，他从士兵口中套出了情报——

The Ladonians were at war with their archenemies, the Campanians, and they used the mountain as a base to carry out guerrilla warfare operations. When Geocles, who had taught himself the common tongue, approached a soldier, he learned a shocking piece of news:
——拉冬人计划在山间布满暗雷和炸药，并诱敌深入。那代表山之民的家园将不再安全，从此会危机四伏。吉奥刻勒斯即刻返回村落，将消息告知族人。然而……

The Ladonians were planning to plant mines and explosives all over the mountain, and then lure their enemies within. With danger lurking with every step, the Mountain Dwellers' homes were no longer safe. Geocles quickly returned to his village to bring the news to his people, but...
我猜猜…他们宁愿忍耐，也不愿求变？
Let me guess: They refused change and chose to put up with the situation instead?
…没错。山之民畏惧改变，更遑论迁徙。战争将至，长老却只打算求和，不愿离开山里。吉奥刻勒斯感到悲哀，愤怒。

...That's right. The Mountain Dwellers were fearful of even the smallest change to their lifestyle, let alone leaving their home. Despite the imminent war, the elders would rather negotiate for peace instead of leaving the mountains. This made Geocles both angry and sad.
但他并未放弃。若你是他，会怎么做？
But he didn't give up. If you were in his shoes, what would you have done?
带领族人发起反抗？说不上来，一时想不到什么两全其美的办法。
Lead my people on a resistance, perhaps? I'm not sure. I can't think of a solution that would make everyone happy.
「两全其美」——这正是你我的天真之处。而吉奥刻勒斯…我告诉你他是如何做的。
"A solution that would make everyone happy," huh... That's how naive we are. Well, let me tell you what Geocles did.
他拿走了山之民囤积的宝石，找拉冬人交换了大量火药。但不是为了抗击坎帕人——趁着夜色，他点燃聚落周围的山林，逼迫所有人逃出了山野。

He took the Mountain Dwellers' store of gemstones and traded them with the Ladonians for a massive amount of gunpowder — but he didn't do this to fight the Campanians. Under the cover of night, he set ablaze the forests surrounding the settlement, forcing his people to flee the mountain.
那场大火成了山之民历史的起点，自那之后，他们才汇入文明的大河，圣城中才出现了巨人的身影。而曾经的那片山岳，早已成了黑潮中的几点浮沫。

That great fire marked the beginning of Mountain Dweller history. Since then, their people became part of civilization, and giants became a common sight in the holy city. Meanwhile, that mountain they once lived in has turned into little more than foam inside the black tide.
但离开故土，也让许多山之民遭遇不幸。比如……
But leaving their homeland also brought many Mountain Dwellers misfortune. They —
…被悬锋族人猎捕，或沦为奴仆。没错，那亦是历史的一部分。
They were hunted by Kremnoans or enslaved. Indeed, that is undeniably also part of their history.
这便是吉奥刻勒斯，他的功过自有人评说。但历史依然奉其为「开山者」，你觉得这是为何？
But that is Geocles for you. The merits of his actions — or the lack thereof — have been scrutinized by many, but historians nevertheless hail him as the Mountainbreaker. Why do you think that is?
这道理再直白不过——<color=#dbc291ff>因为他行动了，用自己的双手刻写下变革。</color>他没有试图让所有人理解自己，也从未在两全其美的困境中蹉跎。

It's simply because <color=#dbc291ff>he took action and enacted change with his own hands.</color> He didn't try to make everyone understand him, nor did he even waste time trying to make everyone happy.
他用一把大火烧毁了名为「传统」的枷锁，然后驱迫所有人…迈向滚滚而来的时代。
He started a great fire and burned the shackles of tradition to ashes, and then... forced everyone to march toward the coming of a new era.
...You've made up your mind, haven't you?
不久之后，我就会离开奥赫玛，去和这世间的至暗搏斗，去背负…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的命运。
I'll be leaving Okhema soon to fight the great darkness of this world... and to shoulder {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} destiny.
所以，仔细听好了——如果有一天，我们又在战场上相见，而我站在了逐火的对立面……
So, listen well: If there comes a day when we meet again on the battlefield, and I stand opposed to the flame-chase...
<color=#dbc291ff>记得从背后刺入我的第十节胸椎，那是唯一能杀死我的弱点。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Remember to stab your sword into my back through my tenth thoracic vertebra. That's my weak spot, and the only way to kill me.</color>
走吧，奔向你的战场，为那盗火的鬣狗送去死亡。
Go now. Your battlefield calls. Send that flame-thieving hyena to their death.
但，倘若是你们被逼上了绝路，那就向天上的锋刃祈祷——
But if you find yourselves with no other recourse, then pray to that blade in the sky...
——然后，大声呼唤新神的名字吧。
...And loudly call out the name of the new god.
死神也抛弃了你啊，吾师。
I see the Reaper has forsaken you, too, teacher.
哼，它只是把我的性命交到了昏光庭院手中。
Hmph, it simply put my life in the hands of the Twilight Courtyard.
那祭司姑娘的医术…不简单啊，她或许远没有你我想的单纯。
That priest girl's medical talents are truly exceptional... She might be far from the ordinary girl we envisioned.
但我的事不重要。迈德漠斯，我看到了…最后，你还是拥抱了自己的命运。
But this isn't about me, Mydeimos. I saw it... You've finally decided to embrace your own fate.
现在…「纷争」的力量在我胸中翻涌。我的筋骨化作钢铁，血液在沸腾燃烧。历代悬锋的王者只能仰望这股力量，但我——已经与它融为一体。

The power of Strife is stirring a tempest within me as we speak... My bones have turned into steel, and my blood is seething and ablaze. Past rulers of Kremnos could only aspire to this might, yet I have merged with it.
我缔造了历史。自我之后，神与王得以共生。
I've made history, and henceforth, divinity and kingship shall coexist as one.
没错，你实现了每一位悬锋先王的野心。
Indeed. You've realized the aspirations of every former king of Kremnos.
现在，你终于能带领族人还乡，去重铸悬锋的荣光了。
And now, you can at last bring our people home and reforge the glory of Kremnos.
Wha—What do you mean by that?
两千余年前，崇拜{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}力量的人们聚集在它脚下，建立了城邦。悬锋人从此成了战神的锋刃，追随泰坦的步伐征讨四方。

Over two millennia past, devotees of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s might banded together beneath their feet and erected a city of their own. Ever since then, Kremnoans have served as the blades wielded by the god of war, following the Titan's path in its conquest.
但此刻，当我以「神」的身份重新俯瞰这段历史——我终于看清了一切。
Yet, gazing upon our history through the lens of my newfound divinity, I now see it with unprecedented clarity.
<color=#dbc291ff>这是一段荒谬且卑微的历史。</color>人们如蝼蚁般奔赴战场、贪婪掠杀，也如蝼蚁一般…遭到践踏。

<color=#dbc291ff>This history is sheer absurdity and inferiority.</color> People surged onto the battlefield like ants, plundering and slaying for their own greed, only to be trampled upon... like ants.
悬锋人引以为傲的城邦、信仰，还有所谓的「传统」——在它眼中，不过是一触即溃的蚁穴。
The city and the beliefs that Kremnoans hold so dearly, alongside the supposed tradition... are mere anthills that can be crushed with a single touch in the eyes of the Titan.
你想用短短的几句话，剥夺悬锋族人累积千年的骄傲吗？！
Are you trying to strip Kremnoans of the pride we've amassed over thousands of years with mere words!?
——那骄傲不值一提，克拉特鲁斯。如今，我已接过「纷争」的神权。而接下来……
...That pride holds little significance, Krateros. Now that I've assumed the divinity of Strife, my next step...
我将卸下，所谓「王」的名号。
Will be to renounce the title of "King."
把我的话语传递给每一个悬锋人，我命令你。
Convey my message to every Kremnoan — this is an order.
始于光历<unbreak>2506</unbreak>年，终于光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年。我，迈德漠斯，悬锋城的末代僭主，歌耳戈之子，在此宣告——

Our history commenced in Year <unbreak>2506</unbreak> of the Light Calendar and concluded in Year <unbreak>4931</unbreak>. I, Mydeimos, last King of Castrum Kremnos, son of Gorgo, do hereby proclaim...
<size=28><color=#dbc291ff>The Kremnoan dynasty comes to an official close today.</color></size>
No, I am granting you a new beginning.
我母亲的印戒。它本是王者的证明，现在，我将赋予它崭新的意义。
My mother's signet ring. It served as a symbol of kingship, and I now imbue it with a fresh significance.
拿上它，召集失去了身份的人们。告诉他们，登上神阶的迈德漠斯昭告天下——
Take it and rally those who have lost their identities. Convey the words of Mydeimos, now ascended to divinity:
不必再去追求缥缈的荣誉，也不用再把战死当成唯一的归宿。但你们必须改变，融入这座曾以冷眼注视的城邦。

You no longer need to chase fleeting honors or face death on the battlefield as if it were your sole destination. However, you must adapt to fit into this city that you once observed with indifferent eyes.
翁法罗斯将迎来残酷的明天。大敌当前，再辉煌的王朝也不过是一堆瓦砾。
A cruel fate awaits Amphoreus. No matter how illustrious a dynasty may seem, it crumbles to rubble and gravel before formidable foes.
但你们会踏上唯一的出路，它的尽头将是崭新的世界。
Yet, you shall tread the only path out, one that leads to a brand-new world at its end.
为何要我做你的传声筒，为何你不去亲口向他们解释这一切？
Why task me with being your messenger? Why not explain all this to them yourself?
因为人要走的道路，只能由人来引领。不是觊觎神明之力，堕入疯狂的「人」……
Because only humans can guide the path to be trodden by humans. It's not the lot of "humans" who crave the power of gods and spiral into madness for it...
<color=#dbc291ff>而是愿意高举盾牌，保护身后生灵的「人」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>But "humans" who stand ready to raise their shields high to protect the lives behind them.</color>
I failed to save that child.
这不重要。同为半神，她们早已有所觉悟。
That is irrelevant. As demigods, they have long been prepared for it.
重要的是你会出现在那里——挡在她的面前。
What truly matters is that you showed up there and shielded her.
那一晚，说服阿格莱雅放了我的…是你么，迈德漠斯？
The one who persuaded Aglaea to set me free that night... Was that you, Mydeimos?
她没有那么容易妥协。你开出了什么条件？
She's not one to easily make a concession. What did you offer her?
我押上了母亲的名誉，向她保证你灵魂的刚直。以及……
I staked my mother's name to guarantee the integrity of your soul to her, and...
…我向她许下承诺，会将自己的一切，献予逐火的征途。
...I promised her that I would dedicate all I have to the Flame-Chase Journey.
去履行我的诺言，回到我应回的地方。
To the place where I belong, to fulfill my promise.
那折磨{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂，吞噬整个翁法罗斯的黑暗……
The madness that has plagued {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and the darkness that has consumed Amphoreus...
现在，轮到我与之抗争了。
It's now my turn to fight against it.
It seems that you are prepared.
你帮奥赫玛渡过了又一道难关，没有言语能表达我的谢意。
You aided Okhema through yet another trying ordeal, and my gratitude knows no bounds.
Isn't that exactly what you wanted?
并非一切都在我的计划中。在如今的世道，我也只能步步为营。何况……
Not everything unfolds according to my plan. In the current state of the world, I can only proceed one step at a time. Furthermore...
即便没有对我的承诺，你也准备好献出自己的一切了，不是么？
You are ready to dedicate all that you have, regardless of the promise you made to me, aren't you?
在圣城的时间，我一直在向你学习：制定战略，领导众人，回应变数…但直到最近，我才看清了你真正令人诚服的特质。

Throughout my time in the holy city, I've gleaned valuable lessons from you — strategy, leadership, and adaptability to change... Yet, it's only recently that I've come to realize the truly remarkable quality you possess.
你身上的「引力」。人们会自愿聚集在你的身边，聆听你的指引。
It's the magnetic allure in your presence. It draws people to gather around you willingly, to seek your guidance.
他们不想令你失望，并非出于对惩戒的恐惧，而是发自内心地认同你的理念。
They strive not to disappoint you, not due to fear of repercussions, but out of sincere alignment with your ideals.
那正是悬锋城的历代僭主缺失的东西。
That is precisely what every ruler of Castrum Kremnos has been missing.
...I am truly honored to hear that.
你已经成了这世上最强大的半神，迈德漠斯。你打算如何使用这份力量？
And now, Mydeimos, you have risen as the most powerful demigod in the world. How do you intend to wield this newfound power?
我将完成{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}未竟的事业，成为翁法罗斯最坚固的墙垣，抵御黑潮的袭击。
I shall see {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s aborted mission through to completion, and become the strongest bulwark for Amphoreus to defend against the black tide.
我会为逐火之旅争取足够的时间，直到你带领所有人走到「创世」的奇迹面前。
I will secure enough time for the Flame-Chase Journey until you manage to lead everyone to reach the miracle of "Genesis."
翁法罗斯会迎来新生的，迈德漠斯…只是，带领人们抵达终点的不一定要是你我。
Mydeimos, a new chapter awaits Amphoreus... Yet, the one who guides the people to the destination need not be you and I.
接过{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的神职后，你看见了什么？
What did you see after assuming {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia's{RUBY_E#} divinity?
…即便过去了一千年，那道预言的字句仍旧清晰。
...Despite the passage of a thousand years, every word of that prophecy remains as vivid as ever.
<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将最后一次沐浴，在温热耀眼的黄金中。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"You shall have your final bath in warm and radiant gold."</color>
…呵，果然是不知所谓的末日预告。
...Heh, just as cryptic as all the other prophecies.
What's the reason for the laughter?
我只是在想，换做常人看见这行字句，恐怕此生都不会再接近浴场。
I was just thinking... if an ordinary person encountered these words, they would probably stay away from the baths for the rest of their life.
但我戒不掉沐浴带来的宽畅享受。
But I cannot forgo the delightful experience a bath offers.
所以，你也看见了么，迈德漠斯？
So, I assume you also glimpsed yours, Mydeimos?
<color=#dbc291ff>「终有一日，汝将背后负创而死。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"One day, you shall die with a wound in your back."</color>
还真是直截了当的画面啊。
Well, that is a rather straightforward scenario.
但如果我会被一则凭空出现的谵语吓破了胆，当初就不会受到你的注视，加入逐火的旅路。
If I were to be terrified by drivel with no basis, I would not have attracted your gaze and joined the Flame-Chase Journey in the first place.
你是对的。愿强有力的命运恭候你，也愿我们在承诺中的新世界再会……
You speak the truth. May you be destined for a powerful fate, and may we reunite in the promised new world...
异乡人…不，开拓者们——我将动身前往悬锋城了。
Outlanders... no, Trailblazers, I will soon make my way to Castrum Kremnos.
假如万事顺利，我们也许不会再见。感谢你们为翁法罗斯带来的一切。
If all goes according to plan, this may be our final meeting. I just want to let you know that I appreciate everything you have done for Amphoreus.
重新审视过往，昂然步向未来，我也经历过这样的挣扎。
Reflecting on the past and moving forward to the future, a challenge I've faced as well.
虽未有机会与你交心，但共同经历了这么多…万敌，你同样是「开拓」的盟友。
Though we never had a chance for a deep conversation, after all we've experienced together... you are also an ally of the Trailblaze, Mydei.
这意义非凡。也祝你们的「开拓」无往不胜。
That means a lot to me. May success accompany your Trailblazing wherever it leads.
呵…你在想些什么，不如由我来猜猜？
Heh... How about you let me guess what's on your mind?
猜测：{F#她}{M#他}要说些鼓舞的话。
I guess... {F#She}{M#He} will say something inspiring.
在思考什么…鼓舞人心的话语么？
Are you thinking about... saying something inspiring?
…多吃蔬菜，多锻炼；少看闲书，少熬夜。
...Eat more greens, work out more often, avoid mindless reads, and get more sleep.
猜测：{F#她}{M#他}要说些煽情的话。
I guess... {F#She}{M#He} will say something sentimental.
莫非在酝酿什么…感人的道别辞？
Are you drafting... a sentimental farewell speech?
…男孩子独自出门，要保护好自己。
...Stay safe out there. A lone boy can get into a lot of trouble.
I guess... {F#She}{M#He} will say something nonsensical.
又要口出狂言了么，开拓者？
Are you going to say something insane again, Trailblazer?
…没了你我们可怎么办啊，呜呜呜。
*sob* ...What are we going to do without you?
不知道该怎么回应的话，微笑就行了。
Just smile if you don't know how to respond.
如今我身负神权，隐隐能感觉到…你们对翁法罗斯的未来重要非凡。
Now that I bear the divine within me, I can get the vague feeling that... that you have a great significance for the future of Amphoreus.
此去恐无归期。我能否将后背交予二位，恳请你们…继续协助逐火的征程？
With this departure, I fear that I will never again return. Can I entrust you both to watch my back... and to continue supporting the Flame-Chase Journey in my absence?
...Rest assured. We'll do everything we can.
You have my gratitude. Then, farewell.
合个影吧，至少留个纪念。
Let's at least snap a photo together to capture this moment, shall we?
感觉不错。你觉得呢，万敌？
Looks pretty good. What do you think, Mydei?
哼，怎么说呢…怪怪的？不是说拍照技术，是我很少给自己拍照……
Hmph, well... It feels peculiar, I suppose? I'm not talking about your photographic skills. It's just that I rarely take photos...
But this one... It's pretty good.
你能满意就好——别留遗憾。
I'm glad you like it. Make sure not to leave any regrets behind.
…也祝你们在翁法罗斯不留遗憾。
...I wish the same for you during your time in Amphoreus.
悬锋之王，虽无印戒…却更有王相，如今。
The King of Kremnos, without the signet ring... But looking more like a king now.
I'm no longer the "king," Grand Craftsman.
并无所谓，称号。胜过所有旧王，你成就之事。
Matters not, the title. Surpassed all former kings, your achievements have.
我将担起你们的信任，令世界不再受恐惧主宰。
I will honor your trust and liberate the world from the clutches of fear.
但哈托努斯，请你继续关照白厄。我有一种预感，也许他的命运…比我们所有人加起来都更沉重。
Nevertheless, I must request that you continue to watch over Phainon, Chartonus. I have a feeling that his fate... will weigh heavier than all of ours combined.
白厄的事，我会记得。归乡去吧，勇敢的王。
Keep Phainon in mind, I will. Return to your home, brave king.
与众人一同，我将在此，聆听悬锋城…那道惊雷。
Together with everyone, I shall remain here. That thunder... from Castrum Kremnos, we wait to hear.
缇里西庇俄丝女士…不在此处么？
原来克拉特鲁斯提到的医师是你，难怪他能取回一命。多谢。
So you are the physician Krateros spoke of. It's no wonder then that he was pulled back from the brink of death. You have my gratitude.
Heh... I can take that as a compliment, right?
树庭的事，我听说了。请你节哀。
I've heard about what happened at the Grove. I am deeply sorry for your loss.
…和死亡、悲伤有关的话，我最近已经听太多啦。用缇宝大人的话说，我们都该望向「明天」，不是吗？
...I've heard far too much about death and grief recently. To quote Lady Tribbie, we should all focus on tomorrow, shouldn't we?
也对…你一直是我们当中最乐观的那个。
That's a valid point... You have always been the most optimistic one among us.
话说回来，目睹一位新的半神站在眼前…真是不可思议。
Well, I must say, it feels quite incredible... to see a new demigod standing right before me.
You should prepare yourself as well.
——「纷争」已被人类执握在手。终有一日，他们也能触及「天空」。
...Humanity has already taken hold of "Strife," and one day, they will also reach the "Sky."
…你觉得我能做到？毕竟连我的祖先，那位史诗中的英雄，都没能征服{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种。
...Do you really believe I can do it? Even my ancestor, that hero of legends, couldn't conquer the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.
你与那几位半神关系甚好，理应明白这个道理：夺取神权的手段，从来不止剑与矛一种。
Given your good rapport with the demigods, you should know that the path to assuming divinity is never limited to swords and spears.
总是这么一针见血呢，万敌阁下。请放心吧，假如命运真的指定了我，我会做好准备的。
You've always been so perceptive, Lord Mydei. Rest assured. If fate has truly selected me, I will be ready.
对了，你是来找缇宝和缇宁大人的吧？她们不在，有什么话需要我转述吗？
Right. You are here looking for Lady Tribbie and Lady Trinnon, no? They're not around at the moment. Is there a message you'd like me to pass on to them?
不必了。我已和阿格莱雅道过别，来见神谕者只是出于礼仪。
No need. I have already bid farewell to Aglaea. Meeting with the oracle is simply a matter of courtesy.
我将返回悬锋城对抗黑潮，恐怕不会再回到奥赫玛了。
I'm heading back to Castrum Kremnos to fight against the black tide. In all likelihood, I will never again return to Okhema.
如此说来，倒是有一句话想求你转述。
On second thought, there is something that I'd like you to help me convey to them.
尽管说吧，万敌阁下。我一定逐字逐句帮你传达。
I'm all ears, Lord Mydei. I'll make sure to convey every single word.
——告诉她们，以后不必再以肉身勘察敌后了。只需一条讯息，天谴的锋刃便会指向奥赫玛的敌人。
...Tell them that there is no longer a need to send scouts behind enemy lines. With a single message, the Lance of Fury will target anyone who dares oppose Okhema.
我先你一步走进自己的宿命了，遐蝶。
I'll be embracing my destiny before you do, Castorice.
你现在…能感受到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吗？
Can you... feel {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} right now?
很可惜，我感受不到任何气息。
I don't feel them at all, regrettably.
如此漫长的岁月里，你一直在苦苦寻找它。但你从未想过找我做些尝试么？
You have been painstakingly seeking that Titan for so long, but have you ever considered reaching out to me for help?
死亡拒绝引渡我。若你将我送往冥界，或许我能在被遣返的路上找到些线索。
Death refused to ferry me. If you were to send me to the nether realm, I may uncover clues along the way back.
我不会那么做的，万敌阁下。死亡不是游戏。
I would never do that, Lord Mydei. Death is not a game.
…你说得对。我的族人之所以挣扎千年，或许正是因为他们太过轻视死亡。
...You're right. That may very well be the reason why my people have struggled for millennia — they underestimated the significance of death.
所以，你要独自返乡了吗，万敌阁下？
So, are you returning home alone, Lord Mydei?
还乡…也许吧。现在悬锋城不仅是我的故乡，还是我命运的归宿。
Returning home, you say... Heh, maybe. At this moment, Castrum Kremnos is not just my birthplace, but also my fated destination.
再努力些吧，遐蝶。去完成你必须完成的事，让你我这一路承受的磨难有所收获。
Work harder, Castorice. Go and do what you have to do, so that the trials we have endured may have meaning.
希望我们能于温暖西风的彼岸再会。
May we reunite on the other side, where the warm west wind blows.
Hmph, I should've known you were the mastermind behind this.
可别随便冤枉人啊，这次真的与我无关。
Hey, don't go pointing fingers without cause. I swear I'm innocent this time.
看到那边的小孩子了吗？是他们把大家聚在一起的。
See those kids over there? They're the ones who brought everyone together.
...I admit, that took me by surprise.
莫非你真想就一走了之，都不跟我通个气？
Were you seriously just going to sneak off without a word with me?
我正打算来同你道别，半路就撞上了这番景象。
Well, I was actually on my way to bid farewell to you, but ended up running into this.
Oh... That's quite an honor, I suppose.
最好还是别让他们等太久了，你说呢？
We better not leave them waiting too long, don't you think?
从这里到悬锋城，路途漫长。
The road to Castrum Kremnos from here is long.
多花些时间，最后一次看清他们的脸孔…未尝不可。
Perhaps it wouldn't be a bad idea... to take a moment and etch their faces in my memory one last time.
Alright... It's about time for us to part ways.
还有什么告别的话想说吗？这没准是最后的机会了。
Any final goodbyes you want to share? This might be your last chance.
…怎么不出声了？我还以为神性会冲淡人的多愁善感。
...Why so quiet? I thought divinity would wash away some of your sentiments.
你的心情果真如此轻松？亦或者…这又是你披上的伪装？
Do you truly feel as carefree as you seem? Or... is this just a facade you wear?
…你现在的语气像极了阿格莱雅，知道吗？
...You know what, you sound just like Aglaea at this moment.
不过…你没说错。我只是觉得，这种场合，强装轻松可能会显得更体面些。
But you're not off the mark... I just thought putting on a nonchalant front for this occasion might help us preserve some dignity.
我无需读心的能力，也能戳穿你的把戏。
I can see through your deception even without the power of mind-reading.
我的表情管理就这么差劲？
Am I really that terrible at controlling my facial expressions?
但话都说到这份上了…感谢你助我手刃仇敌，迈德漠斯。
Well, with that said... thank you for aiding me in defeating my archenemy, Mydeimos.
这场胜利并无实感，也远非结束——你比我更清楚。
This triumph brings no delight, nor does it signify closure — you understand that more than me.
…是啊。到头来，我依旧没能弄清那黑袍剑士的来历，甚至连它的死亡都无法确信。
...Indeed. In the end, I still haven't unraveled the mystery behind that black-robed swordmaster, and I can't even ascertain their demise.
也许，我根本没有斩断自己的宿命。
Maybe I've never managed to cut off my destiny.
但那不重要。痛苦可以治愈，伤痕却不能，也不应被磨灭。即便借助{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神力，过去也会在视线的死角留下蛛丝马迹。

But that matters not. Pain may be cured, but scars remain, and they should not be effaced. Even with the divine might of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, you cannot stop the past from leaving its marks in our blind spots.
就算斩杀了那黑衣人，你心中的失落便能一笔勾销？不可能。复仇只是一件必须被完成的任务，但没有人能通过它得到心灵的满足。

Can you genuinely let go of everything as soon as that swordmaster is dead? That's impossible. Revenge is merely an obligation that must be carried out, and no one can find mental fulfillment through it.
向前看。把你的过往嚼碎、咽下，勿让空虚与苦涩成为你唯一熟知的滋味。
Look forward. Chew up and swallow your past, then make sure emptiness and bitterness are not the only flavors you know.
别忘了，你身后还有一整个世界等着被拯救。
Remember that there is a whole world behind you waiting to be saved.
I will keep that in mind.
最后一个要求，代我照顾好悬锋的战士们。
I have a final favor to ask: Please look after the Kremnoan warriors in my absence.
融入奥赫玛的过程中，他们一定会遇到阻力…我唯一的遗憾，便是无法与他们同担这段时光。
They will undoubtedly face challenges while assimilating into Okhema... It is my sole regret that I cannot stand by them during this time.
Do not worry. Leave it to me.
我倒要找他们确认下，看看悬锋人的字典里是不是真的缺了那么多词语。
And while I'm at it, I'm going to find out if the Kremnoan language is really missing that many words.
哼，悬锋人的哲学从来不以字典彰显。
Hmph, the Kremnoan philosophy can never be encapsulated in a mere dictionary.
但…来世若有机会，来我的图书馆多看看吧。
But... if there's a chance in the next life, you should come visit my library.
走了，救世主——记得活到最后。
I'll be on my way, Deliverer. Remember to stay alive till the final act.
Same goes for you. Don't die too easily —
祝你战无不胜，迈德漠斯。
May triumph always be yours, Mydeimos.
Go ahead. You better not leave any regrets behind.
告诉哈托努斯那枚印戒存在的人，就是你吧？
Are you the one who told Chartonus about the signet ring?
站起来，孩子！你打得很勇敢，今天的训练就到这里。
Get up, my son! You showed great courage in today's training. Let's wrap it up for now.
Mother... There's something I want to ask you.
为什么我们生来就要学习战斗？
Why must we learn to fight?
为了荣耀，孩子。悬锋人一出生便认得剑和矛，战场是我们的归宿……
It is for glory and honor, my son. For Kremnoans, mastery of swords and spears is ingrained from birth, and the battlefield is our destined end.
Is that really the way it is, Mother?
因为你听上去不太肯定。
Because you don't sound entirely sure.
我曾盲信那些字句，直到你的父亲将你抛入冥海。
I once believed those words without question until your father cast you into the Sea of Souls.
那时我才发现，自己信奉的一切都脆弱不堪。也许悬锋精神真的存在过…但随着贪欲之花绽放，它早已随我们的荣耀一同凋零了。

It was at that moment I realized how everything I believed in was utterly hollow. Perhaps the spirit of Kremnos had once existed... but as greed bloomed in the hearts of humanity over the years, such spirit had long faded alongside our glory.
我不再相信任何誓言或教条。现在，我的身份只剩下一个——
I no longer put my faith in any oath or doctrine. Now, I have just one role...
那就是你的母亲，迈德漠斯，你的守护者……
That of your mother, Mydeimos. Your guardian...
…梦总会结束于此。返回悬锋城的路途也比我预想更久。
...That dream always ends there. The journey back to Castrum Kremnos is proving to be longer than expected.
克拉特鲁斯说，在我坠海后不久，母亲便向先王发起了角斗——她死于父亲的毒计，我与她素未谋面。
Krateros said that, shortly after my fall into the sea, my mother challenged my father to a duel — She died through Father's treachery, and I never saw her face.
但她会在每个夜晚出现，等候在朦胧的火光中。我始终在等待梦的后续，以为她一定还会留下更多嘱托，或者指引……
Yet each night, she would show up, waiting by the flickering firelight. I always anticipated the sequel to that dream, believing she had more words of wisdom or guidance to offer...
但现在…我似乎明白了。这便是她想对我表达的全部。
But now... I think I have finally come to understand. That is all she wished to tell me.
如今，我只剩下一个身份……
And now, I too am left with but one role...
光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年 平衡月\n「纷争」之泰坦，天谴之矛，尼卡多利陨落。悬锋之王迈德漠斯战胜试炼，新神诞生。
Year <unbreak>4931</unbreak> of the Light Calendar, Month of Balance\nNikador — the Strife Titan, Lance of Fury — fell. Mydeimos, king of Kremnos, triumphed over the trial, and the new god was born.
是日，悬锋千年王朝宣告终结。
On that day, the Kremnoan dynasty, which had lasted for a thousand years, came to an end.
There are some people to meet with before I leave.
错啦！迈德漠斯殿下已经不是王子了…他是<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的守护者</color>！
Hold on! Lord Mydeimos isn't the prince anymore... He's now <color=#dbc291ff>the Guardian of Amphoreus</color>!
向翁法罗斯的守护者——致敬——！
We salute the Guardian of Amphoreus!
Return home on our behalf, Guardian!
We dedicate our lives to following you.
You will forever be our king.
You will forever be our king.
We dedicate our lives to following you.
愿你战无不胜，悬锋的王。
May triumph always be yours, King of Kremnos.
请为我们抵御黑潮，守护者…
Please fend off the black tide for us, Guardian...
荣耀属于你，歌耳戈之子！
Glory belongs to you, son of Gorgo!
我想…「纷争」的神也许该改名了。
I'm thinking... Maybe it's about time the god of "Strife" gets a new name.
「团结」的神，如何？或者…「存护」？这名字是丹恒告诉我的。
How about the god of "Solidarity"? Or... "Preservation"? Dan Heng mentioned that one to me.
我劝你远离任何需要起名的场合。
I recommend that you steer clear of any situation that calls for naming things.
哈…看来还是「纷争」更适合你。
Hah... I suppose "Strife" still fits you better.
那…旅途也该抵达终点了。
It is time for this journey to reach its end.
新鲜的石榴汁，一起尝尝嘛？
We've got fresh pomegranate juice. Want to try some?
Say! Come and check out what I just wrote...
迈德漠斯！你刚训练回来吗？
Mydeimos! Did you just come back from training?
你也找到值得守护之物了吗？
Have you found something deserving of your protection as well?
I look forward to fighting beside you!
I'm going to beat you at the festival!
杀声震天啊，这可不像那刻夏老师一个人能搞出来的动静。
That's the sound of an all-out war. Not the kind of ruckus Professor Anaxa can raise on his own.
加快脚步吧，战场就在前方。
Let's hurry. The battlefield is just ahead.
这些人里…好像不止有悬锋一族。
I think I see... more than just the Kremnoans here.
你现在可是「翁法罗斯」的守护者。
You're now the Guardian of Amphoreus, after all.
与此同时 云石天宫某处
真没想到她能派悬锋人来助阵。勇敢的战士，前线战况如何？
I didn't think she'd manage to send the Kremnoans to assist. Brave warrior, what's the situation on the front line?
为什么…阿格莱雅没告诉你们吗？我们受命前来协助各位，围猎盗火行者。
What...? Didn't Aglaea tell you? We have been instructed to assist you in trapping the Flame Reaver.
阿格莱雅…天杀的僭主，我呸！
Aglaea... That vile tyrant! I spit on her name!
我们的王…就要回来了。如果是他，一定能把你们…那个黑衣的……
Our king... will be back soon... He'll be able to... deal with you... and that black-robed...
嘶哑的詈骂郁在他的喉头，迟迟不发。不多时，此人痉挛着，头颅垂落，魂息飘离肢体，向{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的府邸而去。

A hoarse curse lodged in his throat, refusing to escape. Moments later, he convulsed, his head drooping as his spirit departed his body, drifting towards the abode of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.
悬锋人…果真和他们的王如出一辙。
...The Kremnoans really are just like their king.
安息吧，愿你的荣光长存。
Rest in peace. May your glory last forever.
还记得之前万敌说的话，身在战场，就要抛却杂念……
But remember what Mydei said before? "Cast aside all distractions once you're on the battlefield"...
上吧，搭档——今日，命运会站在我们这边！
Let's go, partner! Today, destiny shall stand with us!
尼卡多利站在我们这边！
We won't bring dishonor to the king!
That sound... It pierces my ears...
但…传言是真的吗？{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}陨落了？
But... are the rumors true? Has {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} fallen?
和元老院说的一样，大敌当前，黄金裔只会引发更多战乱，而不是考虑民众的安危……
It's as the Council of Elders said. We face a dangerous threat, yet the Chrysos Heirs are only inciting more chaos. They don't care about the people's safety...
「纷争」的火种，最终还是给了悬锋人啊……
They really gave the Coreflame of "Strife" to a Kremnoan at the end...
应该…是因为{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的离去吧。
It's probably because {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is gone...
在世人眼中，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}一直是位慷慨的泰坦。它降下神迹，允许人们从过往中捞取便利……
{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} was a generous Titan in the eyes of the people. They graced us with miracles, allowing humanity to reap many a convenience from the past...
但他们不知道，那位泰坦的「慷慨」并非自愿。
What they don't know is that the Titan didn't do all of that of its own volition.
…无论如何，泰坦之死已成定局。我们得归还{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的火种。
Regardless, the Titan has fallen, and we must surrender {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame.
呵…这么快又要去见那女人了，看来属于我的劫难远未到头啊。
Heh... a meeting with that woman again so soon? I just can't catch a break.
那刻夏老师，我想…不如你先找个地方休息片刻？
Professor Anaxa, why don't you... find someplace to rest first?
眼下需要阿格莱雅定夺的事已经扎堆了，再让你们俩见面——说得直接些，难免会分散她的精力。
Matters that require Aglaea's attention are piling up. You two meeting again will — forgive my honesty — only distract her.
只是，你最好表现得…安分一些。你明白我的意思。
Just... try to stay on your best behavior, if you know what I mean.
这恐怕由不得我。打踏入圣城的那一刻起，我就已经在她的监牢里了。谁让我的脑袋里住下了一位泰坦呢？
That's not up to me, I'm afraid. I've been trapped in her prison the moment I set foot in this holy city. The price of having a Titan living in my head, I suppose.
放心吧，我不想自讨苦吃。
Don't worry. I don't want trouble either.
他和阿格莱雅就那么不对付？
He and Aglaea don't get along, huh?
只是一些理念上的差异……
好吧，这么说是有些轻描淡写了。别担心，你迟早会搞明白这些人际关系的。
Alright, I suppose that's putting it lightly. Don't worry, you'll figure out the intricacies of these relationships sooner or later.
那刻夏老师只是有些…桀骜不驯。别担心，你会习惯的。
Professor Anaxa can be a bit... Unrestrained. Don't worry. You'll get used to it.
处置{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，想必不需要我在场。先告辞了，我还有些私事要处理。
I'm sure you don't need my help handling {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame, so I'll be off. I have some personal matters to attend to.
小敌…总觉得完成试炼后，他的背影变得更孤单了。
It somehow feels like De has closed himself off even more after he completed his trial.
是啊。这短短几日，真是发生了好多事……
Yeah. A lot has happened in the past few days...
缇宝老师，从刚才开始，你也一副沉思的样子，是缇宁捎来了什么消息么？
You've been lost in thought for a while now too, Tribbie. Did Trinnon bring news?
…在神殿外的山壑下。可惜，是个坏消息。
...She was at the bottom of the valley outside the temple. But... that's where the good news ends.
没关系。不过除了缇安，现场还发现了另一个人……
It's alright. They also found someone else besides Trianne.
缇宁和风堇赶到的时候，那人已经和尸体无异了。他承受千刀万剐，又跳下万丈深崖，硬是将缇安的身躯带离了黑衣剑士的魔爪。

He was no better than a corpse when Trinnon and Hyacine arrived. He had suffered more cuts than could be counted and leaped off a cliff from a great height, all to free Trianne's body from the clutches of the black-robed swordmaster.
竟然还有这等勇士？能辨识出他的身份吗？
What a brave soul. Do we know who he is?
想取这女孩的性命？先跨越我的尸体。
If you want this girl dead, you'll have to kill me first.
可笑…血肉之躯，能接下哪怕一击？
How ludicrous... Your body, made of flesh and blood as it is, will not survive more than a single strike from me.
「宁战死，毋荣归」——我生而为悬锋人，何时惧怕过死亡？
"Valorous Death Before Glorious Return." As a Kremnoan, I know not the fear of death.
失去神力的空壳，我没兴趣……
She's lost her divinity. I have no interest in an empty shell.
但回答我，纷争之子，缘何，为她架起盾牌？
But answer me this, child of Strife. Why do you raise your shield for her?
我身为神盾旅的冠军勇士之首，曾手持这面圆盾，在黑潮面前为国王保驾护航，千千万万次……
